Randy Macchi, the director of Houston Public Works, said an engineer advised him to stop telling residents the city would make the fixes in 30 days because they didn’t think it was possible. “We're excited about this because we know it can be done,” Macchi said." ($) | TRUMP ADMINISTRATION “President Trump to tour Texas this week after deadly flooding. Here’s when, ” via AP \-- “White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt said President Donald Trump will be visiting the devastating flooding in Texas “later this week.” She called what happened a “once in a generation national disaster” and urged “everyone in the area to remain vigilant, listen to all warnings and respond accordingly.” Leavitt said the visit would likely come Friday, but that no final decision had been made." “White House defends national forecasting agency amid questions about warnings, response to Texas floods, ” Texas Tribune's Alejandro Serrano \-- “The White House defended its national forecast agency on Monday ahead of an expected visit from President Donald Trump to Central Texas and as questions have emerged about the response to weather warnings ahead of the deadly flooding that killed at least 90 people in the region. White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt said Monday the National Weather Service offices were adequately staffed and "executed timely and precise forecasts and warnings." "To any person who has deliberately lied about these facts surrounding this catastrophic event, you should be deeply ashamed at this time," Leavitt said, blasting media members and Democrats like Sen. Chuck Schumer who have criticized Trump after the floods. "The administration's focus will be on giving the victims in their communities the support they deserve during these recovery efforts in this tragic time." Schumer, the Senate Minority Leader, sent a to the Commerce Department’s acting Inspector General calling for an investigation into whether staffing shortages at NWS contributed to the scope of the devastation. Schumer specifically asked if the NWS’ San Antonio office is adequately equipped to handle future extreme weather events after recent nationwide staffing cuts. He also asked if restored staffing could improve the agency’s forecasting and coordination abilities. Emergency officials on Monday continued searching for people who remain missing. Trump is expected to visit the region later in the week, Leavitt said. In the aftermath of the floods, local and state officials were to weather forecasts that did not accurately predict the intensity of the rainfall. Meanwhile, some forecasters suggested that local officials and camp leadership should have activated more given the threats that were apparent. The National Weather Service issued a flood watch Thursday afternoon, predicting up to seven inches of isolated rainfall early Friday morning. At 1:14 a.m. Friday, the NWS issued the first flash flood warning. At 4:03 a.m., the NWS issued a flash flood emergency, warning of an “extremely dangerous and life-threatening situation.” The flooding came amid concerns about staffing levels at the NWS, after the Trump administration this year as part of Elon Musk’s DOGE cuts. The NWS Austin/San Antonio office’s warning coordination meteorologist announced in April that he was retiring early due to the funding cuts, leading to speculation that vacancies could have impacted forecasters’ response. The NWS forecasting offices were operating normally at the time of the disaster, Greg Waller, service coordination hydrologist with the NWS West Gulf River Forecast Center in Fort Worth, said this weekend. “We had adequate staffing. We had adequate technology,” Waller said. “This was us doing our job to the best of our abilities.” During a press conference Monday, U.S. Sen.Ted Cruz said, "There will naturally be a period of retrospection" after the search and rescue process. “It should not happen in a bitter and partisan sense. It should happen in a reasonable sense to say, what can we learn?” he said." | TEXANS IN DC “Ted Cruz was vacationing in Greece when the deadly Texas floods broke out. His office says he took the first flight home, ” Texas Tribune's Owen Dahlkamp andGabby Birenbaum \-- “As Texans woke up July 4 to the news that flooding in the Hill Country had turned deadly, Sen. Ted Cruz was on a pre-planned vacation in Greece with his family. The senator arrived back in Texas late Sunday night — the soonest he was able to return, according to a spokesperson for his office. Cruz was morning — evening, in Greece — visiting the Parthenon in Athens. “The Senator was already in the middle of preplanned family vacation travel overseas when the flooding occurred on July 4,” the spokesperson said, noting Cruz spoke with federal and state officials within hours of the flood to coordinate federal resources for the search-and-rescue effort. Cruz and his team also “worked closely with local officials and with families of missing girls throughout that time,” the spokesperson said. Cruz’s office declined to say when he purchased his flight home. His spokesperson also declined to say when Cruz boarded his return flight or arrived in Texas, specifying only that he left Greece “early Sunday” Central time and landed in San Antonio “late Sunday.” His flight took off about a day and a half after local officials announced the death toll had reached 24 with many still missing. Cruz made his first on-site appearance Monday morning, hours before a detailed the senator’s Athens visit and set off social media backlash, with some invoking Cruz’s 2021 trip to Cancún in the midst of Winter Storm Uri. During that episode, the senator left Texas after the storm had hit and as many residents lacked power and water, which he was “obviously a mistake.” From Greece, Cruz helped coordinate the federal response, speaking Friday afternoon Central time with President Donald Trump , Gov. Greg Abbott and Texas Division of Emergency Management Chief Nim Kidd , according to his office. Meanwhile in Texas, Sen. John Cornyn and Rep. Chip Roy , R-Austin, joined emergency officials in Kerrville on Saturday for an on-the-ground briefing and to provide updates alongside Homeland Security SecretaryKristi Noem and state officials. While in Kerrville, Cruz surveyed the damage, attended a press conference and appeared on Fox News. He noted that his daughters had long attended a summer camp near Camp Mystic — and that he had been in the area last week to pick one of them up." | NEWS FROM AROUND THE STATE DMN: "Trump signs disaster declaration, activates federal aid to Kerr County " KXAN: "Abbott: Special session may address warnings after deadly Texas floods " HOU CHRON: "' I'll call ICE': Undocumented Houston construction workers face rising risks" KXAN: "Gold, silver become legal tender in Texas under new law " FWST: "What can Texas do about floods? Plenty. Lessons ignored from 1987 bus disaster | Opinion " FWST: "Texas Gov. Greg Abbott gives update on deadly floods " SA REPORT: "Texas allocates $3M to Bexar County for helicopter to support anti-gang operations " HOU CHRON: "Texas flooding: Kerr County deaths rise to 68, including 28 children " HOU CHRON: "Sisters found dead with their 'hands locked together' after Hill Country floods" DMN: "Search for survivors continues following deadly Central Texas flooding " HOU CHRON: "' Beloved' Humble ISD teacher confirmed dead in Hill Country floods; wife and son still missing" HOU CHRON: "Who are the Camp Mystic girls missing, lost after devastating floods in Texas? " SAEN: "' Last act of kindness': Camp Mystic owner died trying to save campers" AAS: "Texas flooding deaths hit at least 70: Here 's how you can help" TX TRIB: "As the floodwaters recede, Kerrville confronts the devastation " MRT: "What to know about the flash floods in Texas that killed more than 80 people " FWST: "Flood watch affecting Johnson and Hill counties until Sunday evening caused by heavy rain " FWST: "UPDATE: Flash flood warning in place for Johnson and Tarrant counties Sunday afternoon " HOU CHRON: "Video: League City woman rescued from flood after clinging to tree for 5 hours " MRT: "Alert: Texas sheriff says deaths from flooding rise to 27 people, including 9 children, as search efforts continue " FWST: "UPDATE: Flood advisory affecting Johnson and Tarrant counties until Sunday afternoon " MRT: "Texas officials face scrutiny over response to deadly flooding " DMN: "Dallas Cowboys pledge donation for victims of flooding in Texas Hill Country " MRT: "The places where deadly Texas floodwaters have killed more than 80 people " FWST: "Misfire at illegal fireworks show on street kills 8-year-old, California cops say " DMN: "Did Texas officials do enough to prevent flood devastation? " FWST: "1 person fatally shot in domestic dispute at south Fort Worth home, police say " MRT: "Death toll in central Texas flash floods rises to 82 as sheriff says 10 campers remain missing " COMMUNITY IMPACT: "1 dead, 2 missing in Williamson County after July 5 floods " SA REPORT: "Hill Country flooding death toll rises to at least 70 as search continues for missing girls, other survivors " | EXTRA POINTS Recent Texas sports schedule: Fri MLB: San Diego 3, Texas 2 MLS: Minnesota 2, Dallas 1 MLB: Houston 18, LA 1 Sat MLB: Houston 6, LA 4 MLS: LA FC at Austin (PPD) MLB: Texas 7, San Diego 4 MLS: Houston 4, San Diego 3 Sun MLB: Houston 5, LA 1 MLB: San Diego 4, Texas 1 Tonight's Texas sports schedule: 7:10pm: MLB: Cleveland at Houston 8:38pm: MLB: Texas at Los Angeles (Angels) 9pm: WNBA: Dallas at Phoenix Tomorrow's Texas sports schedule: 7:10pm: MLB: Cleveland at Houston 8:38pm: MLB: Texas at Los Angeles (Angels) HOUSTON ASTROS : "Another day, another unheralded star as Houston Astros keep rolling: 'The standard is winning'" ($) HOUSTON ASTROS : “Astros first baseman Christian Walker is on paternity leave; Kenedy Corona recalled" TEXAS RANGERS : “All-Star Tatis leads the Padres to a 4-1 win against the Rangers" HOUSTON ROCKETS : "GM Stone thrilled to add Kevin Durant to Rockets despite tough decision to move on from Jalen Green" BIG 12 FOOTBALL : "Arizona State QB Leavitt and Texas Tech LB Rodriguez are preseason Big 12 players of year" DALLAS WINGS : "Wings-Fever returning to AAC, setting up Caitlin Clark vs. Paige Bueckers in Dallas" ($) | | | | Update your email preferences or unsubscribe (C) 2025 Must Read Texas 228 Park Ave S, #29976, New York, New York 10003, United States |

* * *
### **Dispatch From a Dead Republic, And Empire**
**Rome, July 8th**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/11c9257c-c4d6-40b7-92e5-32c2abb4c611?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Hey folks, I'm writing to you from Rome. A planned trip to one of my favorite cities, but who the hell knew so much of its glorious and not-as-glorious past would be so germane at this very moment.
There's an eerie feeling to writing this from over here as I see President mentula magna talk about hating Democrats. And Democrats supposedly hating America.
The childish blather exiting his never-closing cakehole is, of course, the talk of tyrants. And I'm in a place where tyrants took one of the most impressive creations in the history of the world--this republic--and tossed it aside for the simplicity and supposed security of dictatorship.
Sound kinda familiar?
President Trump, it was just announced, is planning an Ultimate Fighting Championship (UFC) bout on White House grounds for next 4th of July. That'll be our teetering republic's 250th anniversary, should we make it.
And all I can think about upon seeing that nitwit-created news, with the Colosseum looming over me, and that bollocks budget passed by a corrupt-to-the-core cult of limp-d*k, dictator wannabes called The GOP...is "bread and circuses."
[](https://substack.com/redirect/3b71954a-4375-46dd-b3e6-a39b367bf8ee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
As Rome struggled with its identity--would it continue to be a republic or become a dictatorship?--it was Marcus Tullius Cicero, brilliant Roman statesman, lawyer, scholar, philosopher, orator and writer who used the now infamous phrase. And for the very reasons it applies to the Trump Show--sponsored by corporate media access-whores--which is in the process of assaulting the very foundations of _our republic_.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7b171fe9-9ec4-4bbc-89c9-127e95cb774e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Here's how Cicero put it:
> The evil was not in the bread and circuses, per se, but in the willingness of the people to sell their rights as free men for full bellies and the excitement of the games which would serve to distract them from the other human hungers which bread and circuses can never appease."
What's amazing is MAGA is ok with _just_ circuses. They don't even need the bread, as they proved by just cutting food assistance to adults and SNAP-program lunches for kids--yes, kids, like many of the flood victims in Texas. This was part of Trump's big, stupid, dumb, corrupt and apparently, big, budget bill that felt more like a mass human sacrifice to Moloch.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c2d695d9-47eb-4f00-bbc1-6d98c450e8b5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Whether Trump's insulting an ally or planning a UFC fight at the White House, it's the never-ending drama of the biggest culus in the world. A man who puts the dedication into hurting his voters that Kristi Noem puts into ensuring her face can't move and Ted Cruz does into vacationing while Texas is being crushed by a natural disaster.
As long as they distract the poor and powerless, billionaire Trump BFFs could and can steal everything that isn't nailed down (and they'll remove some nails if necessary). Because, if they keep MAGAs entertained and even barely fed, if at all, they'll stop asking questions as long as they're told who to hate and who's to blame.
From gladiators in the arena to the UFC at the White House, this isn't theory anymore, folks. It's prophecy.
The ruins here in Rome are reminders--of emperors like Nero who let Rome burn, and Julius Caesar, who transformed a republic into a dictatorship. More recently, Mussolini, the fascist who turned Rome and the rest of Italy into a bright red (MAGA hat) warning sign for the rest of the world.
And now? In America? We're blowing past those warning signs by people who seem to have turned Fox News into crushed, sniff-able form, and are so rage-addicted, Republicans can let their freak flag flyand party like it's 476 AD.
What do I mean? Well, back home in good ole U.S., they just authorized **$45 billion more for ICE, Trump 's secret police**. Forty-five **billion** --not for food, not for healthcare, not for schools or clean water or helping kids in poverty. No, it's for armored stormtroopers who won't show their faces, surveillance and domestic militarization.
It's corporate-media catnip, my friends, kidnapping humans off our streets, especially if you can get it on camera! Meanwhile, we hand out catchy names and slogans that would amuse toddlers as part of the "circuses" plan.
While switching off between a Marlboro Red and the glazed chocolate donut with the sprinkles, just before scratching some belly-lint, Ma & Pa MAGA can yell "F*k Yeah!" About what else but _Alligator Alcatraz_ --a concentration camp for migrant families in the Everglades!
What a cool name, right!? How entertaining, torturing our fellow human beings! And that name, right? Almost as good as Operation Midnight Hammer, where Trump got to bomb Iran with the kinda success he's used to fronting with the Trump Taj Mahal or creating Eric.
Now Trump's talking about active duty Marines helping ICE, which as you may know, violates U.S. law--the Posse Comitatus Act. And there's a reason that law was put in place. Back to the lessons of Rome again! Julius Caesar took Rome, and then took it into autocracy, by crossing the Rubicon River with troops, entering Rome in defiance of law.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e8e4da71-425f-4194-bedd-449c623b9517?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
There is a reason you've heard and likely used the phrase "crossing the Rubicon" yourself. Because the moment Caesar committed that act of treason, Rome was done for. His treacherous act became a lasting symbol for **a point of no return**.
Well, folks, we're getting pretty close to crossing ours.
I don't say this lightly. But from this amazing city, surrounded by literal ruins, you can _feel_ _a future we all dread_ closing in on America like a lion unleashed on a gazelle.
You can see it coming, if you're willing to look:
* Breadlines replaced by TikTok brawls.
* SNAP benefits gutted while billionaires get tax cuts and fund right-wing militias.
* A democracy willingly collapsing, because so many couldn't stop worshipping _not an evil man with an amazing ability to act otherwise_. No, the most transparently stupid, cruel, gaudy, ignorant, repulsive, child-like clown to ever hold power.

This is how may end. Not with a bang, but with the biggest clown running the biggest of those circuses.
**But it doesn 't **_**have**_**to be this way.**
**Not if we name it. Not if we fight it. Not if we support media that dares confront it.**
**Blue Amp is one of those few who will** _**not**_**look away.** We'll keep shouting about the rising fascism, the constitutional betrayals, the gaslighting, the inhumanity. _**[But we need you to help us stay in this fight](https://substack.com/redirect/231c546a-e6ea-4435-aa76-7c4d02dd26f0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).**_
If you've ever thought, "I wish I could do more to stop this," _**this is your chance**_.
Support Blue Amp, and keep _this_ republic--_ours_ --from becoming the ruins of future generations [by backing ](https://substack.com/redirect/231c546a-e6ea-4435-aa76-7c4d02dd26f0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) **The** **Soundcheck Fund**. How? It's easy, just become a paid subscriber! _Help us build the resistance media America will need_!
We still have time. But not much as you'd think.

_**Amplify Good. Support Indy Media!**_

### _**... Yo, Check This Out!**_
### 📍 What's Going On in Texas - The Human Cost Meets the Political Cost
* **Deadly flash floods in Central Texas** (July 4-7) have claimed over **80 lives** , including **28 children** from Camp Mystic, a girls' summer camp near the Guadalupe River.
* The National Weather Service (NWS) _did issue alerts_ --including flash-flood emergencies with several hours' notice. But the warnings **underestimated the scale of the rainfall** , and many campers and residents **never received timely evacuation orders**.
* Local officials had long sought **sirens and enhanced alert systems** , but Kerr County's repeated grant applications (2018-2021) were dismissed, reportedly due to **state and federal underfunding**.
* The Texas Tribune and other outlets have flagged a 10% **staff cut at NOAA/NWS** , with critical roles like lead meteorologists left **vacant during storm season**.
* Former NOAA directors cautioned these reductions **degrade forecasting capabilities**. Meteorologists warn coordination between federal forecasters and local authorities was **significantly weakened**.
* Critics contend: The **buck stops at the President**. Truman had a sign saying exactly that--now Trump's scaling back of NOAA & FEMA, plus overriding local pleas, means **when systems fail and kids die** , responsibility lies at the top.

* * *
### Accountability & What Comes Next
* **Donald Trump declared a federal disaster** , activated FEMA and Coast Guard, and plans to visit the region--but **NWS staffing cuts and under-resourced warning systems** remain central to the mounting tragedy.
* His administration **implausibly denies** that budget cuts hampered preparedness--despite mounting evidence, investigations by Rep. Joaquin Castro, local officials, and former NOAA staff.
* **Structural equipment failures** --like lack of sirens and patchy CodeRED alerts--underscore how **federal choices funnel down to local catastrophes** , especially when the President opts for cuts over investment.
* If this tragedy doesn't compel **significant federal reinvestment in NOAA, FEMA, and local emergency infrastructure** , the next flood--or fire, or heatwave--won't just traumatize communities, it'll **end more lives**.

We'll continue to follow how the White House responds--and whether communities, Congress, and media start demanding real consequences for these deadly failures.

To the neon god they made - Simon And Garfunkel, "The Sound of Silence" | | | Jul 8 | | | | | | | | | | | | THE BLUE LETTER | | ---|---|--- Blue Amp 's building something big. ! We launched The Soundcheck Fund (TSF) to elevate independent voicesand build an ecosystem of bold, hard-hitting journalists, video producers & commentators. And join a movement that won 't be stopped! 🔵 Subscribe now! Power indy media & ourdemocratic future! Dispatch From a Dead Republic, And Empire Rome, July 8th | | ---|---|--- Hey folks, I'm writing to you from Rome. A planned trip to one of my favorite cities, but who the hell knew so much of its glorious and not-as-glorious past would be so germane at this very moment. There's an eerie feeling to writing this from over here as I see President mentula magna talk about hating Democrats. And Democrats supposedly hating America. The childish blather exiting his never-closing cakehole is, of course, the talk of tyrants. And I'm in a place where tyrants took one of the most impressive creations in the history of the world--this republic--and tossed it aside for the simplicity and supposed security of dictatorship. Sound kinda familiar? President Trump, it was just announced, is planning an Ultimate Fighting Championship (UFC) bout on White House grounds for next 4th of July. That'll be our teetering republic's 250th anniversary, should we make it. And all I can think about upon seeing that nitwit-created news, with the Colosseum looming over me, and that bollocks budget passed by a corrupt-to-the-core cult of limp-dk, dictator wannabes called The GOP...is "bread and circuses." As Rome struggled with its identity--would it continue to be a republic or become a dictatorship?--it was Marcus Tullius Cicero, brilliant Roman statesman, lawyer, scholar, philosopher, orator and writer who used the now infamous phrase. And for the very reasons it applies to the Trump Show--sponsored by corporate media access-whores--which is in the process of assaulting the very foundations of our republic. | | ---|---|--- Here's how Cicero put it: The evil was not in the bread and circuses, per se, but in the willingness of the people to sell their rights as free men for full bellies and the excitement of the games which would serve to distract them from the other human hungers which bread and circuses can never appease." What's amazing is MAGA is ok with just circuses. They don't even need the bread, as they proved by just cutting food assistance to adults and SNAP-program lunches for kids--yes, kids, like many of the flood victims in Texas. This was part of Trump's big, stupid, dumb, corrupt and apparently, big, budget bill that felt more like a mass human sacrifice to Moloch. | | ---|---|--- Whether Trump's insulting an ally or planning a UFC fight at the White House, it's the never-ending drama of the biggest culus in the world. A man who puts the dedication into hurting his voters that Kristi Noem puts into ensuring her face can't move and Ted Cruz does into vacationing while Texas is being crushed by a natural disaster. As long as they distract the poor and powerless, billionaire Trump BFFs could and can steal everything that isn't nailed down (and they'll remove some nails if necessary). Because, if they keep MAGAs entertained and even barely fed, if at all, they'll stop asking questions as long as they're told who to hate and who's to blame. From gladiators in the arena to the UFC at the White House, this isn't theory anymore, folks. It's prophecy. The ruins here in Rome are reminders--of emperors like Nero who let Rome burn, and Julius Caesar, who transformed a republic into a dictatorship. More recently, Mussolini, the fascist who turned Rome and the rest of Italy into a bright red (MAGA hat) warning sign for the rest of the world. And now? In America? We're blowing past those warning signs by people who seem to have turned Fox News into crushed, sniff-able form, and are so rage-addicted, Republicans can let their freak flag flyand party like it's 476 AD. What do I mean? Well, back home in good ole U.S., they just authorized $45 billion more for ICE, Trump 's secret police. Forty-five billion --not for food, not for healthcare, not for schools or clean water or helping kids in poverty. No, it's for armored stormtroopers who won't show their faces, surveillance and domestic militarization. It's corporate-media catnip, my friends, kidnapping humans off our streets, especially if you can get it on camera! Meanwhile, we hand out catchy names and slogans that would amuse toddlers as part of the "circuses" plan. While switching off between a Marlboro Red and the glazed chocolate donut with the sprinkles, just before scratching some belly-lint, Ma & Pa MAGA can yell "Fk Yeah!" About what else but Alligator Alcatraz --a concentration camp for migrant families in the Everglades! What a cool name, right!? How entertaining, torturing our fellow human beings! And that name, right? Almost as good as Operation Midnight Hammer, where Trump got to bomb Iran with the kinda success he's used to fronting with the Trump Taj Mahal or creating Eric. Now Trump's talking about active duty Marines helping ICE, which as you may know, violates U.S. law--the Posse Comitatus Act. And there's a reason that law was put in place. Back to the lessons of Rome again! Julius Caesar took Rome, and then took it into autocracy, by crossing the Rubicon River with troops, entering Rome in defiance of law. | | ---|---|--- There is a reason you've heard and likely used the phrase "crossing the Rubicon" yourself. Because the moment Caesar committed that act of treason, Rome was done for. His treacherous act became a lasting symbol for a point of no return. Well, folks, we're getting pretty close to crossing ours. I don't say this lightly. But from this amazing city, surrounded by literal ruins, you can feel a future we all dread closing in on America like a lion unleashed on a gazelle. You can see it coming, if you're willing to look: Breadlines replaced by TikTok brawls. SNAP benefits gutted while billionaires get tax cuts and fund right-wing militias. A democracy willingly collapsing, because so many couldn't stop worshipping not an evil man with an amazing ability to act otherwise. No, the most transparently stupid, cruel, gaudy, ignorant, repulsive, child-like clown to ever hold power. This is how may end. Not with a bang, but with the biggest clown running the biggest of those circuses. But it doesn 't haveto be this way. Not if we name it. Not if we fight it. Not if we support media that dares confront it. Blue Amp is one of those few who will notlook away. We'll keep shouting about the rising fascism, the constitutional betrayals, the gaslighting, the inhumanity. . If you've ever thought, "I wish I could do more to stop this," this is your chance. Support Blue Amp, and keep this republic--ours --from becoming the ruins of future generations The Soundcheck Fund. How? It's easy, just become a paid subscriber! Help us build the resistance media America will need! We still have time. But not much as you'd think. `Full Blue Amp Subscription For Just .26/Day!` Get The Truth corporate media ignores from a former Biden ad man & former Emmy-winning MSNBC anchor who know and will tell What Is Really Going On. And support our new Soundcheck Fund to help fund & promote independent media! Amplify Good. Support Indy Media! ... Yo, Check This Out! 📍 What's Going On in Texas - The Human Cost Meets the Political Cost Deadly flash floods in Central Texas (July 4-7) have claimed over 80 lives , including 28 children from Camp Mystic, a girls' summer camp near the Guadalupe River. The National Weather Service (NWS) did issue alerts --including flash-flood emergencies with several hours' notice. But the warnings underestimated the scale of the rainfall , and many campers and residents never received timely evacuation orders. Local officials had long sought sirens and enhanced alert systems , but Kerr County's repeated grant applications (2018-2021) were dismissed, reportedly due to state and federal underfunding. The Texas Tribune and other outlets have flagged a 10% staff cut at NOAA/NWS , with critical roles like lead meteorologists left vacant during storm season. Former NOAA directors cautioned these reductions degrade forecasting capabilities. Meteorologists warn coordination between federal forecasters and local authorities was significantly weakened. Critics contend: The buck stops at the President. Truman had a sign saying exactly that--now Trump's scaling back of NOAA & FEMA, plus overriding local pleas, means when systems fail and kids die , responsibility lies at the top. Accountability & What Comes Next Donald Trump declared a federal disaster , activated FEMA and Coast Guard, and plans to visit the region--but NWS staffing cuts and under-resourced warning systems remain central to the mounting tragedy. His administration implausibly denies that budget cuts hampered preparedness--despite mounting evidence, investigations by Rep. Joaquin Castro, local officials, and former NOAA staff. Structural equipment failures --like lack of sirens and patchy CodeRED alerts--underscore how federal choices funnel down to local catastrophes , especially when the President opts for cuts over investment. If this tragedy doesn't compel significant federal reinvestment in NOAA, FEMA, and local emergency infrastructure , the next flood--or fire, or heatwave--won't just traumatize communities, it'll end more lives. We'll continue to follow how the White House responds--and whether communities, Congress, and media start demanding real consequences for these deadly failures. 🎥 VIDEO ON DEMAND! Elizabeth Warren - A fighting Dem who gets you must always message, control the narrative, and make Republicans pay--publicly--for their lies and treachery: #### Thanks for Soundcheck Fund and new content! The Blue Letter will be back Friday!** You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | |

name: Message from Trump
subject: I just tried to call you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump National Committee JFC, Inc

subject: A summer recipe I hope you’ll try
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARLENE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111057928/556109918/-1882479441?refcode=LOC_EM_NOFR_2025.07.07_Summer-Recipe_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDI2ZTcwMjQtOTY1Yi1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Xt9zRG-so1TXNVWYwdZWCliJNHtTF6eFXL1DX-ksRGU=)
---
Hi! Growing up, I woke up and fell asleep to the aroma of cumin and garlic. They are two ingredients that show up in just about every Cuban dish — so I was thrilled to find this recipe online. Below is my adapted version. The _Cuban Crunch Salad_ can be a main course or a side salad. It’s a hearty, cool salad perfect for our hot summers in Arizona. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111057929/556109919/-74077192?refcode=LOC_EM_NOFR_2025.07.07_Summer-Recipe_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDI2ZTcwMjQtOTY1Yi1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Xt9zRG-so1TXNVWYwdZWCliJNHtTF6eFXL1DX-ksRGU=) **_Here are the ingredients you will need for the salad:_**
* 2 large cucumbers, cubed
* 2 ears of corn on the cob, husked
* 1⁄2 cup toasted slivered almonds
* 1 can of garbanzo beans (chickpeas) rinsed and drained
* 1⁄2 large red onion, minced
* 2 large avocados
* 4-5 cups cherry tomatoes, halved
* 2 cloves garlic, minced
* 1 bunch cilantro, minced

**_And for the vinaigrette:_**
* 1 tsp chili powder
* 1 tsp cumin
* 1 tsp smoked paprika
* 1 tsp garlic powder
* 1/4 tsp cayenne pepper
* 1/2 tsp kosher salt
* 1/2 tsp pepper
* 2 medium limes, juiced
* 2 tbsp red wine vinegar
* 2/3 cup olive oil

**_Here is how to make the Cuban Crunch salad:_** **For the Vinaigrette** In a medium bowl, combine all the ingredients and whisk them thoroughly until well combined. **For the Salad** Grill corn off the cob or have cooked canned corn. (Grilled is better. Trust me.) Combine corn with other salad ingredients — except the avocado and almonds — and then pour the vinaigrette over the vegetables. Cover the bowl and let the ingredients marinate for approximately one hour in the refrigerator. When ready to eat, add the diced avocado to the salad and top with slivered almonds. Stir gently to combine. _Let us know what you think._ From my family to yours, Marlene **P.S. Eating in the car happens a lot on our team, as we are often on the road meeting with voters in CD-1. (The Cuban Crunch Salad packs well!) We are determined to get the word out about my campaign to unseat David Schweikert.[_Can you pitch in any amount toward our efforts?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111057930/556109920/-74077192?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_NOFR_2025.07.07_Summer-Recipe_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDI2ZTcwMjQtOTY1Yi1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Xt9zRG-so1TXNVWYwdZWCliJNHtTF6eFXL1DX-ksRGU=)** | [DONATE >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111057931/556109921/-74077192?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_NOFR_2025.07.07_Summer-Recipe_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDI2ZTcwMjQtOTY1Yi1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Xt9zRG-so1TXNVWYwdZWCliJNHtTF6eFXL1DX-ksRGU=)
---

_This dish was adapted from[ _The Uncommon Dish’s Cuban Crunch Salad recipe_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111057932/556109922/-610866646?refcode=LOC_EM_NOFR_2025.07.07_Summer-Recipe_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDI2ZTcwMjQtOTY1Yi1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Xt9zRG-so1TXNVWYwdZWCliJNHtTF6eFXL1DX-ksRGU=&emci=53283f04-375b-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=426e7024-965b-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=626985) _.__

They are two ingredients that show up in just about every Cuban dish — so I was thrilled to find this recipe online. Below is my adapted version. The Cuban Crunch Salad can be a main course or a side salad. It’s a hearty, cool salad perfect for our hot summers in Arizona. = Here are the ingredients you will need for the salad: 2 large cucumbers, cubed 2 ears of corn on the cob, husked 1⁄2 cup toasted slivered almonds 1 can of garbanzo beans (chickpeas) rinsed and drained 1⁄2 large red onion, minced 2 large avocados 4-5 cups cherry tomatoes, halved 2 cloves garlic, minced 1 bunch cilantro, minced And for the vinaigrette: 1 tsp chili powder 1 tsp cumin 1 tsp smoked paprika 1 tsp garlic powder 1/4 tsp cayenne pepper 1/2 tsp kosher salt 1/2 tsp pepper 2 medium limes, juiced 2 tbsp red wine vinegar 2/3 cup olive oil Here is how to make the Cuban Crunch salad: For the Vinaigrette In a medium bowl, combine all the ingredients and whisk them thoroughly until well combined. For the Salad Grill corn off the cob or have cooked canned corn. (Grilled is better. Trust me.) Combine corn with other salad ingredients — except the avocado and almonds — and then pour the vinaigrette over the vegetables. Cover the bowl and let the ingredients marinate for approximately one hour in the refrigerator. When ready to eat, add the diced avocado to the salad and top with slivered almonds. Stir gently to combine. Let us know what you think. From my family to yours, Marlene P.S. Eating in the car happens a lot on our team, as we are often on the road meeting with voters in CD-1. (The Cuban Crunch Salad packs well!) We are determined to get the word out about my campaign to unseat David Schweikert.=** | = This dish was adapted from . | To learn more about Marlene, visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to PAID FOR BY MARLENE FOR CONGRESS Marlene for Congress 7904 E. Chaparral Road, Suite A110-472 Scottsdale, AZ 85250 United States

name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: A Devastating Tragedy — And the Truth You’re Not Hearing
body:
Special Episode of the No Doubt About It Podcast for dpwillis67@gmail.com

| | | | | |
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=ff0bb94a59&e=567664f14c)
| | | | | We’ve just released a powerful special edition of the No Doubt About It Podcast, and it’s one we hope you’ll make time for.

👉 [Click to Watch the Full Episode](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=77b7936170&e=567664f14c)
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=e379876582&e=567664f14c)
| **🎙️ In This Episode:
** We dedicate the majority of the show to the devastating Texas floods — and to the families and communities now trying to rebuild in the aftermath. But instead of unity and compassion, political opportunists are already trying to exploit the tragedy — blaming the National Weather Service, and even President Trump, for what happened. That’s where we step in.
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=ddd6b8e521&e=567664f14c)
---
| **🚨 Mark Sets the Record Straight**
With 25 years of experience as a meteorologist working hand-in-hand with the National Weather Service, Mark shares an insider’s look at how weather alerts are issued and coordinated with media and emergency officials. The real story is far more complex than the media wants to admit.

You’ll hear:

✅ The truth about how the NWS warned the public
✅ Why the loss of life is heartbreaking — and avoidable
✅ The rock-solid weather data that debunks the climate change narrative
✅ The media’s dangerous politicization of natural disasters Mark doesn’t hold back.

This is a raw and emotional episode, but it’s one that had to be done. We normally don’t devote an entire show to a single story, but this time, the truth matters too much to stay silent.
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=951b0e040a&e=567664f14c)
---
| **💔 A Story That Will Stay With You**

We close the episode with the gut-wrenching story of a family torn apart by the floods. Their story deserves to be told — and it’s a powerful reminder of what’s truly at stake.
---
|
---
| **💥 Help Us Spread the Word**
If you believe in truth over politics, we need your help to share this episode.
✅ Like the video on [YouTube ](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=515e25a0f9&e=567664f14c)✅ Subscribe to our [channel](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=cfeeb6932c&e=567664f14c) and hit the bell ✅ Rate & review the podcast wherever you listen ✅ Consider donating at [NoDoubtAboutItPodcast.com](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=6f467092fd&e=567664f14c) to support the show
Thanks for being part of this journey with us. In moments like this, truth still matters — and we’re not afraid to speak it.

With heartfelt thanks,

Mark & Krysty Ronchetti
**No Doubt About It Podcast**

_🎙️ Real stories. Real truth. No doubt about it._
---
| | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=b706931495&e=567664f14c)
| [|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=0b145e2cf3&e=567664f14c)
| [|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=c48fe91821&e=567664f14c)
|

body:
A brand new open Senate seat... and an UPGRADED race rating from Cook Political Report.
#

There are TWO U.S. Senate seats that we MUST flip in order to restore our Democratic Senate majority next year. **North Carolina and Maine.** **[If you’re ready to help us flip these seats, please consider chipping in now. Otherwise, please keep reading to learn more about both of these important races.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91372?refcode=em20250707-9096&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9096%2E614464%2E2OXLIm)** **[CHIP IN NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91372?refcode=em20250707-9096&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9096%2E614464%2E2OXLIm)**
---

**— North Carolina —** _GOP U.S. Senator Thom Tillis just announced that he will NOT seek re-election in 2026._ **After this news, Cook Political Report upgraded North Carolina’s U.S. Senate race from Leans Republican to a _TOSS UP!_** The Center for Politics also rates this race as a _TOSS UP!_ **This Senate race will be one of the nation’s top battlegrounds next year.** **[Please consider making a donation today to help us flip North Carolina’s Senate seat blue and restore our Democratic majority:](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91372?refcode=em20250707-9096&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9096%2E614464%2E2OXLIm)** If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91373?refcode=em20250707-9096&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=4&akid=9096%2E614464%2E2OXLIm) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91373?refcode=em20250707-9096&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=5&akid=9096%2E614464%2E2OXLIm) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91372?refcode=em20250707-9096&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=9096%2E614464%2E2OXLIm)
---

**— Maine —** Republican U.S. Senator Susan Collins is running for re-election in 2026. **Maine will be one of the most _expensive_ and _competitive_ races in the country!** Cook Political Report AND the Center for Politics rate Maine’s U.S. Senate race as _Lean Republican._ But right now, with faith in the GOP at an all-time low, just about anything could tip the scales and make this race a TOSS UP! **[Please consider making a donation today to help us flip Maine blue and restore our Democratic majority in the Senate:](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91372?refcode=em20250707-9096&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=7&akid=9096%2E614464%2E2OXLIm)** If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91373?refcode=em20250707-9096&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=8&akid=9096%2E614464%2E2OXLIm) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91373?refcode=em20250707-9096&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=9&akid=9096%2E614464%2E2OXLIm) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91372?refcode=em20250707-9096&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=9096%2E614464%2E2OXLIm)

name: Thank Leader Jeffries (VPP)
subject: Did you mean to leave this blank?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
You have 10 more minutes to sign!
| | We are SO PROUD of Rep. Hakeem Jeffries for taking a stand against Donald Trump’s HORRIFIC big ugly bill.

**_But we just checked our records and we’re STUNNED to see your signature still missing from our thank you card._**

Leader Jeffries made HISTORY on the House floor, so we need to make sure he knows that Democrats (like you!) have his back!

[**LAST CHANCE TO SIGN: Add your name in the next 10 minutes before we send our thank you card to his office! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91766?t=6&akid=20515%2E878179%2EbzSV5w) | [**DONATE $3 TO SIGN THE CARD »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91766?t=7&akid=20515%2E878179%2EbzSV5w)
---
Thank you,
_The Voter Protection Project_
**—BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE—**
_**BREAKING NEWS:**_
_**The Hill:**_ Jeffries stalls final vote on Trump megabill with marathon floor speech
_"People will die. Tens of thousands, perhaps year after year after year, as a result of the Republican assault on the healthcare of the American people...I'm sad. I never thought I would be on the House floor saying this is a crime scene."_

We’re SO grateful he’s standing up to fight this disastrous bill! So we’re launching a MASSIVE thank you letter to Leader Jeffries:
[**10,000 SIGNATURE SPOTS AVAILABLE: CHIP IN $3 TO ADD YOUR NAME TO THANK LEADER JEFFRIES »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91766?t=8&akid=20515%2E878179%2EbzSV5w)
---
* * *
**TO: Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries**
**FROM: A Grateful Democrat**
**RE: Your Bold Leadership**
Leader Jeffries,

Thank you SO much for taking a stand on the House floor and pointing out exactly who the Big Ugly Bill will hurt – families, elderly folks, and children.

Your brave stand is exposing Republicans for their callousness and disregard for the most vulnerable among us.**

[**That’s why I’m rising to join you in the fight by signing this thank you letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to advance our progressive agenda and elect more Democrats to fight alongside you! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91766?t=9&akid=20515%2E878179%2EbzSV5w)**
[**10,000 SIGNATURE SPOTS AVAILABLE: CHIP IN $3 TO ADD YOUR NAME TO THANK LEADER JEFFRIES »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91766?t=10&akid=20515%2E878179%2EbzSV5w)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
* * *
Thanks so much for signing!

\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20515%2E878179%2EbzSV5w). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20515%2E878179%2EbzSV5w).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20515%2E878179%2EbzSV5w) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=20515%2E878179%2EbzSV5w). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=20515%2E878179%2EbzSV5w)

clean_body: The key to our surprise wins? Regional offices | = | Hi team, In 2024 we were able to defy the odds and flip three U.S. House seats in California from red to blue even while Donald Trump won the Presidential election. Pundits were shocked, with us winning races that had been expected to lean Republican. How did we do this? One of the key factors was our Forever Organizing program which included a robust regional office operation. We opened regional offices in some of the most pivotal swing seat areas. These offices became hubs of organizing, event-planning, voter registration, and persuasion across the entire state. And here’s the thing : We didn’t throw these offices together just a few weeks before the election. In many cases, we had leases signed and infrastructure in place over a YEAR ahead of time. That gave us the critical time we needed to reach undecided voters. = = = = = = See this picture below? This is a regional office we opened in CA-27 last election cycle. = Because we had this regional office open, we were able to mobilize supporters and volunteers to organize every corner of CA-27 and eventually flip it from red to blue for Democratic Rep. George Whitesides! And it’s funny ...back in 2024 we asked you for grassroots contributions to open this office. And when we opened the office, we told you it would be a huge part of flipping CA-27 from red to blue. And that turned out to be 100% true! 🙏 So yes, now we are emailing again. Let’s replicate this magic in 2026 and ensure that Speaker Mike Johnson is fired and we take control of the U.S. House. = = Yours, \- CADEM | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. name: Rob Bonta
subject: The ACLU is fighting ICE. We’re supporting them.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
These aggressive, militaristic tactics are not about safety or justice — they’re about intimidation.
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em250707&t=1&akid=1862%2E1088799%2EZUJyQz)
I’m fighting back against the unlawful immigration enforcement tactics that are terrorizing families here in California.
**Today I led a multistate coalition of attorneys general in submitting an amicus brief in support of a lawsuit civil and immigrant rights groups, led by the ACLU of Southern California, filed to stop ICE and Customs and Border Protection from conducting unlawful and unconstitutional stops during immigration raids.**
[**If you’re ready to hold Kristi Noem, Donald Trump, and the entire administration accountable to the law and the U.S. Constitution, please sign on today →**](https://act.robbonta.com/survey/em-250707-pet/?t=2&akid=1862%2E1088799%2EZUJyQz)
Let’s be clear about what’s actually happening in our communities: Masked immigration agents are conducting unannounced raids, stopping residents without so much as reasonable suspicion of unlawful activity, and even wrongfully detaining U.S. citizens. People are scared to leave their homes, and communities are left empty.
These unlawful militaristic tactics threaten public safety and public health, and hurt our local economies.
**These aggressive tactics are not about safety or justice — they’re about intimidation, plain and simple.**
We can’t be silent in the face of cruel and unlawful attacks on our immigrant communities. If you agree we need to put a stop to these unconstitutional practices, I’m asking you to stand with me.
[**Add your name today to keep up the fight against ICE and CBP’s cruel and illegal actions.**](https://act.robbonta.com/survey/em-250707-pet/?t=3&akid=1862%2E1088799%2EZUJyQz)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.robbonta.com/survey/em-250707-pet/?t=4&akid=1862%2E1088799%2EZUJyQz)**
In solidarity,
Rob
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-wrapper?refcode=em250707&t=5&refcode2=1862_1088799_ZUJyQz&akid=1862%2E1088799%2EZUJyQz)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.robbonta.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=6&akid=1862%2E1088799%2EZUJyQz)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.robbonta.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.robbonta.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=1862%2E1088799%2EZUJyQz)

To give by check:
Rob Bonta for Attorney General 2026
c/o Deane & Company
1700 Tribute Road, Suite 201
Sacramento, CA 95815

### **Breaking: Court deals final blow to Kendall lawsuit over ranked-choice voting repeal petition**
---
---
| [](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=686c9dd01cd0287c903cb787&u=https%3A%2F%2Fmustreadalaska.com%2Fbreaking-court-deals-final-blow-to-kendall-lawsuit-over-ranked-choice-voting-repeal-petition%2F&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_686c9ca59304940384990fbe&l=en-US&s=QwT0ItzMvZfBTdTTyDaxGHPTmz8%3D)
---
**A short explanation of the court win above, this case was decided last September 2024, but the Supreme Court ruling in our favor at the time, said the final order would come at a later time. That happened at the end of June. More to Come this week.**
---
### The Fight for Fair Elections: A Personal Mission
When I began the effort to repeal Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) in Alaska, I knew it would be a challenge. But I was determined not to let our electoral process be twisted into a confusing system that leaves voters disempowered.My commitment went beyond Alaska. I wrote **three books** and created a **30-part animated video series** to expose the truth about RCV, distributing thousands of copies and making the videos free nationwide. I've also spent countless hours collaborating with grassroots leaders across the country, helping establish organizations now fighting RCV. My websites, **RCValert.org** and **RemoveRCV.com** , offer years of research, resources, and tools like RCV Election Simulators.This fight is personal. My own grandfather, a wise and hardworking man, couldn't understand the ranked choice ballot. If someone with his common sense was confused, I knew there was a fundamental flaw. That moment spurred me to draft Alaska's repeal initiative.We didn't have billionaire funding or political party backing. What we had was unwavering determination and the support of over **700 dedicated Alaskan volunteers**. We knocked on doors, braved the cold, and gathered over **42,000 signatures** —far exceeding the requirement—all without help from political insiders.I've also traveled nationwide, warning states like Idaho, Oregon, Arizona, and Florida about RCV's manipulative nature, funded by out-of-state billionaires.As expected, the political establishment fought us. The attorney who brought RCV to Alaska even sued to prevent our repeal initiative from appearing on the ballot. But we prevailed in both the Alaska Superior Court and the Alaska Supreme Court. They outspent us by a staggering **one hundred to one** , with millions flowing in from out-of-state organizations like Unite America and the Sixteen Thirty Fund, supported by figures like George Soros and Hansjorg Wyss.On Election Day, I was immensely proud. Not only had I fought RCV in Alaska for years, but seven other states where I'd been active decisively rejected it. Those rejections alone cost the pro-RCV lobby nearly **$150 million** between 2020 and 2024. Here in Alaska, despite our small population, it took nearly three weeks to get election results—a clear example of RCV's confusion and delay.Our repeal effort in Alaska came agonizingly close, falling short by just 743 votes after nearly three weeks of counting. But my resolve is unbroken. This fight is a warning to the entire country. We must maintain simple, clear, and honest elections, demanding voter ID and keeping out-of-state special interests out.I am incredibly proud of what we achieved in Alaska. We showed the nation what ordinary, hardworking people can accomplish when they stand firm. The fight isn't over—not in Alaska, and not anywhere freedom-loving Americans call home.**Stand with us! Let's protect our elections for Alaska and for America.**
---
### **More News**
---
---
|
---
**Exciting News, My team and I have been hired to manage and deliver the Eaglexit project for Eagle River and Chugiak. The objective is to break Eagle River and Chugiak into their own borough.****The phase approach is:****1\. Education / Volunteer Training / Building****2\. Gather signatures for Petition / Education****3\. GOTV (Get Out The Vote) / Education****Our team at**[**http://PetitionEngine.com**](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=686c9dd01cd0287c903cb787&u=https%3A%2F%2Ft.co%2Fq3ow7fFBOA&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_686c9ca59304940384990fbe&l=en-US&s=32XHt2icpqirY6OjPEKBqsnJEmQ%3D)**, is proud to manage and deliver the full-scale rollout of Eaglexit for Eagle River and Chugiak. Let’s make history.**[**https://eaglexit.com**](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=686c9dd01cd0287c903cb787&u=https%3A%2F%2Ft.co%2FCwYOkRQoPB&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_686c9ca59304940384990fbe&l=en-US&s=h13ra6qGCanBp_5LqiAy0Ud0SzU%3D)

subject: They’ll bury me 6 feet deep for this.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by George Moraitis for Congress Committee
body:
But if this message works, it’ll all be worth it in the end.

| | | | I’m digging my own grave.

They’ll bury me 6 feet deep for this.

But if this message works, it’ll all be worth it in the end.

This is George Moraitis – you probably don’t know me, but I’m a ret. Lieutenant Commander and Submarine Warfare officer.

**_I’m also the pro-Trump conservative Republican running in a must-win race in Florida._**

I’m really nothing special. Just a God-fearing American like you who has spent a lifetime in service to our nation.

But the wealthy, well-connected Democrats have all the money and fat cat donors needed to crush conservatives like me.

They look down on folks like us — _and it kills me to say this, but if they win this race, they’ll have all the power needed to silence our voices for good._

**_[So I’ll cut to the chase: I’m humbly asking if you could chip in just a few bucks to help the America First Movement.

Friend, I’m usually not the type to ask for help. But your support today will be the final blow to the Radical Left – America SAVED and a better future secured.

So with everything on the line, I’m respectfully asking if you’ll support a conservative like me.

I give you my word, as a proud veteran, I will not let you down.

Thank you and God bless,

# **[Police responding to disturbance call over PlayStation arrest mother of 3 small children after seeing living conditions](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
A disturbance call about a PlayStation video game console led to the arrest of a mother of three after police said they witnessed horrendous living conditions at her apartment unit.Louisiana police responded to the residence at the Village Square Apartments on June 5 and found a cockroach infestation so bad that they described it as "hazardous" and "unsanitary" to the children, according to a press release from the Shreveport Police Department.'Roaches were also seen coming through holes in the walls, further compromising the health and safety of the environment.

subject: Border Shootout, AI Band, and the Shortest Day
body:
A Michigan [man was shot and killed after opening fire](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMFuhCAURb9GdxhAGHDBoht3022X5ilPfS0DE8Rx5u8b2_5Bdye5yc099-M6XIECxeUdbujKnIaIxxawFMzDmLLHvK0plbQXoBGih-jLOkguNeOGcTt4oPAaVO3djCixrdEJo0V36RSX9erUKITkLVplldJajsZq9L5T3YTae1GTO9u44VZw3mnTcOgktPpijbCtFV2lOHoqKTefiWJZcQ6v9MDcTOlWB7eWct-q9q2SfSX74ziaOE6nxZlXsj-xkv2-sT-i6OlBfofAvigE9Ayf0wpxobiwZY8zZWS_7uwOJafAYMFYNlbwCRvLUwQpjFSizs7fDwqBtoupFF9uQOFnVvnXlw8nvwMAAP__WFOJ6g) outside a U.S. Border Patrol facility in McAllen, Texas, early Monday morning.

## Gunman Killed in Shootout at Border Station
A Michigan [man was shot and killed after opening fire](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMFuhCAURb9GdxhAGHDBoht3022X5ilPfS0DE8Rx5u8b2_5Bdye5yc099-M6XIECxeUdbujKnIaIxxawFMzDmLLHvK0plbQXoBGih-jLOkguNeOGcTt4oPAaVO3djCixrdEJo0V36RSX9erUKITkLVplldJajsZq9L5T3YTae1GTO9u44VZw3mnTcOgktPpijbCtFV2lOHoqKTefiWJZcQ6v9MDcTOlWB7eWct-q9q2SfSX74ziaOE6nxZlXsj-xkv2-sT-i6OlBfofAvigE9Ayf0wpxobiwZY8zZWS_7uwOJafAYMFYNlbwCRvLUwQpjFSizs7fDwqBtoupFF9uQOFnVvnXlw8nvwMAAP__WFOJ6g) outside a U.S. Border Patrol facility in McAllen, Texas, early Monday morning. The suspect, 27-year-old Ryan Louis Mosqueda, exchanged gunfire with agents and local police, [injuring a border patrol employee and two officers](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGyozAMhk9jOhhh7BgXLrahy7ZbMgKL4B1jZ4wSltvvkDfvBK-RGumXvu_PfbxjiCE9fuNGjpc8Jjr2SMxUxikXT2Vfc-b8YgwTJo_J8zpKkLoGU0M_egzxHFXl3UIkqavItUa39mYVyGp1pvcwgZ4NWG-BrJ71MklltV3IL62vgrvSwEDfAlhtGkArsdO33rR917dWKCAfOJfmbw6JV1rimd9UmjlvVXQr83MX3S8hByGH4zia146cPZ7XgJDDzrmcQg4X2dWQQ05CDtdZIQcw3-WLt34ilxzrBecQA5_1R0BIj3qbMUZKNdM_vJJ6paw0SsFnuyrOP48QY9hvRih4bBji50f-kdi3k_8DAAD__7GQipE), one of whom was shot in the knee. Hours before the attack, [Mosqueda's father was pulled over](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLuu2zAMhp9G3hjI9H3w0MXb6drRoI-omD2KFEhMXL994RZ9gi7k8AP_5fvxsX6QBIn37_TgWX1aIx8lsCrndUvZcS57SppeSrJRdBSd7ita7MAOYMfVkYRzbSs3e2bkpuK5Hrp66qfWYrXP47D12IzWdd7ZEb3ffNu71mNra3R1V8l8udnBjrW1UzfcLE1ITdePQz02Yz2Z1rITTfn2M0nUnX0405vz7TM9qjDvqs9imm8GF4PLcRy3r0J6iQaXa831SCVFCgaXK8zgYod_h-BBEXYqsDFH-JIQ2AF55QzpyVHiHbxkBlIgeBX4iwWepDkF8PQpQfQEiaD8iwrQS_eURYULFDoNLlWe3fOQEKT0g2nt_UES_tTX_2L-nvF3AAAA___i-pXP) by police 20 miles away in Weslaco. He told officers he was looking for his son, who was psychologically distressed and armed. The FBI is leading the investigation.
## Trump Announces Tariffs, Posts Letters Online
President Trump announced [new tariffs of up to 40% on goods from 14 countries](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOpDAQRL8GMlBjYxsHDi4hm0svRA1uBo-MjUzPoPn70-xqv2CTSkp6pXr_btMNQwzp_hd3crzmKdF1RmKmMs25eCrnljPnJ2OYMXlMnrdJgFANmAaGyWOI76mvvVuJBMmaXGdUZ7XtQdSbUyAXaTUJLxetFdpZeWX63s6rXkDaOrgPDQwMHYBVpgW0AqXSg-kGOXS26oF84FzaRw6JN1rjO7-otEve6-g25uOs5J9KjJUYr-tqlzQvn7IS4wddiRHMT3B57kfDWMK6ng0X9NR83z2bBx6Y2o33WBfnjyvEGE5tqh7uO4b4tce_kvRy4n8AAAD___TfeXc), set to take effect Aug. 1, as part of his push for reciprocal trade terms. Trump [posted letters](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1u8yAUxvGrgS3R4cMGBoZXeuUtnSp1tLA5jqmwseAkUe6-cm-h6_NIv-H_dRtvIeW03z_Chp6WMu74ahmJsI5TqRFrW0uh8qCQprDHsEdaRwmyu4C5gB1jSPk9ah79gihRcfTCdML1ToPkqzdRwKRccKCWHqxWvVvMpNwyzbPtleXJnxoYsALAdeYKwcmgut4aYZUVjmnAmKjU63dJO6245Hd5Yr3OZePZr0RHY-ofkwOTA9UHra3MKeTzP0cNFUP-X_aQ42d9bAeTw1EaNSYHIbQV0nZaKgXWdEby6uPxSjmn1hum4b6F9Etx-lOfp5c_AQAA__96nHZt) on Truth Social addressed to the affected countries announcing steep new tariffs—ranging from 25% to 40%—on imports from countries including Japan, South Korea, and Malaysia, warning that any retaliation would trigger even higher rates. He left room for future adjustments based on diplomatic ties. U.S. markets closed modestly down on the news, with the Dow, S&P 500, and Nasdaq all falling under 1%.
## Popular New Band Admits It's Completely AI
After racking up over a million monthly listeners, [viral band The Velvet Sundown](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0EFyhCAQheHT4E4LWxFcsMjG3WSbpdVIO5JCmMIezdw-NblCLvBeff_Xbb5hiCHdP3Eny2ueE11HJGYqs8vFUzm2nDk_GYPD5DF53maQoGqpa2lmjyG-5r7ydiUC6iqyrVbtOIy9hGqzjqRZgXQ7QOdHpN5pD6pbvBuMcgNVwb7XpJamlXJUupE4AnZqMLo1nWlH0UvygXNpvnNIvNEaX_mk0ix5r6LdmB-H6D4ETAKm67qaxS3NggKmt0XARImpMIa0U2IBE4b6Tam3jD_1SfEkro9n8vlKddtopZXRfVWsf1whxnAMWvTyvmOIf5f8r06nhd8AAAD__8Ade-A) has confirmed it’s an AI-generated project, calling itself a “provocation” challenging music’s creative boundaries. The group, which debuted in early June with a blend of '70s-style rock and modern indie pop, quickly hit 400,000 listeners on Spotify and released two albums within two weeks, with a third due July 14. [Listen to a song here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L9uszAUBfCnMVvQ9R-MPXj4PkVs6dAlbRdk8CU4cnBkbkLTp6_SsWvX35HOkc7x0B98THE5vfgLOppyv-C2JiTC0g-5BCzrnDPlG_k4-CX4JdDcCxDNDtodmD74mB69qoKbEAXKCh1vG261VSCq2Wk_cMX5YFBaEWA0Shs9SqsaiRMXUxXdsw1aMBzANm0N3govG21abqThlinAECmX-pzjQjNO6ZHvWOoxX6rkZqLryuQ_Jjomum3b6ke-0W3AZ_4UT-PMZHdncv__642_dx9HOI9M6BRXYnL_-ovjEvCTyT2vigvXLaYUV90yBaeLj-lnlf501d2J7wAAAP__nt96cg). But fans noticed red flags—no live shows, no digital footprint, and band photos looked too polished to be real. [See the photos here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOqzAQheGnMV2QPRgbFy5uQ5fbbokmeAheGTsyE1DefsW-wvZHn3T-r_t0x5hifv7HjTwvZcp07omYqU6PUgPVfS2Fy5sxPjAHzIHXCST0N2lvcpgCxvSZdBP8QgTUNeSV7ZUzTktoVr9IK5feGTvP8NDYWaMMqsGB0s7ArJvoL01aOSgpXW9biQ6w681g1dANygktKUQutf0uMfNKS_qUg2o7l61JfmV-7aL7J2AUMJ7n2ca8Mz4rbtdCwMgrHZQO4v2dQznz9UPA2FQfXmdMKe7GCi2fG8b0i_KfShwefgIAAP__nNxyDQ). (Though this doesn’t seem to be their real Instagram account.) The band updated [their Spotify bio](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOozAQgOGngS5obAy2CxdpSJUr7nTKboVMPIRZORjZk0S8_Sr7Ctv_-or_ch7PniKttz_-jo7nNK74KhGZMY9TygFzWVLi9GBPk1-DXwMvowTZHUAfwIzBU9xHVQc3I0psa3RCd8L2VoGsF2eh7TUgSGM6b7yZpRdzf52EUFZdtarJvTXQYASA7XQD3krfdr3RwrRG2EoBBuKUm69EKy84xz09MTfXdK-jW5i3UrXHSg6VHNKGa1O2xDTv76CSg89MhSs5yNNf3o8fl_9E5fT5mLp_p3Oe6uzC9qIYqfS6UnC7e4o_Nv9qyNPJ7wAAAP__X8pzlQ) in early July, stating: _“The Velvet Sundown is a synthetic music project guided by human creative direction, and composed, voiced, and visualized with the support of artificial intelligence.”_ Who is behind the band remains a mystery.

body:
Reform with Purpose, Hope with Action

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/51ce217e5d61/when-we-vote-we-win-14764344?e=8763c56857)

| **The One Big Beautiful Bill:****Honoring the Promise of America**
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
# _Opinion_ | The One Big Beautiful Bill: A Shrill Democratic Lament
---
| _By Dominic Rapini, American Businessman and Political Commentator_
**WASHINGTON, D.C.** – In a shocking turn of events, the dastardly One Big Beautiful Bill has passed, and we, the nation’s proud, pint-sized, and perpetually shrill Democrats, are here to wail, gnash our teeth, and warn you about the coming apocalypse—by which we mean, of course, tax cuts for people who actually work for a living.
**Top 10 Catastrophes (a.k.a. “Benefits”) for the Working Class**
1\. T**ax Cuts for the Poors?** How dare they! The largest proportional tax cuts go to families making $15,000 to $30,000. That’s money they could have been sending to Washington for us to redistribute more inefficiently! 2\. **Standard Deduction Boosted** —Now What?The deduction goes up by $1,500. So now 91% of Americans can file their taxes without needing a PhD in accounting. Where’s the fun in that? 3.**No Tax on Tips** —Waitresses Might SmileFour million tipped workers get to keep their tips. Next thing you know, they’ll be able to afford avocado toast AND rent. 4\. **No Tax on Overtime** —More Money for the MassesEighty million hourly workers get to keep their overtime pay. We can already hear the sound of union bosses sobbing into their soy lattes. 5\. **Child Tax Credit Expanded** —Kids EverywhereThe Child Tax Credit jumps to $2,200. That’s more money for families, and probably more kids named “Liberty” and “Freedom.” Ugh. 6\. **Take-Home Pay Increases** —Workers Might SmileTypical families get up to $10,900 more per year. How will we convince people they’re oppressed if they’re flush with cash? 7.**Job Creation** —A Plague of Employment7.2 million jobs protected or created, including 1.4 million in manufacturing. We prefer our unemployment lines long and our talking points longer. 8.**Tax Relief for Seniors** —Grandma Buys a Jet SkiSeniors get an extra $6,000 deduction. Great, now they’ll be out there living their best lives instead of writing angry letters to Congress. 9.**Small Business Support** —Entrepreneurs UnleashedPermanent tax cuts and expanded expensing for small businesses. Next thing you know, someone will open a gluten-free, solar-powered, artisanal pickle shop on every corner. 10.**Savings Accounts for All** —Personal Responsibility?Trump savings accounts and expanded HSAs. The horror! People might start planning for their own futures instead of relying on government.
**Medicare “Reform” (Or: How We Learned to Stop Worrying and Love Eligibility)**
1.**Eligibility Tightened** —Aliens Need Not ApplyOnly lawful residents, select immigrants, and certain compact citizens can get Medicare. So much for our “Medicare for Martians” platform. 2.**Working Seniors Get More HSA Love** Seniors who keep working can keep saving. We much prefer the “retire, expire, and vote absentee” model. 3.**Bigger HSA Contributions for the Little Guy** Lower-income folks can save more for healthcare. We always said we wanted more savings—just not like this! 4.**Rural Hospitals Reopened** —Country Folk SurviveClosed rural hospitals can reopen. There goes our plan to centralize all healthcare in Brooklyn. 5\. **AI Fights Medicare Fraud** —Robots Take Our Jobs$25 million for AI to prevent fraud. We were hoping to unionize the fraudsters, but whatever.
**Top 5 Myths (That We Totally Still Believe)**
**1.“It’s Just for Billionaires!”** Sure, the biggest cuts go to the working class, but billionaires exist, and we can’t just let them be happy.
**2.“It Kicks People Off Medicaid!”** Except it doesn’t. But if we say it loud enough, maybe someone will believe us.
**3.“It Explodes the Deficit!”** Actually, it cuts the deficit by $2 trillion, but math is hard and yelling is easy.
**4.“Work Requirements Are Cruel!”** Only for able-bodied adults without kids, but we’re pretty sure “work” is a four-letter word.
**5.“It Makes Life Unaffordable!”** Except for the $10,000+ in extra take-home pay, lower taxes, and cheaper energy. But who’s counting?
**A Big, Beautiful, Hopeful Future** But you know what? Maybe, just maybe, the future looks... well, Big, Beautiful, and Bright. Maybe more jobs, more money, and more opportunity means fewer people need to listen to us shriek about doom and gloom. Maybe America will thrive, families will prosper, and even we, the shrillest of Democrats, will find something to smile about—like a new artisanal pickle shop, opened by a newly prosperous working-class entrepreneur.
**So here’s to a future that’s Big, Beautiful, and Bright—even if it means we’ll have to find new things to complain about**

clean_body: Reform with Purpose, Hope with Action | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | “America’s best days are still ahead of us.” – Ronald Reagan | | | | | | | | | | | | The One Big Beautiful Bill:Honoring the Promise of America | | | | Opinion | The One Big Beautiful Bill: A Shrill Democratic Lament | By Dominic Rapini, American Businessman and Political Commentator WASHINGTON, D.C. – In a shocking turn of events, the dastardly One Big Beautiful Bill has passed, and we, the nation’s proud, pint-sized, and perpetually shrill Democrats, are here to wail, gnash our teeth, and warn you about the coming apocalypse—by which we mean, of course, tax cuts for people who actually work for a living. Top 10 Catastrophes (a.k.a. “Benefits”) for the Working Class 1\. Tax Cuts for the Poors? How dare they! The largest proportional tax cuts go to families making $15,000 to $30,000. That’s money they could have been sending to Washington for us to redistribute more inefficiently! 2\. Standard Deduction Boosted —Now What?The deduction goes up by $1,500. So now 91% of Americans can file their taxes without needing a PhD in accounting. Where’s the fun in that? 3.No Tax on Tips —Waitresses Might SmileFour million tipped workers get to keep their tips. Next thing you know, they’ll be able to afford avocado toast AND rent. 4\. No Tax on Overtime —More Money for the MassesEighty million hourly workers get to keep their overtime pay. We can already hear the sound of union bosses sobbing into their soy lattes. 5\. Child Tax Credit Expanded —Kids EverywhereThe Child Tax Credit jumps to $2,200. That’s more money for families, and probably more kids named “Liberty” and “Freedom.” Ugh. 6\. Take-Home Pay Increases —Workers Might SmileTypical families get up to $10,900 more per year. How will we convince people they’re oppressed if they’re flush with cash? 7.Job Creation —A Plague of Employment7.2 million jobs protected or created, including 1.4 million in manufacturing. We prefer our unemployment lines long and our talking points longer. 8.Tax Relief for Seniors —Grandma Buys a Jet SkiSeniors get an extra $6,000 deduction. Great, now they’ll be out there living their best lives instead of writing angry letters to Congress. 9.Small Business Support —Entrepreneurs UnleashedPermanent tax cuts and expanded expensing for small businesses. Next thing you know, someone will open a gluten-free, solar-powered, artisanal pickle shop on every corner. 10.Savings Accounts for All —Personal Responsibility?Trump savings accounts and expanded HSAs. The horror! People might start planning for their own futures instead of relying on government. Medicare “Reform” (Or: How We Learned to Stop Worrying and Love Eligibility) 1.Eligibility Tightened —Aliens Need Not ApplyOnly lawful residents, select immigrants, and certain compact citizens can get Medicare. So much for our “Medicare for Martians” platform. 2.Working Seniors Get More HSA Love Seniors who keep working can keep saving. We much prefer the “retire, expire, and vote absentee” model. 3.Bigger HSA Contributions for the Little Guy Lower-income folks can save more for healthcare. We always said we wanted more savings—just not like this! 4.Rural Hospitals Reopened —Country Folk SurviveClosed rural hospitals can reopen. There goes our plan to centralize all healthcare in Brooklyn. 5\. AI Fights Medicare Fraud —Robots Take Our Jobs$25 million for AI to prevent fraud. We were hoping to unionize the fraudsters, but whatever. Top 5 Myths (That We Totally Still Believe) 1.“It’s Just for Billionaires!” Sure, the biggest cuts go to the working class, but billionaires exist, and we can’t just let them be happy. 2.“It Kicks People Off Medicaid!” Except it doesn’t. But if we say it loud enough, maybe someone will believe us. 3.“It Explodes the Deficit!” Actually, it cuts the deficit by $2 trillion, but math is hard and yelling is easy. 4.“Work Requirements Are Cruel!” Only for able-bodied adults without kids, but we’re pretty sure “work” is a four-letter word. 5.“It Makes Life Unaffordable!” Except for the $10,000+ in extra take-home pay, lower taxes, and cheaper energy. But who’s counting? A Big, Beautiful, Hopeful Future But you know what? Maybe, just maybe, the future looks... well, Big, Beautiful, and Bright. Maybe more jobs, more money, and more opportunity means fewer people need to listen to us shriek about doom and gloom. Maybe America will thrive, families will prosper, and even we, the shrillest of Democrats, will find something to smile about—like a new artisanal pickle shop, opened by a newly prosperous working-class entrepreneur. So here’s to a future that’s Big, Beautiful, and Bright—even if it means we’ll have to find new things to complain about | | | | Copyright (C) 2025 Dominic For CT. All rights reserved. It’s a simple survival kit we built for regular people who just want to be a little more prepared. It’s got:
* Waterproof matches
* A tough little multitool
* Solar charger
* Headlamp
* Rugged dry bag
* And a spork that’s actually kind of badass

No gimmicks. No upsells. Just pay shipping and it's yours. If you've been meaning to get your act together — even just a little — this is an easy first step. [Get your free Go Pack here while they’re still available](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21612/6374453/4d39c02369ad2529089ab34cf05b08e5663abf03/034f26c8fad0c8675a1fc617ba8faff9f065987b) Stay sharp,
– Mike

**Good Morning!** On this day in 1935, former Texas A&M athletics director [John David Crow](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1uwyAUxfGnwZstwA7EA0MXb-na0bqGG_tWfESATPL2Vaq-QcejI_2G_9dtvQF5ivsnBDT1eU9rxFY81op5vfuUHMX9JFsplIwBw4YZ3Sq5vPRc9_y6OiD_WqfOmY27WXRohL6IWctJye4wQukrWFDKzqPS3GncuIBNotXKinHuyLwxrvlVCM4vetgAhHVawjxxOc6KTRwd1ZSHemDFJ5S7f6UT82BT6Lw5an0UNn4wuTC5tNaGA6kEiO-fyeVv9Y1ixFyYXL7TEXsHJ7ne5tSYXLps3KOR91SUZhPfA5D_9ev_qpxG_gQAAP__R3B3Tw) was born in Marion, Louisiana. He won the Heisman Trophy as a running back for the Aggies in 1957 before playing 11 seasons in the NFL and embarking on a career in coaching and athletics administration. We're continuing coverage of the catastrophic flooding in Central Texas today. Gov. Greg Abbott has pledged to add a [review of the weather alert system](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD1uhDAUhE8DnZHxGowLF2noNm1K9MAPsOQfZD_B7u0jVsoJ0k0xM5pvfp7TE5x3cfuGgIZea5oiXsUjEeZp9SlZF7fTLeRCyRgwzJjRToKLjnHF-DBZcP49ydqamVvd1mha1bVaCdmLeje9llqsQ7fyTg8cbCc7sBrnHmGWSonambuMKz60LeedamaAdrFKgJZcPHRfSY7WUcoN7Uj4grL6dzoxN0sKtTc70VGqx1clxkqM13U1a3rJG-M2VGK8ZSXGT5T9MbELgXbMDDxmYi4cOZ0YMFJhh4cY0bJy4OLAs4KluBTZlk4G85yIWIF3qbOxx-W8d6VXleRbAOc_o-h_V55G_AYAAP__9iCMhA) to the upcoming special session agenda. Later today, we’ll email you on behalf of our partner, [International Living](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0EHK2zAUBODTyLvfSM9yZC-0cNoaAkkKJaRLIUXP9gPZCrLqJLcv7hW6nuEbmN8Xc7EUaBmvdkad30M0C77WgDljMkOI0dMybvTINK8JZ5wdJvQGONRfXH3xxnhL4WNk4bXjvhUFaqFq0SqQBygm3Qp0LSqupJSDG2rpaze0DgawDTSOF6R3jCveCMF5rUpnrXh4BbaVHKr2wCRHTzmmMk-Y8W3XIXzihql8xLkIesr5ubKqY9Az6J8plrRkTIvNFBcbAm20jHt3Txn0t1_d_cf53n3rbqefVwPSXI6mPwoG_fl0vteK852q-olV33P6g0XS_vmiEGg9KCb5OFsK_8bz_122afgbAAD__-mUfg4), with an exclusive offer for travel lovers: a free copy of their brand-new “tell-all” book revealing the secrets travel writers don’t want you to know. Stay tuned for that email. We're sponsored today by [Pacaso](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2O2zAQhU8jdTaGPxKpgkWAhbtNm5IYi0N7AFIUSFq7e_tAmyAXSPveh5mH79e7f0dOvD1-YibXP2PxG320RL1T9TGVEnh7HLx2zq1SpnynSsFLkNMFzAWsD8jpy-sxuDuERYzkhJnEYqSe5fh0USEEu5gYRDSR1hi1MXYOi5iitjiP7M5jYMAKATCZ6x1RrMFIXDRItcyDBgrcS732J3X6xBbTVzmoXteSx-Seve9tUD8GeRvkjbeDWr_uuGIrJ3HG6vbq2bfyqisN6o0ychrkfIaZAr_yoN525HDZsfaNanvy_rdfMe_Ij-2b-FcKCxcNxv9RIMBMVimwsIzVhf2DU-I2m0HD43z1PbT_n97Dyd8BAAD__3YDjwI), offering a chance to invest in a business that is turning the vacation rental market upside down.
