## Flooding Victims Remembered, Warning System Scrutinized
As rescue operations from this weekend’s catastrophic flooding across Central Texas continued yesterday, the death toll has [climbed to at least 104](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGunDAQheGngW5Wg7HxUrhIQ3fTpkTGHoMVg6_sCSxvH-2WaVOP5tPR_-tr_rIxxWP9aXcy_Ap5PuiqiZipzCHl7OOxntFx3GuhnfaFCvlZoFCAGvA5exvTPcvWmwX92LVkOq26UQs5iHYzT4u4yKAkBScUoSaUuPSjGvqgFHVtNG8MNT67DlHpx2Jt57wWdpQo-nFoJJKPnMuDN2J62RrSnU8qD5f3NpmN-bs2_Y9GTI2Yrut6_H7Z431sxOTo4GITfP4aMaV4Eiwpr1DJFrdBIfe2bqAQcuEKLh8cjz8EIReQvIG3N9jAVMCT9emGT5YKW2T4l2-L8d9XTCnWQTcS193G9NnJ_1f3NOJvAAAA__8A1JI-), with many still missing. That total includes 27 campers and counselors at Camp Mystic in Kerr County on the banks of the Guadalupe River. Harrowing survival stories and biographies of [those who died](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGuozAQRb_GdEZmAjYULrahy7ZbosEeh9EaHBm_EP7-iej9wWumGenee86_-3RHjrw9_uJKtrxDmjY69kilUJ5CTMnz9nixK7zumVZaZ8rkJ1DQSWWk6iePHM-prbydlR-aimxjumYw0GqoFts7o3AwA86dRgfQNwF1hz6EMGjX64rtFaaM6ptGqc7UM2LjvAEcWgW3QYtWkeeScl0WKvTGPcQzvSjXLq1VtEspz13c_ggYBYzHcdT_dyzXU8B40QgYY3IYBYxXlYBRmetoAeMPmmRPW-HA5CVv0hP6eMpPmVw4RunS11byKT9KrsQqW_88OEbetRGteqzI8bOo_M7jy8J3AAAA__9R4YeB) or are [missing](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkMGq5CAQRb_G7GxMaWKycDEwuHuznWWoaNldPO08jJP0-_shDfMFsyqoezlw7u-P5QM58_P-Cwu59krb8qRzz9Qa1SXlbYv8vB8cGpe9UqGyUqW4gIJBKivVtETk_L2YLrpVxbnvyPV26GcLZoTu4YDCaKeg9YpqDhE0zimsQ5yMSahX27G7YMqqqe-VGuxtRexDtICzUaDnURhFkdtWb-1BjV64p_y9HVRvYStddo_WvnahfwjwAvx5nrfP4w9doQCPtXHIJMBfXgJ83gJmAf4NEuA_qdaDcyb5_sh_zrLwvl83YeHMdHVhGmTQ_YhjBAmYjDRGr3JCayUNkwpog4UpCu0rJaF_0oubrBS4hq66-HVyzryPVhh1L8j5bdD-b_fDwd8AAAD__zmHls8) have dominated headlines. Brothers Brock and Braeden Davis described the moment they realized the [water had entered their cabin](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGy2yAURL8GdXjQFQgoKNKoe2lTai5wsUmQ8SBsPf99Rv6FV-_OmT3752v9wlzy_fobN3L9O9X1TsdeqHdqayq1xny_vnLoedsbbbR5ahRXEKC40FyYNWIu71UO0XkR7TiQG7UarQY5w3Bz6EVIyiYZpZwoCq9smqPEMEsT9UxDdidMaGHGUQilLx5xDFEDWilgsjOTgmLutV36jTp9457Ku76oXULdhuJuvT92Nv1isDBYjuO4_LvV5xkyWLD1HAoxWE4vBkupAQuDJeD24AX53-e9I2-0hyfxD51_tM8uGMWnySPI5DkYabgkZTmSt1xEH4PQRhmThubi48il5H3WTIrrhrl81vWfffpy8D8AAP__kYyJ3w) at Camp La Junta in Hunt, and Christian Fell of Hunt recounted [swimming out his window](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLuunDAQhp_GdLOyB1hD4SIN3UmbEg14ACs2XtkGdt8-ItKR0qeZZvTfvl9f4xc57_b1JwU25b3Ececrey6F07j4GK3b19PNxYWcOHCYOLEdUWILUoPsRkvOf8amsmaStlcVG6Vb1WtsnlhtprVE8zKxWpau7XVDWinsZrZtW3dzjZUzt5nUslNKylY_JiI1W43UNxLr_ikaydaVmB5l48Jvyov_xJPTY46h8mYr5ZVF_UPgIHC4ruvxO1O5nwKHe43AwceZvMDhjhI4SP19HOzMFkqEfKTTnQzbsRcItEOmT4aNIZcYLcQdCAIXTjDF97-C9SBL_ngxJHdygm9qAocqGfu6nPcuP7Vo5BrI-b-1y__BPg3-CQAA___W8pTp) and standing on the meter box until the flood waters receded. Local, state, and federal officials have been questioned about whether the warnings provided before the flooding were sufficient. On Sunday, Kerrville City Manager Dalton Rice [pledged a “full review”](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDuu3DAMRVdjdxpItH4uVKRx99KmNPShx0Jk60HmG8_sPvDks4FUxCHBC5z742P-8Lnk_f7db-joudR5x_MoSIRtXkqtKe_3R46Ut6PhhlvAhmkGDopxw7idk8_lNcs-ucDTKHp0wigxGpAa-tUFHtWgQcgIPmjFB7DaKq5Q6dHLuPTZXWHccCsE58rcgvciJgN-lByGUXeSY8pU241WJHz6Yymv-sB2i3Xri1uJPo9u-NbB1MF0nuft51q_rmMHk2-UY8EOpsurg-kgTxe-g9if5W946_6jNZfCYv3aqb3Y3yYY5e0ai49U2_UKVjG0AVQYRmZQLUwmCMzLJTErlA7WJytU6ptLn2cuJR_adJLfN5_L24D-r_eHg18BAAD__2O0los) of their emergency alert system, and Gov. ## Gunman Killed at McAllen Border Patrol Facility
Just days after multiple masked suspects opened fire on police officers at a federal detention center in Alvarado, a gunman [fired shots at Border Patrol agents](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGuozAQRb_GdI7sAeJQuNiG7m27JRrsIYxkMLLnQfL3q6z2D155pat7dc6fr-kLOfH-_I0beXktedrpqolEqExLyjny_jw5CG-10EbbTIXiBAZ6bZw2jykip_fUNdHPJg62IW9dbwcH3R2a1duFHPTo3CMAdpYMLgMMfQuRAFzbNew_Y8aZh7XG9O42I9oQHeDQGWiHu-oMRZZcbrKS0Avrkt75pHILeWuSX0WOqtpfCkYF43VdtxNTonegXQqmT0vB-MFSMKYcMOn_4bvqOZdIRR8oJSddv-tBQTTvGoPwSbquOQsVzXvgSLvoSBgVjE3x8bg4Ja53pzrz3JD_XTXyM42nh78BAAD___tViYY) at the Rio Grande Valley Border Patrol Sector Annex in McAllen on Monday morning. The shooter, identified as 27-year-old Ryan Louis Mosqueda, was killed when agents returned fire. He was wearing tactical gear and armed with a rifle. Authorities found more weapons, ammunition, and backpacks in his car. His [last known address](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2unDAQhZ8GOq_swWAoXKShu2lTosEeYBRjr4wX9r59xCpvcLtPOtL5-_M1fSEHjutv3MmW95KmSNcRqBTK0xJS8hzXk13h_ci00z5TJj-BhFZII2Q_eeTwPena21n6QdVklWnVYEB3UG_WzQPpYUBoZwCJpu-kVz32WlHfuKWp2d5m0sheKSlb85gRlfMGcNASmqGrtCTPJeVH2ajQG48lfKeT8sOlvQ52K-V5VM2vCsYKxuu6HnF294pbr2C8sYLxdYj_xNHzyf6FQfzlEMgLersN48pxFesrLpxJzCl7yuKJJacgcKVYDvFJF9lFBGVAqzpb_7w4BD46U2m57sjhU6v87MzTwr8AAAD__z2xi3c) is in Michigan. Three law enforcement officials were [injured during the attack](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOtDAMhJ8mdKDEBAJFir-h27-9EhliIFIgq8S3LG9_YqV7gmvsxp75Zr4e4wN98Mf6H3ey_F7ieNCZAzFTGpcQo_PH-vIz-z0n2mmfKJEbQUJTSlPKbnTowzXqwtlJul4VZJVpVG9At1BsFlpwumvruqtJ9lNvasRGGYVa14ZMU3h7i0kjO6WkbEw1IarZGcBeS6j7VmhJznNMFW_E9Ma8hCu-KFVz3ItgN-ZnFvU_AYOA4TzP6jsjR4fXfSBgyBzTJWC4k90L2cdDwHD7Chik-R1TTI5S-UROMZQLzj54vsq8xcj-WMt9xhDoKD8QAoZO6x6M1vLzXSTrnqcPwefWCC3XHX34MPLfmn1Z-AkAAP__AHSKxw) and taken to a nearby hospital. One officer was shot in the knee but is reported to be in stable condition. Hours before the attack, Mosqueda’s father was [pulled over by police](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO4zAMRL9G7hjIimNFhYtr3O21Vxq0RMXEylIgcePN3x-8wH3BNWQxwMyb-fOxfCAnzo_fuNMk37EsmY6WSITqElMpgfPjxV54b5V22leqFBajzQ20BX1fAnJ6L0MXplUH13c09fbWO2uG0XTbNHoXcAyO7s5EIn-_Rh29Ns469Bax4-k001bf-17rm72siL0P1qAbtLm6UQ2aAkupF9lI6BtbTO_yonrxZe_StIk8m7r-UmZWZj6O4_LZUE5Rmflscz4ULhmTMvOZpsys7b-DsGOGDRusRBk-OSUKgFGoQnlS5vyAyJUABRC-GqylBqrwRKklQUTPieUNnOGHDvBLtlJZmBo0fCszd3UKz4NT4jZaNejHjpx-8OX_Rn9N5m8AAAD__xd6mDg) 20 miles away in Weslaco. He told officers he was looking for his son, who was psychologically distressed and armed. The FBI is leading the investigation.
## Stories of Hope Amid Tragedy
Amid the death and destruction caused by the flooding in Central Texas this week, some are finding hope in stories of heroic and unlikely rescues, as well as the massive outpouring of support from fellow Texans. Coast Guard rescue swimmer Scott Ruskan, 26, has been credited with [coordinating the evacuation](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOwyAQBNCvsbuNYG1MXFBcky7XXmmtYW2jg2ABiZO_PyW_cPVITzPzc52u5IO_rd8U2dTnkqYbHyVwrZynJaTk_G19eFt9LJkjx5kzuwkFKhAaxHly5MNr6ltnZuFG2bKRWslRYz9guxm1oMXFKqWp60apesm4jItTM55R0tB688aEFmcphVD6NBNJ6zTS2AvsxqHpBTtfUz7VjSs_qSzhlR6cTzbFNpit1r003VeDlwYvO6c98Dtq8GITlQrrnbKDcvgYOcOxJchc7J0dyEGBpbhDfJXqLXx0-MwuUHam3wLpXkFKPehOqjYbtx8-BF8G3fRijeTDp0b933kPg38BAAD__zLMhJY) of 165 people at Camp Mystic. # Executive Order 14024:
Is This the U.S. Dollar's Death Warrant?
This isn't a warning it's happening NOW.
With **[Executive Order 14024](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8zl1v8iAYxvFPQ89s4OatHHDg83Tdki2L2UvcdoaFKgtYhKrx2y81xlP43flfJqbgh4tG8h8C2HlbEACiSwRw-D7HfPyNz4-Lh7Aki4N4jXz-hf83eoI73veGH1bvPyF9msKje_rahHwidz5dkrvjW7R20fgwv8q2spoOFrPKaSI5UZJKgGqniZVcKXCmt8oIYQkTigy9ZdjiphGq8howcCxxQwgAxjUHLgWR0PRgGq4EYvjaqU102feGlOlsch7HWPdjrILeTVMq12Edgs4Ndcp-zH66bMdgk8nT3uWyIGzmCDr2AR0XCLp2rcjLar6iXTluANEWSywRiHLcUETb9VuVtU1nH4IvQiKGt9chc_ak4S8AAP__UAVu8g)** , the groundwork is being laid to dismantle the U.S. dollar's dominance on the global stage.
Experts warn the consequences could devastate your savings, retirement, and financial freedom.
What does that mean for you?
* **Four major countries** have already ditched the dollar for trade.
* **Elon Musk** warns this is making countries want to abandon the dollar.
* Billionaire **Sam Zell** said it best: I can't imagine anything more disastrous to our country.

If you have cash in a U.S. bank, **YOUR financial future is at serious risk.**
Executive Order 14024 is paving the way for irreversible damage to the dollar's value threatening your wealth, your savings, and your retirement.
When the dollar collapses, **your savings could disappear overnight.**
**With Trump threatening Russia with more sanctions, Russia is rushing to finalize their BRICS payment system aimed to destroy the U.S dollar.**

clean_body: Elon warned about this. Executive Order 14024 is still active. Executive Order 14024: Is This the U.S. Dollar's Death Warrant? This isn't a warning it's happening NOW. With , the groundwork is being laid to dismantle the U.S. dollar's dominance on the global stage. Experts warn the consequences could devastate your savings, retirement, and financial freedom. What does that mean for you? Four major countries have already ditched the dollar for trade. Elon Musk warns this is making countries want to abandon the dollar. Billionaire Sam Zell said it best: I can't imagine anything more disastrous to our country. If you have cash in a U.S. bank, YOUR financial future is at serious risk. Executive Order 14024 is paving the way for irreversible damage to the dollar's value threatening your wealth, your savings, and your retirement. When the dollar collapses, your savings could disappear overnight. With Trump threatening Russia with more sanctions, Russia is rushing to finalize their BRICS payment system aimed to destroy the U.S dollar. This is your last chance to prepare yourself from what's coming.

name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Village idiot is pushing sky-high tariffs again
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Demand Congress block Trump's asinine tariffs](https://default.salsalabs.org/T612d1916-9c16-4e58-b321-59b839303ae9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tef85aed0-0874-4544-9fdd-34d58f55cb23/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Trump's earlier tariffs (and tariff threats) caused stock markets to plummet, and put us into unnecessary trade wars with our allies and adversaries alike. And months later, just when it looked like things on that front were starting to edge back towards normalcy -- he doubled down today and introduced a whole new round of sky-high tariffs. And not surprisingly, the stock market went way down, and the odds of a recession went way up. [**Congress can put an end to this madness. Congress has the power to overturn Trump's tariffs, and they can do it right now with a simple majority vote. Tell them to do it NOW.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7be86eaf-68fd-4690-a0e8-87b65ddc99dc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Prices on almost everything are already rising, as companies price in the ones previously announced. Even if Trump reverses them, the damage is already done, with the whole world economy now having to price in the roller coasters mood swings of the looney in the White House. [For the sake of our entire economy and way of life, we need to DEMAND Republicans join with Democrats to REVERSE Trump's disastrous tariffs.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T17e84cd5-1317-4a9a-94e9-e8e69e483f60/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [**Sign your name: Demand Congress reverse Trump's asinine tariffs.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7ef4296f-5883-4de1-8db1-783fc46affab/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 7/8/2025
body:
Polis Plans Special Session After Trump’s Budget Bombshell: Dems See Opportunity to Revive Agenda
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi friends,
Listen to today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)! And don't miss our latest installment of the **[COvid Chronicles](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**.
Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** As Texas reels from deadly flooding, Colorado’s Task Force 1 stands [ready to deploy and assist](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) with rescue and recovery. A Western Colorado weather aficionado contacted RMV following the tragedy to urge more people to take advantage of [advanced mobile tools](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Back home, tensions mount over the state’s [wolf reintroduction program](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Meanwhile, Governor Polis has [called a special session](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), using Trump’s budget cuts as justification to revive stalled progressive initiatives.
🇺🇸 **On the National Stage...** Federal agents [arrested 264 fugitives](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) in a major raid, including two illegal immigrants wanted for sex crimes. A DOJ memo reaffirmed [Epstein’s death as suicide](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), denying the existence of a “client list.” And a GOP-led hearing spotlighted [visa overstays and lax enforcement](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), fueling calls for immigration reform.
**🗣️ Commentary Spotlight...** In Brush, Colorado, Harvey Baker captures the power of [patriotism still alive in small-town America](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), where the Fourth of July parade serves as a living tribute to faith, freedom, and community. Meanwhile, Ayaan Hirsi Ali warns that the student debt crisis [isn’t just economic—it’s ideological](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).
This is the Mountain Minute for Tuesday, July 8, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Polis Plans Special Session After Trump’s Budget Bombshell: Dems See Opportunity to Revive Agenda](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [THE SUM & SUBSTANCE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
Passage Thursday of the budget-cutting “One Big Beautiful Bill” essentially mandates that the Legislature will return to the Capitol for a special session this summer to deal with aspects of the federal law impacting Medicaid funding and artificial-intelligence regulation.
Gov. Jared Polis’ Office of State Planning and Budgeting estimates the bill’s reductions to Medicaid spending, food assistance and other benefits that are largely or partially federally funded will cut state revenues $500 million and boost state costs another $500 million. That will necessitate legislators to come back and re-balance the budget, likely by reducing funding to a number of other programs.
And before passing the bill, a bipartisan group of U.S. senators stripped from it another provision that some state officials and business leaders had hoped to see stay in it — a 10-year moratorium on states enacting artificial-intelligence regulations beyond federal law.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[They never saw it coming: Kerrville flood sparks call for weather readiness](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* A deadly overnight flood in Kerrville, Texas, killed over 100 people after the Guadalupe River surged without warning, catching residents off guard.
* Experts urge increased use of weather apps like Radar Omega and live streamers like Ryan Hall and Max Velocity for real-time alerts that often outpace traditional media.
* The disaster reignited debate over federal weather infrastructure, with critics citing stalled funding for alert systems despite earlier Trump-era upgrades to radar and emergency warnings.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[The COvid Chronicles June 8–15, 2020: Can’t visit grandma—but defund-the-police protests are doctor-approved](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* During June 8–15, 2020, Colorado officials enforced strict COVID rules on families and businesses—banning hospital visits and shuttering restaurants—while praising mass anti-police protests as a “public health” necessity.
* Despite declining case counts, state leaders and health groups opposed compassionate legislation, pushed for aggressive police reform, and allowed the cancel culture mob to pressure neighborhoods and erase local history.
* The most chilling moment: over 1,300 doctors publicly supported BLM protests while condemning anti-lockdown rallies—illustrating the weaponization of science and public health to advance political agendas.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[Hearing lays groundwork for GOP-led reform after 3-year immigration surge, 500K visa overstays](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** **BY SHAINA COLE****| NATIONAL | JULY 8** _The U.S. House Judiciary Committee held a hearing June 25 on visa security and legal immigration pathways, revisiting the Trump administration’s policies and examining how current enforcement gaps could be putting national security at risk._
**[Baker: Freedom still rings loud in Brush](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** **BY HARVEY BAKER | COMMENTARY | JULY 7** _In Northeast Colorado, where faith, family, and freedom still shape daily life, over 1,200 residents lined the streets under clear skies to celebrate the 70th Annual Brush Fourth of July Parade. This wasn’t just another parade—it was a full-hearted tribute to the traditions and people who keep the American spirit alive._
**[Devotional: When the truth calls you back into formation](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**BY DRAKE HUNTER | COMMENTARY | JULY 6** _I remember the day truth found me, normative truth that is, and it wasn’t in a church pew or quiet devotional moment. It was on a drill pad, surrounded by hundreds of Airmen at Lackland Air Force Base, standing at attention in full formation._
__

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [tori@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\))) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
---
|
---
**💦 DID YOU KNOW?** While 71% of Earth’s surface is covered in water, only about 2.5% of it is fresh—and **less than 1% of that is actually accessible**. The rest is locked away in glaciers, ice caps, or deep underground, making just 0.007% of the planet’s water available for human use.
|
---
**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** "Those who stay away from the election think that one vote will do no good. 'Tis but one step more to think one vote will do no harm." – Ralph Waldo Emerson
|
---

Now comes the masterpiece: — a digitally mined token backed by real, verified gold still in the ground. It merges the scarcity and freedom of Bitcoin with the tangible value and trust of gold. And it goes even further: ❌ No physical extraction — the gold stays in the earth ❌ No storage costs, no middlemen ❌ No pollution or environmental harm ✅ Just real gold, digitally secured and globally tradeable Built by a team of former SEC advisors, global mining executives, and institutional blockchain partners trusted by Goldman Sachs. Only 10,000 NatGold Tokens are available in this exclusive pre-market round — and they're being offered now at a And NatGold is just getting started. Over $20 trillion in gold lies dormant underground — untouched, untapped, and unmonetized. NatGold unleashes that value — instantly, cleanly, and without ever disturbing the earth. This isn't just another token. It's the first asset designed to truly fix money — and a rare opportunity to get in before the world catches on. To your wealth, Brian Hicks President, Angel Investment Research P.S. If Bitcoin — backed by nothing but code and belief — can hit $100,000+ per token... But only 10,000 tokens are available in this early round — and they're priced at a 10% discount to gold's verified Baseline Intrinsic Value.

name: Alliance Defending Freedom
subject: Historic Supreme Court Win! Fund the Fight to Defund Planned Parenthood Nationwide
body:
Great news as champions for life today!

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhnve1ik597gptpueh2giqh05ghtds6s51kqgj18_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cjie0ob4cph2bs)

##
Dear Champion of Life,

Great news as champions for life today! The U.S. Supreme Court's recent ruling leaves states FREE to defund Planned Parenthood!

The decision in _Medina v. Planned Parenthood_ reinstates a South Carolina order that deemed abortion giants like Planned Parenthood unqualified for taxpayer funds via Medicaid.

This is a huge decision that could protect countless unborn lives, as well as women and young people across the country--especially if other states follow South Carolina's courageous lead.

Planned Parenthood has taken the lives of millions of unborn children over the years. It has also left so many women and children scarred--physically and emotionally--as a result of its pro-abortion, pro-gender ideology agenda.

No American should be forced to fund businesses that profit from harming and taking innocent lives. Thankfully, the Supreme Court's ruling today means that funding can finally end.

And now we have an opportunity to call on other states to take a stand against Big Abortion.

Now, there is no excuse. Thanks to ADF's win for South Carolina, the Supreme Court has allowed **states to defund Planned Parenthood.**

[Will you help us take the next step for a pro-life America?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zoqfio00uqkh8pe3cucd889hlisk8j9hn5b372r0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cjie0ob4cph2bs) Here at Alliance Defending Freedom, we're ready to work alongside the next states who are brave enough to say NO to Planned Parenthood. **But to do that we need your help, today.** [**Your gift of any amount will help save lives**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlbshun92t5p11evo6p7lgdkug66mer873a88o9o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cjie0ob4cph2bs) as we stand together to defund Planned Parenthood state by state.

In Christ,

**Julia Payne Koon**
Legal Counsel ****

---
Alliance Defending Freedom 15100 N. 90th Street, Scottsdale, Arizona 85260

---

Pop Acta Media | 1600 Daily
---

# Prayers for the Hill Country
---
| |
---
| Like so many of you, Team TFVC is heartbroken over the devastation that **swept through the Texas Hill Country** this past weekend. We’ve followed the unfolding updates from Kerr County and surrounding areas with a heavy heart—grieving the loss, yet holding onto hope for the missing and unaccounted for. Many of those affected are not just names in the news, but **people we know and care about deeply**. Please continue to **join us in prayer** for these families and communities. If you feel moved to help, monetary donations are the most effective way to support recovery efforts as the focus begins to shift from **search and rescue to long-term rebuilding**. Officials have asked that individuals refrain from traveling to the area or sending goods at this time. Vetted organizations accepting donations include:

---
|
---
| | | [ TX Crisis Response ](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/td/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTU5MzU5MzM3MjkxMDU2NzE2LFwiclwiOjE1OTM1OTM3ODQ5OTA0NDc1Nn0iLCJzIjoiMmJjMTg1MDQ2MDUzM2U0MiJ9)

Even with the passage of HB 1586, it is important for parents to order vaccine exemptions for their students as soon as possible. Order yours today to avoid enrollment delays!

We’ve followed the unfolding updates from Kerr County and surrounding areas with a heavy heart—grieving the loss, yet holding onto hope for the missing and unaccounted for. Many of those affected are not just names in the news, but people we know and care about deeply. Please continue to join us in prayer for these families and communities. If you feel moved to help, monetary donations are the most effective way to support recovery efforts as the focus begins to shift from search and rescue to long-term rebuilding. Officials have asked that individuals refrain from traveling to the area or sending goods at this time. Vetted organizations accepting donations include: | | | | | | | | | | | Together, we can stand in the gap for our neighbors in this time of need. | | | News | | | | | | Petition Closing Soon | We will send the OTC Ivermectin petition signatures to print and deliver them to Gov. Abbott soon! Add your name today to show your support! Together we will get OTC Ivermectin added to the upcoming Special Session agenda! Texans deserve Ivermectin access without a prescription. | | | | | | Reminder: Order Your Exemptions | Even with the passage of HB 1586, it is important for parents to order vaccine exemptions for their students as soon as possible. The printable option is not currently available and may not be until after the beginning of the school year, so TFVC encourages you to utilize the affidavit request form on the DSHS website. Order yours today to avoid enrollment delays! | | | | | | Does Your Group Need a Speaker? | Texans for Vaccine Choice wants to keep your group up to date on the fight for medical liberty in Texas and how we can win. Choose the "request a speaker" option from the drop down on our Contact Us form: | | | Upcoming Events | | | | | | | | | | | | Austin area OC Stephanie is hosting twoBack to School meetups for families to connect, learn more about HB 1586, and get your exemption forms notarized for free. Details below: | | | | | | | | | | | | | TFVC In Action | | | | | | Voyage Houston | TFVC Outreach Director Carrie Bigford was recently spotlighted as Rising Star in Voyage Houston. Learn more about how Carrie turned personal tragedy into purpose in this powerful interview. This is a must-read for anyone who believes in informed consent and respectful advocacy. Get inspired to speak up with courage and kindness. | | | | | | | Texans for Vaccine Choice 1540 Keller Parkway Ste 108 #166, KellerTexas, United States of America | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | You are receiving this email because you donated or signed up. |

name: NEGOP
subject: Calling All Campaigns & Candidates – Your Training Starts Here!
body:
Join the NEGOP and RNC on July 26 for the ultimate campaign training in Lincoln.
| | | | |
---
# You're Invited!
---
We're excited to invite you to the 2025 NEGOP Campaign & Candidate School, hosted in partnership with the Republican National Committee (RNC).
On Saturday, July 26th, we're bringing together county GOP leaders, candidates, campaign staff, volunteers, and grassroots leaders for a full day of hands-on training in Lincoln, Nebraska, at the Graduate Lincoln. Whether you're preparing to run for office or ready to help someone who is, this training is designed to equip you with the tools, strategies, and confidence to win.
Location: Graduate Hotel Lincoln, 141 N 9th St, Lincoln, NE Time: 9:00 AM - 4:00 PM Hotel Booking: Book your stay here - group rate includes parking. [BOOK HERE!](https://feyrpzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nDdlp5hrmLif43-wW0nttMpHixcY5z-6N6xHKcPYDmmrN4kckGmuKiU8-fJP7124YsMpB7DGKYiGwxN0WZwftAkSGohFlZh-hYFt0Xr8eWuVbMjJaIjFukEhPha5RLtxyMLBVkXWZhE2eR7joikc6qeRWvBDVzK0-lzEPwozuOw=&c=2w-zsmWs3i3-Ouzw2CUGg4_FQI8gjb1__jm-c8Pw_8jvZYlQ51w32A==&ch=yaIrxoIUhFMWn-j0XES69bZS5mKzNcdepZe9OswaPW4hpIOIhgtEig==)
This program offers a full day of learning, networking, and campaign skill-building. Breakfast, lunch, and snacks will be provided, along with all-day beverage service.
What You'll Learn:
* Ready to Run: Your Path to Public Office
* Campaign Organization
* Path to Victory
* Campaign Budget
* Field Program / Voter Contact
* Absentee & Early Voting (AB/EV)
* Mastering Campaign Finance: Funding Strategies and Best Practices
* Fundraising Methods & Finance Planning
* Data-Driven Victory: RNC Tools, GOP Data Center, Numinar
* Crafting Your Campaign Narrative: Messaging, Rapid Response, Earned and Paid Media, and Building a Comms Plan

This training is built for Nebraska Republicans who want to make a difference in 2026 and beyond.
Spots are limited--register early to secure your place. RSVP here:[ ](https://feyrpzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nDdlp5hrmLif43-wW0nttMpHixcY5z-6N6xHKcPYDmmrN4kckGmuKvBq-abPLTPE9qyJwmtHMba1RBrbnORgMdNqUUvQRLm2mJUx_3N9nn6LuIbI35WlEkNT7Q_WNCCrz4cypLzCxNOtcH60z8p7--yF0n6LB6223Fx4dqRImyup-KyXWhTIYMRBcG7tXy2X&c=2w-zsmWs3i3-Ouzw2CUGg4_FQI8gjb1__jm-c8Pw_8jvZYlQ51w32A==&ch=yaIrxoIUhFMWn-j0XES69bZS5mKzNcdepZe9OswaPW4hpIOIhgtEig==)[ https://secure.anedot.com/negop/campaignschool2025](https://feyrpzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nDdlp5hrmLif43-wW0nttMpHixcY5z-6N6xHKcPYDmmrN4kckGmuKvBq-abPLTPE9qyJwmtHMba1RBrbnORgMdNqUUvQRLm2mJUx_3N9nn6LuIbI35WlEkNT7Q_WNCCrz4cypLzCxNOtcH60z8p7--yF0n6LB6223Fx4dqRImyup-KyXWhTIYI3m6CdFG5Dy&c=2w-zsmWs3i3-Ouzw2CUGg4_FQI8gjb1__jm-c8Pw_8jvZYlQ51w32A==&ch=yaIrxoIUhFMWn-j0XES69bZS5mKzNcdepZe9OswaPW4hpIOIhgtEig==)
If you have questions, please contact Joe Hagerty at political@ne.gop. We hope to see you in Lincoln!
Sincerely, Haile McAnally Communications Director Nebraska Republican Party
---
| | [](https://feyrpzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nDdlp5hrmLif43-wW0nttMpHixcY5z-6N6xHKcPYDmmrN4kckGmuKvBq-abPLTPE9qyJwmtHMba1RBrbnORgMdNqUUvQRLm2mJUx_3N9nn6LuIbI35WlEkNT7Q_WNCCrz4cypLzCxNOtcH60z8p7--yF0n6LB6223Fx4dqRImyup-KyXWhTIYFan6ASRUXQb&c=2w-zsmWs3i3-Ouzw2CUGg4_FQI8gjb1__jm-c8Pw_8jvZYlQ51w32A==&ch=yaIrxoIUhFMWn-j0XES69bZS5mKzNcdepZe9OswaPW4hpIOIhgtEig==)
---
| | | | NEGOP | 1610 N St. | Lincoln, NE 68508 US

subject: Bernie Sanders is LEADING this fight >>>>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
You need to see this:
| **🚨 BREAKING: DEMOCRATS FIGHT BACK! 🚨** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91769?t=6&akid=20517%2E878179%2EAfjKCx) Bernie Sanders is LEADING the charge to take on Trump and save our Democracy. We’re _THRILLED!_

**Trump and MAGA Republicans are already going after him relentlessly, so we’re sending Sen. Bernie Sanders a MASSIVE letter thanking him for all his amazing work!**

[**You’ve been PERSONALLY selected to sign, friend, so please don’t let us down: Add your name to thank Senator Sanders now! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91769?t=7&akid=20517%2E878179%2EAfjKCx) | [**Donate $3 to sign the card now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91769?t=8&akid=20517%2E878179%2EAfjKCx)
---
TO: Sen. Bernie Sanders
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: Thank you. **Dear Senator Bernie Sanders,**

__Thank you for all your hard work leading the Anti-Trump resistance!__

It’s easy to feel helpless with MAGA Republicans in charge of the House, Senate, and White House, but you keep us hopeful that we can fight back.

**I know it isn’t easy fighting off Trump and the GOP’s escalating threats to take you down, so please know that Democrats _across the country_ stand with you.**

Your leadership is absolutely critical right now, and we hope more Democrats follow your lead.

[**I can’t thank you enough for all of your work to stop Donald Trump and save our Democracy! So I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my gratitude and to keep electing incredible Democrats who will save our democracy from MAGA extremists like Donald Trump. »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91769?t=9&akid=20517%2E878179%2EAfjKCx) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91769?t=10&akid=20517%2E878179%2EAfjKCx)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20517%2E878179%2EAfjKCx). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20517%2E878179%2EAfjKCx).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20517%2E878179%2EAfjKCx) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=20517%2E878179%2EAfjKCx). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=20517%2E878179%2EAfjKCx)
---

Friend,
My America First agenda is EXPLODING their corrupt system from the inside — and now the Democrats are in **_TOTAL PANIC._**
First, they tried to **DERAIL MY CABINET.**
Then, they threatened to **IMPEACH ME THREE TIMES.**
Now, they’re trying to force me to bring **ILLEGAL ALIENS** back to this country — **_SICK!_**

name: America First War Room Sponsor
subject: The High Blood Pressure Hoax
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kM1u6jAQhZ_G2RHZY8dOFl7cW2RaVarUH6nAbnAcMIqJcUICb19BKduZb-Z8Ohhi65uLJuo_Adj5uicAhP8jAMfVFNJpH14Xs2KxX8-O8i0U1y083dERHvDB4nz9_pnE9nnso-y-ouTLkT3w4RLdA76H5i6gb69TNc9qzZuaisxppgpWlaAkzXbaOlVhU4lKImclpyiaQpQOKkAFgtWZ10ChoIqWjBfAZd5wumFOuKrZCA4oiaC3nByDS94i64cJU-q6kNsuZK3eDUPsb2KGgJlSlx9OtnWn_vfMdoGAuSsTMCMBc8ZovnG1spxwcyuNz9Ui4cvHdF5mSddx8m3re6mIoNu_N9mo4ScAAP__Kz1u5w)
Dear Friend,

There's a catch when it comes to reducing your blood pressure.

And it's something my Aunt Carol learned the hard way.

At 67 years old, Aunt Carol happily boasted about how she'd beaten her bad blood pressure.

How'd she do it?

With FOUR prescriptions... _from her doctor_.

Not really a shocker, and not exactly the beating Aunt Carol described. Perhaps you can relate...

That's because blood pressure medications don't "cure" anything... they just delay the inevitable.

And without major changes — when you stop taking them — your blood pressure goes right back up!

Which is why your doctor advises you to never stop taking these drugs.

And if so-called "experts" and pharmaceutical companies have their way, you'll be taking these medications forever...

> • "You may need more than one type of prescription medication to keep your blood pressure at a healthy level...
>
> Follow your recommendations carefully, even if it means taking medication everyday for the rest of your life." — _The American Heart Association_
>
> • "High blood pressure cannot be cured, and if you need to take medications, you will probably need to keep taking them for life." — _Blood Pressure UK_
>
> • "In most cases, medication is needed for life." — _The Patient_

That's because they're treating your symptoms...

In fact, its a never-ending cycle of symptoms and drugs... symptoms and drugs... rinse and repeat!

All while Big Pharma executives laugh their way to the bank.

We can do better than this!

Until you [**find out how to get to the root cause of your problem**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8zsFuqzAQheGnMbsge2wwLLy4NxGpVClSlS7a7Aawg1MbHEOgefuKKMp25pP-gz44a-6KyP8EoLPtSAAI_0cArt-Lj7eLf99vsv3ltLnmB5-tX9g-6Qwv3De4O30cozi_zWPIh8-Q86-Zvfh0D_qFn9FUe7Ruvcpd0ipuWioSrZjMWFmAzGnSKZQFNNDWVIq60NIwyaHMGNSFQVGwNrEKKGRU0oLxDHieGk5rpoUuTS04YE4EfXRS9DraBtk4LRjjMPi0GXziVDdNYXwMqwhUAc96TIPGnx6nW0S3qvWuo9HNVId-WAhULnACle1b_btBloYuEF4dt4TvDpTxMisZTaJqw2Kds2MuiaDnx4q1OSv4CwAA__-rgXBx)... you'll never have normal blood pressure.

But here's the secret they don't want you to know... You can [**get better blood pressure naturally**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8zsFuqzAQheGnMbsge2wwLLy4NxGpVClSlS7a7Aawg1MbHEOgefuKKMp25pP-gz44a-6KyP8EoLPtSAAI_0cArt-Lj7eLf99vsv3ltLnmB5-tX9g-6Qwv3De4O30cozi_zWPIh8-Q86-Zvfh0D_qFn9FUe7Ruvcpd0ipuWioSrZjMWFmAzGnSKZQFNNDWVIq60NIwyaHMGNSFQVGwNrEKKGRU0oLxDHieGk5rpoUuTS04YE4EfXRS9DraBtk4LRjjMPi0GXziVDdNYXwMqwhUAc96TIPGnx6nW0S3qvWuo9HNVId-WAhULnACle1b_btBloYuEF4dt4TvDpTxMisZTaJqw2Kds2MuiaDnx4q1OSv4CwAA__-rgXBx) by...

• Soothing inflammation
• Relaxing blood vessels
• Reducing artery plaque
• And increasing blood circulation

Here's how to get 120/80 BP and healthy circulation... with [**4 all natural blood pressure savers...**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8zsFuqzAQheGnMbsge2wwLLy4NxGpVClSlS7a7Aawg1MbHEOgefuKKMp25pP-gz44a-6KyP8EoLPtSAAI_0cArt-Lj7eLf99vsv3ltLnmB5-tX9g-6Qwv3De4O30cozi_zWPIh8-Q86-Zvfh0D_qFn9FUe7Ruvcpd0ipuWioSrZjMWFmAzGnSKZQFNNDWVIq60NIwyaHMGNSFQVGwNrEKKGRU0oLxDHieGk5rpoUuTS04YE4EfXRS9DraBtk4LRjjMPi0GXziVDdNYXwMqwhUAc96TIPGnx6nW0S3qvWuo9HNVId-WAhULnACle1b_btBloYuEF4dt4TvDpTxMisZTaJqw2Kds2MuiaDnx4q1OSv4CwAA__-rgXBx)

Yours for peak health,

Virginia Tims-Lawson
Founder, Peak Pure & Natural®

| Jul 8

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/rebekahjones/p/climate-change-caused-the-texas-flooding?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

_For my piece on the human disaster in Texas last week,[click here.](https://substack.com/redirect/ee825664-b833-4d91-84e8-01c822ac1571?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_
* * *
Imagine a rising tide--a gradual swell that gathers force until it overwhelms the beach, moving onto the shore, and swallowing everything in its path.
That swell is the warming of Earth's atmosphere and oceans.
During the past five years,[ the intensity of extreme floods and droughts has doubled](https://substack.com/redirect/c2e41b12-07c5-4d38-81b4-3094f3bfa3a9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) compared to the 2003-2020 average. Meanwhile, heatwave data reveal that in 2024, the world saw [41 additional days of extreme heat](https://substack.com/redirect/6c3fa822-b360-4497-ac0b-98f129ab004d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) above historical averages.
These are not statistical anomalies--they are the new normal.
The 1.3 °C rise in global temperature above pre-industrial levels means air is holding more moisture, oceans are warmer, jet streams have fragmented- all lending themselves to slower-moving storms, sudden flooding, and unrelenting heat domes.
And this year has thus far been a testament to those dramatic and violent changes...

GOP Rep. Brandon Gill **[took aim at Democrat Rep. Jasmine Crockett](https://substack.com/redirect/97ddb1b1-ec9f-454d-b258-8e48eee18050?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for attacking the Trump administration's dismantling of the woke USAID bureaucracy.
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/97ddb1b1-ec9f-454d-b258-8e48eee18050?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/97ddb1b1-ec9f-454d-b258-8e48eee18050?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"My Republican colleagues have a weird fetish with dictators, or wannabe dictators, so it should come as no surprise that they are here attacking global democracy programs," Crockett said, referring to USAID aid programs targeted for cuts.
"The dismantling of USAID is just another part of the Republican's chaotic foreign policy and their pro-dictator agenda!" Crockett finished.
Gill fired back, shutting down her point completely, "We have strategic interests abroad that we ought to advance and it ought be rooted in a rational conception of the way the world actually is and not the way some leftist secular bureaucrat at USAID believes the world should be!"
"Forcing transgenderism and novel sexual fetishes on traditional cultures does not advance American interests, **[it alienates us on the world stage!"](https://substack.com/redirect/97ddb1b1-ec9f-454d-b258-8e48eee18050?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** he added.
Watch the clash here:
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/97ddb1b1-ec9f-454d-b258-8e48eee18050?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# **[Zuckerberg's New "Superintelligence" Memo Reveals a Colossal Problem](https://substack.com/redirect/b4c885fb-aa4c-4592-93ca-3861d2a7b469?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b4c885fb-aa4c-4592-93ca-3861d2a7b469?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This week, Mark Zuckerberg unveiled Meta's new mission: the pursuit of "superintelligence" -- AI with intelligence beyond human capacity.
In a company-wide memo, he announced the formation of Meta Superintelligence Labs, a new division that will require "unprecedented computational resources" and "planetary-scale data centers" to achieve its goal.
But buried in the announcement is a critical vulnerability: the "colossal energy requirements" needed to fuel this ambition.1
Our nation's power grid is already struggling.1 Many experts warn it may not handle AI's growing power needs.1
"We need _double_ the energy we currently have in the U.S. for AI to be as big as we want." -- President of the United States, Donald Trump, World Economic Forum, Jan 2025.5
This is where Next Thing Technologies comes in. They believe they are building the power source for the superintelligence race with their revolutionary sodium-ion batteries.1
This technology could be the key to unlocking the future of AI, offering a safer, more scalable, and more abundant energy source than lithium.1
Since its first round, the **internal share-offering price has risen 209%.** 2
**You can still join more than 7,800 investors** 3**at just $6/share -- with up to 20% bonus shares.**4

* * *
# Trump responds to socialist Mamdani's threats to arrest Netanyahu
President Donald Trump **[just gave a classic"Trump" response](https://substack.com/redirect/29eaba3a-5217-48f4-8f9b-0fd223875980?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to socialist NYC mayor candidate Zohran Mamdani after he threatened to arrest the Prime Minister of Israel.
* **NYC mayoral candidate Zohran Mamdani pledged to arrest Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu** if he visits the city, citing the International Criminal Court's arrest warrant against Netanyahu and stating that New York's values should align with international law.
* **Netanyahu dismissed Mamdani's threat as "not serious" and "silly"** during a White House meeting with President Trump, saying he's "not concerned" and would visit New York "with President Trump" if needed.
* **Trump called Mamdani a "communist" who has "said some really bad things about Jewish people"** and warned that the mayoral candidate would need federal funding and "better behave" or face "big problems" from the White House.
* **Trump said:** "He might make it... But, you know, it all comes through the White House. He needs the money through the White House. He needs a lot... He's going to behave. He'll behave. He better behave. Otherwise, he's going to have big problems."
* **Netanyahu used the exchange to discuss broader Middle East policy** , arguing against a two-state solution by referencing October 7th attacks and stating that Israel would only accept peace arrangements where "the sovereign power of security always remains in our hands."

* * *
# LA Mayor Karen Bass confronts ICE officers in LA park
Federal immigration agents carried out a heavily armed sweep in Los Angeles on Monday, **[prompting Mayor Karen Bass to confront the officers](https://substack.com/redirect/c26234b1-671e-4b07-a946-3900bf92bf42?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and demand they leave.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c26234b1-671e-4b07-a946-3900bf92bf42?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Federal agents conducted a heavily armed immigration sweep at MacArthur Park in Los Angeles** , with ICE, CBP, and military units deploying rifles, armored vehicles, and officers on horseback in what appeared to be a large-scale enforcement operation.
* **Mayor Karen Bass confronted the agents and demanded they leave immediately** , calling the operation a "political stunt" that made the city look "under siege" and was "outrageous and un-American," while the sweep disrupted a children's summer camp and homeless health services.

[](https://substack.com/redirect/d42a87e8-6a23-462c-aa77-aae7e6fc9686?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Border Patrol officials defied the mayor's demands** , with El Centro Sector Chief Gregory Bovino telling FOX Los Angeles that "the federal government does not work for Karen Bass" and agents would stay "until that mission is accomplished," warning Bass to "get used to us."
* **The operation's results remain unclear** , as activists had warned people to leave the park before agents arrived, and it's unknown if any arrests were made, while the LAPD said they were unaware of the federal operation taking place in their jurisdiction.

* * *
# No Epstein client list, suicide?
President Donald Trump's Justice Department and FBI concluded they **[found no evidence](https://substack.com/redirect/e665460e-621a-406d-a00b-7fe1ce434c8e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that Jeffrey Epstein blackmailed powerful figures, kept a "client list," or was murdered, releasing prison video footage that they say shows no one entered Epstein's cell area the night he died in 2019, supporting the suicide ruling.
* **The findings contradict conspiracy theories previously promoted by Trump's own FBI appointees** , including current FBI Director Kash Patel and Deputy Director Dan Bongino, who had questioned the official suicide narrative before their appointments but have since accepted it.
* **No further charges will be filed in the Epstein case** , with investigators stating they found no evidence to pursue investigations against other individuals, and the DOJ refusing to release additional materials citing concerns about exposing child abuse details and wrongly implicating innocent people.

"Forcing transgenderism and novel sexual fetishes on traditional cultures does not advance American interests!!" | | | Jul 8 | | | | | | | | | | | | GOP Rep. Brandon Gill for attacking the Trump administration's dismantling of the woke USAID bureaucracy. "My Republican colleagues have a weird fetish with dictators, or wannabe dictators, so it should come as no surprise that they are here attacking global democracy programs," Crockett said, referring to USAID aid programs targeted for cuts. "The dismantling of USAID is just another part of the Republican's chaotic foreign policy and their pro-dictator agenda!" Crockett finished. Gill fired back, shutting down her point completely, "We have strategic interests abroad that we ought to advance and it ought be rooted in a rational conception of the way the world actually is and not the way some leftist secular bureaucrat at USAID believes the world should be!" "Forcing transgenderism and novel sexual fetishes on traditional cultures does not advance American interests, he added. Watch the clash here: Together with Next Things Technologies | | ---|---|--- This week, Mark Zuckerberg unveiled Meta's new mission: the pursuit of "superintelligence" -- AI with intelligence beyond human capacity. In a company-wide memo, he announced the formation of Meta Superintelligence Labs, a new division that will require "unprecedented computational resources" and "planetary-scale data centers" to achieve its goal. But buried in the announcement is a critical vulnerability: the "colossal energy requirements" needed to fuel this ambition.1 Our nation's power grid is already struggling.1 Many experts warn it may not handle AI's growing power needs.1 "We need double the energy we currently have in the U.S. for AI to be as big as we want." -- President of the United States, Donald Trump, World Economic Forum, Jan 2025.5 This is where Next Thing Technologies comes in. They believe they are building the power source for the superintelligence race with their revolutionary sodium-ion batteries.1 This technology could be the key to unlocking the future of AI, offering a safer, more scalable, and more abundant energy source than lithium.1 Since its first round, the internal share-offering price has risen 209%. 2 You can still join more than 7,800 investors 3at just $6/share -- with up to 20% bonus shares.4 Trump responds to socialist Mamdani's threats to arrest Netanyahu President Donald Trump to socialist NYC mayor candidate Zohran Mamdani after he threatened to arrest the Prime Minister of Israel. NYC mayoral candidate Zohran Mamdani pledged to arrest Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu if he visits the city, citing the International Criminal Court's arrest warrant against Netanyahu and stating that New York's values should align with international law. Netanyahu dismissed Mamdani's threat as "not serious" and "silly" during a White House meeting with President Trump, saying he's "not concerned" and would visit New York "with President Trump" if needed. Trump called Mamdani a "communist" who has "said some really bad things about Jewish people" and warned that the mayoral candidate would need federal funding and "better behave" or face "big problems" from the White House. Trump said: "He might make it... But, you know, it all comes through the White House. He needs the money through the White House. He needs a lot... He's going to behave. He'll behave. He better behave. Otherwise, he's going to have big problems." Netanyahu used the exchange to discuss broader Middle East policy , arguing against a two-state solution by referencing October 7th attacks and stating that Israel would only accept peace arrangements where "the sovereign power of security always remains in our hands." LA Mayor Karen Bass confronts ICE officers in LA park Federal immigration agents carried out a heavily armed sweep in Los Angeles on Monday, and demand they leave. | | ---|---|--- Federal agents conducted a heavily armed immigration sweep at MacArthur Park in Los Angeles , with ICE, CBP, and military units deploying rifles, armored vehicles, and officers on horseback in what appeared to be a large-scale enforcement operation. Mayor Karen Bass confronted the agents and demanded they leave immediately , calling the operation a "political stunt" that made the city look "under siege" and was "outrageous and un-American," while the sweep disrupted a children's summer camp and homeless health services. Border Patrol officials defied the mayor's demands , with El Centro Sector Chief Gregory Bovino telling FOX Los Angeles that "the federal government does not work for Karen Bass" and agents would stay "until that mission is accomplished," warning Bass to "get used to us." The operation's results remain unclear , as activists had warned people to leave the park before agents arrived, and it's unknown if any arrests were made, while the LAPD said they were unaware of the federal operation taking place in their jurisdiction. No Epstein client list, suicide? President Donald Trump's Justice Department and FBI concluded they that Jeffrey Epstein blackmailed powerful figures, kept a "client list," or was murdered, releasing prison video footage that they say shows no one entered Epstein's cell area the night he died in 2019, supporting the suicide ruling. The findings contradict conspiracy theories previously promoted by Trump's own FBI appointees , including current FBI Director Kash Patel and Deputy Director Dan Bongino, who had questioned the official suicide narrative before their appointments but have since accepted it. No further charges will be filed in the Epstein case , with investigators stating they found no evidence to pursue investigations against other individuals, and the DOJ refusing to release additional materials citing concerns about exposing child abuse details and wrongly implicating innocent people. | | POLL Do you believe the DOJ and FBI Epstein conclusion? | ? ? ? More Good News: Real Men Are Trending Again

Is real manhood welcome again in America? After four years of woke ideology that denigrated masculinity, fathers, and the
patriarchy as toxic, we are seeing that the only thing that was toxic was that unrelenting attack against America's men. The tide
is turning as real men (and women) who fill the Trump administration embrace the value of authentic men and women once again in
our society. Real men are trending again (finally) and America is better for it!

There's a growing movement of courageous and conservative young men. They are rejecting the lie that being masculine is "toxic."
They are fighting back against the culture and speaking out. We talked with Braeden Sorbo about his new book, "Embrace
Masculinity." We also spoke with Alexander Spellane and Nicholas Scott of Fisher Liberty Gold, a conservative-owned precious
metals, gold, and silver investment company that specializes in IRAs. Like, subscribe and share.

clean_body: We are celebrating real masculinity and appreciating men for their contributions to society. Look inside for the good news! If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] [] July 8, 2025 • Newsletter Moms for America Weekly Blog [] [] More Good News: Real Men Are Trending Again Is real manhood welcome again in America? After four years of woke ideology that denigrated masculinity, fathers, and the patriarchy as toxic, we are seeing that the only thing that was toxic was that unrelenting attack against America's men. The tide is turning as real men (and women) who fill the Trump administration embrace the value of authentic men and women once again in our society. Real men are trending again (finally) and America is better for it! Read the Blog [] Conservative Young Men Taking the Lead. Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] [] Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] There's a growing movement of courageous and conservative young men. They are rejecting the lie that being masculine is "toxic." They are fighting back against the culture and speaking out. We talked with Braeden Sorbo about his new book, "Embrace Masculinity." We also spoke with Alexander Spellane and Nicholas Scott of Fisher Liberty Gold, a conservative-owned precious metals, gold, and silver investment company that specializes in IRAs. Like, subscribe and share. View the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast on Spotify [] [] In Truth & Liberty, Kimberly Fletcher Founder and President Moms for America® The Mom View [] [] Empowering Conversations Start Here! From parenting to public policy, The MomView delves into the topics that shape our culture, impact our nation and influence our homes, because every issue is a mom issue. Season 2 Episodes on Mondays at 10am ET View on YouTube [] View on Rumble [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] Copyright © 2025 Moms for America, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: Moms for America 1440 State HWY 248, Suite Q304 Branson, MO 65616 Visit our Website [] Visit our Store [] Visit us on Truth Social [] DONATE TODAY []

name: House Republicans
subject: You’re legendary, Friend!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We’ve picked YOU for this incredible award

You're an absolute legend, Friend.
You've been selected as a recipient of our [Golden Gavel Award](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zkmk0pcr6qh2rglquhef3560l52ia1hl1cqjs95o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4cjie9ob6c3h2bs) from House Republicans!
Only the strongest, toughest, and bravest fighters in our battle for America's future against the socialist agenda of the Radical Left are given this tremendous honor.

name: Aaron Regunberg from All right, then, I'll go to hell
subject: Big Oil killed those Texas children
body:
It's time we started saying so

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..h_mdlIepAaNLcaXBeygtJ6GZabCy4jCijEs6wojkfBk?) for more
---
# [Big Oil killed those Texas children](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4981170&post_id=167718182&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY3NzE4MTgyLCJpYXQiOjE3NTE5ODU2ODUsImV4cCI6MTc1NDU3NzY4NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQ5ODExNzAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.7Doijft5pMXgpi8dWVST7qmyjYjGL7T5x1t_24aTMhE)
### It's time we started saying so
| | [Aaron Regunberg](https://substack.com/@aaronregunberg)
---
| Jul 8
---
| [](https://substack.com/@aaronregunberg)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4981170&post_id=167718182&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY3NzE4MTgyLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1MTk4NTY4NSwiZXhwIjoxNzU0NTc3Njg1LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNDk4MTE3MCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.HR5v4RIEvOzfIQs6y73886HCM000kOBVkSxhdcLphQY&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4981170&post_id=167718182&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY3NzE4MTgyLCJpYXQiOjE3NTE5ODU2ODUsImV4cCI6MTc1NDU3NzY4NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQ5ODExNzAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.7Doijft5pMXgpi8dWVST7qmyjYjGL7T5x1t_24aTMhE&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4981170&post_id=167718182&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY3NzE4MTgyLCJpYXQiOjE3NTE5ODU2ODUsImV4cCI6MTc1NDU3NzY4NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQ5ODExNzAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.7Doijft5pMXgpi8dWVST7qmyjYjGL7T5x1t_24aTMhE)

---

Welcome to All right, then, I'll go to hell
Don't recognize this sender? [Unsubscribe with one click](https://substack..QcwXw_bXmAWzf0jim3lLeJuP7tmrYRUTuLAAtVIYYRM?)
Aaron Regunberg recently imported your email address from another platform to Substack. You'll now receive their posts via email or the [Substack app](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/f9bf1b77-8416-4baf-ba51-23a05b456cf3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). To set up your profile and discover more on Substack, [click here](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/f06bca42-34f3-460f-add2-4428d5c121fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
More than 100 people are confirmed to have been killed over the weekend by cataclysmic flash flooding in Texas, with many more still lost and unaccounted for. Dozens of the victims were children, [including](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/f1a0afc4-e6cb-4cec-9844-515f3b342a1f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) 27 girls from Camp Mystic, a summer camp that was consumed by the catastrophically fast-rising waters.
While dangerous flash flooding can occur naturally, this tragedy was not a "natural" disaster. Over 1.8 trillion gallons of rain fell on Texas Hill Country on Friday. In just 90 minutes, the Guadalupe River [ballooned](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/46d7149e-40e0-44d9-b0d6-57117487772f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from a depth of three feet to 34 feet; its volume shot from 95 cubic feet per second to 166,000 cubic feet per second. As David Lucas, a resident whose house was swallowed whole in the lethal storm, [put it](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/19a1e736-a412-4446-a47e-ec6590b6ce05?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): "I've been here close to 40 years, and I've never seen anything like this."
Though we'll have to wait for a [weather attribution study](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/a62a096e-ccdb-4f05-9448-8da4438ce313?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to confirm the _exact_ causal connection between this weekend's flooding and human-caused climate change, it is clear that global warming was at the very least a key driver of this disaster. "With a warmer atmosphere, there is no doubt that we have seen an increase in the frequency and the magnitude of flash flooding events globally," [explained](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/2658946d-f07b-40a7-963d-c96d905a9ae7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Jonathan Porter, chief meteorologist with AccuWeather. That's [because](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/52131269-c10a-4913-8a20-a3aa5464f9e7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) hotter air holds more water vapor that can fall as rain, meaning warming air temperatures produce bigger downpours. Rainfall [intensity](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/d61121bd-2945-4276-b711-09b1083973cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in central Texas has been increasing for decades, and this weekend's storms were further super-charged by the off-the-charts, climate-driven temperatures of the Gulf of Mexico, which created record-high atmospheric moisture content over central Texas.
Of course, MAGA Republicans like [Marjorie Taylor Greene](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/aaac9f6b-2a9c-45c8-b60c-a3ac221a617f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) were quick to respond to this tragedy with conspiracy theories. One GOP congressional candidate, Kandiss Taylor, actually [wrote](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/f6dc9c7a-7509-49b0-876d-bb1ed5ff5a5d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), "Fake weather. Fake hurricanes. Fake flooding. Fake. Fake. Fake."
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/03d6c698-484d-46dc-9de5-f2dd52dd66a8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
What makes these cries of "fake weather" extra crazy is that, in important ways, the carnage in Texas this weekend _is_ the result of a conspiracy -- a conspiracy by Big Oil companies like ExxonMobil, Chevron, Shell, and BP to deceive the public about climate change, despite their own internal understanding that their products would cause disasters just like the floods that swept over Camp Mystic on Friday.
To be clear, this internal knowledge isn't conjecture. We know that Big Oil understood that their fossil fuel products would cause catastrophic climate change _because they said so_ , in dozens of internal research reports and memos. For example, in 1989, Shell Oil Company produced a [confidential planning document](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/857e0535-8b65-43a1-a809-23c7dd866947?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that predicted, based on "conventional and probably conservative" assumptions, that the continued burning of fossil fuels would cause "more violent weather -- more storms, more droughts, more deluges." In other words, precisely what we just saw in Texas.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/2939d9cf-ca15-4012-ae15-e1deb150f1a7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/bb935423-2335-4925-bc16-e03dff0ea350?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Excerpt from the Shell report, page 36.
By the time of this Shell Report, the American Petroleum Institute had already spent years predicting that climate change caused by the burning of fossil fuels [would be](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/70bf98eb-fedd-491c-b204-a0eefe1d4549?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) "catastrophic" and [have](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/75e93440-34d6-4bff-981d-02fb506f03ca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) "serious consequences for man's comfort and survival," while Exxon was forecasting that global warming [would do](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/3f307f3e-b3e7-4bb9-9371-5f8ab3dcbed5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) "great irreversible harm to our planet," and [cause](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/42efd976-f974-4bc8-a6ea-3676e4c4c704?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) "suffering and death due to thermal extremes."
In fact, these companies actually [used](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/32de2149-62a2-485c-9060-f1150f39d507?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) their climate predictions to inform their own business decisions, building their pipelines with extra strength to deal with expected increases in extreme weather and raising the level of their offshore oil rigs to account for expected sea level rise. To take just one example, engineering documents written in the mid-1990s for a gas field jointly owned by Shell and ExxonMobil specified that "an estimated rise in water level, due to global warming, of 0.5 meters may be assumed" over the course of the project.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/8b9b67e8-0589-46b3-b854-d101f65b1d68?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Oil rig in the Sable gas field specifically designed to account for sea level rise.
At the same time that these companies were internally preparing for the harmful climate effects that they knew were coming, they were also developing and orchestrating a multi-decade, coordinated campaign to defraud the public about climate dangers and block solutions that could have prevented deaths like those of the Camp Mystic girls.
Again, this is not conjecture. There are piles of internal [strategy memos](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/a709072b-ee74-4cbc-b63d-07269bcf799f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and [external materials](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/1bbb16e5-f456-4d9a-b56f-b738ad7700a4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) outlining Big Oil's massive disinformation campaigns designed, in the words of one climate deception coalition's [mission statement](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/1bbb16e5-f456-4d9a-b56f-b738ad7700a4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), to "Reposition global warming as theory (not fact)."
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/1df6e9d6-a36e-4a34-89d3-9fea791d7e02?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
From one fossil fuel coalition's internal strategy memo.
Documented tactics that Big Oil companies used to deceive regulators, investors, and consumers about climate change include publishing deceptive advertisements with false claims about climate; directing bought-and-paid-for scientists to fraudulently undermine the clear scientific consensus on climate; harassing and attempting to discredit scientists and activists engaged in researching and communicating the actual climate science; deceptively attacking renewable energy efforts and policies; and "greenwashing" to falsely promote Big Oil products and brands as climate solutions.
There is substantial evidence of the impact this conspiracy has had in delaying climate mitigation and adaptation measures that could have prevented the Camp Mystic deaths. For example, a recent Pew Research [survey](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/65ed8eb1-ac72-46a9-a5cd-11b4a3e907f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) found that only 27 percent of Americans believed that almost all scientists agreed that climate change is caused by human activity.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/42cf4d9b-7d65-4c7a-8d64-b170c0ab04e6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Compare this to the most recent [analysis](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/1d3068c8-77ea-4d36-bdee-654a0a7f8da3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of the peer-reviewed scientific literature on climate change, which found that there is a greater than 99 percent consensus among scientists on this point -- out of the 88,125 papers surveyed, just 28 were skeptical, mostly authored by the same few, discredited, industry-funded individuals.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/2f16b9e9-a88a-4059-be38-6c9eb7d0a437?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In the [words](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/2bcc46cb-f3a8-45eb-ab7a-ad203856d2b6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of former Senator Chuck Hagel, who co-sponsored the resolution that prohibited the U.S. from ratifying the international climate treaty known as the Kyoto Protocol, "I was misled. Others were misled. When [fossil fuel companies] had evidence in their own institutions that countered what they were saying publicly -- I mean, they lied. ... It would have changed everything [had they told the truth]. I think it would have changed the average citizen's appreciation of climate change. ... And mine, of course. It would have put the United States and the world on a whole different track, and today we would have been so much further ahead than we are. It's cost this country, and it cost the world." For the children of Camp Mystic, this cost could not have been higher.
And so, I would argue, we should reconsider how we talk about tragedies like this weekend's flash flooding. These are not just natural disasters happening to us -- they are, in a very real sense, crimes that have been _committed_ against us, by corporate actors that made trillions of dollars from their schemes of denial.
This is the [work I do now](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/b16a16a3-dc03-4e07-acad-f2b51ef3090e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as a lawyer -- fighting to use our legal system to hold Big Oil companies accountable for their climate crimes. Because climate victims like the Camp Mystic girls deserve justice, and the fossil fuel corporations behind their deaths should pay for their lethal misconduct.
In this one way, I actually agree with Kandiss Taylor, the MAGA candidate quoted above, when she [wrote](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/4a7c6a2e-05f3-42ae-ba38-14a287012a95?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), "If fake weather causes real tragedy, that's murder."
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/2c3b2866-72b6-40ed-8907-e5def4c5829b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The tragedy here wasn't caused by fake conspiracies like cloud seeding, geoengineering, and manipulation, but rather by Big Oil's very real conspiracy of climate denial. But the conclusion -- "that's murder" -- fits. If climate attribution analysis confirms that the flash floods this weekend were substantially caused by climate change, then victims like the Camp Mystic kids did not passively die -- they were _killed_ , by the recklessness of corporate actors that knew their conduct was catastrophically dangerous and went ahead and did it anyway. It's time we started saying so.
[Subscribed](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9hYXJvbnJlZ3VuYmVyZy5zdWJzdGFjay5jb20vYWNjb3VudCIsInAiOjE2NzcxODE4MiwicyI6NDk4MTE3MCwiZiI6dHJ1ZSwidSI6OTA1MDExOTIsImlhdCI6MTc1MTk4NTY4NSwiZXhwIjoyMDY3NTYxNjg1LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMCIsInN1YiI6ImxpbmstcmVkaXJlY3QifQ.dWputrFj0mFoLzOPLUpSYRPH1dk1lLNGvcwNUZaxevw?)
