Aaron Regunberg recently imported your email address from another platform to Substack. You'll now receive their posts via email or the . To set up your profile and discover more on Substack, . More than 100 people are confirmed to have been killed over the weekend by cataclysmic flash flooding in Texas, with many more still lost and unaccounted for. Dozens of the victims were children, 27 girls from Camp Mystic, a summer camp that was consumed by the catastrophically fast-rising waters. While dangerous flash flooding can occur naturally, this tragedy was not a "natural" disaster. Over 1.8 trillion gallons of rain fell on Texas Hill Country on Friday. In just 90 minutes, the Guadalupe River from a depth of three feet to 34 feet; its volume shot from 95 cubic feet per second to 166,000 cubic feet per second. As David Lucas, a resident whose house was swallowed whole in the lethal storm, : "I've been here close to 40 years, and I've never seen anything like this." Though we'll have to wait for a to confirm the exact causal connection between this weekend's flooding and human-caused climate change, it is clear that global warming was at the very least a key driver of this disaster. "With a warmer atmosphere, there is no doubt that we have seen an increase in the frequency and the magnitude of flash flooding events globally," Jonathan Porter, chief meteorologist with AccuWeather. That's hotter air holds more water vapor that can fall as rain, meaning warming air temperatures produce bigger downpours. Rainfall in central Texas has been increasing for decades, and this weekend's storms were further super-charged by the off-the-charts, climate-driven temperatures of the Gulf of Mexico, which created record-high atmospheric moisture content over central Texas. Of course, MAGA Republicans like were quick to respond to this tragedy with conspiracy theories. One GOP congressional candidate, Kandiss Taylor, actually , "Fake weather. Fake hurricanes. Fake flooding. Fake. Fake. Fake." | | ---|---|--- What makes these cries of "fake weather" extra crazy is that, in important ways, the carnage in Texas this weekend is the result of a conspiracy -- a conspiracy by Big Oil companies like ExxonMobil, Chevron, Shell, and BP to deceive the public about climate change, despite their own internal understanding that their products would cause disasters just like the floods that swept over Camp Mystic on Friday. To be clear, this internal knowledge isn't conjecture. We know that Big Oil understood that their fossil fuel products would cause catastrophic climate change because they said so , in dozens of internal research reports and memos. For example, in 1989, Shell Oil Company produced a that predicted, based on "conventional and probably conservative" assumptions, that the continued burning of fossil fuels would cause "more violent weather -- more storms, more droughts, more deluges." In other words, precisely what we just saw in Texas. | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- Excerpt from the Shell report, page 36. By the time of this Shell Report, the American Petroleum Institute had already spent years predicting that climate change caused by the burning of fossil fuels "catastrophic" and "serious consequences for man's comfort and survival," while Exxon was forecasting that global warming "great irreversible harm to our planet," and "suffering and death due to thermal extremes." In fact, these companies actually their climate predictions to inform their own business decisions, building their pipelines with extra strength to deal with expected increases in extreme weather and raising the level of their offshore oil rigs to account for expected sea level rise. To take just one example, engineering documents written in the mid-1990s for a gas field jointly owned by Shell and ExxonMobil specified that "an estimated rise in water level, due to global warming, of 0.5 meters may be assumed" over the course of the project. | | ---|---|--- Oil rig in the Sable gas field specifically designed to account for sea level rise. At the same time that these companies were internally preparing for the harmful climate effects that they knew were coming, they were also developing and orchestrating a multi-decade, coordinated campaign to defraud the public about climate dangers and block solutions that could have prevented deaths like those of the Camp Mystic girls. Again, this is not conjecture. There are piles of internal and outlining Big Oil's massive disinformation campaigns designed, in the words of one climate deception coalition's , to "Reposition global warming as theory (not fact)." | | ---|---|--- From one fossil fuel coalition's internal strategy memo. Documented tactics that Big Oil companies used to deceive regulators, investors, and consumers about climate change include publishing deceptive advertisements with false claims about climate; directing bought-and-paid-for scientists to fraudulently undermine the clear scientific consensus on climate; harassing and attempting to discredit scientists and activists engaged in researching and communicating the actual climate science; deceptively attacking renewable energy efforts and policies; and "greenwashing" to falsely promote Big Oil products and brands as climate solutions. There is substantial evidence of the impact this conspiracy has had in delaying climate mitigation and adaptation measures that could have prevented the Camp Mystic deaths. For example, a recent Pew Research found that only 27 percent of Americans believed that almost all scientists agreed that climate change is caused by human activity. | | ---|---|--- Compare this to the most recent of the peer-reviewed scientific literature on climate change, which found that there is a greater than 99 percent consensus among scientists on this point -- out of the 88,125 papers surveyed, just 28 were skeptical, mostly authored by the same few, discredited, industry-funded individuals. | | ---|---|--- In the of former Senator Chuck Hagel, who co-sponsored the resolution that prohibited the U.S. from ratifying the international climate treaty known as the Kyoto Protocol, "I was misled. Others were misled. When [fossil fuel companies] had evidence in their own institutions that countered what they were saying publicly -- I mean, they lied. ... It would have changed everything [had they told the truth]. I think it would have changed the average citizen's appreciation of climate change. ... And mine, of course. It would have put the United States and the world on a whole different track, and today we would have been so much further ahead than we are. It's cost this country, and it cost the world." For the children of Camp Mystic, this cost could not have been higher. And so, I would argue, we should reconsider how we talk about tragedies like this weekend's flash flooding. These are not just natural disasters happening to us -- they are, in a very real sense, crimes that have been committed against us, by corporate actors that made trillions of dollars from their schemes of denial. This is the as a lawyer -- fighting to use our legal system to hold Big Oil companies accountable for their climate crimes. Because climate victims like the Camp Mystic girls deserve justice, and the fossil fuel corporations behind their deaths should pay for their lethal misconduct. In this one way, I actually agree with Kandiss Taylor, the MAGA candidate quoted above, when she , "If fake weather causes real tragedy, that's murder." | | ---|---|--- The tragedy here wasn't caused by fake conspiracies like cloud seeding, geoengineering, and manipulation, but rather by Big Oil's very real conspiracy of climate denial. But the conclusion -- "that's murder" -- fits. If climate attribution analysis confirms that the flash floods this weekend were substantially caused by climate change, then victims like the Camp Mystic kids did not passively die -- they were killed , by the recklessness of corporate actors that knew their conduct was catastrophically dangerous and went ahead and did it anyway. It's time we started saying so. ? | | | | | | |

disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
In poetic fashion, Donald Trump and his MAGA Republican allies signed their big, ugly, dangerous budget into law on none other than July 4th.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111089572/556183081/155032579?refcode=header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTQ2MTA3NC0wYjVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PaUsE5_rS-bXj24WgwED-sMcqTgb8uI7mr8e52cUODk=)

Peter,
In poetic fashion, Donald Trump and his MAGA Republican allies signed their big, ugly, dangerous budget into law on none other than July 4th—a day meant to celebrate America as a land of liberty, justice, and opportunity for all. But that’s not the America they’re celebrating or building.
With this budget, Trump and the GOP’s version of America does not give liberty and opportunity to anyone except the wealthy and powerful few. It’s one that shamelessly throws millions of working people under the bus and ignores their cries for lower costs of living. It’s one that strips their healthcare and food assistance rather than uplifting them. And it’s one that rips our freedoms away while turning us against each other.
This is not what America is meant to be, and not the version of America that Minnesotans believe in. In Minnesota, we have our neighbors’ backs, we work together for the good of our communities, and we stand up for freedom and opportunity for everyone.
We believe in politics that lift people up—not tear away their freedoms and security. But standing up to Trump’s cruel agenda and defending a more hopeful vision for America takes all of us pulling together.
[**Will you stand with Governor Walz today to help us fight back against Trump’s cruel agenda and build a brighter future for all of us?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111089573/556183092/82141195?refcode=body&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTQ2MTA3NC0wYjVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PaUsE5_rS-bXj24WgwED-sMcqTgb8uI7mr8e52cUODk=)

clean_body: In poetic fashion, Donald Trump and his MAGA Republican allies signed their big, ugly, dangerous budget into law on none other than July 4th. | = Peter, In poetic fashion, Donald Trump and his MAGA Republican allies signed their big, ugly, dangerous budget into law on none other than July 4th—a day meant to celebrate America as a land of liberty, justice, and opportunity for all. But that’s not the America they’re celebrating or building. With this budget, Trump and the GOP’s version of America does not give liberty and opportunity to anyone except the wealthy and powerful few. It’s one that shamelessly throws millions of working people under the bus and ignores their cries for lower costs of living. It’s one that strips their healthcare and food assistance rather than uplifting them. And it’s one that rips our freedoms away while turning us against each other. This is not what America is meant to be, and not the version of America that Minnesotans believe in. In Minnesota, we have our neighbors’ backs, we work together for the good of our communities, and we stand up for freedom and opportunity for everyone. We believe in politics that lift people up—not tear away their freedoms and security. But standing up to Trump’s cruel agenda and defending a more hopeful vision for America takes all of us pulling together. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for believing in America with us, Team Walz ********=******

| | **_Meet Russell:_** Born and raised in Surfside Beach, SC, Congressman Russell Fry is the proud and homegrown Representative for South Carolina’s 7th Congressional District. Growing up in a cinder block home with no heating or air conditioning, Russell learned at an early age that hard work and perseverance pave the only true path to the American Dream. He watched his parents work day in and day out to make ends meet. And the values they instilled in him during his upbringing led Russell to self-fund both his undergraduate education at the University of South Carolina, and later his law studies at the Charleston School of Law. At Charleston, Russell served as the President of the Student Bar Association and even helped the school achieve its American Bar Association accreditation. He went on to practice law in the Grand Strand area for over a decade before entering the political arena to serve in the South Carolina House of Representatives for State House District 106 (Horry County). During his seven-year tenure in the SC House, Russell fought to safeguard Constitutional liberties, lower taxes, and put the best interests of South Carolina families above all else. He climbed the ranks to become Chief Majority Whip, and also chaired the House Opioid Prevention Study Committee. Under Russell’s leadership, 18 policy initiatives to combat the opioid crisis were signed into law. Since the first day he stepped foot in Washington, Russell has strived to shake up the corrupt status quo and deliver real change for the American people. He believes adamantly that so long as the American people stand united, we can keep the American Dream alive for every citizen of our great nation. Russell is a dedicated husband to his wife, Bronwen, and a loving father to his son, James. The family lives in Murrells Inlet with their chocolate lab, Jasper.

name: Andy Kim

body:
We don’t get discouraged. We get to work.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111090966/556186879/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODUzMTIzOC0wYzVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t8XyLZlT5_XH6JLwLFAcFl0SwnkBddMl3sms01Tuaag=&emci=1eb60365-075c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=88531238-0c5c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=26261389)
---

| | Shame on Republicans in Congress for passing a budget that abandons working families, cuts health care, and hands billions to the ultra-wealthy – all while turning their backs on our children and communities. **But we don't get discouraged. We get to work.** As members of Congress, we are elected to serve the people who live in our states. To help them. To fight for them. To have the courage to do so even when those in power don't want us to. That's the job. To Republicans, "service" looks like cruelty disguised as policy. It looks like tax cuts for billionaires while our kids go hungry. It looks like politicians like Jeff Van Drew, Chris Smith, and Tom Kean Jr. voting to take from New Jersey's hardworking families to line the pockets of the rich. That's not the public service I know. And it's not the future we'll accept. The mission ahead is clear: **Flip 3 seats in the House. Flip 4 in the Senate.** Build a government that works for the people again. Over the coming months, I'll be working to support strong Democratic candidates right here in New Jersey and across the country – leaders rooted in service, compassion, and courage. People ready to fight for our communities like their own futures depend on it – because they do. We can do this. Together. I hope you stay with me in this fight. clean_body: We don’t get discouraged. We get to work. | | | | Shame on Republicans in Congress for passing a budget that abandons working families, cuts health care, and hands billions to the ultra-wealthy – all while turning their backs on our children and communities. But we don't get discouraged. We get to work. As members of Congress, we are elected to serve the people who live in our states. To help them. To fight for them. To have the courage to do so even when those in power don't want us to. That's the job. To Republicans, "service" looks like cruelty disguised as policy. It looks like tax cuts for billionaires while our kids go hungry. It looks like politicians like Jeff Van Drew, Chris Smith, and Tom Kean Jr. voting to take from New Jersey's hardworking families to line the pockets of the rich. That's not the public service I know. And it's not the future we'll accept. The mission ahead is clear: Flip 3 seats in the House. Flip 4 in the Senate. Build a government that works for the people again. Over the coming months, I'll be working to support strong Democratic candidates right here in New Jersey and across the country – leaders rooted in service, compassion, and courage. People ready to fight for our communities like their own futures depend on it – because they do. We can do this. Together. I hope you stay with me in this fight. name: Byron Donalds
subject: I’ve been called many slurs for being MAGA
body:
But never a weak Republican

| | | | |
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zr70pqris1id0tucj91h2aa5hbu0u084louvbui0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1g68oj4cph2bs)
|
---
I’ve been called a lot of disgusting names by the radical-left STRAIGHT to my face for being MAGA Patriot:
_“Race Traitor.”_
_“White Supremacist.”_
But **_never_** a weak Republican.
I’m Congressman Byron Donalds, President Trump’s trusted ally in Florida, proudly endorsed to be the next Governor, and I’m going to keep it real with you.
I’ve been going viral for putting my foot down against the Pelosi-led _**[SOCIALIST Takeover](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zeglbvrk0fh48gk7njn2l8pu9pit7eghlaalf7i8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1g68oj4cph2bs)**_ starting in New York and spreading across the country, and here’s why:
**FACT** –Government doesn't have the ability to provide, it can only take away.
**FACT** –Socialism _DOESN'T WORK._
**FACT** –People thrive when government commits to individual liberty, the Constitution & free markets.
I’m for putting America FIRST because Democrats have lost their minds. But their warchest tells a different story.

|
---
[STAND WITH MAGA](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z4b2d7igavk5jbl6392loutmfqm5ualtt1sbdu5o_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1g68oj4cph2bs)

|
---
They’re rallying around divisive identity politics, a radical socialist agenda, and a flat-out call to put America Last for good, and if we can’t keep up with their momentum, MAGA could be in trouble..
Look, I’m up against the full weight of the radical-left establishment all because I’m fighting for the little guy, YOU!
That's why, with a heavy heart & deep faith in God Almighty, _**[I'm humbly asking you to chip in a few bucks to help me CONTINUE the fight before this day ends:](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z60uc7iubc7evgkpdub03pp9aa1mbv17vprd80tg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1g68oj4cph2bs)**_

|

Byron Donalds

name: Team Rob
subject: A Big Week for Tax Relief and Cookouts 🇺🇸🌭
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rob for PA]()
body:
Rob & Chelsea back at Backwoods 💍

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/0e6b784a7671/a-big-week-for-tax-relief-and-cookouts?e=131e83a3c2)
---
| | | | |
---
| Good Morning,
Team Rob here with your NEPA Rundown! This week, Rob proudly helped deliver major wins for working Americans. Thanks to his support for the Big Beautiful Bill, the Trump Tax Cuts and Jobs Act (TCJA) has been saved, protecting your family from tax hikes. Rob also helped pass key provisions to make tips and overtime tax-free, putting more money back where it belongs: in your pocket.
And while Rob was working hard in Washington, he also took time over the holiday to return home and celebrate something special. On the 4th of July, he and his fiancé, Chelsea, headed back to the Backwoods Hot Dog Eating Contest, the same spot where they got engaged last year!
Let’s dive into this week’s Rundown ⬇️
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| | This week, Rob voted for the One Big Beautiful Bill, delivering a major win for Northeastern Pennsylvania. It preserves President Trump’s historic tax cuts, eliminates federal taxes on Tips and overtime, doubles the child Tax Credit for families, and secures critical funding for our two hospitals in Scranton, protecting quality healthcare and jobs in our community. This was a major win for all residents of PA-08, and we are excited to deliver on the Trump mandate.
---
|
---
[|
---](https://robforpa.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4aaa9665caa590d8638bb435d&id=bb0d79da65&e=131e83a3c2)
| Rob and Chelsea returned to Backwoods, in Dallas, for their annual hotdog eating contest, the same event where they got engaged last Independence Day. It was a full-circle moment filled with food, fun, and a patriotic celebration right in the heart of Northeastern Pennsylvania!
---
|
---
[|
---](https://robforpa.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4aaa9665caa590d8638bb435d&id=a0f83b5747&e=131e83a3c2)
| Our Small Business of the Week is Pizza Paul’s Fireworks in Dallas. Be sure to support local businesses!
---
|
---
| The midterms are creeping up on us and are more critical than even 2024. That’s why the far-left is attacking Rob with lies and smears. He’s fighting for NEPA values, the American economy, and the truth.
**Chip in now to help Rob fight back and win big in 2026!**

name: Del. Sam Rasoul
subject: PRESS RELEASE: Del. Rasoul Urges Congress to Release Delayed Boys and Girls Club Funding
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized By Friends of Sam Rasoul for Delegate Friends of Sam Rasoul for Delegate
body:
| | |
---
| | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** July 8, 2025

**Contact:** Elaina Corfield Legislative Directorinfo@sam4va.com(540) 904-6905
**RASOUL URGES CONGRESS TO RELEASE DELAYED BOYS & GIRLS CLUB FUNDING** ROANOKE, VA – Delegate Sam Rasoul, Chairman of the Virginia House Education Committee, sent a letter on July 3, 2025, to Federal Representatives to release delayed funds for the Boys and Girls Club of America's 21st Century Community Learning Centers. Funding for the 21st Century Community Learning Centers has already been allocated by Congress in previous spending bills. Delay of these funds will result in programs being halted and even possibly shut down entirely, leaving at-risk youth without access to safe and immensely effective programs. “Our youth programs are being immensely impacted by the delays occurring in DC," said Rasoul. "The Boys and Girls Clubs of America provide resources to at-risk youth that are life-changing. I urge our representatives to release the already allocated funds to the Clubs immediately so we do not lose the support systems our youth have come to truly need." Delegate Sam Rasoul currently serves as Chair of the Virginia House Education Committee and is a member of the Appropriations and Public Safety Committees. ####

clean_body: | | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE July 8, 2025 Contact: Elaina Corfield Legislative Directorinfo@sam4va.com(540) 904-6905 RASOUL URGES CONGRESS TO RELEASE DELAYED BOYS & GIRLS CLUB FUNDING ROANOKE, VA – Delegate Sam Rasoul, Chairman of the Virginia House Education Committee, sent a letter on July 3, 2025, to Federal Representatives to release delayed funds for the Boys and Girls Club of America's 21st Century Community Learning Centers. Funding for the 21st Century Community Learning Centers has already been allocated by Congress in previous spending bills. Delay of these funds will result in programs being halted and even possibly shut down entirely, leaving at-risk youth without access to safe and immensely effective programs. “Our youth programs are being immensely impacted by the delays occurring in DC," said Rasoul. "The Boys and Girls Clubs of America provide resources to at-risk youth that are life-changing. I urge our representatives to release the already allocated funds to the Clubs immediately so we do not lose the support systems our youth have come to truly need." Delegate Sam Rasoul currently serves as Chair of the Virginia House Education Committee and is a member of the Appropriations and Public Safety Committees. #### | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for and Authorized By Friends of Sam Rasoul for Delegate Friends of Sam Rasoul for Delegate P.O. Box 13842 Roanoke, VA 24037 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

body:
https://trentstaggs.com/

Friends,

Thank you for all of your support. I'm excited to announce the publication of my first book - a roadmap for restoring elections, citizenship and four other key pillars to getting back to our founding.

Which is possible with President Donald Trump!

This book is a call to action. If you believe in faith, family, and freedom, I invite you to stand with us.

We are the heirs of the Revolution. Let’s prove ourselves worthy.

Yours in freedom,
Trent Staggs

body:
| | |
---
| |
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=0267d61195704208b43e388d2b2902b8&_e=6vLh0DDD-fwtFkaat3_Dbalqj0twoo5LKXkcT72CUtxJt8RoLpWeDXxD6A9--r0KXh1k9AuO6Uzhc0Krr3Bu-qoxuJ57LJ1Kz2R5uXF-jbSTRvDKhYR1awwOL6xEvgOkrAW7fLvYC44YBxOBEasbJnWeJC8KECXKBpCm7rlbyb8wFU0WE_39bI2eALv8H3tK8ySYi8OaYKFm5mChGFQUMQZTUtiiQlZg4Bw8k_cnIC1nXoyn44aOMfoPvjomIXbK_1x7xGc4VVjwc4_WhVjemxK5tsdnt3R6IinNPzTUdnjM_8VOf4v8unIWdTEQEQ3upjR65b0e7Ym2N_-_qCJxEmWFSA8wkrTGqQbrMGPuGlv46GkBQ_m2j5Jbe7e3WQfk0tbtHR1X63oXBoKJFVMUs4DKGkCqg99UuQ_A-Sl9nITt8FxckODoFSDCCFouI6S_)
---
Dear Peter,
---
The _grand finale_ of our Worship In The White House podcast series dropped this morning! We titled this episode, “David’s Harp vs. Saul’s Demons,” and we continue the conversation on the restoration of the tabernacle of David.

For this final episode, I want to challenge _every_ listener to answer this question:
“If God can use these three crazy people, how can He use _me_ to do wild things for Jesus?” _**WATCH THE CONVERSATION ⬇︎⬇︎⬇︎**_
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=0267d61195704208b43e388d2b2902b8&_e=6vLh0DDD-fwtFkaat3_Dbalqj0twoo5LKXkcT72CUtxJt8RoLpWeDXxD6A9--r0KXh1k9AuO6Uzhc0Krr3Bu-qoxuJ57LJ1Kz2R5uXF-jbSTRvDKhYR1awwOL6xEvgOkrAW7fLvYC44YBxOBEasbJnWeJC8KECXKBpCm7rlbyb96h8Y33q17N4DQZAc_hR4BSm9W8n47ChZaK9XjMqbpY0R4bqNgbMBIy7jTg58MrxQyEOP5qGpIYvf0rzLJstelnJtN2LyLJUs6dklVIREe38zkXHNbyK3h0XrYzMj4IfoOwq9iSGTLvSHCHTuClr9jnk713sJ8Cgg86riWsh2hENXnjwS5yulhs-cJaIUo1CDaX2wwIKnNw07jVQeBBPHYW3qxT7DAyGODJsXAeQ0Zs5f8nsJ1JXyEnF_L-RXw64WeEhuFlUQFYRRHmwIIfVSj)
---
I hope this series has encouraged and emboldened you! God continues to open greater and greater doors for Let Us Worship because we’ve remained faithful to say YES to Him in all things—both big and small.

**[Our new album, Worship From The White House is the culmination of some of those incredible open doors—from the White House, to Mar-a-Lago, to the U.S. Capitol Rotunda. The album is available now on iTunes and Spotify—stream it today!](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=0267d61195704208b43e388d2b2902b8&_e=6vLh0DDD-fwtFkaat3_DbaP6vIqgo3D56_ropTmYUUmVNDfMkfvnT9g7hIllIZeH4t3lKqs3AEO2uww-Cj5cnyd0d8CQCjp3L178aP3LYueaz4BcYaHzB3vOQ3diMLgs5AcOnoBP71uW2XO24L9eEVPxom43moM7bvHfr3aNWEN2eCFmQPCw8mOQsCrEFI5MCU6Q5aMjtkLRbzrxQT1xuQGq-P0s0xVYN67KR4IHnl7uU6SInjKN297-NiGDIfK-Q9zN9T0XL1QuNvBjmSIIqpr1-HHC5HHYbbSlO-LqTszhsR0EWk3HZG45zhdQUZf1tN22tOPIRO005PT4Dyb3Moa2FrCxSou8toS_rONd7ddt5hk5N2iIxk2Yldjws-prdai7f_WdsoP3C5kBva4kbMtsv4jYg9R4cMjqxxBSCQfZ22M4bdlG_RdS3ODNmh4MdQVFL3iq-XrOABZqugn9bs_SkvWX_pU45q4lf0zd-Gk%3D)**

TOMORROW NIGHT, we’re celebrating the release of Worship From The White House in my hometown, Missoula, Montana! Join us at River of Life Church (4007 HWY 200 E) on July 9 at 7 PM for a powerful night of worship you won’t want to miss!
---
[ **SUPPORT LET US WORSHIP >>>** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=0267d61195704208b43e388d2b2902b8&_e=6vLh0DDD-fwtFkaat3_Dbalqj0twoo5LKXkcT72CUtxJt8RoLpWeDXxD6A9--r0KXh1k9AuO6Uzhc0Krr3Bu-qoxuJ57LJ1Kz2R5uXF-jbSTRvDKhYR1awwOL6xEvgOkrAW7fLvYC44YBxOBEasbJnWeJC8KECXKBpCm7rlbyb8Or2s14Swj9uVy3LEYWpYQtj-sUiph7qia9q2j1zR67E5PnSlBTeR7tSaH8arWivbgs6ySqfQbsSNte-u0pikKbYB_1fU_zMjlw9e_jtvxcK2-I-X7N1bPTFZcN9_qrvz0b_M5dXP9OuQIbDrSbRumq1l_6N0PAJhhJj_zPD9LdD4L5vJcpsdL0ttBnULmr_VNl4i5TVIjTtNicBYls6AtezGB4zHKOpo_VXVnoev5cdgJcMf7lo9GROpyDszcQzVFAp9bkZQiYxnJMASzhWzQ)
---
Till all hear,
---
---
Sean

clean_body: | | | | | Dear Peter, The grand finale of our Worship In The White House podcast series dropped this morning! We titled this episode, “David’s Harp vs. Saul’s Demons,” and we continue the conversation on the restoration of the tabernacle of David. For this final episode, I want to challenge every listener to answer this question: “If God can use these three crazy people, how can He use me to do wild things for Jesus?” WATCH THE CONVERSATION ⬇︎⬇︎⬇︎ I hope this series has encouraged and emboldened you! God continues to open greater and greater doors for Let Us Worship because we’ve remained faithful to say YES to Him in all things—both big and small. TOMORROW NIGHT, we’re celebrating the release of Worship From The White House in my hometown, Missoula, Montana! Join us at River of Life Church (4007 HWY 200 E) on July 9 at 7 PM for a powerful night of worship you won’t want to miss! Till all hear, Sean | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- INTERNATIONAL DONORS— DONATE Donate by Check or Money Order Sean Feucht Ministries310 Third Street NEWashington, DC 20002 Contributions are tax-deductible. | | Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Let Us Worship | |

Peter —

There used to be a time when extremist conspiracists stayed on the fringe. In the shadows. Whispered behind closed doors. **_But Trump flung the door wide and gave them a megaphone._**
[Before we go any further, if you’re ready to make a donation to the Pennsylvania Democratic Party, this is a good time to chip in!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111092525/556191698/-1020196347?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250708_FR_extremism_0_3MO_padems_NA_NA_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTFhMjY3Mi0wZTVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wcj7p8acddp3wJb6XJqlIC6PLqBLS7lvaL33fW605zc=)

---

Now they’re in our streets. Our statehouses. Our courts. They showed up at the No Kings protests in Pennsylvania — and we don’t even have to wonder how they got here. Trump made space for them. Pardoned them. Campaigned with them. Laughed with them on stage. Called them “patriots.”
**_This is what it looks like when authoritarianism grows legs._**
And let’s not forget — this man is still trying to con the country into thinking he’s some kind of “peace candidate,” the guy who said he’d end every war “on day one” but couldn’t even get out of his own foreign entanglements.
**_You don’t get to light the match and walk away from the fire._**
This November, Pennsylvania can be the firewall. But only if we organize better than we ever have. [Donate now to help elect Democrats who will stand up to Trump — and to the movement he’s tried to unleash across this country!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111092531/556191704/-1020196347?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250708_FR_extremism_0_3MO_padems_NA_NA_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTFhMjY3Mi0wZTVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wcj7p8acddp3wJb6XJqlIC6PLqBLS7lvaL33fW605zc=)

name: Jena Griswold
subject: fwd: $2k
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
Friends,
I’m forwarding my team’s message from yesterday to make sure you saw that we set a 24-hour $2,000 goal. We did this so that we can power through this month and maintain the momentum we've been building since April.
This is our chance to set the tone for the entire quarter. Every donation helps us show the strength of our campaign and the power of the fight to protect our freedoms, our democracy, and the Colorado way of life.
Read our message below, and donate before our goal comes to an end tonight. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2507-q3-jg?refcode=250708-email]
Thank you,
Jena
----- Original Message -----
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2507-q3-jg?refcode=250708-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2507-q3-jg?refcode=250708-email]
Peter –
The new fundraising quarter just started — and we’re wasting no time.
To start July and this quarter off with momentum right out of the gate, we’re setting a 24-hour fundraising goal to raise $2,000 to help elect Jena and defend the Colorado way of life.
This is a critical moment. As Attorney General, Jena will be a line of defense against Donald Trump. And when we show early momentum this quarter, we’ll send a powerful message: Jena is ready to fight for our state and our freedoms — and she’s got a grassroots team behind her.
We have just 24 hours to hit our goal and start this quarter strong. Can you chip in now to help us get there? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2507-q3-jg?refcode=250708-email]

name: Ann Diaz-Austin
subject: Investigated, cleared, and then charged
body:
I never thought I would be writing this email today

| | |
---
Dear Friend,I never thought I would be writing this email today, **but if I can’t find patriots to help us the anti-police mob in New Mexico will lock my son up in prison for life.**
---
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zvvaf2vrsgqksdrp9mh6edmr264g7bdcvat43iqo_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1g64p30cjh2bs)
---
This is a picture of my son and his little boy, my three-year-old grandson, in the picture I sent you.Like his father and brothers, my son Deputy Jacob Diaz has a servant's heart and chose to put his life on the line as a police officer to protect our community. Now, after three years of service, a special prosecutor from Albuquerque is **_charging him with first-degree murder for following his training._** Friend, this charge is shocking for me and my family, and even ridiculous as he’s already been cleared by an internal investigation. In June 2024, Jacob responded to a late-night report of a young man walking in an intoxicated manner along the median of a busy highway.When my son arrived on the scene, the individual repeatedly ignored his instructions to stay back and show his hands.Instead, the young man quickly walked towards Jacob and drew out what appeared to be a pistol. In response, my son followed his training and fired his weapon. Even after falling to the ground, the individual continued to ignore his order to remain still and started moving towards the perceived firearm.Once again, following his training and fearing for his life, Jacob discharged his firearm and the individual was killed. When I heard about the incident, I was so thankful and relieved to hear my son’s life was safe. Because as the wife and mother of police officers, I know all too well the dangers law enforcement face every time they go out on the streets. After filing the incident, an administrative investigation on behalf of the New Mexico State Police was completed and submitted – _**finding my son had followed his training and had sufficient cause**_ to stop the young man and defend his life.And because the investigation cleared him, Jacob was reinstated as an officer on the force. **_But out of the blue, an anti-police prosecutor charged my son with first-degree murder._****** You can imagine the absolute shock my family and I felt when receiving the news. Now, after four months of being cleared of any fault and being back on the force, he’s facing life in prison. Depriving my 3-year-old little grandson of his father for the rest of his life.No dad to put him to bed, no dad cheering on his sports games, and no dad to turn to for advice and rely upon as he grows up.Friend, no child should have to endure such a trial. And I start to tear up just thinking about it. I can’t tell you how afraid we all are – the thought of losing our boy for life was crippling enough, but we also face the additional burden of never-ending legal bills.I didn’t know what we were going to do until we received a call from Jason Johnson with the **Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF)**. If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know they’re a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Jacob. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops – and their families – at their lowest moments.And when Jason called, my family was at our lowest moment. Not only did LELDF decide to help my son get the legal defense he deserves. They’re also raising money to pay for the best attorneys and expert witnesses for Jacob.So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I’ve ever asked anyone: [**Will you help my son Jacob fight the unjust charges against him by donating to LELDF?**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zio1j25phos0klhvnntuqeg58gmhgo7kkj305qvg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1g64p30cjh2bs) My husband and I are doing everything we can to help our son, but my husband is also a police officer, and his pay is nothing compared to the overwhelming fees involved in legal battles.Friend, I can’t let a radical prosecutor take my boy from me...destroying our family and my grandson’s life.[**So if you are able, would you consider following this link to donate to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund to help my Jacob?**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zmnrmrcdoq4n2305nodahotvt4j6p7qppqnsi8eo_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1g64p30cjh2bs) Any amount - $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more - will help.And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly.Jacob is facing prosecution in New Mexico, which has seen many anti-police practices coming to light. This won’t be an easy fight for justice. And you and [**your $35 contribution**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zannj4m4hm6ta5hftvip3fjoufo17eajc89is1ho_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1g64p30cjh2bs) could make the difference in Jacob being acquitted or spending the rest of his life behind bars.Right now, Jacob can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind neighbors like you.Thank you for taking the time to read my email today.And thank you - in advance - for doing what you can to help my son Jacob.
---
Sincerely,
---
Ann Diaz-Austin
---
P.S. My son is going to be locked up for life after following his law enforcement training. I can’t bear to lose my son and watch my grandson grow up without a father, but unless Jacob has the funds necessary for his defense, that’s what will happen. [**Please, send in whatever you can to LELDF today as they fight the anti-police prosecutor in New Mexico and gain justice for my son**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zj4299cphrjkmqdjc1u8cqbqug504h179hplguso_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1g64p30cjh2bs) _**.**_**** Thank you for giving me and my family hope and for protecting our men and women in blue.
---
|
---
_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter!_ © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zh0h2cdi374veqn0kblvt90favoo2kn0qcg282ko_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1g64p30cjh2bs)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303
---
---

Pop Acta Media | National Republican Polling
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z9h5e0brv46djtgch3gl5so9fpj1c1dnitj5ont8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1g64p30cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq7d1heirr7d1hm9qj0tbi66qbcd1jm1rr3cdkmerj79hnmmrqastmelp3cthieip3adt7skqu2c3neior3d5medjm05plmgqb3ct66uqr695lshgm6pr2cthm49fg)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z5nrok33i832fvpj6t6c73c9il517lufq2lmutio_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1g64p30cjh2bs)_

name: Chrissy Houlahan
subject: From Project 2025 to Project 2026
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
body:
Democrats threw everything we could at this
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111093655/556194855/-1072566757?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTExZmE2Mi0xMDVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Npq5RNSX8XsfcmO_i22DpRctSnqesSvFmuLO_QDogVM=&emci=9738ed89-3f5b-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=d111fa62-105c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=21278485)
---
Derek,

Last week was tough. I cut short my travel on behalf of the House Intelligence Committee to fly back to Washington to try to derail the Republican budget. It was hard to watch Republican after Republican go back on their promise to protect Medicare, bring down spending and our ballooning national debt, and slow inflation and make life more affordable for everyday Americans. The Republican budget is a betrayal of all of that, and it will take us years to recover.
I, along with my Democratic colleagues, threw everything we could at the process to stop the bill. We offered amendment after amendment to make the bill better (Republicans accepted none of them), we tried procedural motions to end the congressional session and send everyone home, we’ve been begging and badgering our Republican colleagues behind the scene to vote no, and my friend, Hakeem Jeffries’ broke the record for longest floor speech (almost 9 hours) to give voters a little more time to call their Representative and urge them to vote no.
As Hakeem implored Republicans not to sell out the poor and working class so that the wealthiest Americans could pay less in taxes, I was there. Were Republicans? No, the Chamber was empty. I thought I would be demoralized by this loss, but I’m not, and I hope you aren’t either.
Our party’s leader, Hakeem, invoked both John Lewis and Martin Luther King Jr. in his remarks:
John Lewis: "Do not get lost in a sea of despair. Be hopeful, be optimistic. Our struggle is not the struggle of a day, a week, a month, or a year; it is the struggle of a lifetime.”
Martin Luther King Jr.: “If you can’t run, walk. If you can’t walk, crawl, but at all times, press on.”
And he closed with a powerful reference to the Declaration of Independence. He said that our nation’s founders had “aspirational dreams for a new country that guaranteed its citizens the inalienable rights of life liberty and the pursuit of happiness” while the rest of the document reads like “an indictment against an out of control king. And why was that indictment issued? I think it was because the framers of this great country, they were fed up with Project 1775 and so they implemented Project 1776. I know there are people concerned with what’s happening in America, but understand, what our journey teaches us is that after Project 2025 comes Project 2026.”
Project 2026 is all of us working to right the ship in November. We can do this. We must. Thank you for being in this fight with me.
There is still work to be done,

Chrissy
| Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
P.O. Box 222
Devon, PA 19333
United States Emails are a crucial way for us to stay in touch with our top supporters; however, we understand if you need a break from political emails right now. If you'd like to pause emails for the next few weeks, you can click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111093656/556194856/-1727112621?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTExZmE2Mi0xMDVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Npq5RNSX8XsfcmO_i22DpRctSnqesSvFmuLO_QDogVM=&emci=9738ed89-3f5b-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=d111fa62-105c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=21278485). name: Stasha Rhodes, United for Democracy
subject: They threw immigrants and trans kids under the bus
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
The Supreme Court is done ruling for the summer. We’re going to feel the effects for decades to come. | |
---
Peter, **After a brutal month of horrible rulings, the Supreme Court’s term is finally over.** This year, the Supreme Court went full MAGA—brazenly giving in to the right-wing extremists that placed them in power. **Three of the MAGA justices’ rulings were particularly toxic—throwing trans kids and immigrants under the bus, and placing an even bigger crown on Donald Trump’s head.** Americans are going to feel the effects of their rulings for decades, and it’s going to take a lot of time and work to right their wrongs. United for Democracy has been there every step of the way to rally our community of activists and hold the MAGA justices accountable. And we’ll be there in the years to come as we fight to end MAGA’s corruption of the Supreme Court, and undo all the damage these right-wing extremists have done to our judiciary. [**Our coalition rose to answer each and every MAGA decision this term. But the work doesn’t end when the Supreme Court finishes issuing decisions. clean_body: The Supreme Court is done ruling for the summer. We’re going to feel the effects for decades to come. | | Peter, After a brutal month of horrible rulings, the Supreme Court’s term is finally over. This year, the Supreme Court went full MAGA—brazenly giving in to the right-wing extremists that placed them in power. Three of the MAGA justices’ rulings were particularly toxic—throwing trans kids and immigrants under the bus, and placing an even bigger crown on Donald Trump’s head. Americans are going to feel the effects of their rulings for decades, and it’s going to take a lot of time and work to right their wrongs. United for Democracy has been there every step of the way to rally our community of activists and hold the MAGA justices accountable. And we’ll be there in the years to come as we fight to end MAGA’s corruption of the Supreme Court, and undo all the damage these right-wing extremists have done to our judiciary. Three of the rulings the Supreme Court handed down in June will have enormous effects on our vulnerable friends and neighbors, and on our democracy as a whole, for decades to come. In U.S. v. Skrmetti, the Court put anti-trans propaganda over science and upheld bans ripping gender-affirming healthcare away from transgender youth. Now, if an extremist group wants to create a fake culture war over your identity, the Supreme Court may hear their “concerns” over your rights. In Medina v. Planned Parenthood, the Court ripped reproductive and basic health care from Medicaid patients who get their care from Planned Parenthood. The Court further ruled that patients don’t have the right to sue for their healthcare, which will make it much harder for marginalized people to litigate individual rights. In Trump v. CASA, the Court curbed the power of lower courts to stop the President’s unconstitutional executive orders. This means that Trump can engage in whatever unconstitutional actions he wants to while his policies are being challenged in court—including ripping birthright citizenship from millions of kids born in the United States. The theme of the Roberts Court continues to be victory for the wealthy and powerful, and scraps for the rest of us. But Supreme Court justices aren’t the only ones who get to decide what the Constitution means and what our democracy should be. That’s why United for Democracy is fighting for a more representative government that holds these powerful partisans in black robes accountable.** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Thank you for fighting for democracy this summer, Stasha Rhodes United for Democracy Paid for by United for Democracy. | | Sent via . This is time-sensitive.
| | | Hey team -- It's Pat, the Research Director here at the DSCC. I'll cut to the chase: **We NEED you to represent Pennsylvania in our Democratic Strategy Interview for 7/8/25.**

**[I'll tell you more in a moment, but before I do, will you share your answers real quick?>>](http://go.dscc.org/go/21871?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250708-Pat-PatDailyStrategyRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250708-Pat-PatDailyStrategyRF-Pros-sl1&akid=20691%2E9716520%2E0Tul0A)**

| **[START YOUR INTERVIEW](http://go.dscc.org/go/21871?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250708-Pat-PatDailyStrategyRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250708-Pat-PatDailyStrategyRF-Pros-sl1&akid=20691%2E9716520%2E0Tul0A)**
---

If I've learned anything in politics, it's that getting a head start isn't just important -- it's _crucial._ Victories only happen when we start well _before_ the elections. **And that means today.**

But we also need the right kind of head start. That's why **_not everybody's getting this email._** It's only going to top Democrats with a proven track record of making a difference in our country. **This is your chance to shape our vital 2026 Senate strategy, and believe me, it'll be very hard to get it right without your help.**

Today's survey closes at 11:59 PM, and **I don't have your response on file yet! So please, click this personal link to enter your Democratic Strategy Interview by taking the survey now: [www.dscc.org/DemStrategyInterview/#9716520](http://go.dscc.org/go/21871?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250708-Pat-PatDailyStrategyRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250708-Pat-PatDailyStrategyRF-Pros-sl1&akid=20691%2E9716520%2E0Tul0A) **

**[START YOUR INTERVIEW](http://go.dscc.org/go/21871?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250708-Pat-PatDailyStrategyRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250708-Pat-PatDailyStrategyRF-Pros-sl1&akid=20691%2E9716520%2E0Tul0A)**

subject: Be a Patriot (Not a Parrot)
body:
Taking care of your neighbor isn't socialism. It's American.

# [Be a Patriot (Not a Parrot)](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4399133&post_id=167814906&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY3ODE0OTA2LCJpYXQiOjE3NTE5OTAzOTAsImV4cCI6MTc1NDU4MjM5MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQzOTkxMzMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.VFyWZ5NyCiStalUQFuzzt9NCUk8rBRYmSdtbr4ACFf4)
### Taking care of your neighbor isn't socialism. It's American.
| | [Patrick J. Murphy](https://substack.com/@patrickmurphypa)
---
| Jul 8
---
| [](https://substack.com/@patrickmurphypa)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4399133&post_id=167814906&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY3ODE0OTA2LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1MTk5MDM5MCwiZXhwIjoxNzU0NTgyMzkwLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNDM5OTEzMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.jGMi97UQ8R3S59ENtd3csVDC0YzM0vqerMIms3VHfa8&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ff1d9aa6-023f-42c4-ae40-4f8f68406128?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
President Trump signing the "big beautiful bill." Screenshot via CBSNews.com.
I detest bullies. Pardon the graphic image, but frankly, when I see it happening, I want to break their face. And one of the biggest problems I see today is that far too many bullies are turning their bullying into law. Any dissent, even within their own ranks, triggers a personal attack. That's exactly what the "Big Beautiful Bill" that Congress just passed is: a law that bullies the less fortunate for the benefit of the wealthiest amongst us. It's a masterclass in cruelty disguised as policy.
In my hometown of Bucks County, 10,823 of my neighbors will lose their health insurance because of this bill's Medicaid cuts. To qualify for Medicaid, you need to be below the federal poverty level. For a family of four, that's less than $62,400 a year. For one person, less than $30,120.
Thanks for reading From the Desk of Honorable Patrick J. Murphy! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work.
[Pledge your support](https://substack..bOVGW9WO-UXwlm2TnHZzIcbOyD-nRJsWenY5r5W5q4E?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=167814906)
According to the nonpartisan Congressional Budge Office (CBO) the bottom 10% of income earners in America will suffer a 3.9% cut to their bottom line, roughly a $1600/year cut, while taxpayers in the top 10% will earn a 2.3% increase, receiving $12,000 more in their pocket or more. So, if you make $50K/year, that's almost a $2K cut and if you make a million, that's a $39K more cash in after-tax income in your pocket ( via CNBC). That's a massive redistribution of wealth at a time when folks can't afford it, and a bill that adds another $3.3 trillion to our national debt to pay for it, according to the nonpartisan Penn Wharton Budget Model. (the CBO scores it as adding $3.4 trillion.) (Data from Fox Business).
## Trump Squandered Democratic Success
Republicans claim that we cannot afford Medicaid, SNAP, or rural support programs, lifelines that keep millions of American working families afloat.
But in the same bill, they hand out tax cuts for the ultra-wealthy while raising the tax burden on the working and middle class. We're spending more on the President's boondoggle policies and cutting what actually works and benefits the American people. This is not fiscal responsibility. It's fiscal hypocrisy.
In Trump's first term, he inherited 75 straight months of job growth from President Obama, unemployment had fallen to just 4.7%, gas prices were $2.25 a gallon, the S&P 500 went up nearly 70%, and we were decreasing our deficit spending year after year. . Most importantly, we took care of our neighbors, as the Affordable Care Act provided 20 million more Americans with quality healthcare coverage. Under his Big _Harmful_ Bill, over 11.8 million Americans will lose their healthcare coverage, leaving them with crippling medical debt and destroying rural hospitals and community clinics who cannot survive the loss of coverage. (via CBO & Factcheck.org)
## A National Debt Bomb We Can't Afford
Under the Big Beautiful Bill, the national debt will increase by over $3.3 trillion over the next 10 years, on top of the $8 trillion President Trump added in his first term. This is a debt bomb we cannot afford.
I've been critical of national debt increases before. When I first ran for elected office in Bucks County, I criticized Congress for earmarking $500K in federal dollars for a teapot museum in North Carolina. After winning, we got rid of all earmarks. Here's one of my first speeches as a 33-year-old congressman, still talking about our $9 trillion in debt in 2007.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/d351135f-ce0a-4a22-82cc-338d0878204e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Lots of my Republican colleagues joined me in this criticism.
After all, being a patriot means giving an honest assessment of your party and calling it like you see it. Did President Biden increase the national debt? Yes. But here's the difference: his signature laws-- the Inflation Reduction Act, the CHIPS Act, the Bipartisan Infrastructure Bill-- were investments in the American people that were a net positive for the economy and for American families. They created jobs, strengthened supply chains, and rebuilt crumbling roads and bridges. Even if you combined all three of President Biden's achievements, the cost does not even approach the mountain of debt the Big Harmful Bill will create.
Of course we should do everything we can to protect taxpayer dollars. I believed that when I served in Congress and passed the IMPROVE Act to crack down on wasteful government spending. But ending Medicaid, SNAP, and other core programs millions of Americans rely on to give a tax break to billionaires is not fiscal responsibility. It's bullying. And it's exploitation and betrayal of the working class he claimed to champion in his campaign.
## Don't Be A Lemming
In the Army, we have a saying, "loyalty above all else except honor." Our current times remind me of lemmings-- small Arctic rodents who, according to popular myth, follow each other blindly off cliffs. My humble recommendation: don't be a lemming. Or a parrot, for that matter.
To my friends and readers on the other side of the aisle: Is this the direction you want the country to be going in? Recent [Fox News polling](https://substack.com/redirect/48de3a73-89b9-4d96-b521-079d57e9b3b4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) shows that 85% of Republican voters feel patriotic, up 30% from just a year ago when President Biden was in office. But when you take a closer look, grocery prices are higher. Gas prices are still up. Russia is on the move with no end to the war in sight, and they just launched their largest drone strikes against Ukraine ever. All that changed this past year was the party occupying the Oval Office. I'm not asking you to switch parties, but don't check your common sense at the door.
My Wharton Business School colleague Adam Grant brilliantly wrote on _[X](https://substack.com/redirect/cf87daf4-1454-4041-be2f-5977243cb010?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ , "Too many people recognize their opinions as feelings, but mistake their beliefs for facts. Closed minds hold truths to be self-evident. Open minds are willing to question even strongly held views. Lifelong learning requires the courage to challenge our own convictions."
https://x.com/AdamMGrant/status/1938634663058112790
More specifically, don't back policies that hurt working families, gut healthcare and rural hospitals, and reward billionaires when we can least afford it, just because your party is in power. That's not patriotism. That's partisanship at its worst.
-- Patrick
_The Honorable Patrick J. Murphy is a Wharton lecturer, Vetrepreneur, and the 32nd Army Under Secretary after earning the Bronze Star for service in Baghdad, Iraq as an All-American with the 82nd Airborne Division --@PatrickMurphyPA on Instagram and Twitter._

\- _**Honorable Patrick J. Murphy**_

body:
Guy Ciarrocchi | B+L Featured Columnist | | | |
---
| | |
---
| **__Guy Ciarrocchi_ : Bribing poor families to stay in schools that don’t work!_**
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d5031ec203&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
* * *
---
| ''Yes, the headline is correct. Another public school district is bribing poor families to transfer _back_ to the very schools that they transferred the children _from_. It’s outrageous, unethical, immoral and ought to be illegal — if it isn’t already. When I saw the news article, I stopped another column that I was writing. This is even more outrageous than what I was writing about, because this is about our children..."
---

As a common-sense conservative thought-leader, Guy’s writings provoke thought on important topics such as education, politics, culture, and anti-Semitism. Guy draws on decades of experience from South Philly to the Philadelphia suburbs to Pittsburgh, from Harrisburg to Washington, DC, having served at the highest levels of government, as a candidate and strategist, as well as Chamber CEO. Guy has been listening, observing and guiding his readers for years.

It’s outrageous, unethical, immoral and ought to be illegal — if it isn’t already. When I saw the news article, I stopped another column that I was writing. This is even more outrageous than what I was writing about, because this is about our children..." | "Read More" | | About Guy Ciarrocchi: | | As a common-sense conservative thought-leader, Guy’s writings provoke thought on important topics such as education, politics, culture, and anti-Semitism. Guy draws on decades of experience from South Philly to the Philadelphia suburbs to Pittsburgh, from Harrisburg to Washington, DC, having served at the highest levels of government, as a candidate and strategist, as well as Chamber CEO. Guy has been listening, observing and guiding his readers for years. | | | We at are proud to provide readers across our region, state and beyond, with insightful, original investigative reports, and thought-leadership, on education, crime, business and government. Read more columns on — updated daily and as news breaks. | "Support Broad + Liberty" | | | | | | | | | | | | | www.broadandliberty.com | | Copyright © 2025 Broad + Liberty, All rights reserved._ You're getting Broad + Liberty updates due to your interest in our site – and local stories for free thinkers in the Philly region and beyond. name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: This conservative Supreme Court majority is feckless
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111095823/556201630/623074613?refcode=jtk1409-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM3OTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTgwZGRkOTUtMTQ1Yy1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Xj2XW62ujqH9JiO1uGhkY-j46ZoaSC5Gwx10twybVhk=&emci=674cb7af-8257-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=580ddd95-145c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=9329426)
---
Friend,

After a weekend dedicated to celebrating our nation’s founding, it is the natural moment to reflect upon the special gifts being an American citizen confers.

Just days ago, the Supreme Court ruled to remove power from judges nationwide to block Donald Trump's unconstitutional executive order eliminating birthright citizenship.
This decision leaves families across the country in a state of fear and uncertainty about their children’s future. While birthright citizenship remains the law here in Connecticut, this ruling has paved the way for Trump's executive order to go into effect in many other states. That means, when Connecticut families travel to another state, their rights won't necessarily follow them across state lines.
This is in direct violation of the Constitution and the very fabric of our country.
If you are born in the United States, you are a U.S. citizen. Period. This fundamental right has been enshrined in our Constitution under the 14th Amendment for greater than 125 years. In fact, this issue has already gone to the Supreme Court – _twice_. And twice, the Supreme Court has upheld it.
This feckless conservative Supreme Court majority has chipped away at two bedrock constitutional principles: the guarantee of birthright citizenship and an American justice system that can serve as an effective check and balance to prevent illegal and unconstitutional actions by the government. They claim that this decision is merely procedural, but that is a lie they tell to absolve themselves of leaving millions of Americans newly vulnerable to government overreach.
With our fundamental freedoms, core constitutional values, justice, and democracy under attack like never before, you have my word that I will continue fighting back against this administration with every tool I have in Congress. I will never let up. I will never shy away.
I'm filled with gratitude knowing that you're with me in the fight ahead of us. Thank you – today and always.

Sincerely,

Dick

People might assume the Maryland governor's seat is safe this election. But, before Wes, there was a Republican in Government House.

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: re: the budget bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

**Gutting Medicaid.**
**Bankrupting nursing homes and rural hospitals.**
**Jacking up health insurance premiums for middle-class families.**
**Devastating the renewable energy industry.**
**Adding trillions— _trillions_ —to the national debt.**
That’s just a fraction of the damage that will result from Trump’s disastrous new law — written and passed so that Fortune 500 companies and the very wealthiest Americans can get big tax breaks.
From his palace in Florida, Trump has engineered perhaps the largest upward transfer of wealth in American history.
***
This isn’t a vision for America’s future. It’s pure corruption.
And the truth is, beyond revenge, there’s not much to this President’s agenda.
It’s tax breaks for the rich and rounding up immigrants. That’s it. That’s the whole program.
_I wondered, as my Republican colleagues voted “aye” on this bill, did they stop to ask themselves:_
* Will my constituents be better off when the richest people in America get a tax break and middle-class families see their hospitals close and their health care premiums spike by thousands?

* Will our children be healthier, our parents better cared for, our hospitals better funded, if we gut the program that covers millions of births and seniors in nursing homes?

* Will America be more prosperous if we take a hatchet to renewable energy so we can pump more subsidies into oil and gas?

***
I’m running for re-election to the U.S. Senate in 2026. And I’m the only Democrat in the country on the ballot in a state Trump won in 2024.
GEORGIA IS THE FIREWALL.
To protect health care, our economic and environmental future, our civil rights and civil liberties — to defend our Republic we have to win here.
So if you’re furious: you _should_ be.
I need you in this fight in Georgia right now. Whatever you do, don’t sit this out.
Let’s get to work.
— Jon

_👋 Wait! Before you go... 👋_
Jon Ossoff’s the ONLY Democratic Senator running for re-election in a state Trump won––making him MAGA’s #1 target in the 2026 midterms.
[**If you can afford it, please rush $5 to Jon’s re-election campaign today.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-july25.vLE_dc&refcode=em250708-1-f&t=1&akid=532%2E5691347%2EVDvfU8)

clean_body: There is nothing more American than this | | | | | Patriot, it’s America’s birthday and there is only one way to celebrate the greatest country on earth. So, to celebrate in properstyle, I’m giving away a legendary FN M249S PARA. For two and a half centuries, we’ve fought off tyrants, defended our Constitution, and kept the flame of freedom burning bright. Now, it’s time to honor that legacy with a giveaway that screams AMERICAN PRIDE. Chances like this don’t come often, this gun is valued at over $10,000 , and it could be yours by making a donation of any amount. ! In Liberty, Marjorie Taylor Greene

## Stories I'm reading...

[88% of Seniors Won't Pay Taxes on Social Security If One Big, Beautiful Bill Passes, Analysis Finds](https://substack.com/redirect/65a00de0-d0d4-44ef-a62d-066ad41f90c6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- via The Daily Signal

## Start your day in the know
Are you starting you day in the know? Every morning at 9am ET you can join the Morning Meeting with myself, Mark Halperin and Dan Turrentine. We walk through the news of the day like no one else-- and then take your questions. You can find it all on the same [YouTube channel](https://substack.com/redirect/309bed5f-23b4-4292-a9c3-5e0d90ef58e8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as my 6pm show. Make sure to subscribe and hit the notification button so you don't miss it!
[Subscribe HERE](https://substack.com/redirect/309bed5f-23b4-4292-a9c3-5e0d90ef58e8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## This week on The Sean Spicer Show...
We've got a great line-up this week, starting today with Tricia McLaughlin, Assistant Secretary at Homeland Security. Then Wednesday, I'll be talking with businessman Nate Morris and former U.S. ambassador Scott Brown. Thursday we've got a great panel featuring Steve Cortes, AFPI's Jenn Pellegrino, and Mercedes Schlapp. We'll finish out the week with a fascinating conversation featuring Victor Davis Hanson. Be sure to turn on notifications so you don't miss it!
## Wellness update...
If you watch the show or have been reading the newsletter for a while you know I have been on my own MAHA/wellness journey. One of the big things I have done is switched out many of the personal care products (soap, toothpaste, vitamins, etc) and home care products (cleaning supplies, detergent) with products from an American based, family company where wellness is front and center.
If you are interested in finding out what I did, text INFO to 276-500-1185 and join me!
## America celebrates, the Left fumes...
Coming off of Independence Day weekend, I can't help but feel a little extra patriotic.
With all the wins we've been racking up, it's hard not to.
Trump is brokering peace in the Middle East, manufacturing and jobs are coming back to America, and my 4th of July wish came true: the big, beautiful bill is now law.
It's obvious that the country's starting to prosper again--and not a moment too soon.
Not everyone feels that way though.
It seems like most of the folks on the Left are living in a different reality than the rest of us.
They could barely find it in themselves to pretend to be happy on Independence Day.
And because they're not getting their way, their tantrums are becoming more and more unhinged.
It's sad, but it's where they're at.
Let's break it down. ...

name: Mark Kelly
subject: They’ve really stepped in it
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
I’m going to make sure that the people who did this pay a political price for it.
#

Team — I know it doesn’t feel like it right now, but Trump and his Republican Congress really stepped in it last week.
We saw Republicans in the Senate celebrate after they passed that budget, and the same thing happened in the House. Lots of smiling, lots of applause, pats on the back. On the Fourth of July, of all days, Trump had all of them over to the White House for the signing ceremony like some kind of hero.
But make no mistake: They just signed one of the most unpopular bills of all time into law. Maybe even _the_ most unpopular, ever. They did so with the slimmest of margins, against the will of the majority of Americans. They did all of that, and they celebrated.
People have already been suffering because of Trump’s chaos for the last six months. It’s no secret. Now, that harm is going to increase considerably.
So, I’ve got two priorities right now. First, I’m going to do my best to minimize the harm this bill does to the people of Arizona, and I’m going to try to help as many people as I can. But second, I’m going to make sure that the people who did this pay a political price for it.
I know a thing or two about winning elections. And whatever I can do, wherever I can go, whoever I can help — I am going to do it. I am going to fight like hell to defeat the people who dropped this burden on veterans, hungry kids, the elderly, and hardworking families just trying to get by.
We’ve got to send them a message. So, I’m asking you to chip in and help me do it. Let’s show them what’s coming their way.
[**Make a donation and support my work as we fight our way to the elections in 2026. It’s the only way we’ll roll back the damage Trump’s already done, and it’s how we’ll prevent him from doing even more.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-july25/.CXgdOY&refcode=em250708-1-600&t=1&akid=6117%2E6688874%2EApn_AX)

name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: The Republicans just handed us our midterms strategy - lets GO
body:
“They’ll get over it.”
That’s Mitch McConnell’s response to the nationwide outcry after the GOP passed Trump’s so-called “Big Beautiful Bill” — slashing Medicaid and devastating the lives of millions of Americans.
If you’re as furious as we are, chip in $15 or whatever you can right now to help us fight back. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-biguglybill?refcode=070825_1]
Rush a donation now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-biguglybill&refcode=070825_1&amount=250]
That quote says it all, Peter.
→ They think we’re powerless.
→ They think we’re too tired to fight.
→ They think we’ll just accept it and move on.
Well, we won’t. And we can’t — because the stakes are too high.
Republicans are getting bolder by the day. From attacking reproductive freedom to gutting safety net programs like Medicaid, they’ve made o ne thing clear: they won’t stop until they have complete control of every aspect of our lives.
If we want to stop them, we need to start now. We must flip the House. We must take back the Senate. Falling short means shrinking our field plan, cutting back on outreach, and taking our foot off the gas at the worst possible moment.
Chip in whatever you can today to help us take the fight to McConnell and every Republican who stood by and said nothing as Trump stole the money of hardworking Americans and handed it to his billionaire buddies. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-biguglybill?refcode=070825_1]

If you’re as furious as we are, chip in $15 or whatever you can right now to help us fight back. And we can’t — because the stakes are too high. Republicans are getting bolder by the day. | | BREAKING: FBI Reveals China Is Attacking Our Power Grid | **BREAKING: FBI reveals China is attacking our power grid.** [](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/21614/6374453/f621cfe885b8c4872e3ef24a6ca550ea9174c885/22a6b277fac353cd8b6b447d9ae32095450e7d09) **Experts urge Americans to protect their homes.** A new alarming report reveals over 70 attacks on America's power grid in just one year, and these are calculated strikes designed to weaken our nation's most essential lifeline. Security experts have raised the alarm for years about the most vulnerable aspect of infrastructure in the United States that puts you and your family in critical danger: **Our crumbling electric grid.** _Officials report that attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could result in nationwide blackouts for up to 18 months._ Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment the power fails. Lights all over the country would go out, throwing people into total chaos and darkness. Our enemies would just sit back and watch as we self-destruct through looting, rioting and the targeting of police officers. **Our government is woefully unprepared.** Are you and your family prepared to survive as much as 18 months without electricity, food or clean water? It seems like the government has been fixated on taking more and more away from people who worked hard to earn it, while doing virtually nothing to secure our nation's critical infrastructure. [**That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/21614/6374453/f621cfe885b8c4872e3ef24a6ca550ea9174c885/22a6b277fac353cd8b6b447d9ae32095450e7d09) Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer – spoiled. Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most – and without gas, fumes or noise. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**NEW Patriot Power Generator 1200**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/21614/6374453/f621cfe885b8c4872e3ef24a6ca550ea9174c885/22a6b277fac353cd8b6b447d9ae32095450e7d09). THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever. You'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. And we have some great news! **Right Now Is The Perfect Time To Get Your NEW Patriot Power Generator 1200 Because of This _Exclusive_ 14 FREE Gifts Bonus Package Worth $973!** After offering a similar deal last year, these generators sold like hotcakes. Now with this NEW Patriot Power Generator 1200...
* You get MORE power...
* You get FASTER recharging...
* And it can even power your FRIDGE!

"Honestly, I was VERY impressed. The increased battery capacity and 1200-watt power was a good call. I didn't find a single thing I have in the house, for emergencies or everyday use, that I couldn't use it for! The new screen even shows you the time until empty, even if it's under 1 watt. name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: Less than two weeks left. Let’s make it count.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
This is our moment to lay it all out on the field.
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=473%2E181023%2EXYMCaa)
Team, in a little under two weeks, we are facing the most critical fundraising deadline for our campaign. Every single dollar we raise will be a measure of our grassroots strength.
**[I’ll explain more, but if you’re able, will you rush in $10 right now so we can finish strong?](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q32025.A5XsW4&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250708_PM1_V1_S1&amount=10&t=2&akid=473%2E181023%2EXYMCaa)**
[DONATE](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q32025.OcO0Lx&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250708_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=473%2E181023%2EXYMCaa)
---
We’re rapidly approaching a crucial fundraising deadline here in Michigan, and with all eyes on our campaign, this is our moment to lay it _all_ out on the field.
Right now, we're leading in the polls, and momentum is on our side, but we can’t rest because Michigan Republicans are repeatedly coming after me. We need **bold action** to ensure this campaign has the grassroots support to win in a state as competitive as Michigan.
Look, the stakes are high. The anti-public education DeVos family has already picked their candidate on the Republican side with a $5 million check.. Michigan Republicans are playing political games, voting to hold me in contempt just for doing my job to keep our elections secure. **We need to show all of them that our campaign is ready for whatever they throw at us.**
**[Will you make a donation ahead of our important July 20 fundraising deadline? I want everyone to see how powerful our movement is, but we can’t do that without grassroots contributions that will determine our ability to fight back, reach voters with our vision for a better Michigan, and make government work for every Michigander.](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q32025.OcO0Lx&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250708_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=473%2E181023%2EXYMCaa)**
