name: Dan Freeman (via Democrats.org)
subject: A message from the DNC’s new Litigation Director:
body:
---
Hi Derek, It’s Dan Freeman, the new Litigation Director at the DNC. I’m a former Department of Justice attorney, and now I’m joining the DNC to help protect your right to vote. Here’s my story: I spent almost 15 years at DOJ as a voting rights lawyer. I was a civil servant, and I loved enforcing the Voting Rights Act on behalf of the American people. I helped stop voter purges in Alabama and gerrymandering in Texas. But everything changed when President Trump returned to the White House. They forced out brilliant lawyers. Directed us to drop crucial cases. And now, DOJ is standing by as the Republican Party attacks a law that prevents trading massive campaign donations for political favors. So here at the DNC, we’re stepping up where DOJ is refusing to act. We’re going to use legal action to enforce voting rights laws when states around the country violate them, and we’ll intervene and defend your right to vote when the Republican Party tries to make it harder for you to cast a ballot that will be counted. **That’s why I’m asking you to make a donation to help fund the DNC’s legal work today.** By donating $3 today you’ll help us make investments in legal work that will have an impact for years to come. You’ll also help us send a message to the Republican Party that any attempt to pick and choose their voters won’t go unanswered. [Chip in today to help fund the DNC’s legal work and fight for every vote to be counted. Too much is at stake to lose this battle →](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?refcode=em_20250708_3900_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3907_22930333_qqAsLg&akid=3907%2E22930333%2EqqAsLg) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250708_3900_fr&refcode2=3907_22930333_qqAsLg&akid=3907%2E22930333%2EqqAsLg)**

name: Deb Haaland
subject: I’m beyond excited to share our official Be Fierce green chile salsa with you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
Every jar is made with love and all-natural ingredients right here in New Mexico.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=3100%2E400544%2EiIyEhe)
Long before I served in Congress or as Secretary of the Interior, I made a living selling jars of my homemade salsa.
I started my salsa business when Somáh was just two years old. I was the designated salsa maker at all family and friend dinners, and it was always a hit! Finally, I decided to take the leap and start my own small business to share my salsa and give Somáh and me more time together.
That’s how Pueblo Salsa was born. I worked out of a commercial kitchen and sourced my red chile pequin from a farm in northern New Mexico. When I wasn’t busy prepping, roasting, and blending ingredients for my homemade salsa, I’d strap Somáh in the car seat and we’d drive for hours delivering orders to mom-and-pop shops across the state. It was a small business with a big heart. ❤️
[](https://shop.debhaaland.com/collections/debs-salsa?utm_source=em20250708-1)_Here’s Somáh posing with jars of my homemade salsa at the NM State Fair NMDA Country Store.
Pueblo children start early... 🌶️_
So much has changed since those days I spent running my business, but my passion for sharing New Mexican food with friends and family is still as fierce as ever. **That’s why I’m beyond excited to share our newest addition to the Team Deb merch store: our official Be Fierce green chile salsa!**
[****](https://shop.debhaaland.com/collections/debs-salsa?utm_source=em20250708-1)_Who knew I’d still be selling jars of my salsa all these years later?_
Every jar of this salsa is made with love – _and all-natural ingredients_ – right here in New Mexico. And every dollar from every purchase directly supports our hard work to grow our grassroots campaign for governor.
**[Head to our official Team Deb merch store to pick up your own jar of our Be Fierce green chile salsa. I’d be honored to share this special salsa with you.](https://shop.debhaaland.com/collections/debs-salsa?utm_source=em20250708-1)**
**[Shop now »](https://shop.debhaaland.com/collections/debs-salsa?utm_source=em20250708-1)**
Be fierce,
Deb 🌶️
P.S. Cooking and sharing New Mexican food has always been one of my favorite ways to foster connection and build community – that’s exactly what we’re doing now as we build our people-powered campaign for New Mexico. [**If you’re a fellow salsa lover like me, head to our official Team Deb merch store to pick up your jar of our Be Fierce green chile salsa.**](https://shop.debhaaland.com/collections/debs-salsa?utm_source=em20250708-1)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250708-1&t=2&refcode2=3100_400544_iIyEhe&akid=3100%2E400544%2EiIyEhe)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=3100%2E400544%2EiIyEhe)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=3100%2E400544%2EiIyEhe)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

name: America First Alerts
subject: Kash Patel just blew the lid off the 2020 election.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CONSTITUTIONAL CONSERVATIVES FUND
body:
What he just uncovered is something every single MAGA voter needs to see.

| | | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zecbble1tqle79v7ed49i5ru5970aha68q5ilou0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1g66or1c1h2bs)
---
_**THE 2020 ELECTION WAS RIGGED.**_

For _**YEARS**_ , President Trump has never given up the fight to investigate the most _**RIGGED**_ election ever in American history.

We need your voice now!

| Hi team,

**We wanted to follow up because the GOP's efforts to weaken Social Security are not slowing down, and we can’t afford to stay silent.**

Donald Trump promised not to touch Social Security.

But once in office, he launched one of the most aggressive rollbacks in the program’s history — **slashing staff, closing offices, and making it harder for seniors and people with disabilities to access the benefits they’ve earned.**

This is a direct attack on some of the most vulnerable members of our communities. _That’s why we need your voice now._

\- Cut the Social Security Administration’s staffing by 7,000 jobs – 12% of the workforce

name: Eileen Laubacher
subject: I’m running against Lauren Boebert
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc3671ec6-5a19-4240-a54c-5b1d070f10f5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tffba578c-d9dc-4366-9651-1b39db2ee288/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, **My name is Eileen Laubacher, and I am the Democrat and retired U.S. Navy Admiral running against Lauren Boebert in Colorado.** I was 17-years-old the first time I raised my right hand and took an oath to support and defend the Constitution against all enemies, foreign and domestic. I took those words, and that responsibility, seriously every day for the next 4 decades. When I was an intelligence officer. When I was deployed to Afghanistan. When I became an Admiral. And as a member of the president’s National Security Council. But in all those years, I have never felt as much of a threat to our country, our Constitution, and our very democracy as I do right now. I said I would never run for office. But in this moment, I feel an obligation to step up, serve my community, and defend our country once again. **I am running for Congress to defeat Lauren Boebert because when she was sworn into office, Lauren took a similar oath to defend our Constitution – and she has betrayed it almost every single day since then.** Adam Frisch only lost to Lauren Boebert by 546 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country. With the right Democrat, we can finally put an end to Lauren Boebert’s embarrassing political career – but I need your help now to do it. My campaign has set a goal to raise $50,000 to defeat Lauren Boebert and take back the House for Democrats, but right now, we’re still very short. **If I am going to send Lauren Boebert packing and flip this seat blue, I need grassroots donors like you to chip in right now to my campaign: ** [**Please, will you split a**** donation right now between my campaign and ****Blue Amp Action**** to help me defeat Lauren Boebert, flip this seat blue, and take back the House for Democrats? I am not accepting money from corporate PACs like Boebert is, so no amount you can give is too small.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9f864708-fd99-42b0-a659-a264ab81b948/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Our republic is being tested in ways that it has never been before. We must protect it and keep it. I am so grateful to have your support. Eileen Rear Admiral Eileen Laubacher (Retired)
United States Navy _REAR ADMIRAL EILEEN LAUBACHER (RET) IS A FORMER MEMBER OF THE U.S. NAVY. USE OF HER MILITARY RANK, JOB TITLES, AND PHOTOGRAPHS IN UNIFORM DOES NOT IMPLY ENDORSEMENT FROM THE DEPARTMENT OF THE NAVY OR THE DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE._

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfb2820b1-3a12-4efb-979a-7187ba000a6d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

[ ](https://links.biancoforgovernor.com/s/c/gRtxWQuoFOYV2D3DYGOmHfH9TUsg2h3ust1mDm6Qkk-xN4Gv5ZaLn4MkQc2tFASFGZ5agEBiExcxijmA8VnRtLZdi2QWoG3UU1K2HluhkeJ2kJmrZ_6P3nBVcBlu0ApuarkZp3Fv9H89Rs7jycIEtthqN43nBWQXm9haiJ1Hx__JHoRemNTN8gelk0CAcuTnkGdkdUk-YiBrY8iCkooQG8cKhPyT0JPCq_qfdaz-V2RRv3CWHKhHjYk3PByTk3ynRyabCo26jPvDZnNw7Z7RUk6vPo3L797a3xPeWNljLLwWbsiR84qgNojkQAX8r5LHamX_CTLs56TpWvfE3mJjbQe0TX6jPto1Jg7nsYS7AKmwpfQpJNvcL7Bz55DX7abEgGKJgE-slPnjLIok8iFVGCi9w6Y2vlFXYF0SfjjxBQ1pCGXf38JoIw0jYEcFMZmAwNB-VXUglBFLdk5TXWdsX1CD9dPMrEOgR2EBrv6qY-U6fg3rXsGddhEaV4-ycQLo1H4bleZASQjwraRz9ey5BixsbWdOLj9hy4k7lu4iH4_EuiWvSuEeNe_0mw/qK7WEWfobpXUI8Z-jWTxFrYL1X8wfqRN/10)

Friends,A new poll just sent shockwaves through California politics:

Only 41% of voters would support Kamala Harris for Governor over a Republican.

**That means nearly 60% of Californians are ready for a change.**

They’re done with decades of one-party rule. Done with high crime and high taxes. Done with lawmakers who ignore and disrespect the millions of Californians who do things right.

Together, we are building a movement to save and restore California. This poll shows we have a real chance to win.

**But only if we reach voters NOW.** Your support helps us reach the frustrated Californians who don’t want to vote for another Democrat.

name: Team Bennet
subject: They’re throwing working families under the bus.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q3?refcode=X_250708_obbbresponse_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q3?refcode=X_250708_obbbresponse_act]
Hi folks,
Last week, President Trump signed his so-called “big, beautiful bill” into law.
With this bill, the Republican Party has thrown American workers and families under the bus again to hand out billions of dollars in tax breaks to their ultra-wealthy donors.
This bill includes massive cuts to food aid and health insurance—including the most significant cuts to Medicaid in its history. It will rip healthcare away from Coloradans, shutter rural hospitals and nursing homes, drive up our electricity costs, and force kids to go hungry. Nearly half a million Coloradans will be worse off because of it, and millions more will feel the negative impacts —all to give the wealthy another handout.
To top it off , Trump’s bill will add $3.3 trillion to our debt, which means increased borrowing costs and billions more in interest payments.
Let’s be clear about what’s happening here: Republicans are making the rich richer, the poor poorer, and jeopardizing our kids’ futures.
Truly shameful.
While our country will have to deal with the fallout from this bill, here in Colorado, Michael is determined to lead the way to a better and brighter future.
It’s precisely why he’s running for governor. In office, he will prioritize our working families by pushing for policies that lower the cost of housing and healthcare, modernize our education system, and protect our public lands.
He knows that during these tumultuous times, Coloradans have an opportunity to carve out a hopeful and optimistic future for our state and our country.
Michael believes that by working together here at home, we’ll be able to fight back against Trump’s White House and D.C.’s broken politics in a way that uplifts Colorado’s working families. Team, if you are with us in this campaign, pitch in whatever you can today. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q3?refcode=X_250708_obbbresponse_act]

Peter, will you give me a moment to share where we’re at? We’ve hit the halfway point of 2025, and setting our foundation for the rest of the year is critically important. One-time contributions are really crucial to help us meet deadlines like the one we just passed, or during big moments when the eyes are on us. But consistent, monthly support helps us keep the drumbeat going. Monthly contributions, $5 or $10 at a time, help us build this coalition from the ground up. These contributions lay the foundation and give us the space and ability to plan ahead _and_ respond quickly; two things that we have to be able to do to stand up to the right wing’s misinformation movement. name: Jeff Merkley
subject: The Department of Education is holding back $7 billion from our public schools
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
As Republicans rushed to jam through Trump’s awful revenue and spending bill, we can't let the administration's decision to withhold critical education funding fly under the radar.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111100859/556219046/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NmI2YzE4Yy0xZDVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L5cpXJnV8UT1RWC01Px0pI90FqFUEIMiciL_onEY8Ns=&emci=e4dc1186-1d5c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=56b6c18c-1d5c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7731215)

| | The Department of Education is holding back $7 billion from our public schools — funds that Congress already approved — for essential programs like after-school services, English-language learning, and support for students from low-income families. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111100860/556219047/-2122444374?refcode=2025-07-08-schools&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=56b6c18c-1d5c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NmI2YzE4Yy0xZDVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L5cpXJnV8UT1RWC01Px0pI90FqFUEIMiciL_onEY8Ns=) In the Republican rush to jam through Trump's awful revenue and spending bill, we can't let the administration's misguided decision to claw back critical education funding fly under the radar. **Trump is robbing our children of their futures to pad the pockets of the super-rich.** These programs aren't luxuries. They are lifelines for millions of kids across the country. This is just one more example of Trump and his cronies willfully putting politics ahead of people — hurting students, parents, teachers, and entire communities in the process. Families lose, billionaires win. **We can't sit back while children are denied the resources they need to succeed.** I'm demanding answers and working with my colleagues to hold the Trump administration accountable, and I need you with me. Stand up for our kids, speak out, and let's fight back together. Onward, _Jeff_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Jeff Merkley instantly:

name: Robert Garcia

body:
I don’t apologize for it
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111101127/556219699/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NmU0MmZjZi0xZDVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eTHzGmvKowNoeHDh4lOvWxm_RC7GKqhHmA5oPVVEIEM=)
Hi, it's Democratic Congressman and top Democrat on the House Oversight Committee, Robert Garcia.
The corruption coming out of Donald Trump’s administration is horrifying. Let me explain:
Back in February, I criticized Elon Musk’s so-called Department of Government Efficiency or “DOGE” as “harming the American public in an enormous way.” I said what everyone already knows to be true — that Musk is a d***.
Then, Trump’s crony lawyer came after me for calling out Musk.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111101128/556219700/789508428?refcode=250708_RG_DOJ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NmU0MmZjZi0xZDVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eTHzGmvKowNoeHDh4lOvWxm_RC7GKqhHmA5oPVVEIEM=)
**Now, that same crony lawyer just hired a Trump-pardoned January 6 rioter to work for him at the Department of Justice.**
I’m the top Democrat on the House Oversight Committee. And I need your help to hold corrupt Republican officials accountable to stop them from politicizing the DOJ.
Once we take back Congress, I’ll have the power to hold Republicans accountable on behalf of the American people and restore honor and sanity to the House of Representatives.
**[But I need your help to get the job done. If you’re as fired up as I am to win back the House Majority and defeat these sellout Republicans, then chip in $10 or more right away. Together, we have what it takes to win, but we need to act quickly.>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111101129/556219701/789508428?refcode=250708_RG_DOJ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NmU0MmZjZi0xZDVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eTHzGmvKowNoeHDh4lOvWxm_RC7GKqhHmA5oPVVEIEM=)**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111101130/556219702/-309737922?refcode=250708_RG_DOJ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NmU0MmZjZi0xZDVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eTHzGmvKowNoeHDh4lOvWxm_RC7GKqhHmA5oPVVEIEM=)
Thank you,
Robert

Peter, extreme House Republicans just approved the largest cut to Medicaid and food assistance in American history to fund tax breaks for their billionaire donors. |

Peter, extreme House Republicans just approved the largest cut to Medicaid and food assistance in American history to fund tax breaks for their billionaire donors.

**The latest GOP stunt will rip healthcare away from 17 MILLION Americans, jack up our utility bills and take food out of the mouths of children, seniors and veterans. It’s disgusting.**

I won’t be silent. You shouldn’t be either.

**[Peter, if enough Democrats band together, we can ensure Republicans will always regret this vote. I’m calling for an emergency fundraising surge today – 5,000 Democratic Membership renewals before midnight – to show everyone watching that when Republicans go after our families, we’re coming for their seats. Can I count on you to renew your membership by splitting a donation between me and George Whitesides so we can rush resources to battleground districts, reclaim the House majority and hand the right-wing extremists a stunning rebuke? >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111101288/556220639/94277892?refcode=em-7.8.25-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmYzMmE1Yi0xZTVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_k2va4osj8s8yKx9raTIbQ-jHXShfz0jELnpcEUIIKk=)**

name: Eliza Walton
subject: Peter, let’s chat about what happened this session 💬
body:
https://secure.everyaction.com/lXDBtLsT3kaDrFjGNFRPog2?contactdata=k7MybyPj4PBFDuDuptMRuwuoRP8IVnWylUttbjz9kxZGCeuGV7h5hrtXuf5Xtor1maiJ2VebY0TN49nhBGTU32hBuWu5Go8bemdz/diK0ED4H+vWKFKFLT22LIBS84NR [https://secure.everyaction.com/lXDBtLsT3kaDrFjGNFRPog2?contactdata=k7MybyPj4PBFDuDuptMRuwuoRP8IVnWylUttbjz9kxZGCeuGV7h5hrtXuf5Xtor1maiJ2VebY0TN49nhBGTU32hBuWu5Go8bemdz/diK0ED4H+vWKFKFLT22LIBS84NR]
Dear Peter,
The 2025 legislative session concluded at 11:15 on June 27th. We did not accomplish all that we hoped to. It was a missed opportunity for lawmakers to respond to the escalating risks – from climate impacts, rising energy costs, and dire federal rollbacks – with bold, forward-looking policies that align with Oregon’s deeply held values of environmental stewardship, equity, and resilience. To put it simply, this session wasn’t what we expected with the newly elected supermajorities. Will you send your lawmakers a message today to urge them to prioritize these values going forward? [https://secure.everyaction.com/lXDBtLsT3kaDrFjGNFRPog2]
Send your message [https://secure.everyaction.com/lXDBtLsT3kaDrFjGNFRPog2?contactdata=k7MybyPj4PBFDuDuptMRuwuoRP8IVnWylUttbjz9kxZGCeuGV7h5hrtXuf5Xtor1maiJ2VebY0TN49nhBGTU32hBuWu5Go8bemdz/diK0ED4H+vWKFKFLT22LIBS84NR]
Let’s break down where all of our priorities landed:
* Failed — Pro-Climate and Pro-Conservation Budgets: Nothing to point to on investment for climate and environment. This was a challenging year with a lot of federal attacks but the need for these critical investments remains.
* Failed/Not Strong Enough on Climate — Transportation Package: The bill (HB 2025) included some important safety and transit investments, but did not include steps forward on climate, which caused us to be neutral on the bill. Ultimately, the bill failed to pass. This was one of our biggest opportunities to reduce climate pollution, and something we have to keep working towards. * Wildlife Crossings (HB 2978) passed .

* Mixed — Energy Affordable and Utility Accountability: * The POWER Act (HB 3546) passed . A big win to ensure mega-energy users pay their fair share!
* Get the Junk Out of Rates (SB 88) and One Stop Shop 2.0 (HB 3081) both failed to pass.
* Some other wins worth celebrating for lowering Oregonian’s utility bills and ensuring that our utility companies’ are using their profits for the good of the public, that weren’t included in this package: * The FAIR Act (HB 3179), which ensures that Oregon consumers are priorities when setting energy rates, passed .
* Senate Bill 688, which provides new tools for holding utilities accountable for spending money, lowering energy bills, public safety, and providing grid reliability, passed .

* Failed — Safeguarding Streamflows to Protect Oregon's Water: Both SB 427 and SB 1153 did not pass. OLCV would like to thank Gov. Tina Kotek for making modernization of water laws a top priority this session. [https://capitalpress.com/2025/03/27/kotek-backs-controversial-oregon-water-transfer-reviews/] Oregon's limited water resources are under such pressure in many areas that new withdrawals are no longer feasible. As a result, water transfers—modifying existing water rights to allow use in different locations or for new purposes—are being used more frequently to support new water needs. Oregonians are counting on us to ensure our laws are protective of our water and we will continue to support this work.
* Failed — Wildlife Stewardship Program (OLCV Special Focus): did not get funded.
Take action [https://secure.everyaction.com/lXDBtLsT3kaDrFjGNFRPog2?contactdata=k7MybyPj4PBFDuDuptMRuwuoRP8IVnWylUttbjz9kxZGCeuGV7h5hrtXuf5Xtor1maiJ2VebY0TN49nhBGTU32hBuWu5Go8bemdz/diK0ED4H+vWKFKFLT22LIBS84NR]
There were also a number of other bills that we were happy to see pass even though they were not part of our priority packages. We were also able to stop 5 of our Major Threats this session, although one passed: Wolf Depredation Compensation Program Bill ( SB 777 [https://olis.oregonlegislature.gov/liz/2025R1/Measures/Overview/SB777] ) . This bill significantly increases the wolf depredations multiplier, presenting significant risks to wolf conservation and the long-term goal of coexistence. To read the full debrief on this session, check out our blog post here [https://www.olcv.org/end-of-session-debrief/] .
As an OLCV member, I’m sure that you’re just as disappointed as we are that our lawmakers missed their opportunity to meet the moment. However, the fight is not yet over. Please send your legislators a message to voice your disappointment of how this session went [https://secure.everyaction.com/lXDBtLsT3kaDrFjGNFRPog2] , and stay tuned for the full breakdown in the 2025 scorecard.
Send your message [https://secure.everyaction.com/lXDBtLsT3kaDrFjGNFRPog2?contactdata=k7MybyPj4PBFDuDuptMRuwuoRP8IVnWylUttbjz9kxZGCeuGV7h5hrtXuf5Xtor1maiJ2VebY0TN49nhBGTU32hBuWu5Go8bemdz/diK0ED4H+vWKFKFLT22LIBS84NR]
Regardless, as a close out to this session, I want to thank you for showing up for our climate and environment all session long. OLCV members successfully participated in three lobby days this session: OLCV and Oregon Conservation Network’s (OCN) Lobby Day, Building Resilience Lobby Day, and Move Oregon Forward (MOF) Advocacy Day. We had over 300 volunteers joining us in Salem to urge their legislators to stand up for the environment and climate we all depend on. Together, we can win this fight.
Sincerely,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Eliza.png]
Eliza Walton (she/they)
OLCV Coalition Director
https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv [https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv] https://bsky.app/profile/olcv.org [https://bsky.app/profile/olcv.org] https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F [https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F] https://x.com/OLCV [https://x.com/OLCV]

Oregon League of Conservation Voters
1110 SE Alder Suite 220
Portland, OR 97214
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/ReVeUSnqh0mAa9rjhFdl7A2?unsubscribedata=yHrr7dtP5klM56CNqCx76vKehP80kRoJNUCBp%2BYQTsH6AvcWlytndckmEPsztWq3ocyJxw%2BIFlVkNtbAW4lpx%2Fk42BHz7BF4USSy22UWciqsN1dwQvD3XWm8lmd7TfafU2GM1j0BjdA%2F%2FrpvXKqgosr8V1Y7ruFfWMOtHSSoZaCTLhcLtzXEKyW5uyqspT04dq9AmS%2FpFzHgI4V7MWIfBQs5w540pVCuNG76teBhKoS057Lr6bXkz7PMxnhPjRL1Rlxta1A9YlShQh6mQ%2BEJWD4KpdHkD8iLnzfkLCWJERfvo%2F%2FWXJg%2F%2Bp6mgfUhgX%2FdYHaGNGYxQkFKkR9J%2BAg3oOiqk5KTs1DxSGK87wY0UBvz9W%2B6g7KrjJDMhYIU%2F9EavZ2ZPu%2FoK8Gf6QxAB960EwYFlZPlo%2Fki7Plhei%2Bvt%2Bk%3D .

Donald Trump is teaming up with Establishment Democrats to sabotage Zohran
Mamdani's campaign for Mayor of New York City – and Bernie is calling out
this disgusting alliance:

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32745?source=email-20250708&t=1011&akid=8980%2E5885482%2EVR6CcW ]Bernie tweet about Mamdani's primary victory callig out the
billionaires raising money against him while Trump is ranting

Trump is openly attacking Mamdani as a "100% Communist Lunatic,"
threatening to cut off critical funds to New York City, while Democratic
Party elites and billionaire donors are plotting to back Eric Adams to
defeat Mamdani in November.

We can't let the alliance between Trump and Establishment Democrats
against Mamdani succeed.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32745?source=email-20250708&t=1012&akid=8980%2E5885482%2EVR6CcW ]Add your name to demand the Democratic Party immediately unite behind
Zohran Mamdani as the official nominee and defend Mamdani’s clear
democratic mandate for change!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32745?source=email-20250708&t=1013&akid=8980%2E5885482%2EVR6CcW ]ADD YOUR NAME

The scary fact is that the attacks are only going to pick up steam. First
it was billionaires and party elites as they poured money and political
muscle into stopping Mamdani’s campaign. And now Trump is ranting and
raving that Mamdani is a “100% Communist Lunatic,” threatening to cut off
funds to New York City if Mamdani doesn’t “behave.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32745?source=email-20250708&t=1014&akid=8980%2E5885482%2EVR6CcW ]Headline: Trump vows to 'save' New York City from 'communist lunatic':
'I hold all the levers'

The fact is Trump is only lashing out because he and MAGA extremists see
Mamdani as a major threat. He's spent years taking on Wall Street
financiers and powerful interests – which is EXACTLY why Trump and his
billionaire backers are on the attack, mobilizing their right-wing
networks against him, and pouring money into efforts to defeat him.

Even worse – prominent Democrats are hesitating to fully back Mamdani’s
progressive leadership. Instead, they’re maintaining silence or quietly
signaling to donor networks and party insiders that Zohran might be "too
progressive" or "controversial."

Trump knows that progressive leaders like Mamdani are the greatest threat
he faces. Which is why we CANNOT let this alliance between Trump and
Establishment Democrats sideline his victory.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32745?source=email-20250708&t=1015&akid=8980%2E5885482%2EVR6CcW ]Sign your name today: Join us in demanding Democratic leadership
immediately unite behind Zohran Mamdani and respect the clear mandate of
voters.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32745?source=email-20250708&t=1016&akid=8980%2E5885482%2EVR6CcW ]ADD YOUR NAME

When we organize, we win.

The Our Revolution Team

clean_body: [ stdin# ][IMG] Donald Trump is teaming up with Establishment Democrats to sabotage Zohran Mamdani's campaign for Mayor of New York City – and Bernie is calling out this disgusting alliance: [ ]Bernie tweet about Mamdani's primary victory callig out the billionaires raising money against him while Trump is ranting Trump is openly attacking Mamdani as a "100% Communist Lunatic," threatening to cut off critical funds to New York City, while Democratic Party elites and billionaire donors are plotting to back Eric Adams to defeat Mamdani in November. We can't let the alliance between Trump and Establishment Democrats against Mamdani succeed. [ ]Add your name to demand the Democratic Party immediately unite behind Zohran Mamdani as the official nominee and defend Mamdani’s clear democratic mandate for change! [ ]ADD YOUR NAME The scary fact is that the attacks are only going to pick up steam. First it was billionaires and party elites as they poured money and political muscle into stopping Mamdani’s campaign. And now Trump is ranting and raving that Mamdani is a “100% Communist Lunatic,” threatening to cut off funds to New York City if Mamdani doesn’t “behave.” [ ]Headline: Trump vows to 'save' New York City from 'communist lunatic': 'I hold all the levers' The fact is Trump is only lashing out because he and MAGA extremists see Mamdani as a major threat. He's spent years taking on Wall Street financiers and powerful interests – which is EXACTLY why Trump and his billionaire backers are on the attack, mobilizing their right-wing networks against him, and pouring money into efforts to defeat him. Even worse – prominent Democrats are hesitating to fully back Mamdani’s progressive leadership. Instead, they’re maintaining silence or quietly signaling to donor networks and party insiders that Zohran might be "too progressive" or "controversial." Trump knows that progressive leaders like Mamdani are the greatest threat he faces. Which is why we CANNOT let this alliance between Trump and Establishment Democrats sideline his victory. Her stunning defense of President Trump and his tariffs left the FAKE NEWS CNN host speechless.

**“President Trump is doubling down on the economic agenda from his successful first term where we saw growth, low inflation, a significant increase in real wages, and American workers put first.**

**With historic tax cuts, massive deregulation, and our energy industry unleashed – we will see an economic BOOM in the months ahead.**

**Don’t bet against President Trump!”**

President Trump promised **YOU** that he would do everything to Make America Great Again.

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: Heartbreak and Heroism in Hill Country, Texas
body:
[Dan Crenshaw: Heartbreak and Heroism in Hill Country, Texas](https://www.thefp.com/p/dan-crenshaw-heartbreak-and-heroism?utm_source=dan-crenshaw-newsletter)

[CLICK HERE OR ON THE IMAGE ABOVE TO READ](https://www.thefp.com/p/dan-crenshaw-heartbreak-and-heroism?utm_source=dan-crenshaw-newsletter)

If you live in Central Texas, flash flood warnings are part of life. Nowhere is that truer than the 150-mile stretch of land that sits on the banks of the Guadalupe River. Warnings happen often. Floods themselves are rare.

But on July 4 at 3:00 a.m., [four months’ worth of rain](https://www.washingtonpost.com/weather/2025/07/04/texas-flooding-extreme-rains/) fell within hours, rapidly saturating the dry Hill Country soil and swelling creeks into violent torrents.

The Guadalupe River that snakes through downtown Kerrville averages a depth of just 1.65 feet. But between 5:15 a.m. and 6:45 a.m. that day, it surged from two feet to 34 feet, becoming a literal wall of water that swept through Kerr County communities.

As of this morning, the flash floods have claimed more than 100 lives. Hundreds of families spent Independence Day searching through debris for missing loved ones. Among the dead is [Jeff Wilson](https://archive.ph/RRxmt), a teacher at my hometown school district, Humble ISD. (His wife, Amber, and son, Shiloh, are still missing.)

The dead include [27 children](https://www.cbsnews.com/news/camp-mystic-campers-counselors-killed-texas-flooding/) from Camp Mystic, a storied girls’ Christian summer camp.

It’s impossible to look at the pictures of these girls, or to read of children like Brooke and Blair Harber. The sisters—11 and 13 years old—were found with their [hands locked together](https://www.newsweek.com/central-texas-flooding-sisters-found-holding-hands-2095335).

I am the father of a young daughter. The pain is unimaginable.

Alongside the heartbreak was the kind of heroism that embodies the best of Texas.

At Camp La Junta, a boys’ summer camp in the small town of Hunt, college-age camp counselors leaped into action to wake the boys and rush them up the hillside to higher ground as flood waters rushed in. By that afternoon, Camp La Junta announced that every camper and staff member was [safe and accounted for](https://www.cnn.com/2025/07/07/climate/childrens-camps-texas-flooding). Not a single life was lost at La Junta.

Camp Mystic, the historic girls’ camp downriver, bore the worst of the flood. As floodwaters engulfed the camp, its beloved owner and director, 73-year-old Dick Eastland, raced to the Bubble Inn, a cabin just 150 feet from the river, to save the girls in his care. Searchers later found Eastland downriver alongside three young campers. His grandson, George, said this about him: “If he wasn’t going to die of natural causes, this was the only other way, saving the girls that he so loved and cared for.”

Emma Foltz, a [counselor at Camp Mystic](https://www.yahoo.com/news/camp-mystic-counselor-played-instrumental-182112898.html?guccounter=1&guce_referrer=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGhlZnAuY29tLw&guce_referrer_sig=AQAAAD4AkwFcjwNMEbAr1jXbgw-ut7JZnuT0P8f9R7e_yYM2araGI6G3htdCR1m1xc1vfN6O1rI62OgyQCmILqLZeR4r5vpMG_-BbUyS8MprZepE-1GYahAsY6N8LmGbCYo6LoYUdBYsejQDK2Uz9pNjV6b9AshTbn5uCu6c5x3qUAwh), is a name every American should know. Foltz, a rising senior at Louisiana Tech, didn’t hesitate and guided 14 young campers from rising waters to high ground. We often think of our younger generations as fragile and afraid. How wrong that caricature can be. It was Americans in their late teens and early 20s who answered the call after 9/11, who stormed the beaches of Normandy, and who fought the British in 1775. Like them, Emma Foltz should be remembered for the same heroic public service.

Nearby, on the same stretch of river, in the Bumble Bee Hills neighborhood, Erin Burgess and her 19‐year‐old son were swept away until they found a tree to cling to for an hour before the water receded. When asked how she survived, [Erin credited](https://www.nbcdfw.com/weather/weather-connection/pitch-black-wall-of-death-hill-country-flood-survivor-describes-wave-of-water/3878483/) her teenage son’s strength and tenacity. “Thankfully, he’s over six feet tall. That’s the only thing that saved me, was hanging on to him.”

In the small town of Ingram, 27-year-old [Julian Ryan](https://www.khou.com/article/news/local/texas/texas-flooding-death/285-5002cc64-ed8d-4ff6-8cd4-45834487b522) fought to get his fiancée, their two young children, and his mother onto the roof. He punched out a window to give them an exit, a desperate action that severed the artery in his arm. Before the slashed artery rendered him unconscious, he refused to quit and made sure his whole family was safe on top of their roof. He looked at his loved ones, told them he loved them, and apologized that he “wasn’t going to make it.” His body was taken by the river and found hours later, after the water receded.

Our first responders also showed incredible heroism. [Petty Officer Scott Ruskan](https://www.nytimes.com/2025/07/06/us/texas-floods-rescues.html?smid=nytcore-ios-share&referringSource=articleShare), 26, of the U.S. Coast Guard, was on the first rescue mission of his career when he plunged into the floodwaters. Ruskan personally rescued 165 people stranded by the high water—an astonishing number of lives saved by one man. He was also the lone triage coordinator on the scene, tending to the injured in between helicopter operations to hoist survivors to safety. “I’m just doing a job,” Ruskan said when asked by the New York Post about his heroism. “This is what I signed up for. If anyone else had been on duty that day, they would’ve done the same thing.”

The Texas National Guard and local emergency responders continue their work as of this writing. Guard helicopter crews and high-water rescue teams have been saving families from rooftops and submerged cars without rest. In total, [roughly 850 people](https://www.reuters.com/sustainability/climate-energy/death-toll-texas-floods-reaches-78-trump-plans-visit-2025-07-06/) have been rescued across Central Texas in this disaster—a testament to the tireless work of these men and women. These citizen-soldiers and first responders are showing us all what service truly means.

It is perhaps fitting that these stories of heroism occurred on Independence Day, of all days. It is what Independence Day is really about: heroism, self-sacrifice, courage, and love of community. These are the values we cherish as Americans and as Texans, and they were on full display in Central Texas this weekend.

One never knows if they will be a hero when the time comes. Only a test of tragedy will be the judge. Many think they will act with courage, but fail. Many think they will lack the courage, but instead become the hero we need. Neighbors saved neighbors. Ordinary people became heroes. That is the spirit of Texas. No flood can ever wash it away.

Continue to pray for the victims and their families. Pray for the good people of my beloved state.

[Twitter](https://twitter.com/DanCrenshawTX)
[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/CrenshawforCongress/)
[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/dancrenshawtx/)

No longer want to receive these emails? [Unsubscribe](https://manage.kmail-lists.com/subscriptions/unsubscribe?a=S4BaSF&c=01J1QTVQWPYECZHVSD48W6BZXF&k=d7a252b5a9aa2f11f013663142d1414b&m=01JZNF0EJEFKNB783Y6EJ4735Y&r=01JZNHS39R46337252E3YBEYSV).
Team Crenshaw, 12645 Memorial Drive, STE F1, Box 211, Houston, TX 77024
clean_body: If you live in Central Texas, flash flood warnings are part of life. Nowhere is that truer than the 150-mile stretch of land that sits on the banks of the Guadalupe River. Warnings happen often. Floods themselves are rare. But on July 4 at 3:00 a.m., fell within hours, rapidly saturating the dry Hill Country soil and swelling creeks into violent torrents. The Guadalupe River that snakes through downtown Kerrville averages a depth of just 1.65 feet. But between 5:15 a.m. and 6:45 a.m. that day, it surged from two feet to 34 feet, becoming a literal wall of water that swept through Kerr County communities. As of this morning, the flash floods have claimed more than 100 lives. Hundreds of families spent Independence Day searching through debris for missing loved ones. Among the dead is , a teacher at my hometown school district, Humble ISD. (His wife, Amber, and son, Shiloh, are still missing.) The dead include from Camp Mystic, a storied girls’ Christian summer camp. It’s impossible to look at the pictures of these girls, or to read of children like Brooke and Blair Harber. The sisters—11 and 13 years old—were found with their . I am the father of a young daughter. The pain is unimaginable. Alongside the heartbreak was the kind of heroism that embodies the best of Texas. At Camp La Junta, a boys’ summer camp in the small town of Hunt, college-age camp counselors leaped into action to wake the boys and rush them up the hillside to higher ground as flood waters rushed in. By that afternoon, Camp La Junta announced that every camper and staff member was . Not a single life was lost at La Junta. Camp Mystic, the historic girls’ camp downriver, bore the worst of the flood. As floodwaters engulfed the camp, its beloved owner and director, 73-year-old Dick Eastland, raced to the Bubble Inn, a cabin just 150 feet from the river, to save the girls in his care. Searchers later found Eastland downriver alongside three young campers. His grandson, George, said this about him: “If he wasn’t going to die of natural causes, this was the only other way, saving the girls that he so loved and cared for.” Emma Foltz, a , is a name every American should know. Foltz, a rising senior at Louisiana Tech, didn’t hesitate and guided 14 young campers from rising waters to high ground. We often think of our younger generations as fragile and afraid. How wrong that caricature can be. It was Americans in their late teens and early 20s who answered the call after 9/11, who stormed the beaches of Normandy, and who fought the British in 1775. Like them, Emma Foltz should be remembered for the same heroic public service. Nearby, on the same stretch of river, in the Bumble Bee Hills neighborhood, Erin Burgess and her 19‐year‐old son were swept away until they found a tree to cling to for an hour before the water receded. When asked how she survived, her teenage son’s strength and tenacity. “Thankfully, he’s over six feet tall. That’s the only thing that saved me, was hanging on to him.” In the small town of Ingram, 27-year-old fought to get his fiancée, their two young children, and his mother onto the roof. He punched out a window to give them an exit, a desperate action that severed the artery in his arm. Before the slashed artery rendered him unconscious, he refused to quit and made sure his whole family was safe on top of their roof. He looked at his loved ones, told them he loved them, and apologized that he “wasn’t going to make it.” His body was taken by the river and found hours later, after the water receded. Our first responders also showed incredible heroism. , 26, of the U.S. Coast Guard, was on the first rescue mission of his career when he plunged into the floodwaters. Ruskan personally rescued 165 people stranded by the high water—an astonishing number of lives saved by one man. He was also the lone triage coordinator on the scene, tending to the injured in between helicopter operations to hoist survivors to safety. “I’m just doing a job,” Ruskan said when asked by the New York Post about his heroism. “This is what I signed up for. If anyone else had been on duty that day, they would’ve done the same thing.” The Texas National Guard and local emergency responders continue their work as of this writing. Guard helicopter crews and high-water rescue teams have been saving families from rooftops and submerged cars without rest. In total, have been rescued across Central Texas in this disaster—a testament to the tireless work of these men and women. These citizen-soldiers and first responders are showing us all what service truly means. It is perhaps fitting that these stories of heroism occurred on Independence Day, of all days. It is what Independence Day is really about: heroism, self-sacrifice, courage, and love of community. These are the values we cherish as Americans and as Texans, and they were on full display in Central Texas this weekend. One never knows if they will be a hero when the time comes. Only a test of tragedy will be the judge. Many think they will act with courage, but fail. Many think they will lack the courage, but instead become the hero we need. Neighbors saved neighbors. Ordinary people became heroes. That is the spirit of Texas. No flood can ever wash it away. Continue to pray for the victims and their families. Pray for the good people of my beloved state. # [No, America Doesn't Have a Spending Problem--But An Oligarch Problem](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=167829510&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY3ODI5NTEwLCJpYXQiOjE3NTE5OTczODMsImV4cCI6MTc1NDU4OTM4MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.QydUgEMG0QkYcCJfnWmbr0F6pZE2jse7zgVE4WYI43c)
### 3 facts that debunk this common right wing talking point used to deny working class people access to life's necessities
| | [Qasim Rashid, Esq.](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| Jul 8
---
| [](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=167829510&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY3ODI5NTEwLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1MTk5NzM4MywiZXhwIjoxNzU0NTg5MzgzLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjU1MDIyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.WKgO6thbVCdEwYuve0LVvWXSOpsMvEKaNP2ZCqPb3h8&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/qasimrashid/p/no-america-doesnt-have-a-spending?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Every time a budget crisis looms or a corporate tax loophole is scrutinized, the same tired chorus resurfaces: _" We have a spending problem!"_ It's a line repeated like gospel by corporate media, Republicans, and yes, even a few cowardly corporate Democrats. This was the MAGA rallying cry when justifying the Big Ugly Bill, which massively cuts taxes for the wealthy while raising them on low income people.
But here's the truth: America doesn't have a spending problem--we have a corruption problem fueled by billionaire oligarchs and unchallenged by corporate media. And unless we face that truth, future policies will continue to elevate poverty and increase wealth and income inequality. Below I present three facts that corporate politicians and corporate media will never have the integrity to admit. **Let 's Address This.**
**Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..gzmRI-fFu1zDznZTEXAGb3pA75D3DNEqWFEPZvLhjZk?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=167829510)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/206fc96b-a367-43c6-8680-e9e220fd4ea3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
caption...
## Fact 1: The U.S. Has Never Overspent on Social Programs That Help People Live
Despite the scare tactics, there has never been a documented case in U.S. history where our national budget was harmed because we invested too much in food access, affordable housing, public education, or healthcare. This idea is a manufactured lie meant to scare people away from compassion and convince us that austerity is some moral virtue. It is not.
On the contrary, when we have invested in social programs, it's paid off. The GI Bill created a booming middle class (even as it was denied to Black soldiers--more on this later). The Affordable Care Act (while flawed) reduced the uninsured rate to historic lows. Programs like SNAP and Medicaid _lift millions out of poverty every year_. According to [FRAC](https://substack.com/redirect/45d2fbb3-35d7-4edc-968a-7a0e1e96caad?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), "each dollar in federally funded SNAP benefits during a recession generates between $1.50 and $1.80 in economic activity." The Center on Budget and Policy Priorities reports that in 2021 alone, federal safety net programs kept 37 million people out of poverty--including 6.7 million children.
So when someone says we're "overspending" on the poor, what they really mean is: _We 'd rather spend that money on the rich._
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..gzmRI-fFu1zDznZTEXAGb3pA75D3DNEqWFEPZvLhjZk?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=167829510)
## Fact 2: The Outrage Only Started When Black & Brown People Got Access
There's a deeply uncomfortable truth that too many white pundits and politicians refuse to say out loud: the moment welfare became racially inclusive, the backlash began.
Sociological research by Dr. Martin Gilens in _Why Americans Hate Welfare_ shows that public support for welfare plummeted when media narratives started tying it to Black and brown Americans. Remember Ronald Reagan's racist "welfare queen" trope? That was on purpose to demonize Black people, and Black women in particular. The facts are clear. The largest demographic to rely on government welfare is, and always has been, white Americans. Whether it was getting reparations for giving up the Black people they enslaved, getting 270 million acres of free land via the Homestead Act, getting the GI bill (which was denied to Black soldiers), getting FHA loans when redlining was official policy, or getting exclusive access to universities while banning Black and brown people--white Americans have _always_ been the primary recipients of Government welfare, and no one batted an eye that we were "overspending."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b08bc69f-2a8c-4d42-957f-5c5c3a140c84?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Post Civil Rights era, the programs didn't change, in fact they decreased--only the perception of who was benefiting changed. And that's when the "we have a spending problem" propaganda claim ignited. A nearly decade old study finds [that](https://substack.com/redirect/dba4898a-4b87-4b3b-9d6a-42bd96e36fb9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> White Americans are increasingly critical of the country's social safety net, thanks in part to a rising tide of racial resentment. The study, conducted by researchers at two California universities, finds that opposition to welfare programs has grown among white Americans since 2008, even when controlling for political views and socioeconomic status. White Americans are more likely to favor welfare cuts when they believe that their status is threatened and that minorities are the main beneficiaries of safety net programs, the study says. The findings suggest that political efforts to cut welfare programs are driven less by conservative principles than by racial anxiety, the authors conclude.
So to be clear, this isn't about fiscal policy. It's about white supremacy. It's about maintaining racial hierarchies under the guise of economic stewardship.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..gzmRI-fFu1zDznZTEXAGb3pA75D3DNEqWFEPZvLhjZk?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=167829510)
## Fact 3: The Real Overspending? War, Police, and Prisons
Let's talk numbers. The U.S. currently spends more on its military than the next 10 countries combined, according to the Stockholm International Peace Research Institute (SIPRI). Over $886 billion in 2024 alone went to the Pentagon. Add another $80 billion for federal law enforcement and $81 billion for prisons, and you've got a recipe for mass surveillance and oppression. Then, add the "Big Ugly Bill" and these numbers become even more grotesque, with hundreds of billions more allocated for the military, for ICE, and to build even more private prisons.
Yet questioning this obscene spending is somehow "un-American"? That's the propaganda trick: militarize everything, defund humanity, and call it "freedom."
This isn't national defense--it's a blank check for defense contractors and private prison profiteers. It's war profiteering dressed up as patriotism. And when you ask why we can't afford healthcare or pre-K, they'll tell you the problem is _you_ , not the grotesque trillion-dollar defense budget.
## Conclusion
Let's be honest: this isn't about overspending. It's about priorities--and right now, our government is prioritizing oligarchs over ordinary Americans. We're told we "can't afford" child care, universal healthcare, or debt-free college. But somehow we _can_ afford tax cuts for billionaires? We can afford $400 million fighter jets, $50 billion border walls, and $59 billion for private prisons? All while 1 in 6 Americans are food insecure? The cruelty is the point, it seems.
Corporate media plays its part, too--refusing to challenge these narratives because it would mean losing access or offending donors. This is the same media that normalizes tax cuts for the rich but treats food stamps like a national emergency.
But we don't have to accept this. Reject this propaganda claim that we cannot have life's necessities because they cost too much. Humanity is never too expensive, but war always is. We must recognize that poverty is not a life choice, and we cannot let it become a life sentence. Poverty is not a moral failing--it is a policy failure. It is the result of deliberate political choices made to protect obscene wealth and punish ordinary people for daring to want dignity. We must continue to support those who run for office on platforms of economic justice--while rejecting those who prioritize a bloated military at the cost of starving children.
That is how we form a more perfect union.
**Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.**

clean_body: 3 facts that debunk this common right wing talking point used to deny working class people access to life's necessities | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Thank you for being an awesome subscriber! When possible, I hope you'll consider upgrading to a $6/mo or $50/year subscription! 3 facts that debunk this common right wing talking point used to deny working class people access to life's necessities | | | Jul 8 | | | | | | | | | | | | Every time a budget crisis looms or a corporate tax loophole is scrutinized, the same tired chorus resurfaces: " We have a spending problem!" It's a line repeated like gospel by corporate media, Republicans, and yes, even a few cowardly corporate Democrats. This was the MAGA rallying cry when justifying the Big Ugly Bill, which massively cuts taxes for the wealthy while raising them on low income people. But here's the truth: America doesn't have a spending problem--we have a corruption problem fueled by billionaire oligarchs and unchallenged by corporate media. And unless we face that truth, future policies will continue to elevate poverty and increase wealth and income inequality. Below I present three facts that corporate politicians and corporate media will never have the integrity to admit. Let 's Address This. Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. | | ---|---|--- caption... Fact 1: The U.S. Has Never Overspent on Social Programs That Help People Live Despite the scare tactics, there has never been a documented case in U.S. history where our national budget was harmed because we invested too much in food access, affordable housing, public education, or healthcare. This idea is a manufactured lie meant to scare people away from compassion and convince us that austerity is some moral virtue. It is not. On the contrary, when we have invested in social programs, it's paid off. The GI Bill created a booming middle class (even as it was denied to Black soldiers--more on this later). The Affordable Care Act (while flawed) reduced the uninsured rate to historic lows. Programs like SNAP and Medicaid lift millions out of poverty every year. According to , "each dollar in federally funded SNAP benefits during a recession generates between $1.50 and $1.80 in economic activity." The Center on Budget and Policy Priorities reports that in 2021 alone, federal safety net programs kept 37 million people out of poverty--including 6.7 million children. So when someone says we're "overspending" on the poor, what they really mean is: We 'd rather spend that money on the rich. Fact 2: The Outrage Only Started When Black & Brown People Got Access There's a deeply uncomfortable truth that too many white pundits and politicians refuse to say out loud: the moment welfare became racially inclusive, the backlash began. Sociological research by Dr. Martin Gilens in Why Americans Hate Welfare shows that public support for welfare plummeted when media narratives started tying it to Black and brown Americans. Remember Ronald Reagan's racist "welfare queen" trope? That was on purpose to demonize Black people, and Black women in particular. The facts are clear. The largest demographic to rely on government welfare is, and always has been, white Americans. Whether it was getting reparations for giving up the Black people they enslaved, getting 270 million acres of free land via the Homestead Act, getting the GI bill (which was denied to Black soldiers), getting FHA loans when redlining was official policy, or getting exclusive access to universities while banning Black and brown people--white Americans have always been the primary recipients of Government welfare, and no one batted an eye that we were "overspending." | | ---|---|--- Post Civil Rights era, the programs didn't change, in fact they decreased--only the perception of who was benefiting changed. And that's when the "we have a spending problem" propaganda claim ignited. A nearly decade old study finds : White Americans are increasingly critical of the country's social safety net, thanks in part to a rising tide of racial resentment. The study, conducted by researchers at two California universities, finds that opposition to welfare programs has grown among white Americans since 2008, even when controlling for political views and socioeconomic status. White Americans are more likely to favor welfare cuts when they believe that their status is threatened and that minorities are the main beneficiaries of safety net programs, the study says. The findings suggest that political efforts to cut welfare programs are driven less by conservative principles than by racial anxiety, the authors conclude. So to be clear, this isn't about fiscal policy. It's about white supremacy. It's about maintaining racial hierarchies under the guise of economic stewardship. Fact 3: The Real Overspending? War, Police, and Prisons Let's talk numbers. The U.S. currently spends more on its military than the next 10 countries combined, according to the Stockholm International Peace Research Institute (SIPRI). Over $886 billion in 2024 alone went to the Pentagon. Add another $80 billion for federal law enforcement and $81 billion for prisons, and you've got a recipe for mass surveillance and oppression. Then, add the "Big Ugly Bill" and these numbers become even more grotesque, with hundreds of billions more allocated for the military, for ICE, and to build even more private prisons. Yet questioning this obscene spending is somehow "un-American"? That's the propaganda trick: militarize everything, defund humanity, and call it "freedom." This isn't national defense--it's a blank check for defense contractors and private prison profiteers. It's war profiteering dressed up as patriotism. And when you ask why we can't afford healthcare or pre-K, they'll tell you the problem is you , not the grotesque trillion-dollar defense budget. Conclusion Let's be honest: this isn't about overspending. It's about priorities--and right now, our government is prioritizing oligarchs over ordinary Americans. We're told we "can't afford" child care, universal healthcare, or debt-free college. But somehow we can afford tax cuts for billionaires? We can afford $400 million fighter jets, $50 billion border walls, and $59 billion for private prisons? All while 1 in 6 Americans are food insecure? The cruelty is the point, it seems. Corporate media plays its part, too--refusing to challenge these narratives because it would mean losing access or offending donors. This is the same media that normalizes tax cuts for the rich but treats food stamps like a national emergency. But we don't have to accept this. Reject this propaganda claim that we cannot have life's necessities because they cost too much. Humanity is never too expensive, but war always is. We must recognize that poverty is not a life choice, and we cannot let it become a life sentence. Poverty is not a moral failing--it is a policy failure. It is the result of deliberate political choices made to protect obscene wealth and punish ordinary people for daring to want dignity. We must continue to support those who run for office on platforms of economic justice--while rejecting those who prioritize a bloated military at the cost of starving children. name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: The IRS Caved... The Church Is FREE In America!
body:
As you probably already know, I have never been shy about addressing political issues (a.k.a biblical issues) or endorsing political candidates from t
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22764768.11946.1.2b3156498de0d034a8160eef2c6a616a) |
---
As you probably already know, I have never been shy about addressing political issues (_a.k.a biblical issues_) or endorsing political candidates from the pulpit at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22764768.11947.1.95f7ce94bd8fbb2af4afa2c44d549635). However, this had led to [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22764768.11948.1.7ea34b763a6b66d5fdd3dfa46fe70d3a) being reported to the **IRS** _thousands of times_ (not an exaggeration either) for violating the **"Separation of Church and State."** Last night, the [New York Times](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22764768.11949.1.23f39d69e1766ecf6d612869af17835f) released an article that will serve as a devastating blow to that line of thinking that churches cannot politically engage. The I.R.S. admitted that churches **CAN ENDORSE CANDIDATES FROM THE PULPIT**! Now there is no excuse for Pastors/Churches to avoid an issue that they should have never avoided in the first place. The removal of this fear tactic, I believe, may usher in the **greatest Christian engagement politically** since the founding of our Nation. Generational change may be happening before our very eyes. Let's Keep Winning! Thank you, Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
| | [ Partner w/the Mission of Sheridan.Church ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22764768.11950.1.e39c60479c6202a1f4ee9cc25de45e6d)
---
---
## Why Does God Allow Evil Things To Happen Like In Texas?
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22764768.11951.1.354e522cb9453f22c97dc4f33084be68)
---
Recently, tragedy struck Texas in ways that are hard to even talk about. With these terrible events that took place, many people are wrestling with a valid question: **WHY DOES A GOOD GOD ALL SUCH EVIL THINGS TO HAPPEN?** This is a _real_ and _raw_ conversation that I had recently with **Erick Stakelbeck** on **TBN** about this very matter. You can watch it here: [https://youtu.be/7clhTfOB7Rc](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22764768.11952.1.315238790a5d0c5153672024e332432e)
---
| | [ Watch: Why Does A Good God Allow Evil? ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22764768.11953.1.1396d0e28e9fa37d60bc015be296d2f4)
---
---
|
---
I woke up today with a really cool notification... My **FIRST** book, ["_Chasing After The Wind_ "](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22764768.11954.1.2b4d71f0df77897415379abbb0798a7b) is out and has reached **#13 in Religion/ Christian Living / Personal Growth**! **I have been blown away by the response!** THANK YOU SO MUCH! If you have not ordered your copy you can still get the **Limited Edition Signed Book** here: _[*"Chasing After The Wind"*](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22764768.11955.1.40a1a25d68ea13391b77777ef026501b)_ It is also available on [Amazon](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22764768.11956.1.19332e29b73dabc8bc86844c464d397b)\+ [Barnes & Noble](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22764768.11957.1.2a7a80e8349f0302c6c70b41ab06ab32). **Amazon** : [https://www.amazon.com/Chasing-After-Wind-Catching-Everybody/dp/B0F7M4GK26](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22764768.11958.1.92407b6f79ebade4b39efcfb94a66a8f) **Barnes & Noble**: [https://www.barnesandnoble.com/w/chasing-after-the-wind-jackson-lahmeyer/1147391019](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22764768.11959.1.31f4ed1c49f1eefbe394ff9305808a9d) I really want to thank **MLB LEGEND Darryl Strawberry** for writing the Foreword and becoming vulnerable by sharing his story. The Foreword is worth getting the book, I promise. This book is 200 pages and I am confident will change your life as it has mine. In ["Chasing After The Wind"](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22764768.11960.1.c2ca5643f3ce3fdad880216fbbb872f9) I share VERY personal stories and I decided to get real and raw with the heartbreaks and triumphs I have experienced.
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22764768.11961.1.059427725d342ab9d47103bad19d9f71)
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22764768.11962.1.5b30e0f1dbd44d6cc8de1072adc2622d)
---
Get your [LIMITED EDITION SIGNED COPY](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22764768.11963.1.fec09cd761ada4e3a582a53ad1d5bf9d) here: [https://books.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22764768.11964.1.5905bfdc97b3f2a169727f3d79103e37) Thank you,
---

name: =?utf-8?B?4oCLSmFtZXMgVXRobWVpZXI=?=
subject: ​I have a message for the radical left
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj205f7ferwar0syv9yf3gcg2s0q6m5ukj61eaz3ax7zlfqu0ab1yxlk37yk7xfxoxduujv2kq34f0hsbzvtp&__stmp=sz3e3i&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sz3e3i&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxokllgfxhiz41sg5kkdwyvwmoufwwxymiw5zd8nuved9ufekg5mzgpx9rtn0s6o0ppi9atd21h2mfj2z2ttgyrpu0v033ql8p685eod3sb3n3arlc3kteo6l9hofbe5aqj1v7d2a7injv&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sz3e3i&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sz3e3i&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sz3e3i&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sz3e3i&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxokllgfxhiz41sg5kkdwyvwmoufwwxymiw5zd8nuved9ufekg5mzgpx9rtn0s6o0ppi9atd21h2mfj2z2ttgyrpu0v033ql8p685eod3sb3n3arlc3kteo6l9hofbe5aqj1v7d2a7injv&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sz3e3i&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sz3e3i&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Hillsdale College via Real American Reporting
subject: Now Available: “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer”
body:
I am excited to announce that Hillsdale’s online teaching series, “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,” is now available to own as a DVD box set.

This sponsored message from Real American Reporting is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zi6inouoeghjdk7gt70rahd6u785rpqtvq8q0mr0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1i64o36cph2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z65400ggahjct7m6habohif4oeqmulr3qs2k685o_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1i64o36cph2bs) Dear Fellow American,

I am excited to announce that Hillsdale's online teaching series, ["Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,"](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z6b1b4v49ng279nlhau36hk2glq0kq7jliutlghg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1i64o36cph2bs) is now available to own as a DVD box set.

In this series, you will discover how taxation, regulation, money, government spending, and trade influence our decisions and impact our lives. Joined by Steve Forbes, Stephen Moore, Larry Kudlow, Amity Shlaes, Brian Domitrovic, and Larry P. Arnn, Dr. Laffer explains how supply-side economics holds the key to unleashing American prosperity once again.

But we need the support of citizens like you to promote this series to millions of Americans along with our other nationwide outreach.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online teaching series from Hillsdale College and expand other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty? Your tax-deductible donation will help us to enroll thousands of Americans in this series.

And for a donation of $100 or more, we will send you this beautiful DVD box set of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer."

**To help support this course and get your copy of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer" on DVD, click the link below:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/supply-side-economics-support-dvd](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zh1imkcqfho1krq7738a49jl5lf2m7ubsh596qmg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1i64o36cph2bs)

I hope you enjoy this teaching series. Thank you for your support.

Warm Regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Pop Acta Media | Real American Reporting
---

body:
What we're up against: |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111104162/556231443/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE714_20250708_NRCCAds_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1056557&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDE5YjY5Yi0yNTVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WvZWqZuR9w6Dm_Y8fyF8GcZlQuUPaz8VeBpL0Rfavl0=) Peter, here's what we're up against:
* Republicans' House campaign arm, the NRCC, raised a staggering **$36.7 MILLION** in the first quarter of this year.
* They're spending that money on **misleading ads attacking House Democrats** for voting against Trump's disastrous budget bill.
* AND their ad buy includes **attacks on SEVEN EMILYs List women**.

If we don't fight back against these attacks — and quickly — our chances of taking back the House next year could disappear. ****[**Donate now to help Democratic pro-choice women fight back against GOP attacks:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111104164/556231447/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE714_20250708_NRCCAds_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1056557&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDE5YjY5Yi0yNTVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WvZWqZuR9w6Dm_Y8fyF8GcZlQuUPaz8VeBpL0Rfavl0=)**** | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111104165/556231450/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE714_20250708_NRCCAds_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1056557&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDE5YjY5Yi0yNTVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WvZWqZuR9w6Dm_Y8fyF8GcZlQuUPaz8VeBpL0Rfavl0=)

clean_body: What we're up against: | = Peter, here's what we're up against: Republicans' House campaign arm, the NRCC, raised a staggering $36.7 MILLION in the first quarter of this year. They're spending that money on misleading ads attacking House Democrats for voting against Trump's disastrous budget bill. AND their ad buy includes attacks on SEVEN EMILYs List women. If we don't fight back against these attacks — and quickly — our chances of taking back the House next year could disappear. = | = The NRCC is coming after EMILYs List women because they know the power our women yield — and they're scared. Democratic pro-choice women can flip the House next November, but they need our support to counter the GOP's lies. =** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for taking a stand, the EMILYs List team = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List.
