As has been the case for over 200 years, the Electoral College determines the outcome of U.S. presidential races. Yet most Americans have long supported moving away from this system. **More than six-in-ten Americans (63%) would instead prefer to see the winner of the presidential election be the person who wins the most votes nationally.** Roughly a third (35%) favor retaining the Electoral College system, according to a Pew Research Center survey of 9,720 adults conducted last fall. We're clearly all tired of a system where all our candidates and their campaigns care about is whether the margin of victory is close enough in the state to make it worthwhile to campaign there instead of speaking to real Americans with real challenges. **[The people who tell you we can't get rid of the Electoral College are wrong. Chip in $25 or more to help us change to a popular vote system once and for all>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111104190/556231533/-523723236?amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM0ZGI3ZWM5LTI1NWMtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NBPR80ba6AkevBwVqZjTL7S0lxkWuTXwKrIZHsd67LI=&emci=770e7ca4-075c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=c4db7ec9-255c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=33603084)**

clean_body: PRC: Majority of Americans continue to favor moving away from Electoral College| | | | | As has been the case for over 200 years, the Electoral College determines the outcome of U.S. presidential races. Yet most Americans have long supported moving away from this system. More than six-in-ten Americans (63%) would instead prefer to see the winner of the presidential election be the person who wins the most votes nationally. Roughly a third (35%) favor retaining the Electoral College system, according to a Pew Research Center survey of 9,720 adults conducted last fall. We're clearly all tired of a system where all our candidates and their campaigns care about is whether the margin of victory is close enough in the state to make it worthwhile to campaign there instead of speaking to real Americans with real challenges. If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Defenders of voting rights like Cory Booker, AOC, Robert Reich, and Stacey Abrams recognize that the Electoral College is harming our democracy and needs to go. It’s the biggest tool the opponents of voting rights have to swing national elections and suppress the will of the people. We have to move to a system that's right and just over a system that benefits only themselves and silences others. This is about the people's voices being heard and their votes meaning something. This is about a system that has rewarded the popular vote loser with the job anyway five times now. This about the people and the states that get ignored and lost along the way to just enough Electoral College votes. you, Voter Action Project's Electoral College Team | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. name: Justice Democrats
subject: Help Texas recover from deadly flooding
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Over the weekend, communities across Texas were devastated by extreme
flooding that tragically took at least 104 lives — including those of
multiple children and counselors at Camp Mystic — destroyed homes, and
displaced families in one of the worst natural disasters the state has
ever seen.

Our hearts go out to every person and community impacted by this disaster.

Once in a 100 year weather disasters no longer happen every 100 years, and
it's everyday people across the country who are harmed the most and have
to put the pieces of their community back together in the aftermath. Our
nation and government should be united in wanting to prevent these at
every turn.

While Justice Democrats will continue fighting for a Green New Deal,
climate justice, and a federal response to climate change rooted in
equity, right now communities on the ground need immediate support.
Families, rescue groups, government agencies and community members across
Texas are working around the clock to rescue, recover, and rebuild in the
wake of this harrowing disaster.

That’s why we’re lifting up the following mutual aid efforts. Will you
make a donation to support relief efforts in Texas today?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140798?t=1002&akid=36825%2E1203867%2EeTfbC1 ]Kerr County, Texas Flood Relief Fund

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140799?t=1003&akid=36825%2E1203867%2EeTfbC1 ]GoFundMe – Central Texas flood relief (July 2025)

If you’re in a position to do so, please give what you can. Every
contribution is a reminder of the strength of our solidarity in these
difficult times.

Thank you,

Justice Democrats

PS: Ongoing rain and flash floods continue to pose a threat to some Texas
communities. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140800?t=1004&akid=36825%2E1203867%2EeTfbC1 ]If you or someone you know lives in an impacted area, find
resources to stay safe here.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250708-36825-footer&t=1005&refcode2=36825_1203867_eTfbC1&akid=36825%2E1203867%2EeTfbC1

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1006&akid=36825%2E1203867%2EeTfbC1

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
P.O. Box 910 Knoxville, TN 37901
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

# TUESDAY, JULY 8, 2025
---|---
**Good Afternoon!** Our friends at _International Living_ put together something pretty eye-opening: [a travel guide packed with tips](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJys0LFygzAQBNCvgc6MkISRChVp3DltSkZIJ3OeQ2LEGU_-PkOa_ECK7XZfsV_36e6RMD8-_QqOU5kiRAyeIU4Z3jsBM9Qp1bJau1U8PMMTeF8KA-0vnKSQw0WMF2Gm9CL6W_dtdAlAgmrB9ePQW2t6YdvFJZmU9hrUVccAWqfx6o2NyqgZtFWqRXeqYhSmN8JI0_k5QEhiFlabMMvUaAERudTuWTDzAom-ywG1C2VtyS3M296oj0beGnnbaukwM9TsGUv2RHhgfpzdRt7OSD0M1tq2uri9kQj369ho8Vg90i_J__zM4eRPAAAA__8-C3_i) like flying private for $99, staying in five-star suites for $32, and scoring free overseas vacations. They're offering _The_ _Flyover_ readers a free copy with a special membership offer. We're not saying it'll turn you into a jet-setter overnight--[but if you've got a trip coming up, these insider tips might just change how you travel.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJys0LFygzAQBNCvgc6MkISRChVp3DltSkZIJ3OeQ2LEGU_-PkOa_ECK7XZfsV_36e6RMD8-_QqOU5kiRAyeIU4Z3jsBM9Qp1bJau1U8PMMTeF8KA-0vnKSQw0WMF2Gm9CL6W_dtdAlAgmrB9ePQW2t6YdvFJZmU9hrUVccAWqfx6o2NyqgZtFWqRXeqYhSmN8JI0_k5QEhiFlabMMvUaAERudTuWTDzAom-ywG1C2VtyS3M296oj0beGnnbaukwM9TsGUv2RHhgfpzdRt7OSD0M1tq2uri9kQj369ho8Vg90i_J__zM4eRPAAAA__8-C3_i) -- Cole, _CEO_
* * *
[](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJys0LFygzAQBNCvgc6MkISRChVp3DltSkZIJ3OeQ2LEGU_-PkOa_ECK7XZfsV_36e6RMD8-_QqOU5kiRAyeIU4Z3jsBM9Qp1bJau1U8PMMTeF8KA-0vnKSQw0WMF2Gm9CL6W_dtdAlAgmrB9ePQW2t6YdvFJZmU9hrUVccAWqfx6o2NyqgZtFWqRXeqYhSmN8JI0_k5QEhiFlabMMvUaAERudTuWTDzAom-ywG1C2VtyS3M296oj0beGnnbaukwM9TsGUv2RHhgfpzdRt7OSD0M1tq2uri9kQj369ho8Vg90i_J__zM4eRPAAAA__8-C3_i) | Dear Reader, Jen Stevens here with some great news...[](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJys0LFygzAQBNCvgc6MkISRChVp3DltSkZIJ3OeQ2LEGU_-PkOa_ECK7XZfsV_36e6RMD8-_QqOU5kiRAyeIU4Z3jsBM9Qp1bJau1U8PMMTeF8KA-0vnKSQw0WMF2Gm9CL6W_dtdAlAgmrB9ePQW2t6YdvFJZmU9hrUVccAWqfx6o2NyqgZtFWqRXeqYhSmN8JI0_k5QEhiFlabMMvUaAERudTuWTDzAom-ywG1C2VtyS3M296oj0beGnnbaukwM9TsGUv2RHhgfpzdRt7OSD0M1tq2uri9kQj369ho8Vg90i_J__zM4eRPAAAA__8-C3_i) Today, I want to share with the readers of _The Flyover_ some of my **best-kept travel secrets** ... Secrets like......
* **[How to fly by private jet for as little as $99](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJys0LFygzAQBNCvgc6MkISRChVp3DltSkZIJ3OeQ2LEGU_-PkOa_ECK7XZfsV_36e6RMD8-_QqOU5kiRAyeIU4Z3jsBM9Qp1bJau1U8PMMTeF8KA-0vnKSQw0WMF2Gm9CL6W_dtdAlAgmrB9ePQW2t6YdvFJZmU9hrUVccAWqfx6o2NyqgZtFWqRXeqYhSmN8JI0_k5QEhiFlabMMvUaAERudTuWTDzAom-ywG1C2VtyS3M296oj0beGnnbaukwM9TsGUv2RHhgfpzdRt7OSD0M1tq2uri9kQj369ho8Vg90i_J__zM4eRPAAAA__8-C3_i)** (Yes, really!) Alesandra D. tried this tip and loved it: "My [secret] flight had me feeling like a celebrity!"
* **A guaranteed way to vacation on a cruise without the crowds** ... quiet pool days, almost no kids, and exotic ports of call...
* **How to get your own private chauffeur in any city starting at just $8 per hour ...** and no, I'm not talking about Uber, this is a real, private driver...
* **Ways you could get a FREE vacation overseas** (7 tips inside...) including: free RV road trips (just pay for gas)... off-the-beaten-path free stays in Scotland... and more...
* **8 easy tricks to get a seat upgrade on your next flight (without paying for it ...)**
* **How to snag the first-class lounge --even when you're flying economy... **dine on lobster, sip an Old Fashioned, or pamper yourself at the spa...
* **Never pay for a hotel again --yet, stay in London, Paris, or Rome for free (well, almost!) thanks to this tip...**

name: Office of the Governor
subject: Conducting the Work of Repair
body:
Our Recent Work + What the "Big Beautiful Bill" Means for Maryland
---
| | | | | [](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2FPages%2Fhome.aspx/1/01000197eb3a910d-dcf2465c-e145-4bfa-bd66-6d8738d2f56f-000000/reEomiYD7j8Jz2uXpbwPHsTRRq_0-I82QEvFt_cddg8=413)
---
| | [](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fyoutube.com%2Fshorts%2FHi6bxWtflVA/1/01000197eb3a910d-dcf2465c-e145-4bfa-bd66-6d8738d2f56f-000000/y0mJHsKbEyh02WqG0MD_U9IYWDYqvqzMa4gaKAtzfok=413)
---
On Day One of our administration, we made clear that Maryland would refuse to tolerate a widening racial wealth gap.
The racial wealth gap affects all of us: It hurts our economy, restrains job growth, and limits our potential as a state. Over the last two decades, **racial inequality has cost the American economy $16 trillion.**
That cost will continue to grow if we wait. That’s why we’ve taken major actions in the last few weeks:
📈 At Johns Hopkins University, [we announced a new fund](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2Fnews%2Fpress%2Fpages%2Fgovernor-moore-launches-maryland-community-investment-venture-fund-to-promote-access-to-capital-for-small-business-owners.aspx/1/01000197eb3a910d-dcf2465c-e145-4bfa-bd66-6d8738d2f56f-000000/fACoBmuP1IgvRkeJ7lPYJa4ux6fm9oGcHwebwyINOdU=413) to **help entrepreneurs of color access capital** so they can grow their businesses.
🏠 In Baltimore’s Orchard Ridge neighborhood, we kicked off [our UPLIFT program](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2Fnews%2Fpress%2Fpages%2Fgovernor-moore-announces-first-uplift-fund-recipient-to-increase-property-values-and-homeownership-in-historically-disinves.aspx/1/01000197eb3a910d-dcf2465c-e145-4bfa-bd66-6d8738d2f56f-000000/GYkpyJh9SMLGAZ68zP9I53iwRFESdGg-0_XOv1Y_UDE=413) to **help raise property values in disinvested neighborhoods** affected by redlining.
🏗️ During [Road to Careers in Upper Marlboro](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2Fnews%2Fpress%2Fpages%2Fgovernor-moore-announces-first-road-to-careers-funding-recipients-to-promote-highskill-workforce-development.aspx/1/01000197eb3a910d-dcf2465c-e145-4bfa-bd66-6d8738d2f56f-000000/VQkaNhOZx0mQ-cM6xgop8RgudykFGBeoh7y2Wq3EHpY=413), we awarded $4 million in funding to **strengthen apprenticeships and job training programs**.
🔨 At Bethel AME Church in Cambridge, I announced the [first round of “Just Communities” designations](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2Fnews%2Fpress%2FPages%2Fgovernor-moore-announces-additional-action-to-close-maryland%25E2%2580%2599s-racial-wealth-gap-by-promoting-just-community-investment-and.aspx/1/01000197eb3a910d-dcf2465c-e145-4bfa-bd66-6d8738d2f56f-000000/qVOzTcU4xlhvGPA2jQbzKvhgESdPQh-SblD9puUH0qU=413) to prioritize **investments for neighborhoods once left behind by exclusionary policies**.
I also announced that I would **issue nearly 7,000 pardons for simple cannabis possession** , building on my historic executive clemency order from last year, where I pardoned 175,000 state convictions for cannabis possession.
While the President divests from Black and underserved communities, dismantles minority business programs, and bans books about our history, **in Maryland, we are proving there’s a better way**.
Together, we’re going to continue the work of repair so we can deliver results — not just for certain groups, but for every single Marylander.
Your Governor,
Wes Moore
| | [](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2FPages%2Fhome.aspx/2/01000197eb3a910d-dcf2465c-e145-4bfa-bd66-6d8738d2f56f-000000/AtkhlfPpWYKByULp-DPHMOd9jQ38IirEg08ZPnLbf_Y=413)
---
| | [](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2Fnews%2Fpress%2FPages%2Fgovernor-moore-unveils-historical-marker-honoring-life-and-legacy-of-maryland-native-harriet-tubman.aspx/1/01000197eb3a910d-dcf2465c-e145-4bfa-bd66-6d8738d2f56f-000000/aIpJSucAwWVPGlm56alAYTz2GRbuw_lPntW8mIDY_b8=413)
---
### [**Honoring the Life and Legacy of Harriet Tubman**](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2Fnews%2Fpress%2FPages%2Fgovernor-moore-unveils-historical-marker-honoring-life-and-legacy-of-maryland-native-harriet-tubman.aspx/2/01000197eb3a910d-dcf2465c-e145-4bfa-bd66-6d8738d2f56f-000000/K6o3Op50grRI3dle5UYKDzOd-OAELrnW8SRy8owd0Y0=413)

For generations to come, residents and visitors alike will pass by here and learn of Tubman’s legacy. They will learn about the achievements of someone who had high hopes for us, even if she never saw those hopes realized in her lifetime.
Maryland has come together—across party lines and zip codes—to say in one voice: **Our history is our power and we are going to protect it, defend it, and pass it on.**
| [](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2Fnews%2Fpress%2Fpages%2Fgovernor-moore-delivers-keynote-address-at-the-2025-maryland-municipal-league-summer-conference.aspx/1/01000197eb3a910d-dcf2465c-e145-4bfa-bd66-6d8738d2f56f-000000/DvmGvpMQdPjsiM6IRwXqnNjf4yaMQX7FOzu7Rnx5hjY=413)
---
### [](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2Fnews%2Fpress%2Fpages%2Fgovernor-moore-celebrates-the-formation-of-the-enough-alliance-and-100-million-dollar-philanthropic-investment-to-end-child.aspx/1/01000197eb3a910d-dcf2465c-e145-4bfa-bd66-6d8738d2f56f-000000/iIFEqvblLK9yWOXmedDfyAaEeemyWg1GuzzkB8UPfCA=413)[Keynote Address at the 2025 Maryland Municipal League Summer Conference](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2Fnews%2Fpress%2Fpages%2Fgovernor-moore-delivers-keynote-address-at-the-2025-maryland-municipal-league-summer-conference.aspx/2/01000197eb3a910d-dcf2465c-e145-4bfa-bd66-6d8738d2f56f-000000/J84iCFCxMep3KQK-SJ02cJUvpHjdQmIoMfIIqNbzprw=413)

In partnership with the Maryland General Assembly, **we turned a $3 billion inherited deficit into a surplus** , **we gave middle-class Marylanders a tax cut** , **we preserved critical investments in health care and education** , and we asked those who have done exceptionally well to pay a little more, so we have the best schools in the country and don’t have to lay off cops or firefighters.
| [](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fyoutu.be%2FiM73A0u6Mm0/1/01000197eb3a910d-dcf2465c-e145-4bfa-bd66-6d8738d2f56f-000000/Y0ep8ziiZC_yV4GpWhjuzFg72UD8BIvSioAcT1W9vOw=413)
### [](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2Fnews%2Fpress%2Fpages%2Fgovernor-moore-to-lead-international-trade-and-investment-mission-to-japan-and-south-korea.aspx/1/01000197eb3a910d-dcf2465c-e145-4bfa-bd66-6d8738d2f56f-000000/XLlCrbePkP4XbYmpCC_aUO7e48ClVrwyV9JqY7y9IJs=413)[What President Trump's "Big Beautiful Bill" Means for Marylanders](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv=iM73A0u6Mm0/1/01000197eb3a910d-dcf2465c-e145-4bfa-bd66-6d8738d2f56f-000000/5_55e8LWif8EWOCJNTS_c_iXtQyhUsSHcHZXdmSNFFo=413)

Last Friday, the President signed his disastrous “Big, Beautiful Bill” into law.

**[Here’s what it means for us in Maryland.](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fyoutu.be%2FiM73A0u6Mm0/2/01000197eb3a910d-dcf2465c-e145-4bfa-bd66-6d8738d2f56f-000000/9-b-46gWTq_K9Ea41vYPN3dBmTVs6MZOoFW3N-Uh_Xo=413)** | [](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.cbsnews.com%2Fbaltimore%2Fnews%2Fmaryland-gov-moore-state-center-complex-baltimore-city%2F/1/01000197eb3a910d-dcf2465c-e145-4bfa-bd66-6d8738d2f56f-000000/kYgXe6U6ykHxlbGniywRMAYo94GnAHiH90zExGMDRyI=413) | |
## [**Maryland Gov. Moore announces plan to redevelop State Center Complex in Baltimore City**](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.cbsnews.com%2Fbaltimore%2Fnews%2Fmaryland-gov-moore-state-center-complex-baltimore-city%2F/2/01000197eb3a910d-dcf2465c-e145-4bfa-bd66-6d8738d2f56f-000000/Wfn7xB1r5Z58A9v3o_Iy24H4raujLRTB-GLuiUrCXP4=413)

_“‘This next chapter for State Center will expand our mission to create jobs, build housing that's affordable, and create new pathways to work, wages, and wealth in all corners of the state,’ Moore said.”_

_“This new facility marks the next chapter in our work to build pathways to work, wages, and wealth while prioritizing access to health care and opportunity,”_[said Moore.]

[](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.thebaltimorebanner.com%2Feconomy%2Fbge-utility-bill-rebates-maryland-CPLLMZXESRAXNJILEYABOI2ZSE%2F/1/01000197eb3a910d-dcf2465c-e145-4bfa-bd66-6d8738d2f56f-000000/1WlGbTtMhog7YEc2eY0Qy-Xv6YMFmPkomWGSCsVqU78=413) | |
## [**BGE customers could get rebates of $80, starting as soon as August**](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.thebaltimorebanner.com%2Feconomy%2Fbge-utility-bill-rebates-maryland-CPLLMZXESRAXNJILEYABOI2ZSE%2F/2/01000197eb3a910d-dcf2465c-e145-4bfa-bd66-6d8738d2f56f-000000/NFs0DRmaE2X6DyWU62hW6PyRdYaKDHrEVfj30EK5fd4=413)

_“The rebates are part of the $200 million that state legislators earmarked in the Next Generation Energy Act, which passed in the 2025 General Assembly and was signed by Gov. Wes Moore on May 20. The law went into effect June 1.”_
---|---|---

clean_body: Our Recent Work + What the "Big Beautiful Bill" Means for Maryland | | | | | | | On Day One of our administration, we made clear that Maryland would refuse to tolerate a widening racial wealth gap. The racial wealth gap affects all of us: It hurts our economy, restrains job growth, and limits our potential as a state. Over the last two decades, racial inequality has cost the American economy $16 trillion. That cost will continue to grow if we wait. That’s why we’ve taken major actions in the last few weeks: 📈 At Johns Hopkins University, to help entrepreneurs of color access capital so they can grow their businesses. 🏠 In Baltimore’s Orchard Ridge neighborhood, we kicked off to help raise property values in disinvested neighborhoods affected by redlining. 🏗️ During , we awarded $4 million in funding to strengthen apprenticeships and job training programs. 🔨 At Bethel AME Church in Cambridge, I announced the to prioritize investments for neighborhoods once left behind by exclusionary policies. I also announced that I would issue nearly 7,000 pardons for simple cannabis possession , building on my historic executive clemency order from last year, where I pardoned 175,000 state convictions for cannabis possession. While the President divests from Black and underserved communities, dismantles minority business programs, and bans books about our history, in Maryland, we are proving there’s a better way. Together, we’re going to continue the work of repair so we can deliver results — not just for certain groups, but for every single Marylander. Your Governor, Wes Moore | | | | For generations to come, residents and visitors alike will pass by here and learn of Tubman’s legacy. They will learn about the achievements of someone who had high hopes for us, even if she never saw those hopes realized in her lifetime. Maryland has come together—across party lines and zip codes—to say in one voice: Our history is our power and we are going to protect it, defend it, and pass it on. | In partnership with the Maryland General Assembly, we turned a $3 billion inherited deficit into a surplus , we gave middle-class Marylanders a tax cut , we preserved critical investments in health care and education , and we asked those who have done exceptionally well to pay a little more, so we have the best schools in the country and don’t have to lay off cops or firefighters. | Last Friday, the President signed his disastrous “Big, Beautiful Bill” into law. | | | “‘This next chapter for State Center will expand our mission to create jobs, build housing that's affordable, and create new pathways to work, wages, and wealth in all corners of the state,’ Moore said.” ---|---|--- | | “This new facility marks the next chapter in our work to build pathways to work, wages, and wealth while prioritizing access to health care and opportunity,”[said Moore.] ---|---|--- | | “The rebates are part of the $200 million that state legislators earmarked in the Next Generation Energy Act, which passed in the 2025 General Assembly and was signed by Gov. Wes Moore on May 20. The law went into effect June 1.” ---|---|--- | Update your subscriptions, modify your password or email address, or unsubscribe .

name: James Carville
subject: Big Beautiful Bill? More like Big Ugly Betrayal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by SMP, www
body:

I’ve seen some stupid ideas in Washington. But Trump’s “Big, Beautiful Bill”? It ain’t beautiful, it ain’t smart, and it sure as hell ain’t for working people. We’re talking about a budget bill that will:
* Gut health care for 11.8 million Americans
* Rip food assistance out from under struggling families
* Force rural hospitals to close and destroy Medicaid

And all this damage just so Republicans can pass out $4 trillion in tax breaks to the richest idiots in America. It’s cruel. It’s reckless. And politically? **It’s like they’re handing us Democrats a big red “FLIP THE SENATE” button.** Republicans are already jumping ship. This whole bill fiasco pushed Thom Tillis into retirement! Voters hate this thing — and they _should_. It's an economic betrayal wrapped in billionaire bootlicking. But if we’re gonna bury this Big, Ugly Betrayal once and for all, we’ve gotta get to work. **[So I’m asking you, from one pissed-off Democrat to another, will you chip in today to help us flip the Senate, kick these right-wing lunatics out, and elect some Senators with common sense?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111104765/556233872/-746039140?amount=10&refcode=AU_SMP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20250708_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjk3MjViZS0yNjVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XBELi7KepYhvTFRydvB6LdVRaqDZSiDuw-r-xx_G-uQ=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $10 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111104767/556233873/-788614911?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_SMP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20250708_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjk3MjViZS0yNjVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XBELi7KepYhvTFRydvB6LdVRaqDZSiDuw-r-xx_G-uQ=)

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: Now Available: “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer”
body:
I am excited to announce that Hillsdale’s online teaching series, “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,” is now available to own as a DVD box set.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z7vljqjrhaf7tlfnuahg9b0qak7ffck64jhji2mo_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1i64p74cth2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zrstlobgu51sncnslib20oajs4jk3j650ogb15io_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1i64p74cth2bs) Dear Fellow American,

I am excited to announce that Hillsdale's online teaching series, ["Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,"](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2j0humhk58cntv18akc5sh1mk1u5m95hhghm26g_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1i64p74cth2bs) is now available to own as a DVD box set.

In this series, you will discover how taxation, regulation, money, government spending, and trade influence our decisions and impact our lives. Joined by Steve Forbes, Stephen Moore, Larry Kudlow, Amity Shlaes, Brian Domitrovic, and Larry P. Arnn, Dr. Laffer explains how supply-side economics holds the key to unleashing American prosperity once again.

But we need the support of citizens like you to promote this series to millions of Americans along with our other nationwide outreach.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online teaching series from Hillsdale College and expand other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty? Your tax-deductible donation will help us to enroll thousands of Americans in this series.

And for a donation of $100 or more, we will send you this beautiful DVD box set of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer."

**To help support this course and get your copy of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer" on DVD, click the link below:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/supply-side-economics-support-dvd](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0islr5r6n14coercc2v9v5e5irf3lr48v067ui0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2c1i64p74cth2bs)

I hope you enjoy this teaching series. Thank you for your support.

Warm Regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Pop Acta Media | Your America
---

Will you partner with us to promote this free online teaching series from Hillsdale College and expand other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty? Your tax-deductible donation will help us to enroll thousands of Americans in this series. And for a donation of $100 or more, we will send you this beautiful DVD box set of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer." To help support this course and get your copy of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer" on DVD, click the link below: I hope you enjoy this teaching series. Thank you for your support. Warm Regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | Pop Acta Media | Your America PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC
body:
After Trump’s GOP rammed through their megabill, Hakeem Jeffries stood for 8 HOURS and 45 MINUTES to expose their anti-working family agenda. Look ↙↙

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q32025_ltr_jeffries?amount=10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q32025_ltr_jeffries?amount=10]So at 9am sharp tomorrow morning, we’re sending Leader Jeffries a thank-you letter and want YOUR name on it!

We only have [37] open signature spots left for grassroots Democrats, Peter. Sign before our midnight deadline » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q32025_ltr_jeffries?amount=7]

SIGN THE “THANK YOU HAKEEM JEFFRIES” LETTER NOW » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q32025_ltr_jeffries?amount=7]

TO: Rep. Hakeem Jeffries
FROM: A grateful Democrat
RE: We’ve got your back
Dear Leader Jeffries,
Thank you SO much for standing up to Republican extremism and fighting back against Donald Trump’s cruel megabill.
Your record-breaking speech exposed exactly what the GOP is trying to do behind closed doors:
— Rip away health care from working families
— Defund reproductive care
— Give billionaires more tax breaks
— And silence the people most at risk
While Republicans rushed through this hateful legislation, you showed the country what real leadership looks like: Relentless, unafraid, and unapologetically on the side of the people.
I’m signing this letter to say THANK YOU, and I’m chipping in $7 to Democracy On the Line so we can take back the House, defeat Trump’s MAGA agenda, and send more Democrats like you to Congress. » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q32025_ltr_jeffries?amount=7]
SIGN THE “THANK YOU HAKEEM JEFFRIES” LETTER NOW » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q32025_ltr_jeffries?amount=7]
Sincerely,
X Peter Willis

– Democracy on the Line

subject: Kentucky Conservative Fights Establishment Money

body:
True Conservative Threatens McConnell's Power | | |
---
---
A new voice is emerging in Kentucky politics, and the establishment is already mobilizing against him. **Nate Morris** , a successful entrepreneur and ninth-generation Kentuckian, has launched a grassroots campaign for U.S. Senate that's sending shockwaves through the state's political establishment. With Mitch McConnell's political machine already gearing up to crush any challenge to their hand-picked candidates, Morris is racing against time to build the conservative movement needed to break their stranglehold on Kentucky politics. _**From Bootstrap Success to Political Insurgent**_ Morris's story embodies the American Dream that career politicians only talk about. Raised by a single mother in a union household, with 19 family members working at the local auto plant, Morris understands working-class struggles firsthand. His grandfather, who led the local auto union, inspired him to never accept "no" for an answer. That determination paid off. With just a $10,000 line of credit, Morris founded Rubicon, building it into one of America's largest waste and recycling companies operating in 50 states and 20 countries. After 12 years as CEO, growing the company to nearly $700 million in annual revenue, he launched Morris Industries to tackle America's biggest challenges. **Now he's taking on his biggest challenge yet: the Washington establishment.** Unlike the typical McConnell-approved candidates who talk tough during campaigns then cave in Washington, Morris has laid out an uncompromising conservative agenda: ▶︎ **Immigration** : Complete opposition to amnesty, ending birthright citizenship, mass deportations, and a temporary immigration pause until illegal entries are addressed ▶︎ **Health Freedom** : Full support for Trump and RFK Jr.'s Make America Healthy Again initiative ▶︎ **Protecting Children** : Banning hormone treatments for minors and defunding schools pushing woke ideology ▶︎ **Second Amendment** : Repealing the Biden-McConnell gun control bill and stopping credit card companies from blocking gun purchases ▶︎ **Election Integrity** : Cutting federal funds to states refusing voter ID requirements ▶︎ **Economic Revival** : Backing Trump's working-class tax cuts and tariff policies to bring jobs home **Time is running out.** [**Please support Nate Morris for Senate today!**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=a874dc73b8004b24b44833a964a7c18f&_e=U3oft-RnsPqvcBWlaePZiETIG0JI3dHZ1-61jLNtOVq0TjYUmdBWWwt3sPDzFxL-21oTIctzYEm8hZhse2tTvkb1N2TWpCVAiSVYTKukhJ9wYvV236f-bv39HqtHx2RZnYZR3fkw2zT6M7UK9Ad6Sh1aGDQ16FbxW1HEnEqgE1h0-FhoXHJacpv7lL3oUBXuIWYBJUgF21NoQLZjsvR6M3N-CJaiMiHUcO1d1B8wQ-AGQxIaVNN_9bVeR49Ra1iUrrg43T-nXMtCu5kMi1LLYup4KTgqh0Ci3paDsx5-vhwPKI20XJ9T8sJhMRQESorKcubuH4hzGsFWirpNnHCEYV1yJZBF2UHNv8yYLJK9OVcNYdffSy_TKw-k1JTaDJbtLK7o-HLM0Kf2tN1TEzYzbA%3D%3D) McConnell's political network, flush with establishment money and deep-state backing, is already moving to ensure another RINO puppet wins this seat. They've seen what happens when outsiders like Morris gain momentum, and they're determined to stop him before his campaign can take root. Morris has been one of the few Kentucky Republicans brave enough to criticize McConnell by name, calling out his betrayals of President Trump and the America-First agenda. That courage has made him a target, but it's also exactly why conservatives must rally now. _**Why Your Support Matters**_ While Morris achieved business success, he knows this fight requires something money alone can't buy: a passionate grassroots movement. The establishment will outspend him with their billionaire donors and special interest money. But they can't match the power of committed conservatives joining together. Every day counts. While McConnell's machine organizes to protect their power, Morris needs patriots to step up immediately. Your support today – whether $5, $50, or $500 – sends a message that Kentucky conservatives are done with RINO representation. **This is about more than one Senate seat. It's about whether President Trump will have the allies he needs to implement his agenda, or whether McConnell's saboteurs will continue blocking America-First policies from within.** _**Take Action Today**_ The window to build a winning grassroots campaign is closing fast. The McConnell establishment is counting on conservatives to wait, to hesitate, to assume someone else will step up. Don't let them win by default. [**Rush your donation now**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=a874dc73b8004b24b44833a964a7c18f&_e=U3oft-RnsPqvcBWlaePZiETIG0JI3dHZ1-61jLNtOVq0TjYUmdBWWwt3sPDzFxL-21oTIctzYEm8hZhse2tTvkb1N2TWpCVAiSVYTKukhJ_FX5THciR8U4YNbVV7e85jh4v6JEvcKdvzSK77NtIlSE3x8gRiZivQNLkguwg84UKuK86Af2HdWhNbU6rDaiUvOVXLhisdFAgTkXZdsVnE_GR5OZbtv45Ei_5y1TyqzwZHl-jLHEXZuLAdzZH5ox8mVpVRSFtUXz_nKKG2tNlG-3B8v23H3JGmcErqorSkWmFdUCEgFewi8hLtRmOWDoljXalbbyzTZ-XULMFC5Zn5inTQU-rSGgcAFot9hj7fNoni3kAu5sGt5uXqU6ltFKK0WfvaIX8f66LkpTmP_zgaCw%3D%3D) to help Nate Morris defeat the RINO machine and ensure Kentucky sends a true conservative fighter to the Senate. Whether it's $5 or $500, every contribution fuels the grassroots army needed to overcome the establishment's millions. Kentucky deserves better than another McConnell puppet and America needs senators who will fight for Trump's agenda, not undermine it. The time to act is now – before the establishment's money drowns out the voice of real conservatives. [**Stand with Nate Morris today.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=a874dc73b8004b24b44833a964a7c18f&_e=U3oft-RnsPqvcBWlaePZiETIG0JI3dHZ1-61jLNtOVq0TjYUmdBWWwt3sPDzFxL-21oTIctzYEm8hZhse2tTvkb1N2TWpCVAiSVYTKukhJ-cxH_IK_KxPH5b2_NaonltTN39tjC4Vu1c0tRTllJTCEkE3Y_y8IGn_avafUHLtFTap0rKy5qsu6n7RNqepnPiG9Lu2fGUCn0oMAOUpj_33VMSw7E4HLe3b7hp1or9lXxaIuZ0wT5CNLIWtlVd2boJxbJktCCvE33lrRokavyi2vVf8Ev5YjKE8_XSC_h0fyLnb51MFr_uepVozZzTxULeo--PFhPD-gIzXd1KrvI7zMz3cFHy6bglkIBpYLloxLJ5Txhmp1Wcql0AIDe1rykIXGS2TMyQfEEIfEndzBqD-A%3D%3D) Tomorrow may be too late.

body:
We hope you enjoyed your 4th of July! Now is the time to dive deep

| | | | | [|
---](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=abaf8fc5a1&e=6484bb6dd5)
| | | | | Dear Friend,As the glow of the Fourth of July fades, we’re reminded that the true celebration of our nation’s founding principles happens not just in fireworks and parades—but in the everyday work of strengthening our democracy.Here at Governing Group, Utah’s municipal primary election season is in full swing. We’re working hard to help principled, capable candidates run effective campaigns in races across the state. **From city councils to school boards, these local positions shape the daily lives of Utahns—and they need our attention and support.** Right now, with your help, we’re:-Designing and delivering eye-catching, informative mailers that get noticed-Developing targeted digital ads that reach voters where they are-Creating compelling social media content-Helping candidates craft strategic, effective voter outreach plans

This work is vital—and it’s how we ensure that democracy doesn’t just endure, but thrives at the local level.If you're looking for a meaningful way to carry the spirit of the Fourth into the rest of the summer, consider making a contribution to support this important work.[**Can you chip in $10, $50, or $100 today to help elect leaders who put service over partisanship?**](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=69e2379c47&e=6484bb6dd5) Your support empowers local leaders and helps ensure that Utah remains a place where democracy works for all of us.With gratitude,
Governing Group

body:

Friend,

Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson at the Chicago Nascar event on July 6, 2025. (Mayor Brandon Johnson/X)
By Illinois Review

At a Tuesday morning press conference at Chicago City Hall, Mayor Brandon Johnson — whose approval rating hovers around six percent — reiterated that local law enforcement would not “cooperate with ICE.”

“Our local police department will not ever cooperate with ICE – whatever their constitutional authority is,” said Johnson.

| Peter,

Recently, I toured Whittier and spoke with local business owners about the devastating toll the ongoing ICE raids are placing on our community and local economy.

These are thriving shops, restaurants, and markets. But fear is keeping families at home, workers from showing up, and customers away. That empty footprint is hurting us all.

We must speak up.

[_**Will you sign my petition calling on the Trump administration to halt these destructive ICE raids**_**?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111106173/556238949/1436234130?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjM5ZWIxMS0yYjVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IR79ZVXWPZaa_IGQC-Z_Tw9QuqSgSPjjV6hNrB18TYY=&emci=2877ed01-005c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=0239eb11-2b5c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=6681226)

Onward,

Linda

name: Todd Kitzler
subject: Reaching out from the Grantham for Congress campaign
body:
Hello,

My name is Todd Allen Kitzler and I am reaching out on behalf of the
Grantham for Congress campaign because I got a signup submission with your
email attached,.

I wanted to see what interest you had with the campaign (volunteer, extra
information, donation, etc.), as well as introduce myself.

Please let me know and I will be sure to get back to you as soon as I can.
Thank you very much and have a fantastic rest of your day!

All the best,
TA

name: Dear Patriot >>
subject: This isn’t just another email. And no, we are NOT asking for money.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Political Action Committee (AmeriPAC) American Political Action Committee (AmeriPAC)
body:
It’s a PRIVATE message about Trump >>
---
| | | | | | | Dear Peter,

| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/eqiVNQi1HIWz0xJ-yWpKRcenpU1YoCIjb7QSamComfdetxqRYX8ugvduTaBc-CqSEbaqX0Krypgi31N9p9y_zQmkY5LRibw8tllyaEoaAxhPaZhe_8uhoHC_CEhMn8XOjM2LgS9VU-eMp9SeFZa7L-fWULJMQjzM9XPPzrOo-l4LkyBF02dZZeIQJ5FkK6wMRkgrJftiWsDHiZQrwHv2jy0QmiWZAZ7BlrfVRziiEZwrl2e6nJVZakdHa8NU4bHNH6PwLxODT8wU8DYAy67WROzlUxhvDyt7D-uaIvWr4wXypjSY5-3dKJDPbe0p0SOgA6pTo78h7OlzqVjRJvxZFskNA4WjYH4v1QPbru8lvgOdoMJ4fw9TWYJcFl9G_N9hYCdgVD50-0ftZLhym1eLUNc3mklHpj5eNLRL-PxrBfzl9v795Qttopbv89xX3efoPtmWyvAaIV9A8a5SNcmoanE0jPLaBDZnTLZVY9T7wMYFHyA__i8NHtO32UnnEUkAZv2S5UviURyFMVM7y50UlXUrt-AhO-pGwWYNi7trll0-NiPCKv5mcbBmjcsMnHbJAv4ejPq4m_IDn9V9uI-MnTWG6wK6sad0CWwDxkE76FI54m4DAQEMMEqiUn6TBftt1OINntYfUZAKO89z55NCb9WoK7svx-6xY2m2WluurN8QoemuWOyQ74kad_dwxiRih6U3RDRB71WV30QPTYhrJwRPsQMZS1xWyQ/l_P8JU0p4kL1FEs5bApNsaMu1hf_JtOP/10) [NO](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/vdQIfxk2OmiV4KnLzlSGIPQ_4lorz7sRTjLKzNCd1cguxb9Ba93uthIJ9tBwNLt82YrbSi2-EwgwHXhd7gzLa_HovterEiwE_MjGC0_DU4cOcXGkohJ3CsZOCjuZNeoOFLqBV020y3C70p4I-_yX26auHDvyjaCXUqvVtIH5dDPq_uAWv3l0-E-qxQ0CC6-GQcQ1qNMBZIY3Ag2_zATAyNcXkoI8tEWT8rwe5i6G9j9WTM6rbGm6975puAgsjxhj10xxHHJwWRO2eyseVIVldf1mFV90VgxogQdFQFwX6VgRhRaYn6IqIZBabFtnQ2XrydFm08do9fWjI9REtnrrPZZvcoHzYhxMNxPYWunum4RrvV9BPEc_lblKxLIdy9cDcpEwuDOXTywIWCTsA7guOXpRc-kVF5Nj9bcSc6UQUXTPAtnPeVXmdBpFPF3jIGl6tsQZRV7HtyOpJytlUKQ8qcoCfzayTw46uMQS7roE_b7edeoiKjwssmcqqZtiSVoyUscLTUFgLqc5I-I2ayyh0EkL72kURKCsn5gzFReeSGdM1mXYVSMKq5o7h6lDG2e8uwGylrUGpYnupNIdD-V5ZEMjbBUu5APKmvHz8HKOjBlSw-0qjpTP0VZKk19F_fqf0dPIkOpptHBVuq8qSF5praTcKAlKmKZmOjaWQuNOLLkL2h0ge16oaZyUGZ0WI_mQmvsnkkEsi75SfY-_gTXlWF4nQgH_X7u4VA/4xRn_HlLSioZRBapiYEhEK13qdx6OAYV/10) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

That is why I'm reaching out to you today...

_What is your opinion about the Supreme Court 's role in our constitutional republic? _

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/nQmISDaRARw70eV9nM3o6xKJKg6yuyiY4j6ReS4zrz3bAZWzpuM3i6l0d-eV7AdxScukVQih_1mk1V0VgUoPuVY5a4arGvtQQP4G97cCNT3c9dpRvfgmaoND-7JOgoVCCWsMNbAeeA9i7q51QCRDYsiCD3fR0lp90lci2_geoDEM2s6Cp6GeFOS25iCiKwtYjRP7L-CsIyp9ylr_tO3FM5BeerCGXqUQGahhhAjezgpGvz-etXRqOQueSPDu3w_oiaB4TgxEzqZuhs66PZdJrbB8x9NFFqO1yA8F5kxmHRGnfYuHbUjkC6BVpbd9tzdd_EN-WCAy8d6NI_D_XyexxJnzXfyyBpc2QsMiLBJN6vSPrmiW2Eu2OSNfjalfRFZ3CZ5Y6-a_Wy94KP0SY7QRFP2y5kfYG0zUcaig9tTlOi_kO2RuIbshTR-82NYKALYQi-83M5K-A6THsZUk__plPK7GVC8dR_eaSNE2Ygy9RNIZFSfIMzM5TAzj605uEmJSAufFPXq3xr2dCFiNjXBwoze_OIkdxhHyphS3URW0vOUXSzo8JrH36mJw1grlrOXgRpxLMOp9u3iLNL6O84W4qb3H9gxK5d4f2HrIepsrJA7w2aS0KzZlKfIukghpAUeSQNlmZoIM_dGJSyMEK0W0pUhfdLb6x-Oo4z6d2WCgpe9yhrOYy_hsOYL-s_BMUuoG01rIRMjuzVOiW4KgZIh6-0vp-xxcFtqMqA/vQ8uCZDpaCid5uab05EoO-FVbYk7ucRp/10)** Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844

body:
In all 83 counties |
#
---
Team, In Michigan, we’re fighting like hell to make life easier for Michiganders in all 83 counties. We’re supporting the governor’s work to lower costs, fix the damn roads, and elect champions for working people across the country. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111107623/556243783/-1561548045?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250708_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDE2ZDA4YmEtMmQ1Yy1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cIe0pVtFoVXMV8aMUCPEj1ziF1_D7w0dWCcjNkeOq7E=) The future of our country depends on what we do here in Michigan. With the GOP’s hold on the House of Representatives so narrow and another open U.S. Senate seat on the ballot in 2026, Michigan could truly help decide the House and Senate majority next year. **In other words,_a lot_ is riding on the work we do here in Michigan. ** We’ve had a lot of competitive elections recently, and this year will be no different. That’s why, from Detroit to Marquette, we’re sharing our message with Michiganders in all 83 counties to ensure they know Democrats are the ones fighting to lower their costs, make their lives more affordable, and create a brighter future for themselves and their families. **[Michigan can deliver a Democratic House and Senate majority, but only if we reach enough voters. clean_body: In all 83 counties | Team, In Michigan, we’re fighting like hell to make life easier for Michiganders in all 83 counties. We’re supporting the governor’s work to lower costs, fix the damn roads, and elect champions for working people across the country. = The future of our country depends on what we do here in Michigan. With the GOP’s hold on the House of Representatives so narrow and another open U.S. Senate seat on the ballot in 2026, Michigan could truly help decide the House and Senate majority next year. In other words,a lot is riding on the work we do here in Michigan. We’ve had a lot of competitive elections recently, and this year will be no different. That’s why, from Detroit to Marquette, we’re sharing our message with Michiganders in all 83 counties to ensure they know Democrats are the ones fighting to lower their costs, make their lives more affordable, and create a brighter future for themselves and their families. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = The stakes of the upcoming races are high, and we can’t afford to take even a vote for granted. clean_body: Background on report that FBI concludes Epstein killed himself and didn't have a client list [NEWSLINK] BREAKING NEWS... [image] [] RIGHTS AND FREEDOMS IN PERIL "When it comes to fighting for the American people’s ‘right to know,’ no one holds a candle to Tom Fitton and his team at Judicial Watch" - SEAN HANNITY Tom Fitton returns with an exhaustive investigation into the progressive movement’s efforts to dismantle the venerable institutions of American rights and freedoms. Order Tom Fitton's Must-Read Today! [] [600x300] [] Jeffrey Epstein died by suicide, did not have client list: DOJ memo [] Source: Fox News [] A two-page internal Department of Justice and FBI memo that says deceased pedophile Jeffrey Epstein died by suicide, and that there is no list of clients whom Epstein may have procured for exploitation by third parties. "This systemic review revealed no incriminating ‘client list,’" a portion of the memo says. "There was also no credible evidence found that Epstein blackmailed prominent individuals as part of his actions." [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] Background Notes from Judicial Watch [180x150x1] [] April 23, 2025 Strange Bondi DOJ Response on Epstein Records [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton: "They make a big deal about having the records on her desk, and then they say they don't have any records. It doesn't make any sense to me." [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x2] [] July 07, 2025 Judicial Watch Sues Justice Department for Jeffrey Epstein Client Lists [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judicial Watch sued the Justice Department after it failed to adequately respond to four separate FOIA requests for records concerning Jeffrey Epstein, including a specific request for records “depicting the identities of clients or associates of Jeffrey Epstein.” [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x3] [] June 11, 2025 UPDATE: Judicial Watch Sues Justice Department for Epstein Client Lists [] Source: Judicial Watch [] "They're obligated under the law to release the records, and they haven't," Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton said. That’s right: Mariannette Miller-Meeks. In an effort to save her seat, Johnson cut Miller-Meeks a check for a jaw-dropping $213,000. This is a clear signal that the Republican establishment is terrified of Christina’s momentum — and for good reason. Mike Johnson knows Miller-Meeks is vulnerable. Miller-Meeks knows she’s vulnerable. And we know we can beat her. Christina’s campaign is powered by real people, not billionaires or party elites. name: Rick Larsen
subject: I voted no against the dangerous Big Ugly Bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
During the days leading up to the vote on the Big Ugly Bill, I was in-district, listening to people locally, hearing about what the bill would do to Northwest Washington.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111108840/556248098/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2QwOGZlZS0zMTVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SaIiS1hAKn0z561hNUQ1Ube9A4KtQlY46ji8b6UTjFM=&emci=09c837af-175c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=e7d08fee-315c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=9494239)
---

| | **During the days leading up to the vote on the Big Ugly Bill, I was in-district, listening to people locally, hearing about what the bill would do to Northwest Washington.** The people I talked to shared about the devastating consequences this bill would have on Northwest Washington:
* **The Joyce L. Sobel Family Resource Center shared that these cuts are going to impact their ability to serve people in Northwest Washington.**
* Since 1988, the Soble Family Resource Center has served as a welcoming and accessible place where over 2,800 islanders per year receive resources, advocacy, help, and education.
* **The Northwest Region Council shared that the budget cuts will flood our emergency departments at our hospitals as folks are still desperately going to pursue health care**
* "More people will be found will be found dying or deceased in their homes after weeks of no one hearing from them"
* **The cuts to Planned Parenthood prevent the program from getting reimbursements from Medicaid**
* The 4-5 Planned Parenthood medical facilities in Northwest Washington will be impacted by these cuts
* These cuts to Planned Parenthood are a back-door ban on safe and legal reproductive care. **This is going to put people in danger.**

**Let us make no mistake, the Big Ugly Bill is not about deficit reduction. **It is not about cutting spending. It is about cutting spending in order to pay for tax cuts for the richest Americans and largest corporations. I voted no against this dangerous bill, but Trump and the Chaos Caucus recklessly passed this bill last week. More soon, _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Rick Larsen instantly:

clean_body: During the days leading up to the vote on the Big Ugly Bill, I was in-district, listening to people locally, hearing about what the bill would do to Northwest Washington. | | | | During the days leading up to the vote on the Big Ugly Bill, I was in-district, listening to people locally, hearing about what the bill would do to Northwest Washington. The people I talked to shared about the devastating consequences this bill would have on Northwest Washington: The Joyce L. Sobel Family Resource Center shared that these cuts are going to impact their ability to serve people in Northwest Washington. Since 1988, the Soble Family Resource Center has served as a welcoming and accessible place where over 2,800 islanders per year receive resources, advocacy, help, and education. The Northwest Region Council shared that the budget cuts will flood our emergency departments at our hospitals as folks are still desperately going to pursue health care "More people will be found will be found dying or deceased in their homes after weeks of no one hearing from them" The cuts to Planned Parenthood prevent the program from getting reimbursements from Medicaid The 4-5 Planned Parenthood medical facilities in Northwest Washington will be impacted by these cuts These cuts to Planned Parenthood are a back-door ban on safe and legal reproductive care. This is going to put people in danger. Let us make no mistake, the Big Ugly Bill is not about deficit reduction. It is not about cutting spending. It is about cutting spending in order to pay for tax cuts for the richest Americans and largest corporations. I voted no against this dangerous bill, but Trump and the Chaos Caucus recklessly passed this bill last week. More soon, Rick | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Rick Larsen instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen. | This email was sent by .** Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen PO Box 326 Everett, WA 98206 United States Email is an important way for Rick Larsen to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. name: Team Heidi Hall
subject: [SIGN] Pledge to hold Kevin Kiley accountable
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://forms.oneswitchboard.com/heidi-hall-for-congress/bbb [https://forms.oneswitchboard.com/heidi-hall-for-congress/bbb]
Friend, it's Heidi Hall's team.
We need to talk about Trump's "big beautiful bill."
With the help of Republicans like our opponent, Kevin Kiley, the budget bill that bundles major tax cuts for the wealthy with drastic cuts to Medicaid and food assistance... passed.
Friend, this bill steals from the sick, it steals from the hungry, and it steals from our rural communities—all to give a handout to those that are already rich beyond comprehension.
Health care centers that rely on Medicaid to operate, people who count on SNAP to feed their families, and state budgets that were already stretched to fund important services will all feel the brunt of this bill.
As Rep. Kiley fails to listen to our communities and instead works hand in glove with the Trump administration to further their partisan agenda, we need to answer back.
Friend, will you sign our petition and pledge to hold Kevin Kiley accountable for his voting record by endorsing Heidi Hall in this race? [https://forms.oneswitchboard.com/heidi-hall-for-congress/bbb]
ADD YOUR NAME [https://forms.oneswitchboard.com/heidi-hall-for-congress/bbb]
In solidarity,
Team Heidi Hall
Heidi Hall has spent her three-decade public service career working with others to solve problems, protect our land and water, improve health, and build opportunities for others, all while raising two boys primarily as a single mom.
https://forms.oneswitchboard.com/heidi-hall-for-congress/bbb [https://forms.oneswitchboard.com/heidi-hall-for-congress/bbb]
Raised by parents who had persisted to make a middle-class life for their kids in Contra Costa County while lifting up others, Heidi was taught to push through and overcome challenges rather than complain about them. She learned to stick up for the vulnerable, to respect working people, and to value equal opportunity and justice.
After graduating from Pomona College and earning graduate degrees from Columbia and Rutgers, Heidi went to work for the Rockefeller Foundation promoting reproductive care and then began her career at the Environmental Protection Agency, stopping the dumping of toxic waste and holding corporate polluters accountable.
Today, Heidi chairs the Nevada County Board of Supervisors, where she’s taken on homelessness, expanded broadband access, and worked to reduce crime and illegal cannabis growth. Heidi flipped her seat from red to blue – and now she’s ready to do it again in Congress to take on toxic politics in Washington and put people first.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250708_em_pet_b1_THH_standard]
PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS

Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
United States

name: Sharice Davids
subject: I’m not giving up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
There’s no denying that the past week has been difficult

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111109587/556250265/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzhlOTkwMy0zNDVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xCItaIECdRrxfk8RwQYiRqQ1tNyRfEuV-jTOUis32zM=) I wanted to reach out and share a few thoughts. There’s no denying that the past week has been difficult. After the Senate passed Donald Trump’s disastrous budget bill on a 50-50 vote, National Republicans pushed the legislation through the House over the protests of their own constituents. **Yes, they thought it was appropriate to ignore the thousands of people — Republicans and Democrats alike — who called their offices and spelled out exactly how this bill would hurt them.** I voted NO, alongside every one of my Democratic colleagues. But it wasn’t enough. Instead, this cruel attack on working-class Americans was passed by a narrow margin and sent to Donald Trump’s desk. And with the President’s signature, the grave consequences of this legislation will soon become apparent in the very near future: Nearly 100,000 Kansans thrown off their health care. Nursing homes and rural hospitals forced to shutter their doors. Skyrocketing premiums for those with private insurance. Food assistance ripped away from hungry children. Trillions in tax handouts to the wealthiest people on the face of the Earth. This outcome is far more than a disappointment. It’s a devastating loss for the millions of moms, dads, kids, seniors, and workers whose lives will be changed for the worse. **But this doesn’t mean we can give up our fight. It doesn’t mean we now have to passively accept every outrageous scheme that Donald Trump and his extreme allies throw at us. We have to turn our anger into action — not helplessness.** And the single best way to do that is by taking control of the House next year. Because with a Democratic Congress in charge, we can stop future attacks on working families. We can place a check on Trump’s power. And we can begin the work of clawing back all the progress we’ve lost. [_**That’s why I’m asking for your support today. Democrats need to flip just 3 seats next year — and hold competitive districts like mine — to win control of the House and take real power _away_ from National Republicans. So if you’re just as ready as I am to kick the dust off and get to work, will you chip in?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111109588/556250266/-1340363074?refcode=email_070825_budget&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzhlOTkwMy0zNDVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xCItaIECdRrxfk8RwQYiRqQ1tNyRfEuV-jTOUis32zM=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111109589/556250267/-1340363074?refcode=email_070825_budget&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzhlOTkwMy0zNDVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xCItaIECdRrxfk8RwQYiRqQ1tNyRfEuV-jTOUis32zM=)
---
Together, we’ll be ready for whatever’s next.
Thank you,
Sharice

subject: Only 14% of Maine voters currently view GOP Senator Susan Collins favorably
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
This is our chance to flip Maine’s Senate seat and restore our Democratic majority... and we’re counting on your help to do it, Peter.
#

**NEW:** Favorability rating of Maine’s GOP U.S. Senator Susan Collins **57% Unfavorable**
**14% Favorable**
---
Here’s the deal, Peter: _We MUST flip Maine’s U.S. Senate seat if we want to restore our Democratic Senate majority next year —**and this new polling proves that momentum is on our side.**_
According to the University of New Hampshire, the favorability of Maine’s incumbent GOP Senator Susan Collins is CRASHING.
**_Only 14% of Maine voters currently view Susan Collins favorably._**
Our path to flipping the Senate does not exist without defeating Susan Collins. And now, we know that we have a real chance to do it.
**But we need your help to reach voters across Maine with the truth about Senator Collins’ record every day between now and November of next year.** Online, on TV, on the radio — we need to get our message out early + often.
**[So Peter, will you help us take advantage of this MAJOR opportunity for Democrats in Maine by rushing a donation of $5 or whatever you can right now?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91376?refcode=em20250708-9097&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9097%2E614464%2EBRqNVD)**

According to the University of New Hampshire, the favorability of Maine’s incumbent GOP Senator Susan Collins is CRASHING. Only 14% of Maine voters currently view Susan Collins favorably. Our path to flipping the Senate does not exist without defeating Susan Collins. And now, we know that we have a real chance to do it. But we need your help to reach voters across Maine with the truth about Senator Collins’ record every day between now and November of next year. Online, on TV, on the radio — we need to get our message out early + often. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Thank you, State Democrats HQ Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.

name: Tobias Read
subject: Our work is only just getting started
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250708em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250708em]
Hi, it's Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read.
It’s been a whirlwind six months since I took office as Secretary of State here in Oregon.
That’s why I was grateful to sit down with Oregon Business to discuss the progress we’ve made so far, our plans for the future, and more. You can read the article here [https://oregonbusiness.com/in-conversation-oregon-secretary-of-state-tobias-read/] , and then, if you’re able, I’d be grateful if you could chip in $10 or more to help continue the fight for Oregon’s democracy. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250708em]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250708em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250708em]
READ THE ARTICLE [https://oregonbusiness.com/in-conversation-oregon-secretary-of-state-tobias-read/]
CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250708em]
My office has worked to increase public confidence and trust in our elections through ballot ride-alongs with the media — so that people can see exactly what happens with their ballot after they turn it in or mail it in.
We’ve also helped ensure all county election officials have the resources they need to continue running clean, free, and fair elections — no matter what’s happening in Washington or in the national news.
Our mission is to continue the kinds of elections that the people of Oregon can be proud of — so that we can earn the trust of the voters and shield our democracy from the partisan attacks that have been launched against it in recent years.
That work takes time, patience, and — most importantly — resources, especially in the face of well-funded attacks on our democracy from both national and local figures.
That’s why I’m relying on grassroots support now more than ever.
If you’re proud of the work we’re doing to defend democracy and safeguard elections here in Oregon, I’d be grateful if you could chip in $10 or more to my campaign. The work is only just getting started, and sustained grassroots support is the only we’ll be able to continue making progress on these critical issues. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250708em]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250708em]
Thank you,
Tobias Read
P.S. Don’t forget! The Oregon Political Tax Credit allows you to donate $50 (if you file single) or $100 (if you file joint) to a candidate, PAC, or party, which will be fully credited back as a rebate — so it’s free to donate! For more information, click here. [https://www.oregon.gov/omd/ONG/Documents/SMFS/Personal%20Financial%20Counselor/Political-Tax-Credit.pdf?]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250708em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250708em]
https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR [https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR] https://twitter.com/TobiasRead [https://twitter.com/TobiasRead] https://instagram.com/tobiasreador [https://instagram.com/tobiasreador]

Friends of Tobias Read (5208)
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
United States

Friend, I’ll make this quick:
_**[I’m humbly asking you to chip in $3 to my Speak Up PAC and the Nevada State Democratic Party.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtEEjhuOfSZtU0xhsJqEpvPMf65R0K8fTsVODIcKCa5BcWz0L1sng6cTW8x9MK7WSAXV0f6jSeaHGRCNLUV-UDVhdJpM_PaBr2mCfarwRG-J0dS2Lp3va_RLrSsJrxk7SgA8JT6rEhALvtj0h6BMBMt-t33n77bxW96aKWf90IPoxW_tNQ02QnvNDFoY9iEHL75v16kEtHV93xD_NthUMMf57TSXB8ZoBFFpVU_hvqvuqn_58mF-O1V7cwAYAzvRuehv0k5nqsX1uMBzdWGu61mRJmUV8TpZ-TdXrCQBeYSejAGz0cwOtovofLhBqoIEWcY8NPEbMz_W1xITBZ7T2soSnTXSIbUeTeah_y93Etc38tnC_brFRRTG7dLJWGtXSo/4i0/tHat1PLUTO-jCXDQPtmPDw/h1/h001.o534tb1rCGRgavmcNHzNUJY4MrZlqX0LqORmH2s0Y0E)**_
I know – $3 might not sound like much. Especially when the news is filled with terrifying headlines about Trump and his extremist allies’ latest threats to our democracy.
But I’ve seen the power of grassroots movements. When thousands of Democrats step up together, even with just a few bucks, we can’t be ignored.
Your $3 helps Speak Up PAC support candidates who are committed to fighting for democracy, like NV Dems.
Your $3 helps fund groups putting out hard-hitting ads, organizing in battleground states, and turning out the voters who decide elections, like NV Dems.
Your $3 helps us take on Trump’s lies, expose his allies, and flip the seats that will decide control of Congress.
If just 7,500 supporters chipped in $3 before midnight, we’ll hit our $60,000 goal – and keep this important fight going strong.
_**[So please friend, will you please split a $3 donation to power Speak Up PAC and the Nevada State Democratic Party’s grassroots efforts?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtEEjhuOfSZtU0xhsJqEpvPMf65R0K8fTsVODIcKCa5BcWz0L1sng6cTW8x9MK7WSAXV0f6jSeaHGRCNLUV-UDVhdJpM_PaBr2mCfarwRG-Jz6HKsRTENMGhPgPHWO3gpr7cq3sp3IOdcjNuBK-y4IIJTA6Oun_mFe_QsmqC077JkS56tQ2SKeFaT1plz_lBiNgJbdqV2EXkTjy-XX-GIaPSx9BimFmLwn-eqDn6hypCiZJDWt-Peg1aDozZwXsPOFJNBSqBYall_gfRn0nUI6fBFomolUSYiZo-2fnKjlI1x2NG_i-Rsd6UbkNjX8cd545qgOsUcp3_PhVKHciud6eHBUkCrH2OrV8UQEbnQ9wJ_ko6z1qxyEpRjGywpNv2c4/4i0/tHat1PLUTO-jCXDQPtmPDw/h2/h001.At2F8RWekIKtDeBPR3zNA4m6BcDHGKwzVSswBK8ZbMk)**_

clean_body: | | | | Friend, I’ll make this quick: I know – $3 might not sound like much. Especially when the news is filled with terrifying headlines about Trump and his extremist allies’ latest threats to our democracy. But I’ve seen the power of grassroots movements. When thousands of Democrats step up together, even with just a few bucks, we can’t be ignored. Your $3 helps Speak Up PAC support candidates who are committed to fighting for democracy, like NV Dems. Your $3 helps fund groups putting out hard-hitting ads, organizing in battleground states, and turning out the voters who decide elections, like NV Dems. Your $3 helps us take on Trump’s lies, expose his allies, and flip the seats that will decide control of Congress. If just 7,500 supporters chipped in $3 before midnight, we’ll hit our $60,000 goal – and keep this important fight going strong. Sincere thanks, Stacey The Nevada State Democratic Party fights for progress in the Silver State. We believe that we are stronger together than on our own, and that America succeeds when everyone gets a fair shot, everyone does their fair share, and everyone plays by the same rules. | | Paid for by the Nevada State Democratic Party, NVDEMS.com, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Becca Balint
subject: This is how we’ll turn despair into action.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont**
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111110714/556254207/-785282667?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250708_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTk4MzYzYi0zNzVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RKZ9GY2lwHJOfC3M0iak4NgnqRHH8hEZ3G1XagW0cbc=)
---
Peter, I know that after the “One Big Beautiful Bill” vote, a lot of folks are feeling deflated, worried, angry, or honestly, just overwhelmed. That’s the point. _“Flood the zone”_ isn’t just a phrase; it’s a strategy. If the GOP keeps us off balance and disconnected, we’re more likely to check out, give up, or tune out. And we _cannot_ let that happen. So here’s what I want to say to you today: **Pick one thing.** Is it reproductive freedom? Veterans’ health care? Voting rights? Whatever it is, zero in on it. Get curious. Become an expert on it. Not in a doomscrolling, armchair-pundit way — I mean really _learn_ it. Become the person your friends and family turn to when they want to understand what’s going on. And then, find a way to plug into that issue locally. The truth is, even as a sitting member of Congress with a whole staff, I still get to the end of the day and realize there are bills I didn’t track and news stories I missed. No one can do it all, so the goal isn’t to do everything. It’s to _**do something**_ with focus and purpose. **That’s how we’ll build a winning movement. That’s how we’ll flip the House, block bad bills, and pass the ones that _actually_ lift people up.** **[So if you're with me, and if you're ready to turn that frustration into fuel, I hope you'll consider supporting this work by chipping in today:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111110715/556254208/-1695230582?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250708_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTk4MzYzYi0zNzVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RKZ9GY2lwHJOfC3M0iak4NgnqRHH8hEZ3G1XagW0cbc=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111110716/556254209/-1695230582?express_lane=true&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250708_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTk4MzYzYi0zNzVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RKZ9GY2lwHJOfC3M0iak4NgnqRHH8hEZ3G1XagW0cbc=)

name: Brad Knott
subject: A quick note of thanks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brad Knott for Congress _Copyright © 2025 Knott for Congress_ **Our mailing address is:**
body:
| | | I wanted to write to you personally this morning and sincerely **thank you** for being part of this campaign and for standing with Team Knott. Your support—whether through thoughtful encouragement, strategic insight, or financial investment—means more than I can express. It reminds me daily that I’m not in this fight alone, but backed by principled leaders who care deeply about the future of North Carolina and our country. Together, we’re not only defending conservative values—**we’re shaping the future of our nation.** As we look ahead to 2026, I am confident. Not because the path will be easy, but because of the strength, experience, and conviction of the people standing with us. Thank you for your trust and partnership. I’m grateful to have you in this fight.
---
| | With deep appreciation, Brad Knott
---
| |
---

clean_body: | | | I wanted to write to you personally this morning and sincerely thank you for being part of this campaign and for standing with Team Knott. Your support—whether through thoughtful encouragement, strategic insight, or financial investment—means more than I can express. It reminds me daily that I’m not in this fight alone, but backed by principled leaders who care deeply about the future of North Carolina and our country. Together, we’re not only defending conservative values—we’re shaping the future of our nation. As we look ahead to 2026, I am confident. Not because the path will be easy, but because of the strength, experience, and conviction of the people standing with us. Thank you for your trust and partnership. I’m grateful to have you in this fight. | | With deep appreciation, Brad Knott | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Brad Knott for Congress Copyright © 2025 Knott for Congress Our mailing address is: Brad Knott for Congress PO Box 97275 Raleigh, NC 27624 If you would like to donate online, please visit our website . If you have any suggestions, comments, complaints, or feedback, please send your ideas to mailto:info@bradknott.com.

I’m not looking for a contribution. I’m asking for something just as important -- _**Your endorsement!**_

As the architect of the current Senate Majority that was instrumental in passing President Trump’s Big Beautiful Bill, Democrats are 100% united in defeating me in 2026.

We need to show Democrats we have a united front and we’re ready to defend this seat and our extremely narrow Republican Senate Majority. Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. clean_body: I’m not looking for a contribution. I’m asking for something just as important – Your endorsement! | Fellow American, I’m not looking for a contribution. I’m asking for something just as important -- Your endorsement! As the architect of the current Senate Majority that was instrumental in passing President Trump’s Big Beautiful Bill, Democrats are 100% united in defeating me in 2026. We need to show Democrats we have a united front and we’re ready to defend this seat and our extremely narrow Republican Senate Majority. I need 2,221 more endorsement signatures in the next 48 hours. For America, Steve Daines Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

name: Mazie Hirono
subject: Why your support matters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#

I’ll be blunt, Peter: Donald Trump and Senate Republicans have betrayed the American people. On the campaign trail, they promised Americans that they would lower their costs and make life more affordable. But since the election, they’ve caused nothing but chaos and hardship for working families. They're pushing the largest cut to Medicaid in U.S. history and ripping food assistance away from the people who need it most — all so they can deliver tax breaks for their billionaire donors. And Trump’s efforts to chip away at our democracy are growing by the day. Whether he’s attacking judges or deploying troops to take away Americans’ right to peacefully protest, he’ll do whatever it takes to realize his true goal of unchecked political power. You can bet that he will continue steamrolling the American people to serve their own interests, which is why it’s important for us to fight back. Sustained donations are how we do just that. Monthly donations from folks like you help us build the foundation we need to flip the Senate blue and stop Trump’s extremist agenda in its tracks. **[So I’m asking, Peter: Will you commit to a monthly contribution of any amount today?
