name: Colin Allred
subject: Why I need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111110801/556254642/-570383128?refcode=250708_MFC_Allred_NeedYourHelp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTk4MzYzYi0zNzVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DlxAnQQJ-Sj2q1vwWIWZpXyr8UodzH_F14Y0EJJLMVo=) Hi, it’s Colin Allred. I just launched my campaign for U.S. Senate here in Texas, I’d love to take just a moment to explain to you why I’m running again: **I’m running for Senate to fight for working families, not tax cuts for billionaires.** I’ve heard and seen so much frustration about what’s going on in Washington right now. I know Texans are struggling, but Congress is more focused on cutting taxes for the wealthy than lowering prices for everyday families. That needs to change. **I’m running for Senate to give every kid in Texas and across America the opportunities that were given to me.** I was raised by a single mom who often worked two jobs to make ends meet, and I’ve gone on to play in the NFL, graduate law school, work for President Obama, and make it to Congress. **And I’m running for Senate because we have a real shot to win in Texas** – in fact, the first two polls in this race show me already in the lead! But if we're going to win, we need to build on the historic grassroots movement we created last year. And that means I need you on this team from the very start – early momentum can make or break our campaign. [**That’s why my team and I set a critical goal of raising $1 million in the first few days of my campaign and why I’m personally asking for your help. Can you rush $15 or more right now to be split between me and Seth Moulton? Together we can fight to bring real leadership back to Texas.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111110802/556254643/-570383128?refcode=250708_MFC_Allred_NeedYourHelp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTk4MzYzYi0zNzVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DlxAnQQJ-Sj2q1vwWIWZpXyr8UodzH_F14Y0EJJLMVo=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111110803/556254644/-1643139164?refcode=250708_MFC_Allred_NeedYourHelp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTk4MzYzYi0zNzVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DlxAnQQJ-Sj2q1vwWIWZpXyr8UodzH_F14Y0EJJLMVo=) Grateful to have you in this fight with me, – Colin Allred

clean_body: Only 1% of supporters will receive this honor... Only 1% of State Republican supporters will receive this honor, and you are one of them, Fellow Conservative. State Republicans HQ is proud to award you the Flame of Liberty award in recognition of your unparalleled support in stopping the Democrats' radical agenda. Flame of Liberty is what ignited the Great American Revolution against tyrants across the ocean and continues to light the way of these United States of America. Fellow Conservative, you've stood with us and fanned the Flame of Liberty no matter what has stood in our way. Through your support of State Republicans, we've been able to put America First and fend off the Radical Left. gratitude for all you've done for us is hard to put into words, but we hope granting you our highest honor shows our thankfulness. The Flame of Liberty Award is no small measure, but there is no person more deserving. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111111193/556256104/1328794144?refcode=ea.8e1bcf08-395c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.8e1bcf08-395c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhlMWJjZjA4LTM5NWMtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=W9JAS5jsCRH_CuCPQT5ugPIID13EuBTTrPP4YNPt6Tc=&emci=36f203c8-235c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=8e1bcf08-395c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)
---
Hi there — it’s Jane. I’m excited to personally invite you to a special virtual event this Thursday, July 10th, in support of Adelita Grijalva, one of our JanePAC-endorsed climate champions who needs our help to WIN! [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111111194/556256105/448295322?refcode=em_JPC_OTH_Adelitaeventemail1_070825&ms=ea.8e1bcf08-395c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhlMWJjZjA4LTM5NWMtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=W9JAS5jsCRH_CuCPQT5ugPIID13EuBTTrPP4YNPt6Tc=) 📅 **Date: Thursday, July 10
⏰ Time: 5:30 PM PT / 8:30 PM ET
📍 Where: Online (Zoom link provided after RSVP)
🎟️ Ticket: Just $5 for entry (every penny goes to Adelita's campaign)** | [**🎟️ GET YOUR TICKET →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111111195/556256106/448295322?refcode=em_JPC_OTH_Adelitaeventemail1_070825&ms=ea.8e1bcf08-395c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhlMWJjZjA4LTM5NWMtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=W9JAS5jsCRH_CuCPQT5ugPIID13EuBTTrPP4YNPt6Tc=)
---
On July 15th, Adelita faces a competitive Democratic primary for Arizona's 7th Congressional District, and it's one of the most consequential races in the nation right now.
Adelita’s running to become the first Latina ever elected to Congress from Arizona. But she’s not just running to make history — she’s running to make a difference.
Her roots run deep in Southern Arizona. She grew up in Tucson, graduated from the University of Arizona, and has spent her life fighting for the very community she's now running to represent in Congress.
She’s also the proud daughter of Raúl Grijalva — one of Congress’s most steadfast progressive champions for working people and the planet. Now, at a time when Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans are attacking everything from the air we breathe to the future of Social Security, Adelita isn’t just continuing her father’s legacy — she’s forging her own, with the same fierce conviction and deep love for her community.
**But here's the reality: Primary elections often have low voter turnout, and they’re frequently decided by just a few votes. Losing this race means losing a critical voice for climate action in Congress, which is why I’m giving it my ALL.**
**[Join me, Lily Tomlin, and Adelita on Thursday night for a powerful conversation about climate leadership and Adelita's fight against Big Oil. Every contribution from this event helps her campaign reach undecided voters in these final days >>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111111196/556256107/448295322?refcode=em_JPC_OTH_Adelitaeventemail1_070825&ms=ea.8e1bcf08-395c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhlMWJjZjA4LTM5NWMtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=W9JAS5jsCRH_CuCPQT5ugPIID13EuBTTrPP4YNPt6Tc=)**
We can't afford to lose races like this. Not when the stakes are this high. Not when we have a candidate this good.
[**🎟️ GET YOUR TICKET →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111111197/556256108/448295322?refcode=em_JPC_OTH_Adelitaeventemail1_070825&ms=ea.8e1bcf08-395c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhlMWJjZjA4LTM5NWMtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=W9JAS5jsCRH_CuCPQT5ugPIID13EuBTTrPP4YNPt6Tc=)
---
See you Thursday night!
xx Jane

name: Nellie Pou HQ
subject: A review of June:
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP61/1/115406/images/pout-header-3.png]

Team,

Nellie was focused on delivering for New Jersey last month — as she has been each of the last six months since she took office. Here's what we got up to:

* Nellie fought tooth and nail to try to eliminate the Congressional Republican cap on state and local tax deduction, which is so important to New Jersey localities and taxpayers.

* Nellie was recognized by the NJ State AFL-CIO for her record of service on behalf of working Americans.

* Nellie fought for new funding for the National Firefighter Cancer Registry to make sure our firefighters get the care and support they deserve for keeping our communities safe.

* Hosted a roundtable of local community groups to understand how massive budget cuts planned by this administration would impact our neighbors.

We also officially welcomed Morghan Cyr as Nellie's Campaign Manager. We're excited to continue growing our campaign from the ground up so we can put Nellie in the best possible position to protect her seat and keep on delivering for working families. That's all made possible because of support you've given — your time, your donations — all make a huge difference.

Summertime is notoriously slow for fundraising, so if you'd like to help us get a head start on our July fundraising goals, you can give at this link. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em?refcode&=250708_hq_recap_l1]

Thank you.

Nellie Pou HQ
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP61/1/115406/images/pou_headshot_crop.jpg]

About Nellie Pou
Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same.
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=b4627794-3a5c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c] Give Monthly [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em?recurring=true&refcode=footermonthly&refcode2=b4627794-3a5c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c]
Follow Nellie
https://x.com/NelliePou [https://x.com/NelliePou] https://www.facebook.com/senatorpou/ [https://www.facebook.com/senatorpou/] https://www.instagram.com/congresswomannelliepou/ [https://www.instagram.com/congresswomannelliepou/]

As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same. Donate Now [] Give Monthly [] Follow Nellie [] [] [] Checks may also be mailed to: Nellie Pou for Congress - PO BOX 2696, Paterson, NJ, 07509 Paid for by Nellie Pou for Congress Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so here [] . Nellie Pou for Congress PO Box 2696 Paterson, NJ 07509 United States

body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23195%2E4449941%2EelvU5q) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23195%2E4449941%2EelvU5q) Friend, we need you to sign our petition urging Congress to make Washington, D.C. a state before 11:59PM. [**Here's why:**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/63980?t=3&akid=23195%2E4449941%2EelvU5q) | [ALREADY CONVINCED? SIGN ON NOW! >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/63980?t=4&akid=23195%2E4449941%2EelvU5q)
---

1\. **Pete Buttigieg, Jamie Raskin, Jasmine Crockett, Joe Biden,** and **Elizabeth Warren** all want Washington, D.C. to become the 51st STATE!
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/63980?t=5&akid=23195%2E4449941%2EelvU5q)
2\. DC has a larger population than Vermont and Wyoming but they have absolutely 0 voting representation in Congress... _It’s disgusting._

3\. [If D.C. became the 51st state, 700,000 Americans would get representation in Congress + we’d gain 2 more Democratic Senators!](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/63980?t=6&akid=23195%2E4449941%2EelvU5q)

4\. Donald Trump and his MAGA cronies HATE the idea of D.C. becoming a state – it would crush their far-right agenda!!
[**We’re rushing to gather 50,000 signatures from Americans across the country urging Congress to make D.C. the 51st state. If we hit our goal, Congress won’t be able to ignore it!!**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/63980?t=7&akid=23195%2E4449941%2EelvU5q)
[SIGN ON NOW >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/63980?t=8&akid=23195%2E4449941%2EelvU5q)

subject: re: Senator Tuberville’s racist nonsense

body:
These far-right A-holes are obsessed with making despicable attacks against Ilhan because they hate everything she represents.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1702%2E791427%2ENnNTtv)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-july25.Ih7rVK&refcode=em250708-1-nor&t=2&akid=1702%2E791427%2ENnNTtv)
**First:** Elon Musk tweeted to his 200 million followers on Twitter that Ilhan is a “major grifter” who “hates America”, putting a MAGA target on her back.
**Then:** Republican Rep. Brandon Gill sent around a petition to his supporters, asking them to sign on to deport Ilhan out of the country.
**Now:** This week, Republican Senator Tommy Tuberville sent an email asking people to help him “raise enough money to buy Ilhan Omar a one-way ticket from Minnesota to Somalia.”
Friend — These far-right A-holes are obsessed with making despicable attacks against Ilhan because they hate everything she represents.
They want a country with less diversity and literal walls to keep people out. Ilhan represents the American dream and the melting pot that makes America great.
They want to funnel more money and handouts to the mega-rich. Ilhan wants to lift up the working class and ensure everyone can prosper.
They want to push a far-right Christian Nationalist agenda on the American people. Ilhan fights for an open society where everyone is free to be themselves no matter their race, religion, age, sex, or sexual orientation.
This isn’t the first time Ilhan has been attacked like this and it certainly won’t be the last. We are asking for your help to counter this racist nonsense by making our campaign and our movement stronger than ever with a huge wave of donations today.
[**Chip in $5 or whatever you can afford today to send a message that thousands of grassroots supporters have Ilhan’s back as she takes on the far-right. Our solidarity is stronger than their hate, and we will never stop fighting for a better future for all of us.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-july25.Ih7rVK&refcode=em250708-1-nor&t=3&akid=1702%2E791427%2ENnNTtv)**

Now: This week, Republican Senator Tommy Tuberville sent an email asking people to help him “raise enough money to buy Ilhan Omar a one-way ticket from Minnesota to Somalia.” Friend — These far-right A-holes are obsessed with making despicable attacks against Ilhan because they hate everything she represents. They want a country with less diversity and literal walls to keep people out. Ilhan represents the American dream and the melting pot that makes America great. They want to funnel more money and handouts to the mega-rich. Ilhan wants to lift up the working class and ensure everyone can prosper. They want to push a far-right Christian Nationalist agenda on the American people. Ilhan fights for an open society where everyone is free to be themselves no matter their race, religion, age, sex, or sexual orientation. This isn’t the first time Ilhan has been attacked like this and it certainly won’t be the last. We are asking for your help to counter this racist nonsense by making our campaign and our movement stronger than ever with a huge wave of donations today. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | In solidarity, Team Ilhan Omar PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS

clean_body: | The Democrat’s fight to retake one of California’s most flippable House districts just hit a breaking point. Republican David Valadao -- the incumbent in California’s 22nd District -- shocked even members of his own party by voting for Trump’s so-called “Better Budget Balance” Act, which slashes Medicaid by nearly $1 trillion. = Nearly 70% of Valadao’s district relies on Medicaid today. Despite repeated promises to his voters that he’d never vote for cuts to the program, he backed it anyway. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Voters are furious, and this race has emerged as ground zero in the fight to defend health care access and defeat the GOP’s extremist, corporate-first agenda. The good news is that Valadao’s district is one of the most flippable in the country. It’s swung for Democrats in the past, and 2026 represents the best shot we’ve ever had to oust Valadao for good. Democrat Randy Villegas, a 30-year-old college professor and son of immigrants, is running to unseat Valadao -- and he’s not taking a dime from corporate PACs. Randy has deep roots in the Central Valley, a strong local base of support, and a real shot at flipping this seat. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = \- California Election Update | With deep ties to our community and a lifelong commitment to justice and equity, Randy is running for Congress in California’s 22nd District to bring bold, compassionate leadership to Washington. To support Randy's campaign = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Paid for by Villegas for Congress Villegas for Congress PO Box 1346 Visalia, CA 93279 United States

# **[NEW PODCAST EPISODE OUT NOW!](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=227987fa58&e=5bd167f239)**

---

_**Is This Really Who We Are?**_
**Alligator Alcatraz and Trump's Big Bill**

The Latino Vote Podcast Season 2025 Episode 21
| Mike Madrid unpacks the jaw-dropping implications of the newly passed**federal budget** — a bill that dramatically **expands ICE and Border Patrol** into what he calls a “paramilitary operation.” From scenes of federal agents detaining U.S. citizens in churches and Home Depots to the chilling rhetoric of “Alligator Alcatraz,” this episode explores how cruelty has become policy — and whether it has always been part of the American mythos.
---
|
---
| | | |
**Today's Headlines:**

[At CPAC Latino, MAGA propaganda fell flat with the sophisticated business crowd](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=3cb98d1052&e=5bd167f239) By: KJZZ

[Democrats might be ‘overthinking’ strategy to recapture voters](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=b8663a7a46&e=5bd167f239) By: The Hill

[Latino activists adopt “smartphone journalism” as a witness strategy to ICE’s unchecked state power](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=283faefe85&e=5bd167f239) By: MILWAUKEE INDEPENDENT

[The Gender Gap That Ate the Democrats](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=d0d37be0be&e=5bd167f239) By: The New York Times

[‘Joy turned into shame’: California’s Latino Caucus agonized over slashing immigrant health care](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=6aa2475def&e=5bd167f239) By: CalMatters

¡Bienvenidos Todos!
The Latino Vote Podcast brings together the most sophisticated Latino voices in the country to provide you with insightful, accurate, unbiased, and timely information relating to the voting patterns and inclinations of the Nation’s Hispanics.

# [**ORDER
THE LATINO CENTURY**](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=b1a6f22781&e=5bd167f239)
[](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=eb5dd586bb&e=5bd167f239)

An insightful investigation of how and why the two major political parties have failed to appeal to the Latino vote—the second largest ethnic voting group in the country—and the impact it will have on American democracy and politics for decades to come.
[**ORDER IT ON AMAZON**](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=a73de747e9&e=5bd167f239)

name: David Hogg
subject: This is enraging, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
This is no joke.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250708-1&t=1&akid=2359%2E587540%2EOdWQpn)
Peter, it is infuriating to watch the Trump administration wreak havoc on our government and enact their dangerous, destructive agenda.
We need to be taking pages out of Mitch McConnell’s playbook that he used for years to stop Obama, to stop Biden, and prevent Democrats from passing our agenda. Everything has to be on the table to stop and slow Trump.
On top of that, we need to be organizing against vulnerable Republicans and turning the screws on them. We have to make their lives as painful as possible and line up the incentives for them to oppose Trump.
And finally we have to look ahead to upcoming elections and get behind people that are filled with rage over Trump’s actions and have a burning fire within them to stop Trump and fight aggressively for a vision of this country that allows us to have more affordable housing, better healthcare, and provides some real economic opportunity and security.
That’s where we come in.
**[Can you pitch in $5 to power our mission to elect the next generation of leaders?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250708_1_infuriating?refcode=em20250708-2359&amount=5&refcode2=2359_587540_OdWQpn&akid=2359%2E587540%2EOdWQpn)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250708_1_infuriating?amount=5&refcode=em20250708-2359&refcode2=2359_587540_OdWQpn&akid=2359%2E587540%2EOdWQpn)**
This is no joke. _Every single day counts in the fight ahead._
**Here’s the truth:** The GOP is already gearing up for the next fight. If we don’t keep our fundraising on track, the billionaires and corporate elite will keep pouring money into the Republican right-wing agenda while Democrats and progressives are left scrambling.
**But we’re not going to let that happen.** We may not have the special interests on our side, but I know that the grassroots can be even more powerful.
**We need leaders who fight for working families, voting rights, and climate justice. Leaders who will not back down when things get tough.**
That’s exactly why Leaders We Deserve exists. Now, we need your help to make sure we can keep electing the young, progressive leaders we deserve.
**[Can you chip in $5 right now to help power our game-changing work?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250708_1_infuriating?refcode=em20250708-2359&amount=5&refcode2=2359_587540_OdWQpn&akid=2359%2E587540%2EOdWQpn)**
Thank you for being part of this movement,
David Hogg
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250708-1&t=2&refcode2=2359_587540_OdWQpn&akid=2359%2E587540%2EOdWQpn)**

Everything has to be on the table to stop and slow Trump. On top of that, we need to be organizing against vulnerable Republicans and turning the screws on them. We have to make their lives as painful as possible and line up the incentives for them to oppose Trump. And finally we have to look ahead to upcoming elections and get behind people that are filled with rage over Trump’s actions and have a burning fire within them to stop Trump and fight aggressively for a vision of this country that allows us to have more affordable housing, better healthcare, and provides some real economic opportunity and security. That’s where we come in. This is no joke. Every single day counts in the fight ahead. Here’s the truth: The GOP is already gearing up for the next fight. If we don’t keep our fundraising on track, the billionaires and corporate elite will keep pouring money into the Republican right-wing agenda while Democrats and progressives are left scrambling. But we’re not going to let that happen. We may not have the special interests on our side, but I know that the grassroots can be even more powerful. We need leaders who fight for working families, voting rights, and climate justice. Leaders who will not back down when things get tough. That’s exactly why Leaders We Deserve exists. Now, we need your help to make sure we can keep electing the young, progressive leaders we deserve. Thank you for being part of this movement, David Hogg Leaders We Deserve

Peter,

Last week, Republicans in Congress voted to kick millions of Americans off their Medicaid and SNAP benefits. Constituents across the country begged their leaders not to pass this bill. Doctors, nurses, and healthcare workers preached about what these cuts would do for their jobs and for the health of their communities.

Plenty of Republicans in Congress spoke out about this bill too, and the devastating effects it will have in rural areas across America. But those same Republicans who were thinking of voting “no” sat down with President Trump, got some signed merch and MAGA hats, and then went back to the Halls of Congress to pass Trump’s tax cuts for wealthy Americans.

Since the passage of Trump’s “Big, Ugly Bill,” more and more Republicans are talking about the concerns they have about how these cuts will affect their districts and their states. They fear what these cuts will do to rural hospitals in their states. They fear their people will go hungry without SNAP benefits, and that families will lose jobs when hospitals close. And now, Republicans are saying this vote could cost them the House Majority. _**As it should.**_

What is Congress if it doesn’t listen to the people? One GOP representative said it best: “If you don’t keep the voters right with you, you’re going to awaken to a bad, bad, bad day.”

**Let’s prove the GOP right, Peter.** Let’s build the foundation and resources we need right now to give them a very bad day the morning after Election Day.

clean_body: Peter, Last week, Republicans in Congress voted to kick millions of Americans off their Medicaid and SNAP benefits. Constituents across the country begged their leaders not to pass this bill. Doctors, nurses, and healthcare workers preached about what these cuts would do for their jobs and for the health of their communities. Plenty of Republicans in Congress spoke out about this bill too, and the devastating effects it will have in rural areas across America. But those same Republicans who were thinking of voting “no” sat down with President Trump, got some signed merch and MAGA hats, and then went back to the Halls of Congress to pass Trump’s tax cuts for wealthy Americans. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Since the passage of Trump’s “Big, Ugly Bill,” more and more Republicans are talking about the concerns they have about how these cuts will affect their districts and their states. They fear what these cuts will do to rural hospitals in their states. They fear their people will go hungry without SNAP benefits, and that families will lose jobs when hospitals close. And now, Republicans are saying this vote could cost them the House Majority. As it should. What is Congress if it doesn’t listen to the people? One GOP representative said it best: “If you don’t keep the voters right with you, you’re going to awaken to a bad, bad, bad day.” Let’s prove the GOP right, Peter. Let’s build the foundation and resources we need right now to give them a very bad day the morning after Election Day. = – Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat. = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: $800K in TV attacks -- more than any other Democrat.
body:
|
#
I'm furious.

Last Thursday, House Republicans passed the most dangerous budget we've seen in decades. They cut $800 billion from Medicaid, devastating working families and seniors in mid-Michigan.

We’re talking about people being kicked off their care. Rural hospitals forced to close. Nursing homes shutting their doors. It’s not just reckless -- it’s cruel. I voted “hell no.”

**And now I’m paying the price for speaking out.**

In just the past month, Donald Trump’s and Mike Johnson’s super PACs have spent $800,000 attacking me -- I'm facing more TV attacks than any other House Democrat in the country.

**Let that sink in, folks. I am the most targeted House Democrat in America right now. That may sound surprising, but it's the truth.**

Why? Because I’m raising the alarm about how their agenda will impact working families, and because they know flipping MI-08 is crucial to locking in a permanent majority.

MI-08 is now ground zero in the fight against the MAGA agenda and for the future of working families. The scale and intensity of their attacks make it crystal clear: they’re betting big on taking this seat.

[**And I’m betting big on you. We set an urgent fundraising goal -- not just to fight back, but to send a message that we reject these cruel cuts and won’t let the GOP get away with attacking me for standing up to them. name: New Dems
subject: House GOP passes the worst bill for working families in modern history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund
body:
New Dems are fighting back! Will you step up and join us?

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111113671/556265041/-2140435400?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTc2NzhmYy00MTVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kd5GzvBpc324lKizM8CPf-aIv2VbDhwQKeKnzY35zlE=)
---
**Last week, House Republicans passed what is, without question, one of the most damaging pieces of legislation for working families in modern American history:** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111113672/556265042/-93286155?amount=10&refcode=NDCAF_20250708_EMDF_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTc2NzhmYy00MTVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kd5GzvBpc324lKizM8CPf-aIv2VbDhwQKeKnzY35zlE=)** | **[CHIP IN $10 TO ELECT A NEW DEM MAJORITY »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111113673/556265043/-93286155?amount=10&refcode=NDCAF_20250708_EMDF_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTc2NzhmYy00MTVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kd5GzvBpc324lKizM8CPf-aIv2VbDhwQKeKnzY35zlE=)**
---
For months, New Dems have been fighting alongside the American people to stop this reckless legislation.

**But the Republican majority ignored working families,** choosing instead to gut critical programs and hand out massive tax breaks to billionaires.
This bill will **rip away healthcare** away from 17 million Americans,

**Food assistance** from tens of millions more,

And give trillions in **tax breaks to the already ultra-wealthy** like Jeff Bezos and Elon Musk, **while raising prices on everything from electricity to groceries and destroying millions of jobs.**
---
The GOP made their priorities clear: siding with Trump and his billionaire backers over the people they were elected to serve.

**But this fight isn’t over.** New Dems are mobilizing, and we need your support to take back the House and stop their dangerous agenda in its tracks.

clean_body: New Dems are fighting back! Will you step up and join us? | = Last week, House Republicans passed what is, without question, one of the most damaging pieces of legislation for working families in modern American history: = | = For months, New Dems have been fighting alongside the American people to stop this reckless legislation. But the Republican majority ignored working families, choosing instead to gut critical programs and hand out massive tax breaks to billionaires. This bill will rip away healthcare away from 17 million Americans, Food assistance from tens of millions more, And give trillions in tax breaks to the already ultra-wealthy like Jeff Bezos and Elon Musk, while raising prices on everything from electricity to groceries and destroying millions of jobs. The GOP made their priorities clear: siding with Trump and his billionaire backers over the people they were elected to serve. But this fight isn’t over. name: Team Truth to Power
subject: We need to hold them accountable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39872%2E3422442%2EGiWhzD)
Dear Peter,
Last week, President Trump signed his “Big Beautiful Bill” into law, which passed Congress with only Republican votes.
This new law is going to roll back progress on climate action, kick millions of Americans off their health insurance, and take food away from families in need—all to give tax cuts to the ultra wealthy. It’s despicable.
Congressional Republicans are counting on Americans forgetting or ignoring their bad votes next November. We won’t let them.
**Democrats only need to flip _three_ seats to retake the House.** The work starts now to recruit, support, and elect new leaders, who will fight for what working families need, not what billionaires want.
This is core to Truth to Power’s mission. We only endorse candidates who commit to fighting for the public interest, not special interests or their own self interest.
**[We reject corporate donations, so 100% of our work is powered by folks like you. Will you chip in $5 or whatever you can today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_ttp_20250708_1_ak?refcode=em20250708-39872&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39872_3422442_GiWhzD&akid=39872%2E3422442%2EGiWhzD)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_ttp_20250708_1_ak?refcode=em20250708-39872&refcode2=39872_3422442_GiWhzD&akid=39872%2E3422442%2EGiWhzD)
Thanks for being in this movement,
Team TTP

Former U.S. Congresswoman Katie Porter founded Truth to Power to support the campaigns of her fellow Democrats. Truth to Power supports candidates who will stand up to Donald Trump, fight to lower costs, and protect the environment. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/truth-to-power-1?refcode=em20250708-39872&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=39872_3422442_GiWhzD&akid=39872%2E3422442%2EGiWhzD)**
---
Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [**you can do so here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-ttp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=39872%2E3422442%2EGiWhzD).

To contribute via check, please address to: Truth to Power PAC, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

name: Sarah McBride
subject: Helping us plan ahead with confidence
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
I’m counting on friends and neighbors like you to keep this campaign going.
#
Hi friend,
If there’s one thing I’ve learned from my time in public service, it’s that the most meaningful change happens when people show up, stick with it, and put in the work to make change happen together.
**The same thing is true of campaigns, which is why I’m reaching out to ask you to[start a monthly recurring donation to my campaign today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250708-1?refcode=em20250708-2165&recurring=true&refcode2=2165_21716_kNpERi&akid=2165%2E21716%2EkNpERi)**
With the news cycle moving faster than ever, monthly donations help my team and I plan ahead with confidence. When we know that we’ve got recurring donations coming in each month, we can make smarter decisions — about how many organizers to hire, how much to spend on advertising, and more — without the guesswork.
And because we’re a grassroots-powered campaign, I’m counting on friends and neighbors like you to keep us going.
**I know that a few dollars a month might not feel like a big deal. But when enough people pitch in $5, $20, or even $50 at a time each month, it adds up to make a powerful difference.**
[**So if you’re ready to be a part of this ongoing movement and keep me focused on fighting for Delaware in Congress, please start a recurring donation of any amount you can today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250708-1?refcode=em20250708-2165&recurring=true&refcode2=2165_21716_kNpERi&akid=2165%2E21716%2EkNpERi)
**[Start A Recurring Donation Now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250708-1?refcode=em20250708-2165&recurring=true&refcode2=2165_21716_kNpERi&akid=2165%2E21716%2EkNpERi)**
In gratitude,
Sarah
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20250708-1&t=1&refcode2=2165_21716_kNpERi&akid=2165%2E21716%2EkNpERi)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=2165%2E21716%2EkNpERi)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=2165%2E21716%2EkNpERi)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2165%2E21716%2EkNpERi)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

name: Sen Rick Scott
subject: First, he trained leaders. Then he defended them in the Senate. Now he’s ready to lead Alabama
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE FOR GOVERNOR, INC
body:
Senator Rick Scott backs Coach Tuberville for Governor -- a proven defender of America's veterans and service members.
| [ ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=b9cc37dd7a2a4d889f7a36e6768abe66&_e=mMU3cEH7DsMZvbXKX8beeVDeAQGGf1VIDwZQUK-J_4GWKgHidk4soYZrcvPQkLXaX0Tj0AI5nJpKJRO3hxCIVJ6phbgZL7-7c3MVZcKgE-ayZ-U2qAm66dYOyhIRs_oxwCU7etoFp5pUmYbap3hNBIb-ix0eOUPXyGFG5GphbUN3ThO-ZazM764UB0cl5fKpyWBatv1jpjZIglc1T5EYQOYc9K6LYguYDpnpA8QWLZys5iRi_lemXSRrxhb7nwqLeFqsfDHGPQs-3RZtd_LY4afJYtn00SLWYRDHyiamXi-oV0MaZqm4JQ__KsWVx3qW9gZ1V_lWj7aAQRonjyVX2hoM7gwQE1QYGDarw4jmBBUPlHDOLxj-m0258VEw5mS105Y66FsPoDHqpad61Hgp47z7Xllcv9UEabwLcqdsPEd1qCaxzJ1aED5GXvt4QLE5bQyBotZq7lBZqq0Oy2jgVinVItXgJMIixHiusCFsTvvAGQZ2EdzyokMP_2NIOO7cq1WrvQ-NjklwGMbdINjrW-JUpspoocpsGBuGDp2VIHz_QRMBrI1Ni7AMIB34_DCI)
---
Peter,

**FIRST** \- Coach Tommy Tuberville helped shape future leaders. As a college football coach, he mentored young men -- many of whom went on to serve our country in uniform. He taught _discipline, loyalty, and teamwork_ -- values every veteran recognizes.

**THEN** \- when he got to the U.S. Senate, Coach Tuberville became one of the most **outspoken defenders of our veterans and active-duty service members.**

He stood up to Joe Biden's Pentagon. He demanded that promotions be based on merit -- not ideology -- and he fought to ensure the military stayed focused on defending our nation, **not woke politics.**

I stood with him in those fights. Because like me, Coach Tuberville believes the military is sacred -- and our veterans deserve better.

**NOW** \- Coach is ready to bring that same courage and commitment home as the next **Governor of Alabama.**

**And I 'm proud to endorse him.

** **[If you’re a veteran — or if you simply believe America must do more to honor those who’ve served — Coach Tuberville is the leader Alabama needs.

](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=b9cc37dd7a2a4d889f7a36e6768abe66&_e=mMU3cEH7DsMZvbXKX8beeVDeAQGGf1VIDwZQUK-J_4GWKgHidk4soYZrcvPQkLXaX0Tj0AI5nJpKJRO3hxCIVJ6phbgZL7-7c3MVZcKgE-ayZ-U2qAm66dYOyhIRs_oxwCU7etoFp5pUmYbap3hNBFH6OApOnCGVVYGxWXEbNeB0F7CbACtGMQRFkTRzjb6b_qGvNM3DS_EPXyqKziEH4BUVH4cmeK6-5rie1QqATfV5djJGvRTbnm30M-Qz931yZGUqe7F1TPypLqXG5QhLoHn-Pg4oyzvuerWR8QXvzUvygrxumg_-vv_QtYOCPX7stnNvedfy1BG_BpLlf9Ey2RwET1EK7DUal9gpumHdVbz2VV1wTVa2atf8yshn9z4vuc7lVMdIcMRYl5FtZ7Q_1w5yu_PvYy3xCQYTitxR-z1Zf_Mb7Bm8PoCxVeGBJ6abk4D4s0H2RndlAoLymbYscX655i3WwL-pGTyN2La0kVovGznAOHlwSG_MAjJCeYvOVYEt9VGGWCWOSIw_V6EztwVzRZMH6C0A5W64zzQrtQk%3D)** **[Pitch in now to help send Coach Tuberville to Montgomery and put veterans first.

](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=b9cc37dd7a2a4d889f7a36e6768abe66&_e=mMU3cEH7DsMZvbXKX8beeVDeAQGGf1VIDwZQUK-J_4GWKgHidk4soYZrcvPQkLXaX0Tj0AI5nJpKJRO3hxCIVJ6phbgZL7-7c3MVZcKgE-ayZ-U2qAm66dYOyhIRs_oxwCU7etoFp5pUmYbap3hNBFH6OApOnCGVVYGxWXEbNeB0F7CbACtGMQRFkTRzjb6b-G1Y2w8i8vR2edQemepJsLT_WH8uD_XrZgu-TeKKQh_rfnNs1AF5KOhkVp8LgGB_GODNMREoZUO0-l0saqBtWCQHtDhCxkRVVazybHKWHi7ADEhvkvM6h-mXp9dgfL4Nys56EVgWLfcipAmKawgY7SFjfm72KKEVeoLC80XhGzjIJ_wjaNcZ0dTE_-R7DjbrjHNFor_X_VV59aGKcMfIKopDBuDMWcfjDGHHEGtBMbnBanKmwv310ll70HhieCtaUCw8G_GDxR81uwRJM-CGnFnMEcl2Uey-WJ0UV5xigCoPCErf1L2CLugAap73NvlBzBspHBpVZahYv0YzZvcOloyzHVkW_iWISFLY0cY8ZcY%3D)** The Left would rather tear down our military than rebuild it. Coach Tuberville fought back. Now let's help him fight -- and win -- this next battle.

For service and country,
**Senator Rick Scott
** U.S. Senator, Florida
Former Governor of Florida
Veteran, U.S. Navy

clean_body: Senator Rick Scott backs Coach Tuberville for Governor -- a proven defender of America's veterans and service members. | Peter, FIRST \- Coach Tommy Tuberville helped shape future leaders. As a college football coach, he mentored young men -- many of whom went on to serve our country in uniform. He taught discipline, loyalty, and teamwork -- values every veteran recognizes. THEN \- when he got to the U.S. Senate, Coach Tuberville became one of the most outspoken defenders of our veterans and active-duty service members. He stood up to Joe Biden's Pentagon. He demanded that promotions be based on merit -- not ideology -- and he fought to ensure the military stayed focused on defending our nation, not woke politics. I stood with him in those fights. Because like me, Coach Tuberville believes the military is sacred -- and our veterans deserve better. NOW \- Coach is ready to bring that same courage and commitment home as the next Governor of Alabama. And I 'm proud to endorse him. The Left would rather tear down our military than rebuild it. Coach Tuberville fought back. Now let's help him fight -- and win -- this next battle. For service and country, Senator Rick Scott U.S. Senator, Florida Former Governor of Florida Veteran, U.S. Navy | PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE FOR GOVERNOR, INC PO Box 43124 Birmingham, AL 35243 Copyright (C) 2025 Tuberville for Governor, Inc, All rights reserved.

**Most presidencies _have_ scandals. Joe Biden's presidency _was_ a scandal.** That's the explosive revelation from a recent hearing chaired by conservative Senator**Eric Schmitt**(R-MO), this hearing exposed a constitutional crisis that should outrage every American. For four years, Biden routinely forgot the names of senior advisors and foreign leaders. He asked about deceased friends as if they were still alive. He froze up and drifted off during critical public appearances. He required stabilizing shoes because he kept falling down. And for four years, Democrats and their allies orchestrated a massive cover-up. Senator Schmitt played a damning video montage of senior Democrats brazenly lying about Biden's mental fitness. But the lying was just the beginning. The hearing revealed the outrageous abuse of President Biden's "autopen" signature machine. _A majority_ of Biden's official documents were never actually signed by the president himself. The Justice Department is now reviewing over 1,200 "signed" documents to determine if they're even legally valid. Biden's staff used the autopen even when he was physically present in Washington, D.C. Why? Because this wasn't about Biden's convenience — it was about whoever was really _calling the shots_ behind the scenes. The evidence was so damning that Judiciary Committee Democrats literally _ran away_ from the hearing room rather than face the truth. **Every Biden Policy May Be Illegal** **All of Biden's unconstitutional executive orders, his crony policies, his corrupt family pardons — they may all be completely illegal. The entire administration appears to have been a criminal conspiracy from day one.** Conservative senators didn't back down. Senator **Josh Hawley** (R-MO) demanded investigations into who was controlling the autopen. Senator **Ted Cruz** (R-TX) exposed how autopen usage suspiciously increased every year of Biden's presidency. Senator **Ashley Moody** (R-FL) connected this constitutional crisis to real-world disasters: the border invasion, the crime wave, the protection of criminals and terrorists. **We Need More Fighters in 2026** The senators who stood up during this hearing — who refused to let this scandal be buried — are exactly the kind of conservatives we need more of in Washington. That's why the Senate Conservatives Fund is going ALL-IN to support proven fighters in 2026. **Ashley Moody** is running for Senate in Florida. CNN's Kaitlan Collins **[pressed President Donald Trump](https://substack.com/redirect/872a3bb1-6e2a-4e46-b3a6-5f77105a9f0e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on if he was "second guessing" any of the DOGE cuts that have been made to parts of the federal government during a press conference, Tuesday.
His response was loud and clear...
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/872a3bb1-6e2a-4e46-b3a6-5f77105a9f0e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/872a3bb1-6e2a-4e46-b3a6-5f77105a9f0e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Trump firmly stood by DOGE's actions, saying that he has no regrets and highlighting the money that was saved and the frivolousness of the programs affected by the cuts.
**["No, we cut hundreds of billions of dollars,"](https://substack.com/redirect/872a3bb1-6e2a-4e46-b3a6-5f77105a9f0e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** the president said. "We saved a lot of money,... it was dramatic and important."
He then turned to Environmental Administrator Lee Zeldin to expound on her question. "The Biden EPI gave $50 million dollars to a group called Climate Justice Alliance, they say climate justice runs through a 'free Palestine.' We say that if you're going to spend a dollar on remediating an environmental issue, then spend a dollar on remediating an environmental issue!" Zeldin said.
**["Maybe its a bad day for all those well connected Democrats](https://substack.com/redirect/872a3bb1-6e2a-4e46-b3a6-5f77105a9f0e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** getting paid off, but you know what, God bless America!" Zeldin concluded his answer.
Watch the must-see MAGA moment here:
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/872a3bb1-6e2a-4e46-b3a6-5f77105a9f0e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

In a company-wide memo, he announced the formation of Meta Superintelligence Labs, a new division that will require "unprecedented computational resources" and "planetary-scale data centers" to achieve its goal.
But buried in the announcement is a critical vulnerability: the "colossal energy requirements" needed to fuel this ambition.1
Our nation's power grid is already struggling.1 **[Many experts warn it may not handle AI's growing power needs.1](https://substack.com/redirect/9fd1a236-bcf5-4186-93b5-450647418e23?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
"We need _double_ the energy we currently have in the U.S. for AI to be as big as we want." -- President of the United States, Donald Trump, World Economic Forum, Jan 2025.5
This is where Next Thing Technologies comes in. They believe they are building the power source for the superintelligence race with their revolutionary sodium-ion batteries.1
This technology could be the key to unlocking the future of AI, offering a safer, more scalable, and more abundant energy source than lithium.1

# California REJECTS Title IX compliance to keep men out of women's sports, despite Newsom's 'unfair' claims
**[The state of California rejected a resolution agreement](https://substack.com/redirect/459f5d2f-87b8-40da-a29a-37c6c15e0296?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** from the Trump administration to comply with federal Title IX requirements aimed at keeping biological males out of women's sports.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/459f5d2f-87b8-40da-a29a-37c6c15e0296?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **The California Interscholastic Federation (CIF)** and California Department of Education (CDE) refused to sign the agreement after the U.S. Department of Education's Office for Civil Rights found the state in violation of Title IX.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b30875ce-e356-44de-9ef0-ee120c4a60f1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **In March, Governor Gavin Newsom acknowledged on his podcast** that allowing males in women's sports is "deeply unfair," but state agencies continued current policies despite the federal investigation.
* **" Turns out Gov. Newsom's acknowledgment that 'it's an issue of fairness' **was empty political grandstanding," Education Secretary Linda McMahon posted on X, warning of possible legal action.
* **This rejection comes as California is under continued scrutiny** for its handling of the recent LA anti-ICE riots, most of which continue to wreak havoc on the city despite leadership stating otherwise.

* * *
# Socialist NYC mayoral candidate visits mosque that praises Hamas
Socialist NYC nominee Zohran Mamdani's campaign trail included **[a visit to a notably contentious Brooklyn mosque](https://substack.com/redirect/5b7387f5-cdf9-49a3-9216-1cb01ee06419?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that previously called for Israel's destruction.
* **Mamdani visited the Islamic Society of Bay Ridge** in January, sharing a photo of himself with Imam Muhammad Al-Barr, months after the cleric called for the "annihilation" of Israel in a sermon.
* **In an August sermon, Al-Barr prayed to Allah to "liberate Palestine"** and "annihilate those who occupied their lands," referring to Israel and praising Hamas fighters as more effective than Arab armies in past wars.
* **Mamdani 's visit came amid ongoing pro-Palestinian activism** in Bay Ridge, including an August vigil by Al-Awda New York that honored Hamas leader Ismail Haniyeh and Hezbollah commander Fuad Shukr, who led the 1983 attack on US Marine Corps and milled 241 US service members.
"It was a privilege to join Jummah prayers at the Islamic Society of Bay Ridge today," Mamdani wrote in a January 17 post on X, where he appeared alongside the firebrand imam.

* * *
# Trump unveils sweeping agriculture plan to thwart Chinese nationalists and protect American food supply
The Trump administration **[launched a sweeping National Farm Security Action Plan](https://substack.com/redirect/6cf3ec24-95c6-44a6-8972-9144f8b93621?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Tuesday to block China and other adversaries from buying U.S. farmland, stealing agricultural research, and infiltrating supply chains.
* **Agriculture Secretary Brooke Rollins** announced the plan alongside top officials, pledging to ban Chinese nationals from land ownership and expel over 700 foreign nationals from USDA-linked contracts.
* **The plan follows federal charges against Chinese researchers** accused of smuggling dangerous crop pathogens and includes aggressive reforms to secure food stamps, agricultural IP, and biosecurity.
> _" You fast forward to a book that was written by two high-ranking military officials in China called 'Unrestricted Warfare.' And you understand that we are indeed in a new world where kinetic warfare, it's not the first choice of our rivals anymore," Trade advisor Peter Navarro said. "Rather, it is things like sending us seeds or trying to steal our seeds or trying to change the seeds. It is acquiring our supply chain in agriculture. It's setting up spy shops on land next to military bases."_
* **" Too much American land is owned by nationals of adversarial countries,"** Rollins added, citing that over 265,000 acres held by Chinese nationals are near critical U.S. military bases.

Trump unveils sweeping agriculture plan to thwart Chinese nationalists and protect American food supply The Trump administration Tuesday to block China and other adversaries from buying U.S. farmland, stealing agricultural research, and infiltrating supply chains. Agriculture Secretary Brooke Rollins announced the plan alongside top officials, pledging to ban Chinese nationals from land ownership and expel over 700 foreign nationals from USDA-linked contracts. The plan follows federal charges against Chinese researchers accused of smuggling dangerous crop pathogens and includes aggressive reforms to secure food stamps, agricultural IP, and biosecurity. " You fast forward to a book that was written by two high-ranking military officials in China called 'Unrestricted Warfare.' And you understand that we are indeed in a new world where kinetic warfare, it's not the first choice of our rivals anymore," Trade advisor Peter Navarro said. "Rather, it is things like sending us seeds or trying to steal our seeds or trying to change the seeds. It is acquiring our supply chain in agriculture. It's setting up spy shops on land next to military bases." " Too much American land is owned by nationals of adversarial countries," Rollins added, citing that over 265,000 acres held by Chinese nationals are near critical U.S. military bases. * * *
* **TOP NEWS**

**" Texas rescuers soldier on for fifth day; flooding death toll at 109," **USA Today's**Jeanne Santucci** and**Jorge L. Ortiz** -- "Search and rescue operations in central Texas entered their fifth day Tuesday after heavy rainfall overwhelmed the Guadalupe River, [sending floodwaters roaring through homes and summer camps](https://substack.com/redirect/6364dfbd-488f-494e-8483-dcc39c41c349?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and killing over 100 people.

The death toll rose to 109, including at least 27 children and counselors from the beloved [Camp Mystic](https://substack.com/redirect/5d448bb9-afa3-4af7-9490-8904973525d8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), a storied Christian girls camp in Kerr County, where flooding hit the hardest beginning July 4. At least 30 children were among those killed in the county, Sheriff**Larry Leitha** said in an update Tuesday morning.

Five Mystic campers and one counselor remain unaccounted for, said Leitha, who updated the county's death toll to 87, up from 84 the previous day. Officials in Kendall County also [said Tuesday](https://substack.com/redirect/1cf79de8-1aec-4211-8002-fe5a4bcfceb5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that the death toll there rose to seven, up from six. In Burnet County, a fifth person was confirmed dead, Capt. **Mike Sorenson** with the sheriff's office confirmed to USA TODAY**.**
[ BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/63c08780-77c2-41b8-9e97-30a2ffb39b1d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The last "live rescue" was made on Friday, said Jonathan Lamb with the Kerrville Police Department.

The [flooding came in the early-morning hours](https://substack.com/redirect/9b66876c-6cae-44fc-b307-410a6f8674e5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and the rainfall caused the nearby Guadalupe River to surge over 26 feet in less than an hour, according to Texas Lt. Gov. **Dan Patrick**.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/63c08780-77c2-41b8-9e97-30a2ffb39b1d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
By Tuesday, forecasters said storms would taper off, [finally providing search and rescue teams some relief.](https://substack.com/redirect/c4755c66-f565-4dac-b8e1-29324113b39f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

As first responders and volunteers continued to scour the region for any sign of life, rescuing people [clinging to trees using helicopters](https://substack.com/redirect/cfa0978f-6344-4b90-94ea-d6f6ebca5f86?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the death toll has steadily risen. [Parents nationwide looked on with anxiety and horror](https://substack.com/redirect/4eea070b-8a3d-4259-aa16-5675c9eb7eaf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as the toll at Camp Mystic became clearer. Photos of the aftermath show children's bunks caked in mud, belongings strewn about and a building with an entire wall missing.

"We will not stop until every missing person is found," Texas Gov. **Greg Abbott** has pledged." [USA Today](https://substack.com/redirect/ef900fcb-92b4-412f-8540-22de6d17cffe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

* **TEXANS IN DC**

Release: "**Sen. Cruz Announces Key Senior Staff Hire** ," via office of U.S. Sen. Ted Cruz _\--_**WASHINGTON, D.C.** - Today, U.S. Sen. **Ted Cruz** (R-TX) announced the hiring of John Etue as Chief of Staff in his Washington, D.C. office.

A Texas native, **John Etue** most recently served as Chief of Staff for U.S. Representative **Roger Williams**(TX-25), Chair of the House Small Business Committee. From 2009 to 2013, John served as Senator **Kay Bailey Hutchison 's** (R-TX) Advance Director. John holds a degree from the University of Texas at Austin.

**Sen. Cruz said,**_" I'm proud to announce the hiring of Texan John Etue as my new Chief of Staff. John has over two decades of experience working for Congressman Roger Williams, Senator Kay Bailey Hutchison, and the Texas state legislature. He is a native Texan and a selfless civil servant who will be an indispensable member of our team. Welcome to the team, John."_

**John Etue said,** "_I 'm excited to be joining Team Cruz to bring the strong Texas spirit to Washington, D.C. It's an honor to work for Senator Cruz and to support him in executing his legislative agenda and vision for America. I look forward to this new chapter."" _[Office of Sen. Cruz](https://substack.com/redirect/21141a04-2113-4cc0-8927-28f7901d3dde?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

TOP NEWS " Texas rescuers soldier on for fifth day; flooding death toll at 109," USA Today'sJeanne Santucci andJorge L. Ortiz -- "Search and rescue operations in central Texas entered their fifth day Tuesday after heavy rainfall overwhelmed the Guadalupe River, and killing over 100 people. The death toll rose to 109, including at least 27 children and counselors from the beloved , a storied Christian girls camp in Kerr County, where flooding hit the hardest beginning July 4. At least 30 children were among those killed in the county, SheriffLarry Leitha said in an update Tuesday morning. Five Mystic campers and one counselor remain unaccounted for, said Leitha, who updated the county's death toll to 87, up from 84 the previous day. Officials in Kendall County also that the death toll there rose to seven, up from six. In Burnet County, a fifth person was confirmed dead, Capt. Mike Sorenson with the sheriff's office confirmed to USA TODAY. The last "live rescue" was made on Friday, said Jonathan Lamb with the Kerrville Police Department. The , and the rainfall caused the nearby Guadalupe River to surge over 26 feet in less than an hour, according to Texas Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick. By Tuesday, forecasters said storms would taper off, As first responders and volunteers continued to scour the region for any sign of life, rescuing people , the death toll has steadily risen. as the toll at Camp Mystic became clearer. Photos of the aftermath show children's bunks caked in mud, belongings strewn about and a building with an entire wall missing. "We will not stop until every missing person is found," Texas Gov. Greg Abbott has pledged." FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. Free subscribers will only receive the top story in their morning email. Free subscribers will need to become paid subscribers to receive full story summaries. TOP NEWS " Hills, rivers and rocky terrain: Why the Hill Country keeps flooding" " 10 held in Texas immigration detention center shooting that was 'planned ambush,' US attorney says" " Texas officials report first West Nile cases of the year, urge mosquito precautions" ($) "University of St. Thomas in Houston names first female president " ($) BUSINESS NEWS " Nvidia nearing announcement of big lease near The Domain, sources say" ($) "Dallas Regional Chamber president stepping down " ($) STATE GOVERNMENT "TxDOT notifying drivers after breach results in 300K crash reports downloaded with personal info " ($) 2026 "Houston council member Letitia Plummer launches bid for Lina Hidalgo's seat for Harris County judge " ($) LOCAL GOVERNMENT "Plummer's county judge campaign announcement opens her Houston City Council seat. What happens next " ($) "Dallas County judge gets 2nd sanction for jailing man, revoking bond despite recusal " ($) TRUMP ADMINISTRATION "Congress delivers $10B to NASA with 'Big, Beautiful Bill,' saving Houston-led program from Trump cuts " ($) "Trump praises Texas flood response, says it prevented dozens more deaths " ($) TEXANS IN DC Release: "Sen. Cruz Announces Key Senior Staff Hire ," via office of U.S. Sen. Ted Cruz \--WASHINGTON, D.C. - Today, U.S. Sen. Ted Cruz (R-TX) announced the hiring of John Etue as Chief of Staff in his Washington, D.C. office. A Texas native, John Etue most recently served as Chief of Staff for U.S. Representative Roger Williams(TX-25), Chair of the House Small Business Committee. From 2009 to 2013, John served as Senator Kay Bailey Hutchison 's (R-TX) Advance Director. John holds a degree from the University of Texas at Austin. Sen. Cruz said," I'm proud to announce the hiring of Texan John Etue as my new Chief of Staff. John has over two decades of experience working for Congressman Roger Williams, Senator Kay Bailey Hutchison, and the Texas state legislature. He is a native Texan and a selfless civil servant who will be an indispensable member of our team. Welcome to the team, John." John Etue said, "I 'm excited to be joining Team Cruz to bring the strong Texas spirit to Washington, D.C. It's an honor to work for Senator Cruz and to support him in executing his legislative agenda and vision for America. I look forward to this new chapter."" * **TOP NEWS**

**" Texas rescuers soldier on for fifth day; flooding death toll at 109," **USA Today's**Jeanne Santucci** and**Jorge L. Ortiz** -- "Search and rescue operations in central Texas entered their fifth day Tuesday after heavy rainfall overwhelmed the Guadalupe River, [sending floodwaters roaring through homes and summer camps](https://substack.com/redirect/c69de71b-0f6b-4151-a070-d5033e6a2bf6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and killing over 100 people.

The death toll rose to 109, including at least 27 children and counselors from the beloved [Camp Mystic](https://substack.com/redirect/b2c0877a-ff6a-41d1-9d47-e04e0e1ba81a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), a storied Christian girls camp in Kerr County, where flooding hit the hardest beginning July 4. At least 30 children were among those killed in the county, Sheriff**Larry Leitha** said in an update Tuesday morning.

Five Mystic campers and one counselor remain unaccounted for, said Leitha, who updated the county's death toll to 87, up from 84 the previous day. Officials in Kendall County also [said Tuesday](https://substack.com/redirect/009221ef-5c87-41d3-b6a1-2ea2cef2d3da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that the death toll there rose to seven, up from six. In Burnet County, a fifth person was confirmed dead, Capt. **Mike Sorenson** with the sheriff's office confirmed to USA TODAY**.**
[ BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/859c27f2-6caa-4477-a7cc-efbed6c532f4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The last "live rescue" was made on Friday, said Jonathan Lamb with the Kerrville Police Department.

The [flooding came in the early-morning hours](https://substack.com/redirect/8f4dde11-3b7f-4893-9819-6a79ea7a5d0d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and the rainfall caused the nearby Guadalupe River to surge over 26 feet in less than an hour, according to Texas Lt. Gov. **Dan Patrick**.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/859c27f2-6caa-4477-a7cc-efbed6c532f4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
By Tuesday, forecasters said storms would taper off, [finally providing search and rescue teams some relief.](https://substack.com/redirect/0185da9f-3488-45d5-bb97-4a75368f2e70?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

As first responders and volunteers continued to scour the region for any sign of life, rescuing people [clinging to trees using helicopters](https://substack.com/redirect/bbcc63d1-a211-4505-90d6-620342904885?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the death toll has steadily risen. [Parents nationwide looked on with anxiety and horror](https://substack.com/redirect/7bfe1f69-752b-4f11-b1b2-aa2dc7120d7d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as the toll at Camp Mystic became clearer. Photos of the aftermath show children's bunks caked in mud, belongings strewn about and a building with an entire wall missing.

"We will not stop until every missing person is found," Texas Gov. **Greg Abbott** has pledged." [USA Today](https://substack.com/redirect/8459ba41-abf6-40e9-baba-0edcc235bf5b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

* **TEXANS IN DC**

Release: "**Sen. Cruz Announces Key Senior Staff Hire** ," via office of U.S. Sen. Ted Cruz _\--_**WASHINGTON, D.C.** - Today, U.S. Sen. **Ted Cruz** (R-TX) announced the hiring of John Etue as Chief of Staff in his Washington, D.C. office.

A Texas native, **John Etue** most recently served as Chief of Staff for U.S. Representative **Roger Williams**(TX-25), Chair of the House Small Business Committee. From 2009 to 2013, John served as Senator **Kay Bailey Hutchison 's** (R-TX) Advance Director. John holds a degree from the University of Texas at Austin.

**Sen. Cruz said,**_" I'm proud to announce the hiring of Texan John Etue as my new Chief of Staff. John has over two decades of experience working for Congressman Roger Williams, Senator Kay Bailey Hutchison, and the Texas state legislature. He is a native Texan and a selfless civil servant who will be an indispensable member of our team. Welcome to the team, John."_

**John Etue said,** "_I 'm excited to be joining Team Cruz to bring the strong Texas spirit to Washington, D.C. It's an honor to work for Senator Cruz and to support him in executing his legislative agenda and vision for America. I look forward to this new chapter."" _[Office of Sen. Cruz](https://substack.com/redirect/19420da8-adb6-4867-aeb0-022919623b26?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

TOP NEWS " Texas rescuers soldier on for fifth day; flooding death toll at 109," USA Today'sJeanne Santucci andJorge L. Ortiz -- "Search and rescue operations in central Texas entered their fifth day Tuesday after heavy rainfall overwhelmed the Guadalupe River, and killing over 100 people. The death toll rose to 109, including at least 27 children and counselors from the beloved , a storied Christian girls camp in Kerr County, where flooding hit the hardest beginning July 4. At least 30 children were among those killed in the county, SheriffLarry Leitha said in an update Tuesday morning. Five Mystic campers and one counselor remain unaccounted for, said Leitha, who updated the county's death toll to 87, up from 84 the previous day. Officials in Kendall County also that the death toll there rose to seven, up from six. In Burnet County, a fifth person was confirmed dead, Capt. Mike Sorenson with the sheriff's office confirmed to USA TODAY. The last "live rescue" was made on Friday, said Jonathan Lamb with the Kerrville Police Department. The , and the rainfall caused the nearby Guadalupe River to surge over 26 feet in less than an hour, according to Texas Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick. By Tuesday, forecasters said storms would taper off, As first responders and volunteers continued to scour the region for any sign of life, rescuing people , the death toll has steadily risen. as the toll at Camp Mystic became clearer. Photos of the aftermath show children's bunks caked in mud, belongings strewn about and a building with an entire wall missing. "We will not stop until every missing person is found," Texas Gov. Greg Abbott has pledged." FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. Free subscribers will only receive the top story in their morning email. Free subscribers will need to become paid subscribers to receive full story summaries. Cruz Announces Key Senior Staff Hire ," via office of U.S. Sen. Ted Cruz \--WASHINGTON, D.C. - Today, U.S. Sen. Ted Cruz (R-TX) announced the hiring of John Etue as Chief of Staff in his Washington, D.C. office. A Texas native, John Etue most recently served as Chief of Staff for U.S. Representative Roger Williams(TX-25), Chair of the House Small Business Committee. From 2009 to 2013, John served as Senator Kay Bailey Hutchison 's (R-TX) Advance Director. John holds a degree from the University of Texas at Austin. Sen. Cruz said," I'm proud to announce the hiring of Texan John Etue as my new Chief of Staff. John has over two decades of experience working for Congressman Roger Williams, Senator Kay Bailey Hutchison, and the Texas state legislature. He is a native Texan and a selfless civil servant who will be an indispensable member of our team. Welcome to the team, John." John Etue said, "I 'm excited to be joining Team Cruz to bring the strong Texas spirit to Washington, D.C. It's an honor to work for Senator Cruz and to support him in executing his legislative agenda and vision for America. I look forward to this new chapter."" * **TEXANS IN DC**

Release: “**Sen. Cruz Announces Key Senior Staff Hire** ,” via office of U.S. Sen. Ted Cruz _\--_**WASHINGTON, D.C.** – Today, U.S. Sen. **Ted Cruz** (R-TX) announced the hiring of John Etue as Chief of Staff in his Washington, D.C. office.

A Texas native, **John Etue** most recently served as Chief of Staff for U.S. Representative **Roger Williams**(TX-25), Chair of the House Small Business Committee. From 2009 to 2013, John served as Senator **Kay Bailey Hutchison’s** (R-TX) Advance Director. John holds a degree from the University of Texas at Austin.

**Sen. Cruz said,**_“I’m proud to announce the hiring of Texan John Etue as my new Chief of Staff. John has over two decades of experience working for Congressman Roger Williams, Senator Kay Bailey Hutchison, and the Texas state legislature. He is a native Texan and a selfless civil servant who will be an indispensable member of our team. Welcome to the team, John.”_

**John Etue said,** “ _I’m excited to be joining Team Cruz to bring the strong Texas spirit to Washington, D.C. It’s an honor to work for Senator Cruz and to support him in executing his legislative agenda and vision for America. I look forward to this new chapter.” " _[Office of Sen. Sign up now and invite your friends and family to be part of the informed. | TOP NEWS “Texas rescuers soldier on for fifth day; flooding death toll at 109,” USA Today'sJeanne Santucci andJorge L. Ortiz — “Search and rescue operations in central Texas entered their fifth day Tuesday after heavy rainfall overwhelmed the Guadalupe River, and killing over 100 people. The death toll rose to 109, including at least 27 children and counselors from the beloved , a storied Christian girls camp in Kerr County, where flooding hit the hardest beginning July 4. At least 30 children were among those killed in the county, SheriffLarry Leitha said in an update Tuesday morning. Five Mystic campers and one counselor remain unaccounted for, said Leitha, who updated the county's death toll to 87, up from 84 the previous day. Officials in Kendall County also that the death toll there rose to seven, up from six. In Burnet County, a fifth person was confirmed dead, Capt. Mike Sorenson with the sheriff's office confirmed to USA TODAY. » The last "live rescue" was made on Friday, said Jonathan Lamb with the Kerrville Police Department. The , and the rainfall caused the nearby Guadalupe River to surge over 26 feet in less than an hour, according to Texas Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick. » By Tuesday, forecasters said storms would taper off, As first responders and volunteers continued to scour the region for any sign of life, rescuing people , the death toll has steadily risen. as the toll at Camp Mystic became clearer. Photos of the aftermath show children's bunks caked in mud, belongings strewn about and a building with an entire wall missing. "We will not stop until every missing person is found," Texas Gov. Greg Abbott has pledged." | FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. What happens next” ($) “Dallas County judge gets 2nd sanction for jailing man, revoking bond despite recusal ” ($) | TRUMP ADMINISTRATION “Congress delivers $10B to NASA with 'Big, Beautiful Bill,' saving Houston-led program from Trump cuts” ($) “Trump praises Texas flood response, says it prevented dozens more deaths ” ($) | TEXANS IN DC Release: “Sen. Cruz Announces Key Senior Staff Hire ,” via office of U.S. Sen. Ted Cruz \--WASHINGTON, D.C. – Today, U.S. Sen. Ted Cruz (R-TX) announced the hiring of John Etue as Chief of Staff in his Washington, D.C. office. A Texas native, John Etue most recently served as Chief of Staff for U.S. Representative Roger Williams(TX-25), Chair of the House Small Business Committee. From 2009 to 2013, John served as Senator Kay Bailey Hutchison’s (R-TX) Advance Director. John holds a degree from the University of Texas at Austin. Sen. Cruz said,“I’m proud to announce the hiring of Texan John Etue as my new Chief of Staff. John has over two decades of experience working for Congressman Roger Williams, Senator Kay Bailey Hutchison, and the Texas state legislature. He is a native Texan and a selfless civil servant who will be an indispensable member of our team. Welcome to the team, John.” John Etue said, “ I’m excited to be joining Team Cruz to bring the strong Texas spirit to Washington, D.C. It’s an honor to work for Senator Cruz and to support him in executing his legislative agenda and vision for America. I look forward to this new chapter.” " | NEWS FROM AROUND THE STATE HOU CHRON: "Kerr County asked Texas for help multiple times in 8 years. It said no. name: Jason Miyares
subject: Defunding the Police? Jay Jones still supports it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miyares for Virginia |
body:
If you're a cop doing your job, he wants to punish you.| | | Friend,

**Jay Jones would make every cop in Virginia a trial lawyer's target.**

**Jay Jones** helped write legislation that would have **ended qualified immunity** for the men and women on the front lines protecting our streets, our schools, our neighborhoods. **If you’re a police officer doing your job, he believes you could be sued, lose your home, your life savings...** while politicians like himself stay protected.
**Jay Jones** has **always sided with felons over law enforcement.** He tried to end qualified immunity, the one protection that keeps our brave officers from being personally bankrupted just for doing their job.
He didn’t propose that for politicians. Not for bureaucrats. Just the police...
That’s defacto defunding. And law enforcement leaders know it, it’s why **senior officers retired early when Jay wrote his radical bill.** It’s why Virginia’s police are warning this election could be the most dangerous in decades.
I stand with those who stand between order and chaos. **I backed Operation Ceasefire and cracked down on fentanyl dealers.**
**But now I am under attack from the far-left.**
Help me fight back.
👉 [_**Chip in today to help protect Virginia from Jay Jones.**_](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/s/c/Gqd5OQbbydCi7Q4p1eA5amt85voTwONhso1aokWk9bgUqWEQhhMJ9S3S3_yQz0cpuoXbOhiEqYHdixboMcy-jiXAVDE0KIhXW_6r1TVbK0qARcgNXnJFLWO7tfoORQanQjpEbtLJDnvMRujedbJYrkSONjsqZnXpAcjr0sIqZg4R-10XnsTGzYeAUM-PU2zIupjGh0FaVIQqgdA1kDsT9Yz2b1L4Nj1PB8w4zDglgPCAC3LL1DxBLonnpY0CLj-8adt8QypMcnVE2hjAimNkz_pzrqBQNhkyeJRvPkcQfWOJR9F6Ne5YgZUdyxtVMeKLgeOHw_3vDlXYQlXvDepWZEzW5X885SLHZGcHG_IaWZEF7aUtOcQFmoWqL2uCRWjbCmvPFJkblcvBcPrXWYX-7QBM-GzGo8fTCxCtn-me5isu-qnEaGRiabfgAXsDF97Dk7yiqAGdDXVMlHQt7yDr6Wl1sL1pBf0HSXv7Avk_sxdz9ktDlR7IC1f90u5RDjAtLnd_nt2x5wO9lsMmPmjdIlKqL2-706_I6nZMKTGP2lC8PEbqICTDYUHqcmIJ3MwWWZVbDCrNU7qvEtCyV1LH/GkgFMGrqkm6zn7LeedHvma-Dyo5VzLFa/10) Every dollar helps protect our police, our kids, and our communities.
