clean_body: If you're a cop doing your job, he wants to punish you.| | | Friend, Jay Jones would make every cop in Virginia a trial lawyer's target. Jay Jones helped write legislation that would have ended qualified immunity for the men and women on the front lines protecting our streets, our schools, our neighborhoods. If you’re a police officer doing your job, he believes you could be sued, lose your home, your life savings... while politicians like himself stay protected. Jay Jones has always sided with felons over law enforcement. He tried to end qualified immunity, the one protection that keeps our brave officers from being personally bankrupted just for doing their job. He didn’t propose that for politicians. Not for bureaucrats. Just the police... That’s defacto defunding. And law enforcement leaders know it, it’s why senior officers retired early when Jay wrote his radical bill. It’s why Virginia’s police are warning this election could be the most dangerous in decades. I stand with those who stand between order and chaos. I backed Operation Ceasefire and cracked down on fentanyl dealers. But now I am under attack from the far-left. Help me fight back. 👉 Every dollar helps protect our police, our kids, and our communities. Let’s back the badge. For Virginia,Jason Miyares | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | Paid for by Miyares for Virginia | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

Scott Ruskan left his accounting job in NYC to serve his country in the U.S. Coast guard, today he is a national hero. It was Petty Officer Ruskan's first mission as a rescue swimmer for the Coast Guard and the Guadalupe river had risen from 3 to 30 feet in the area near Camp Mystic, an all girls Christian camp. On the ground Ruskan was the only first responder and nearly 200 terrified, cold children needed his help. Ruskan, along with 65 brave men and women of the aircraft unit showed their bravery and heroism and are American heroes. Tricia McLaughlin joins me today to give us a comprehensive look at the Department of Homeland Security and the efforts they are taking to keep Americans safe. Two more attacks on federal agents happened in Texas as deranged lunatics are ambushed agents at an ICE facility and U.S. border patrol facility. ICE is currently in LA's MacArthur park, infamous for gang activity and Karen Bass wants them to leave immediately. Dangerous gang members, terrorist supporters and criminals will continue to be deported. Dangerous rhetoric from Democrats incahoots with the media have caused a 700% increase in assaults on ICE agents this year. The headlines like "Maryland man" and "Georgetown scholar" are forgetting little details like members of MS 13 or tren de aragua. The "Georgetown scholar" that was detained is the senior advisor to the Hamas terrorist group. The USDA's new National Farm Security Action Plan is securing and protecting American farmland and banning American farmland to be purchased by Chinese nationals or other foreign adversaries. Under Kristi Noem's leadership the DHS will continue to put America First and keep the homeland safe.
Featuring:
**Tricia McLaughlin**
Assistant Secretary for Public Affairs | Department of Homeland Security https://www.dhs.gov/

body:
Our work is not over. We have a path forward, and it involves a Democratic majority in Congress.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111114456/556267997/32658279?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-07-08_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGQ4NTEwMC00NzVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E1tDH5CoS5fdDUUrK2VSRt2321PMzxP857mdJLkXX2I=)
---
| Last week, Republicans pushed through their _Big Ugly Bill_. I voted no for the good people of West Michigan–for our healthcare, for our children, for our farmers, for our seniors, for our veterans, and for each and every one of you.

Republicans will tell you otherwise, but this is a dangerous bill that puts millions of Americans at risk of losing critical access to healthcare, SNAP benefits, and so much more. And Republicans know it. It’s why they started the vote at 3:28 AM. It’s why it took them hours upon hours to be convinced that this bill was good for their constituents. And it’s why the bill passed with a narrow margin of **217-214**.

Our work is not over. We have a path forward, and it involves a Democratic majority in Congress.

**Flipping and then holding this seat meant we turned a “yes” vote into a “no” vote. Michigan will serve as a firewall against further attacks on the working and middle class, and defending this district, just as we did in 2024, is critical.

[_I hope you’ll join me in helping us remain a check to the Republican party’s billionaire-first agenda. clean_body: Our work is not over. We have a path forward, and it involves a Democratic majority in Congress. | = | Last week, Republicans pushed through their Big Ugly Bill. I voted no for the good people of West Michigan–for our healthcare, for our children, for our farmers, for our seniors, for our veterans, and for each and every one of you. Republicans will tell you otherwise, but this is a dangerous bill that puts millions of Americans at risk of losing critical access to healthcare, SNAP benefits, and so much more. And Republicans know it. It’s why they started the vote at 3:28 AM. It’s why it took them hours upon hours to be convinced that this bill was good for their constituents. And it’s why the bill passed with a narrow margin of 217-214. Our work is not over. We have a path forward, and it involves a Democratic majority in Congress. Flipping and then holding this seat meant we turned a “yes” vote into a “no” vote. Michigan will serve as a firewall against further attacks on the working and middle class, and defending this district, just as we did in 2024, is critical. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Onward, Hillary * | | = Paid for by Scholten for Congress Hillary Scholten for Congress PO Box 6233 Grand Rapids, MI 49516 United States | = If you would like to receive fewer emails, . name: Tina Kotek
subject: Putting student mental health and learning first
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
|
#
---
Peter, cell phones are essential personal items these days. But for kids and teens, this modern technology can be more of a harm than a help. Research clearly shows that cell phone use has a negative impact on young people’s mental health, attention spans, and self-esteem. Teachers around the state also report they disrupt their classrooms, hinder their ability to teach, and lead to worse learning outcomes. **That’s why we took action:** Last week, I signed an Executive Order banning student use of cell phones during the school day, starting this fall. **[Add your name to stand with us if you agree. →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111114591/556268357/1287067654?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250708_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWMzNzgyYS00NzVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fVa__d9akTuhMFqrgnT6CkglsgojCS_m7Eg2kjYRcPg=&emci=c6c3782a-475c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=cac3782a-475c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=15353729)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111114592/556268358/1287067654?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250708_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWMzNzgyYS00NzVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fVa__d9akTuhMFqrgnT6CkglsgojCS_m7Eg2kjYRcPg=&emci=c6c3782a-475c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=cac3782a-475c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=15353729)
---
I believe the research and what I’ve heard from students: If students are off their phones and fully engaged with teachers from the start of the first class of the day to the last bell, they’ll be better supported, focused in the classroom, have increased connection to their classmates, and will see improved overall wellbeing.
I’m committed to creating educational environments that lead to better futures for our students — and that begins with making sure our students can focus on learning during the school day.
**[If you believe in our vision for students, will you add your name right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111114593/556268359/1287067654?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250708_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWMzNzgyYS00NzVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fVa__d9akTuhMFqrgnT6CkglsgojCS_m7Eg2kjYRcPg=&emci=c6c3782a-475c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=cac3782a-475c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=15353729)**

---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111114766/556269050/1328710725?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_070825_MTG_2x30DO-60DC-60DD_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmI0MjM5Ny00NzVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p2VDg0839WXvoIyIgW4i20PJ0_ZS8BbZvUvjQt4H4JQ=) Marjorie Taylor Greene is _hinting_ at a run for governor of Georgia — but after voting for Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill,” **one of the worst and most destructive bills in American history,** she has proven yet again she will always put MAGA politics ahead of the people of this state. How can we trust someone who repeatedly prioritizes Donald Trump and his dangerous, destructive agenda over the needs of Georgians? **She cannot be allowed to bring that chaos to the governor's mansion.** Our communities deserve better than her reckless leadership that threatens the future of our state and further divides us. name: Rusty Hicks
subject: These Republicans betrayed you:
disclaimer_text: paid for by hardworking Americans
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5]
Dear friends —
Last week, Donald Trump and his Republican cronies worked overtime to pass their Big Ugly Bill that rips healthcare away from 17 million Americans and endangers food support to 5 million more.
Additionally, the bill puts 1.75 million construction jobs at risk — all to the tune of $3 TRILLION added to the national debt.
And what is all this pain for? To fund tax breaks for their billionaire buddies.
The passage of this Big Ugly Bill is a massive giveaway to the wealthy and well-connected, paid for by hardworking Americans. It’s a national disgrace.
Frustratingly, this legislation could not have passed without the support of Republican representatives here in California.
These California Republicans in swing districts betrayed their constituents and voted YES:
➡️ David Valadao (CA-22)
➡️ Ken Calvert (CA-41)
➡️ Young Kim (CA-40)
➡️ Kevin Kiley (CA-03)
As agonizing as this moment is, our path forward is clear . We need to defeat these four Republicans who represent “tossup” or “lean” districts and take back control of the U.S. House in 2026.
These members of Congress had a choice : Represent their constituents by opposing this bill that strips away healthcare, or kiss the ring of Donald Trump. Cowering in fear, they decided to kiss the ring.
Well, now they get to be afraid of our organizing campaigns. Because when you betray our healthcare and interests, you lose your seat. Period .
We’re launching an emergency push to fire these GOP traitors and flip their districts blue. But we urgently need to raise another $11,546.67 for our Swing Seat Fund to expand organizing and voter outreach programs now. Will you pitch in $ or more? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-july25-trumpbill?&refcode=&amount=]

clean_body: [] Dear friends — Last week, Donald Trump and his Republican cronies worked overtime to pass their Big Ugly Bill that rips healthcare away from 17 million Americans and endangers food support to 5 million more. Additionally, the bill puts 1.75 million construction jobs at risk — all to the tune of $3 TRILLION added to the national debt. And what is all this pain for? To fund tax breaks for their billionaire buddies. The passage of this Big Ugly Bill is a massive giveaway to the wealthy and well-connected, paid for by hardworking Americans. It’s a national disgrace. Frustratingly, this legislation could not have passed without the support of Republican representatives here in California. These California Republicans in swing districts betrayed their constituents and voted YES: ➡️ David Valadao (CA-22) ➡️ Ken Calvert (CA-41) ➡️ Young Kim (CA-40) ➡️ Kevin Kiley (CA-03) As agonizing as this moment is, our path forward is clear . We need to defeat these four Republicans who represent “tossup” or “lean” districts and take back control of the U.S. House in 2026. These members of Congress had a choice : Represent their constituents by opposing this bill that strips away healthcare, or kiss the ring of Donald Trump. Cowering in fear, they decided to kiss the ring. Well, now they get to be afraid of our organizing campaigns. Because when you betray our healthcare and interests, you lose your seat. Period . We’re launching an emergency push to fire these GOP traitors and flip their districts blue. But we urgently need to raise another $11,546.67 for our Swing Seat Fund to expand organizing and voter outreach programs now. Will you pitch in $ or more? ---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111114975/556269554/-1590518309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGZjNTBkYS00NzVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G8ce2qYzO74ygdSe4LfReOqABP9VIvrbj7PQ80iBxQs=&emci=cc7fb531-455c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=c4fc50da-475c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7878003)
Friend, I was on CNN this morning talking about Trump’s tariffs — and let me be clear: **This isn’t a policy. It’s a tax hike on working Americans.** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111114977/556269557/444482356?&refcode=E14094-20250708-EriconCNN-Image-Economy&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGZjNTBkYS00NzVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G8ce2qYzO74ygdSe4LfReOqABP9VIvrbj7PQ80iBxQs=)** The billionaires and hedge fund execs? They’re not the ones paying higher prices at Costco or Walmart. I don’t see them in the checkout line. But my friends and neighbors _are_ — and they’re the ones who are getting squeezed. Donald Trump promised he’d lower costs on Day One. We’re now nearly 200 days into his term, and he’s batting zero. He hasn’t made anything cheaper — not groceries, not gas, not rent, _nothing_. Instead, he’s creating economic chaos so unpredictable that even Wall Street doesn’t know what’s coming. And the result? **Families across the country are delaying vacations, skipping school supplies, and holding off on basic purchases because they just don’t know how these tariffs will hurt them next.** [**Friend, I’m fighting to make sure these tariffs don’t resume on August 1 or EVER. And as I continue holding Trump accountable for failing the American people, I’m asking you to pitch in whatever you can to help stop the MAGAnomics madness for good.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111114978/556269558/444482356?&refcode=E14094-20250708-EriconCNN-SL-Economy&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGZjNTBkYS00NzVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G8ce2qYzO74ygdSe4LfReOqABP9VIvrbj7PQ80iBxQs=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111114980/556269560/444482356?express_lane=true&&refcode=E14094-20250708-EriconCNN-EG-Economy&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGZjNTBkYS00NzVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G8ce2qYzO74ygdSe4LfReOqABP9VIvrbj7PQ80iBxQs=)

That means more organizers, more rallies, and more direct outreach to voters in every corner of the state. If everyone reading this chipped in just $10, we’d hit our weekly fundraising goal tonight. But the reality is: not everyone gives. That’s why your early support matters so much. = Thank you for everything. Jon Ossoff | | = | *

In a few short months, we can start Democrats on a winning streak by flipping Virginia blue.

_It's not going to be easy_.

Four years ago, we lost this same Governor's race by _two points_ and saw years of progress erased in an instant. And my opponent Winsome Earle-Sears has shown she will indulge in fearmongering and disinformation to keep Virginia under Republican control.

Your contribution today, whatever the amount, will help us rise above the attacks and build a winning campaign that reflects our shared values.

If you're fed up with the chaos coming out of Washington, if you're outraged watching GOP officials bend their knee rather than uphold their oath, I am counting on your immediate and full support.

[_**Click this link to complete your donation and become a founding member of my campaign for Governor.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111115117/556270047/-246804040?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2025-07-08_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2RjNzY2Yi00ODVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wvx7E3S2-qhl97TyUjZC58iAewJ-Mp2vvVGtf2uK0a0=) Together, we will flip Virginia blue and send a resounding message to this White House and beyond that voters will not stand for the corruption, the attacks on fundamental rights, and the brazen disregard for the needs of working families.
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111115118/556270102/-246804040?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2025-07-08_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2RjNzY2Yi00ODVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wvx7E3S2-qhl97TyUjZC58iAewJ-Mp2vvVGtf2uK0a0=)

name: Mark Warner
subject: I’m tired of being Republicans’ conscience.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111115426/556271052/-272311645?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Conscience_250708_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTA5MmVhZS00OTVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hCB9UIyRcsh1V0tdId1DBtj10V-05e0wmBNc13lakQs=) Derek,

It’s been a few days since Donald Trump signed his Big, Ugly Bill into law and frankly, I can’t stop thinking about how disappointed I am with my Republican colleagues.

**They knew it was a scam that would rip millions of Americans off their health insurance, raise prices for hardworking Virginians, explode the national debt, and gut our social safety net all to give tax breaks to the wealthiest in our country.**

_**They knew it was wrong – my Republican friends told me so in private, and then voted for it anyway.**_

They sold out the American people to pay for tax cuts for billionaires because they don’t have the spine to stand up to Trump’s destructive policies – and this wasn’t the first time.

Behind closed doors, my Republican colleagues encourage me to keep speaking out against the dangers of this Trump administration. One colleague even told me “Mark, you’re like our conscience.”

I don’t want to be Republicans’ conscience. They need to vote their conscience.

While we couldn’t defeat the bill in Congress, Derek, we _can_ defeat the politicians who passed it in the midterms next year, flip the Senate, and finally put a check on Trump’s dangerous agenda.

[_**Can I count on you to chip in today to help me hold my seat, keep Virginia blue, and take back the Senate for Democrats so we can hold Republicans accountable at the ballot body:
[ https://act.robbonta.com/go/4?refcode=em250708&t=1001&akid=1865%2E1088799%2E_jEKIn ]Rob Bonta

The work continues in our lawsuit to stop President Trump and Defense
Secretary Hegseth from unlawfully federalizing the California National
Guard, and I wanted you to hear an update directly from me:

Approximately 4,000 California National Guard servicemembers have been
federalized and 700 Marines have been deployed to LA — diverting service
members from critical work, including fighting the flow of fentanyl into
our communities and responding to wildfires.

This case is ongoing, and we are confident that the law is on our side. We
will continue making our case in court, and we hope to prevail.

As long as President Trump keeps breaking the law, I will keep taking him
to court.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-250708?refcode=em20250708-1865&refcode2=1865_1088799__jEKIn&akid=1865%2E1088799%2E_jEKIn ]If you’re with me, please make a contribution of any amount to fund our
grassroots fight to hold Donald Trump accountable to the law.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-250708?refcode=em20250708-1865&amount=5&refcode2=1865_1088799__jEKIn&akid=1865%2E1088799%2E_jEKIn ]Donate $5 »

More to come.

-Rob

Raising my daughter Harper is the most important part of my life. As Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania, it influences every decision I make because everything I do is with my daughter and her generation in mind. **We are creating the world that they are going to inherit, and by failing to protect critical programs like Medicaid and Medicare, we let them down. ** This spending bill that just passed is one of the most dangerous and destructive bills we've seen in modern memory, and I'm devastated. I'm devastated for the seniors who will lose care, for the working parents who will be forced to struggle even harder to make ends meet, and for my daughter's generation, who will now come of age in an America with even less access to healthcare than we were afforded. **Everyone deserves access to healthcare, regardless of their circumstances, and building roadblocks to that access instead of supporting people in need is inexcusable. ** This bill will cut benefits for over 500,000 people, kick over 140,000 people off of food assistance, and shutter 25 rural hospitals that are already struggling. All to line the pockets of the ultra-rich. [**We need to ramp up the fight at the state level, and I'm going to need your help. Will you chip into my campaign today so I can keep advocating for healthcare?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111115560/556271532/160205011?amount=10&source=SBD_AD_EM_FR_070825_MEDICAID_30DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzllMGVmMC00YTVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=owpYcAS0U_loBhAw0lyd8gbUOCPC81rp6K8QCVCxiuA=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

name: Team DLCC
subject: The largest transfer of wealth in American history.
disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005
body:
Every state Republican who backed the MAGA agenda is complicit. | | |
---
| |
---|---
**Trump’s disastrous billionaire-first budget bill passed Congress** The MAGA movement has once again failed the American people. This new law will leave nearly 17 million Americans without health care, slash funding for food support, and cut basic services. This bill is a wrecking ball to state budgets, and the consequences will be felt in our communities for decades. **Republicans passed the largest transfer of wealth in American history from working families to the wealthiest, and every state Republican who backed the MAGA agenda is complicit.** The balance of power in our statehouses directly impacts access to health care, especially under this new bill. We must hold state Republicans accountable for leaving working families behind and elect Democrats who will work to strengthen communities, not tear them down. [Donations to the DLCC fuel our work to protect and expand Democratic majorities in statehouses nationwide. clean_body: Every state Republican who backed the MAGA agenda is complicit. | | | | | ---|--- Trump’s disastrous billionaire-first budget bill passed Congress The MAGA movement has once again failed the American people. This new law will leave nearly 17 million Americans without health care, slash funding for food support, and cut basic services. This bill is a wrecking ball to state budgets, and the consequences will be felt in our communities for decades. Republicans passed the largest transfer of wealth in American history from working families to the wealthiest, and every state Republican who backed the MAGA agenda is complicit. The balance of power in our statehouses directly impacts access to health care, especially under this new bill. We must hold state Republicans accountable for leaving working families behind and elect Democrats who will work to strengthen communities, not tear them down. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | Thank you, Team DLCC | Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005. name: Senate Conservatives
subject: Stop McConnell's Hand-Picked Senate Puppets
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES ACTION AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
| | |
---
---
A new voice is emerging in Kentucky politics, and the establishment is already mobilizing against him. **Nate Morris** , a successful entrepreneur and ninth-generation Kentuckian, has launched a grassroots campaign for U.S. Senate that's sending shockwaves through the state's political establishment. With Mitch McConnell's political machine already gearing up to crush any challenge to their hand-picked candidates, Morris is racing against time to build the conservative movement needed to break their stranglehold on Kentucky politics. _**From Bootstrap Success to Political Insurgent**_ Morris's story embodies the American Dream that career politicians only talk about. Raised by a single mother in a union household, with 19 family members working at the local auto plant, Morris understands working-class struggles firsthand. His grandfather, who led the local auto union, inspired him to never accept "no" for an answer. That determination paid off. With just a $10,000 line of credit, Morris founded Rubicon, building it into one of America's largest waste and recycling companies operating in 50 states and 20 countries. After 12 years as CEO, growing the company to nearly $700 million in annual revenue, he launched Morris Industries to tackle America's biggest challenges. **Now he's taking on his biggest challenge yet: the Washington establishment.** Unlike the typical McConnell-approved candidates who talk tough during campaigns then cave in Washington, Morris has laid out an uncompromising conservative agenda: ▶︎ **Immigration** : Complete opposition to amnesty, ending birthright citizenship, mass deportations, and a temporary immigration pause until illegal entries are addressed ▶︎ **Health Freedom** : Full support for Trump and RFK Jr.'s Make America Healthy Again initiative ▶︎ **Protecting Children** : Banning hormone treatments for minors and defunding schools pushing woke ideology ▶︎ **Second Amendment** : Repealing the Biden-McConnell gun control bill and stopping credit card companies from blocking gun purchases ▶︎ **Election Integrity** : Cutting federal funds to states refusing voter ID requirements ▶︎ **Economic Revival** : Backing Trump's working-class tax cuts and tariff policies to bring jobs home **Time is running out.** [**Please support Nate Morris for Senate today!**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=832362f9eee8440c97bc3163c5f9095e&_e=ixmvdXWUjEjZtuaRQDyEAcBfPXeNk3v-wvaquai46a7qsM7Fjef5k95wWc4KMarcbyVQhSnF038KBgrD0NmhcVUVpg17XMbRYbevendKFcs_q0CbFvCGNiUiPlIxekWV24lIopgmu7FrLVpUYtPGjRfMg2n8ao-0EXzNYScScPtbcmvVUs3p8Jvv7TCQ7OlIu--lqjzgIny-VdKJY24B2bijz5fW8_DZqhuZFgKfaRi0TCO3HiJcZpvhgN28iJHS-dKDSSjfunI4i0qjQgonYEBqQeJ6XApASX4sf86ThrPYBCE5EjW60HkCKj5BCdps9LRlZx5_7aMsjcuP0wOpAfQt9bRW1AwWm4MycoyKild0ihTsr_1fcCx1zTBUuqvNw4xwFbPsklbrQyzON5A2Ew%3D%3D) McConnell's political network, flush with establishment money and deep-state backing, is already moving to ensure another RINO puppet wins this seat. They've seen what happens when outsiders like Morris gain momentum, and they're determined to stop him before his campaign can take root. Morris has been one of the few Kentucky Republicans brave enough to criticize McConnell by name, calling out his betrayals of President Trump and the America-First agenda. That courage has made him a target, but it's also exactly why conservatives must rally now. _**Why Your Support Matters**_ While Morris achieved business success, he knows this fight requires something money alone can't buy: a passionate grassroots movement. The establishment will outspend him with their billionaire donors and special interest money. But they can't match the power of committed conservatives joining together. Every day counts. While McConnell's machine organizes to protect their power, Morris needs patriots to step up immediately. Your support today – whether $5, $50, or $500 – sends a message that Kentucky conservatives are done with RINO representation. **This is about more than one Senate seat. It's about whether President Trump will have the allies he needs to implement his agenda, or whether McConnell's saboteurs will continue blocking America-First policies from within.** _**Take Action Today**_ The window to build a winning grassroots campaign is closing fast. The McConnell establishment is counting on conservatives to wait, to hesitate, to assume someone else will step up. Don't let them win by default. [**Rush your donation now**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=832362f9eee8440c97bc3163c5f9095e&_e=ixmvdXWUjEjZtuaRQDyEAcBfPXeNk3v-wvaquai46a7qsM7Fjef5k95wWc4KMarcbyVQhSnF038KBgrD0NmhcVUVpg17XMbRYbevendKFcvaZppwne9aw4U9PW4uIWj15xu3WdbmN3qYyBHlREGKO1ATbB5tUIihzzP92fuPf0QeTiNfkXbM-zKeKzTeJDaX0l7BJKaVZa8OOJaiLVKYl9zX-5JjJRmEUAQJH-wPGJBisOEsecvtdF9G_5iRGkg_RdrOX9-BO8b8wwExItTKto7cipgzNHcy8VunGWv_XG6GNYIhH07_1qQcPNNULAiqGu4qboHlOyleLkkQajyr69zvgc5se2AaCQRGR_feGEDo2Nh20rPDTUb03VQuA-Yqd2-4QOVD3EzJ5i2wz77VTQ%3D%3D) to help Nate Morris defeat the RINO machine and ensure Kentucky sends a true conservative fighter to the Senate. Whether it's $5 or $500, every contribution fuels the grassroots army needed to overcome the establishment's millions. Kentucky deserves better than another McConnell puppet and America needs senators who will fight for Trump's agenda, not undermine it. The time to act is now – before the establishment's money drowns out the voice of real conservatives. [**Stand with Nate Morris today.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=832362f9eee8440c97bc3163c5f9095e&_e=ixmvdXWUjEjZtuaRQDyEAcBfPXeNk3v-wvaquai46a7qsM7Fjef5k95wWc4KMarcbyVQhSnF038KBgrD0NmhcVUVpg17XMbRYbevendKFcvQWtwC8Ovz-dtVaSZJJ8fVKJpXsJ476fMxdd-fQ0JbFHsB2e5enuvBp4osUUMBF09WN2Dj0WhpClqsq16fK6Xn90WkGBJW7bTBdoOFCc2bVPu6qjYChwWYTxr0xi-Xx_1FD0hM2LiqH78iEjizqwFCpQWq3ae35DOQgWehjDXoZo1Cx6bAbcdwLdyVObadSKmjnotSSnxJ2qHJm4JQUTNhm7tW6Ew7k4UIlFqZU3UEtibU4MnTGCIUcIngKrfgtOsiXgXznUZQwQuZuHq5Jap40-6kXxc6JBsm00bivZ5oDQ%3D%3D) Tomorrow may be too late.

name: John James
subject: Be my co-pilot in this fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for MI, 35744 Van Dyke Avenue, Sterling Heights, MI 48312
body:
| | | Patriot, When I flew missions as a combat pilot, I learned one thing above all: no mission is ever accomplished alone. **_That’s why I’m asking you to be my co-pilot in this campaign._** Right now, the national experts call this race a toss-up. The latest poll shows me just 0.5% behind – a MASSIVE change from Republicans losing here by 10 points last time. We have momentum, but the Democrats are spending millions to stop us. I can’t do this without you. Together, we can win – and build a stronger, freer Michigan for everyone. name: Dr. Annie Andrews
subject: I used to race bikes. Now I’m racing to defeat Lindsey Graham.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio House Democratic Campaign Committee, 545 E Town St
body:
We’ve got a race to win.

|
---
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111116347/556273941/658992212?refcode=250708_Andrews_Race&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTUxNDNmYS00ZTVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VJVG-fc1K7XL59x_LCVlcBqn7claad2SzLsBPr8xBrg=)** Growing up with two brothers, I had a fierce competitive streak. I was the only girl on my little league baseball team and could catch my dad’s pop-flies in the backyard better than my brothers. The three of us would set up Indy 500-style bike races on our cul-de-sac. Winner got bragging rights. Loser got the snacks from the house. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111116348/556273942/658992212?refcode=250708_Andrews_Race&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTUxNDNmYS00ZTVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VJVG-fc1K7XL59x_LCVlcBqn7claad2SzLsBPr8xBrg=)** Fast forward a few decades and I’m channeling that same energy into a much bigger race: _**Taking down Lindsey Graham and flipping South Carolina blue.**_ He’s been in the Senate since I was 22. I’ve had 3 kids, cared for thousands more, and taught hundreds of med students and residents. And let me tell you — they all deserve better than the future Lindsey Graham is fighting for. I’m in this race because I’ve got _fire_. I’ve got _purpose_. And unlike him, I’ve got a _soul_. But, friend, I’ve never been the one to back down from a tough race. That’s why I’ve set an ambitious $250,000 fundraising goal to show Graham that we have the power to win this. https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email06302025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email06302025&amount=25]
Peter ,
They posed for pictures, gave fiery speeches, and swore up and down they’d never vote for such an irresponsible mega bill.
Then Republicans folded, nearly every single one of them, to hand Donald Trump a bill that will:
✔️ Adds $3.3 trillion to the national debt
✔️ Cut Medicaid and threaten hospitals
✔️ Dish out massive tax breaks to the ultra-wealthy
29 so-called “moderate” Republicans voted for it anyway, including the ones who called it “morally and fiscally bankrupt” and a “travesty.”
Let’s make sure their voters never forget it.
Can you pitch in $29 today — one dollar for each Republican who caved — to help GOTV PAC take them on in 2026? Your $29 today helps us flip these seats and end the Trump rubber stamp in Congress. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email07082025&amount=29]

I need to tell you: ✅ Why this moment in Congress is critical ✅ Why I'm leading the fight to dismantle the Swamp ✅ And how YOU can help us win this fight for America Let's break it down: WHY THIS MOMENT MATTERS President Trump is back in the White House. But here 's the truth: He can 't get it done alone. 🚨 Republicans have a RAZOR-THIN majority in Congress 🚨 Democrats are BLOCKING his agenda at every turn 🚨 We need more America First FIGHTERS in the trenches If we don't hold the line--and grow our ranks--Trump 's promises will stall. WHY I 'M LEADING THIS FIGHT I'm not in Washington to play politics. I 'm here to defend our Constitution--and expose the truth. 🔻 Abolish the ATF and protect the Second Amendment 🔻 Uncover fraud and corruption through the DOGE Subcommittee 🔻 Expose Biden's swamp holdovers and demand accountability I sit on the Oversight Committee, the House Freedom Caucus, and the DOGE Subcommittee. Republican Senators quietly tried to sneak a plan into their budget bill that would’ve sold off millions of acres of public land.
It would’ve been one of the biggest public land sell-offs in modern history — handing huge parts of the West to private developers, threatening clean water, wildlife, and outdoor access for millions of people.
We stopped them this time. But let’s be clear: **they’re going to keep trying.**
Again and again, Republicans look for ways to bend the rules — not to help working families, but to help their rich friends and big donors.
Here in New Mexico, our public lands are part of who we are. From the high deserts to the pine-covered mountains, these places are home to our stories, our communities, and our way of life. They’re not for sale — **not now,_not ever._**
If we want to stop these attacks for good, we need to flip the House in 2026. That’s the only way to hold the line and protect what’s ours.
[But we can’t do it without your help. Will you chip in $10 to help us defend New Mexico’s public lands — and send a message that we’re not backing down? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111117379/556277797/1449064918?amount=10&source=SBD_GV_EM_FR_070825_PUBLICLANDS_60DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmUzNGJhMS01MTVjLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z_HA5kY5XeNmQXK40RQ6LFHkPuHLQQ4Zpx_73895Tuo=)

clean_body: Let’s be clear: they’re going to keep trying. Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | | AP NEWS: “GOP plan to sell more than 3,200 square miles of federal lands is found to violate Senate rules” = | | = Republican Senators quietly tried to sneak a plan into their budget bill that would’ve sold off millions of acres of public land. It would’ve been one of the biggest public land sell-offs in modern history — handing huge parts of the West to private developers, threatening clean water, wildlife, and outdoor access for millions of people. We stopped them this time. But let’s be clear: they’re going to keep trying. Again and again, Republicans look for ways to bend the rules — not to help working families, but to help their rich friends and big donors. Here in New Mexico, our public lands are part of who we are. From the high deserts to the pine-covered mountains, these places are home to our stories, our communities, and our way of life. They’re not for sale — not now,not ever. If we want to stop these attacks for good, we need to flip the House in 2026. That’s the only way to hold the line and protect what’s ours. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = For our lands, Team Vasquez | | | ---|---|--- = Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. name: America First War Room
subject: The High Blood Pressure Hoax
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMtuwjAQRb_G2RHZ4ycLL0pRWFStIipV6tLxoxjFJDghafr1FZSynTkz9-ia1LcxLBrJDQI4RDcgAESfEMD5c075ckwvu5WpU706i7fEr1t4vqMTPOCTNf5n877Uiz0OoibhlX-vJ_LAx6X3D_geWvpkYnudym3hNA0Os8JrIjlgIvEaFwctCXbCB0mExZypxjHaKMYUV5J608giasDAscQKKFCQpVXKBhYEMTQIigli-JZTmuRztIYM42xy7rpU2i4VrT6MYz_cxCoE1Zy78nSxrb8Mf2e2SwiquzKCakJQuY8N3_m8qDWi1a00uhX7Zh_x1qQia9fPsW3jICRi-Ov_TTFp-A0AAP__U_RuZg)
Dear Friend,

There's a catch when it comes to reducing your blood pressure.

And it's something my Aunt Carol learned the hard way.

At 67 years old, Aunt Carol happily boasted about how she'd beaten her bad blood pressure.

How'd she do it?

With FOUR prescriptions... _from her doctor_.

Not really a shocker, and not exactly the beating Aunt Carol described. Perhaps you can relate...

That's because blood pressure medications don't "cure" anything... they just delay the inevitable.

And without major changes — when you stop taking them — your blood pressure goes right back up!

Which is why your doctor advises you to never stop taking these drugs.

And if so-called "experts" and pharmaceutical companies have their way, you'll be taking these medications forever...

> • "You may need more than one type of prescription medication to keep your blood pressure at a healthy level...
>
> Follow your recommendations carefully, even if it means taking medication everyday for the rest of your life." — _The American Heart Association_
>
> • "High blood pressure cannot be cured, and if you need to take medications, you will probably need to keep taking them for life." — _Blood Pressure UK_
>
> • "In most cases, medication is needed for life." — _The Patient_

That's because they're treating your symptoms...

In fact, its a never-ending cycle of symptoms and drugs... symptoms and drugs... rinse and repeat!

All while Big Pharma executives laugh their way to the bank.

We can do better than this!

Until you [**find out how to get to the root cause of your problem**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8zsGOgjAQxvGnKTfJdAoUDj2sGvawWUPiaY9jaaUuhQoosk-_wRivM7_k_5EPrbOLYnLLEBtXjwyRiQ-GeP2Z_XC7-K_PDVW-2lyzg0_XL-5e9I5v3Gkyf9vjUi36MmYVt9_po7jzN5-WYN74FY2NJ9euV7mPaiVsDUlkFJcpApdQQNSoE-RWiyLPoBYSLD_lpBOjKeUizQwlkVMImIKEHAUKlLHOc20Tm3ESNhPAWQLPTkzeDE4TH6eZhqHvfax7H7WqmaYwPoeVDMtAZzPGwdBvR9NtoHZV690M1ujpFLp-Zli2QTAsXVebx4Z4HJrARHncMbE_ABdFWnCIBlWH2bWtGzPJEjg_V6zNu8L_AAAA__86VHDp)... you'll never have normal blood pressure.

But here's the secret they don't want you to know... You can [**get better blood pressure naturally**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8zsGOgjAQxvGnKTfJdAoUDj2sGvawWUPiaY9jaaUuhQoosk-_wRivM7_k_5EPrbOLYnLLEBtXjwyRiQ-GeP2Z_XC7-K_PDVW-2lyzg0_XL-5e9I5v3Gkyf9vjUi36MmYVt9_po7jzN5-WYN74FY2NJ9euV7mPaiVsDUlkFJcpApdQQNSoE-RWiyLPoBYSLD_lpBOjKeUizQwlkVMImIKEHAUKlLHOc20Tm3ESNhPAWQLPTkzeDE4TH6eZhqHvfax7H7WqmaYwPoeVDMtAZzPGwdBvR9NtoHZV690M1ujpFLp-Zli2QTAsXVebx4Z4HJrARHncMbE_ABdFWnCIBlWH2bWtGzPJEjg_V6zNu8L_AAAA__86VHDp) by...

• Soothing inflammation
• Relaxing blood vessels
• Reducing artery plaque
• And increasing blood circulation

Here's how to get 120/80 BP and healthy circulation... with [**4 all natural blood pressure savers...**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8zsGOgjAQxvGnKTfJdAoUDj2sGvawWUPiaY9jaaUuhQoosk-_wRivM7_k_5EPrbOLYnLLEBtXjwyRiQ-GeP2Z_XC7-K_PDVW-2lyzg0_XL-5e9I5v3Gkyf9vjUi36MmYVt9_po7jzN5-WYN74FY2NJ9euV7mPaiVsDUlkFJcpApdQQNSoE-RWiyLPoBYSLD_lpBOjKeUizQwlkVMImIKEHAUKlLHOc20Tm3ESNhPAWQLPTkzeDE4TH6eZhqHvfax7H7WqmaYwPoeVDMtAZzPGwdBvR9NtoHZV690M1ujpFLp-Zli2QTAsXVebx4Z4HJrARHncMbE_ABdFWnCIBlWH2bWtGzPJEjg_V6zNu8L_AAAA__86VHDp)

Yours for peak health,

Virginia Tims-Lawson
Founder, Peak Pure & Natural®

* It's wildly volatile
* And it burns more electricity than Argentina

name: Brent Hennrich
subject: Marie voted for MAGA’s climate bill. Then came the floods.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brent Hennrich for Washington
body:
| | [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMU_BeZcmRBr16dPjlrMKhhjiC51ataw3Peft1wIO87ITaSuLeawpW6rbFmJyQ9vjiSOU_bwyIvpZ74Ui2tiVu863ShfMSt8XbmHkqUPxvI05HWuKAcK-JUk3yim6V_49SNhqi0t9TdkDMBgqaQ8fnb-4Qs2Wq8aohnLPOS8pVLhf9YjzPHY-jA0Nn3Tmjcsv6_LKxK6boJmrmBHtUkNNExk1wwaZSW9Ga-t3g0QZovrlGv3GlRETCcOkvYG0jjtpzKGHvND5RtPKKAiQvehl0iw/4i0/hw_0elaRS9icQCO8RQPV-w/h0/h001.0hqY7l553hTahn5GBE6ls7UJa5wT9efR52GfLoxJfk0)
---
Peter,

This week, the flooding in Texas passed a grim milestone: more than 100 lives lost, including many children.

My heart is with every family mourning a loved one. As a dad to young kids, I cannot imagine the pain. But I also cannot ignore what is coming next. Because while Texas floods, hurricane season is just getting started in Florida and wildfire season is ramping up here in Washington. And the same MAGA budget cuts that just gutted Medicaid and food assistance also slashed funding for disaster relief and environmental protections. That's on top of cuts to the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration, FEMA, and wildfire mitigation. All pushed by MAGA extremists who call climate change a hoax and treat every disaster like a freak occurrence. [**Chip in now to help us hold them accountable and build a climate-safe future for every family.**](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUBRW_TcYOkliXSrHP_s9J9yIjj3U9R0szWlTrcNexqM24LbaYN4C7fTMX7cFW7LVdVTQ1kKRPr6_vC-KA9uZNGtWW9LSZ7w7d8GSHUvGWfmJqL-ZT2nnKcK3eXe7ZuTeZ8r3E8P5Jww9GVUcezyndKHzxm-ToZyVWst7ETtXfVqg-8BjqmIYmHNtpP5sbO3ZYL-4QJn25quo4XtWp4Z-heYkImokDnIATcl-oJwaS7BGokFDGVqZ9Q-rlGb7Q9DO7FCdcboaHW_gvh7jDginOZqK56OetFyHFVmEdfq3XamkKOaqWHhTyDLn3DRRmhvXD0/4i0/hw_0elaRS9icQCO8RQPV-w/h1/h001.6LyC2_FYQEXe_LVftx5vBupeV7PtPR9CFu4LoFpDbec) If it wasn't abundantly clear already, climate change is here and it is coming for every one of us. **Yet instead of standing up and fighting these attacks, my opponent Marie Gluesenkamp Perez keeps siding with the people accelerating the disaster**. She was one of just four House Democrats to vote for H.R. 1--the "Lower Energy Costs Act"--a MAGA-backed bill that slashed environmental protections, fast-tracked fossil fuel development, and gutted clean energy investments. And when Speaker Mike Johnson introduced Trump's budget full of cruel environmental and emergency response cuts, Marie did not sound the alarm. Instead, she wrote him a national op-ed promising to "throw him a bone." **You cannot say you care about the future while siding with those setting it on fire.** **This is not bipartisanship. It is complicity in every future flood, fire, and famine we fail to prevent.** If we do not stop subsidizing fossil fuels, if we do not protect our environment and invest in public safety, we are going to keep losing lives. But together, we can build something better. A government that takes climate science seriously. A Congress that does not wait for headlines or body counts to act. And a representative who will not trade your future for political optics and centrist talking points. Because this fight is not theoretical. It is happening in real time. To families in Texas, to firefighters in Washington, to children in every state left breathing smoke and drinking unsafe water. I am running to protect what we still have and fight for what we are owed. [**If that is the kind of leadership you want, pitch in today and help us rise to meet this moment.**](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUBRW_TcYOkliXSrHP_s9J9yIjj3U9R0szWlTrcNexqM24LbaYN4C7fTMX7cFW7LVdXZfuNIl3gg3EnMT0JOgI-bPhYYhdU9n67o9BdY5ashu-4S564NUCJSX69_Vt2cCbdYroHJolmvLr9J7HDYo9Ak1HHc2gYfRikaaTAq34IfvFIiNORU0Dg7k0nC7rzmVYP6xH8Bsc9lUX3J4JTW3k9JMc7uItB0k5FchBawV631Xn_-uaQB5hki6QUYkvWXkNff6YFVf6HabuEyprV5l9SraU2ZnFo2kaBMeLiVAaY6kMO1maHpLk2JwzhxsjVU5Wg/4i0/hw_0elaRS9icQCO8RQPV-w/h2/h001.inh7Nc1DcMtnseCCnw9EsjH0J8V5qRHHKITNCPScT80) Let's Heal Washington!

Brent

clean_body: | | Peter, This week, the flooding in Texas passed a grim milestone: more than 100 lives lost, including many children. My heart is with every family mourning a loved one. As a dad to young kids, I cannot imagine the pain. But I also cannot ignore what is coming next. Because while Texas floods, hurricane season is just getting started in Florida and wildfire season is ramping up here in Washington. And the same MAGA budget cuts that just gutted Medicaid and food assistance also slashed funding for disaster relief and environmental protections. That's on top of cuts to the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration, FEMA, and wildfire mitigation. All pushed by MAGA extremists who call climate change a hoax and treat every disaster like a freak occurrence. If it wasn't abundantly clear already, climate change is here and it is coming for every one of us. Yet instead of standing up and fighting these attacks, my opponent Marie Gluesenkamp Perez keeps siding with the people accelerating the disaster. She was one of just four House Democrats to vote for H.R. 1--the "Lower Energy Costs Act"--a MAGA-backed bill that slashed environmental protections, fast-tracked fossil fuel development, and gutted clean energy investments. And when Speaker Mike Johnson introduced Trump's budget full of cruel environmental and emergency response cuts, Marie did not sound the alarm. Instead, she wrote him a national op-ed promising to "throw him a bone." You cannot say you care about the future while siding with those setting it on fire. This is not bipartisanship. It is complicity in every future flood, fire, and famine we fail to prevent. If we do not stop subsidizing fossil fuels, if we do not protect our environment and invest in public safety, we are going to keep losing lives. But together, we can build something better. A government that takes climate science seriously. A Congress that does not wait for headlines or body counts to act. And a representative who will not trade your future for political optics and centrist talking points. Because this fight is not theoretical. It is happening in real time. To families in Texas, to firefighters in Washington, to children in every state left breathing smoke and drinking unsafe water. I am running to protect what we still have and fight for what we are owed. Let's Heal Washington! Brent | | Marie Gluesenkamp-Perez has betrayed Democrats and the voters of WA-3 by repeatedly voting with MAGA against women's rights, immigrants, and more. Brent Hennrich is a lifelong Washingtonian, a proud working class dad, and lifelong Democratic activist. Chip in now to help elect a Democrat ready to stand up to MAGA. | | | | Paid for by Brent Hennrich for Washington ---|--- (C)2025 Brent Hennrich for Washington, all rights reserved Our mailing address is: Brent Hennrich for Washington PO BOX 820070 Vancouver, WA 98682 We hate to see you go, but if you believe you received this email in error, or you no longer wish to receive our emails you can | | Sent via . Once you're done, we hope you'll make your inaugural contribution to elect Abigail Spanberger as Governor. | = THE STATE Virginia is the ONLY state in the nation where Democrats can flip a Governor's seat blue in 2025. Just four years ago, Republicans were elected to all three statewide offices: Governor, Lieutenant Governor, and Attorney General. Now, Trump's allies are dumping money into Virginia to keep hold of power. They know a Democratic win here would send shockwaves across the country heading into 2026. = | = THE CANDIDATES Abigail Spanberger (D) is our Democratic nominee for Governor. She's a former CIA officer and three-term Congresswoman who flipped a ruby red seat in 2018 and has fought to lower families' costs, secure our freedoms, and deliver on a common-sense agenda. Voters can trust that she'll put Virginians first and stand up to extremism. Winsome Earle-Sears (R) is the far-right Republican nominee for Governor. She's in lockstep with Trump's extreme agenda and is trying to distract voters from her record of opposing reproductive rights, voting to defund public schools, and downplaying the DOGE layoffs of Virginia workers. = | = THE RACE Experts consider our race a toss-up. body:
Expose the Autopen Conspiracy | | |
---
|
---
**Most presidencies _have_ scandals. Joe Biden's presidency _was_ a scandal.** That's the explosive revelation from a recent hearing chaired by conservative Senator**Eric Schmitt**(R-MO), this hearing exposed a constitutional crisis that should outrage every American. For four years, Biden routinely forgot the names of senior advisors and foreign leaders. He asked about deceased friends as if they were still alive. He froze up and drifted off during critical public appearances. He required stabilizing shoes because he kept falling down. And for four years, Democrats and their allies orchestrated a massive cover-up. Senator Schmitt played a damning video montage of senior Democrats brazenly lying about Biden's mental fitness. [**WATCH THE VIDEO HERE >>>**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=ca31e6edf05a4335a37f6ccc0f68e5cd&_e=jy-R2f6Fz656Kp6JYhWK9yIygxWFrT7zDNvgJ1c3gs1vE0qdvIwkaEaRZLeuRLQcEo23zZ0TMqDzAEy0mzRiXRekBymeuXDwWB9pYilaLJmrQebudVIFtVY6w3BRaiwfjo2TT6GxA9zq__cZofj-DjG_IlvVLiQvB_T0HRXCN4cFsJbaWEQkSm91byAEZRU4Clfor6jvQpaJC-T9tvzQYfw73-kpGB0BKFnPaBqrm3d3FSt-pAq_HX8jrxtKKRoiE1t47win9sQavttsGP3YNpzUVWFQraXrkbPvVWXie37tHKqUICVEN3uZEY55IKoeXlOT8p5c1VcFyeAOcv_IddlwQDI7lJEY8DPi9scf13q87l8nft5jCNSB_TdI_sKionDUpS9M2_c-vfNEJbglNg%3D%3D)

But the lying was just the beginning. The hearing revealed the outrageous abuse of President Biden's "autopen" signature machine. _A majority_ of Biden's official documents were never actually signed by the president himself. The Justice Department is now reviewing over 1,200 "signed" documents to determine if they're even legally valid. Biden's staff used the autopen even when he was physically present in Washington, D.C. Why? Because this wasn't about Biden's convenience — it was about whoever was really _calling the shots_ behind the scenes. The evidence was so damning that Judiciary Committee Democrats literally _ran away_ from the hearing room rather than face the truth. **Every Biden Policy May Be Illegal** **All of Biden's unconstitutional executive orders, his crony policies, his corrupt family pardons — they may all be completely illegal. The entire administration appears to have been a criminal conspiracy from day one.** Conservative senators didn't back down. Senator **Josh Hawley** (R-MO) demanded investigations into who was controlling the autopen. Senator **Ted Cruz** (R-TX) exposed how autopen usage suspiciously increased every year of Biden's presidency. Senator **Ashley Moody** (R-FL) connected this constitutional crisis to real-world disasters: the border invasion, the crime wave, the protection of criminals and terrorists. **We Need More Fighters in 2026** The senators who stood up during this hearing — who refused to let this scandal be buried — are exactly the kind of conservatives we need more of in Washington. That's why the Senate Conservatives Fund is going ALL-IN to support proven fighters in 2026. **Ashley Moody** is running for Senate in Florida. She's been fearless in exposing the truth about Biden's failed policies and their devastating consequences. **Roger Marshall** in Kansas, **Bill Hagerty** in Tennessee, and **Cynthia Lummis** in Wyoming are battle-tested conservatives who've never backed down from a fight. And businessman **Nate Morris** , an anti-establishment insurgent in Kentucky, is working hard to replace Mitch McConnell in the Senate. These five leaders have proven they'll stand up to the establishment, expose corruption, and fight for constitutional government. But they're facing millions in attacks from liberal donors and the DC swamp. **Here's How You Can Fight Back** The Senate Conservatives Fund makes it easy to support ALL FIVE of these conservative champions with a single contribution. We'll pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your candidate contributions directly to their campaigns. [**HELP ELECT ALL FIVE CONSERVATIVE FIGHTERS >>>**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=ca31e6edf05a4335a37f6ccc0f68e5cd&_e=jy--Okax1hHC-nfceS8gzdrvLeCtYHXzJmhnljfG5AuGg_UQDoD9Mhs8bKfdPBkYy5AuF4o8-BKA%3D%3D) **▶︎ **Support Ashley Moody's fight for Florida's Senate seat **▶︎ **Help Roger Marshall continue his conservative leadership in Kansas **▶︎ **Back Bill Hagerty's principled stand in Tennessee **▶︎ **Strengthen Cynthia Lummis's voice for Wyoming values **▶︎ **Help Nate Morris replace Mitch McConnell in Kentucky Every dollar you give goes directly to these campaigns to help them fight back against the liberal establishment and win decisive victories in 2026. The Biden cover-up proves what we've always known: the DC swamp will do anything to maintain power, even if it means shredding the Constitution. We need senators who will never stop fighting to expose the truth and restore constitutional government. **Don't let this scandal be forgotten. Don't allow it to go unpunished. name: DNC HQ
subject: Just 60 seconds →
body:
We know you’re busy, but we’ll keep this brief.
---
Hi Derek, we know you’re probably winding down for the day, so we’ll keep this short and sweet — we just need a minute of your time (literally). [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?refcode=em_20250708_3901_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3901_22930333_oG7Ae0&akid=3901%2E22930333%2EoG7Ae0) Last week, **Congressional Republicans voted to pass Trump’s horrid spending bill,** effectively sending the message that they have no problem stripping their constituents of access to health care, food assistance, and more — all to give massive tax cuts to millionaires and billionaires. [**We need your help. We’re asking you to contribute $3 to the DNC to help us fuel our fight to hold the Republicans who voted for this bill accountable.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250708_3901_fr&refcode2=3901_22930333_oG7Ae0&akid=3901%2E22930333%2EoG7Ae0) Your contribution helps us:
* Organize in every state across the country to flip the House and the Senate in 2026.
* Invest a total of $1 million every month in Democratic state parties, so they have the resources to elect Democrats at the state and local level.
* Hold the Trump administration accountable in court.

name: John Fetterman
subject: this could mean lights-out for local news stations
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
| | |
---
Hi Derek,
Trump’s at it again – this time trying to yank over **$1 billion** from the Corporation for Public Broadcasting, which supports PBS and NPR.
That’s not just some D.C. budget tweak. That’s lights-out for local stations – especially in small towns and rural communities that depend on public radio for _real news, weather alerts, and emergency info_.
He doesn’t need a single Democratic vote to pull it off. All it takes is a simple majority – and Republicans have one, just barely. But if we can convince a few of them to do the right thing, we can shut this nonsense down.
**But time’s running out. Congress has until July 18 to approve or reject the cuts. So I need to know what you think by MIDNIGHT TONIGHT.[Will you take 60 seconds to answer this quick survey?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51393?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&code=jtk163-su-fl&t=1&akid=10191%2E434096%2EWkGygM)**
| | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51393?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&code=jtk163-su-fl&t=2&akid=10191%2E434096%2EWkGygM)
---
If Trump gets his way, here’s what happens:
👉 Rural stations go dark.
👉 Emergency broadcasts vanish.
👉 “News deserts” grow – and lies spread like wildfire.
It’s a straight-up attack on truth, community, and the little guy. He's counting on folks not paying attention. Let's prove him wrong.
**[Please, let me know where you stand by taking my public broadcasting survey now.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51393?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&code=jtk163-su-fl&t=3&akid=10191%2E434096%2EWkGygM)**
Thanks, Derek,

John ❤️

It’s part of a broader pattern: Trump is rewriting what it means to be an American. subject: Susie Lee voted to crush 🇺🇸 families
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTY FOR CONGRESS**
body:
She’s lying to us and stoking fear to cover up the fact that she’s sold out to D.C. elites. | [](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=e1534085c1af476b9627bbf340f74fc0&_e=Qt5Czk_FQ_oQbMGa-1PCl7UT-jPb_kxb5NxelE6QlioAHFrNXEaTiPA5JPZ8VrxM5kWfXamh5qcwOAN7qi3IaJIN8M_XWQuT1zAG5SZZeyVN38cjQ08lZhRshYCW3xuQv8FHAdbkYg1Zc2ClTu5mPqFFZ1b08YCvHiXUriJWmcf9tkiq_yj-WlsZIjCDN3qVOfidDIUO6pyvu05sOLzMNyYX_rF11xWoyYLdfiVHIN_P_490CY5unK0fQLsn_E-LYMOvOyzhR5D-dgiNMJMv0C7G9IpH5pTiVnK_jkeNBdfNDGgJwCSbHS5gvrmnQ0SRRHnz7-DiG15hGPqfRAaxiYxzMw-0c69M6mXA2gwNZIM_-XZug7d70VX5IgkQMPvpYZOJIJrLQaA72qLejKC0eXoUg4N0cmkXjqNl-9f1ompW9wnuSKmTT418cvmd1yep0JFb0-il_fZ1Y80rFuC6ZCYtpVH1tiAl3MVzvCxb2XFbx2IqFGpAqKf_QbTbSGQ1sjta-c2ZUz-Jcz8ANUwsUSzXAxRE_rHLP9cTViSMjH09uohIa7iBciS1gLZk0EupukpTA00WXp-c8y0Mbd4ik8i7K0q56P_HRFNJ3aQEAN5VDdls7_vyW0XEohE-62WFG-GghvNSjnuMCRl55OJFBn13OsgkNrPyEB8UTUhiepIcpeFZITHnFm_mDojXXQ5Kc9IfVCGJFnmNvO_QslVrlvPaWGmquK0_Il4apY9aRqe-YG7w1Z0kXlnmU2z2eMi7)
---
Friend,

The day before Congress delivered on promises to the American people and passed the One Big Beautiful Bill, sending it to President Trump’s desk for his signature, my opponent Susie Lee had the audacity to stand on the Capitol steps and post this:

[](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=e1534085c1af476b9627bbf340f74fc0&_e=Qt5Czk_FQ_oQbMGa-1PCl7UT-jPb_kxb5NxelE6QlioAHFrNXEaTiPA5JPZ8VrxM5kWfXamh5qcwOAN7qi3IaJIN8M_XWQuT1zAG5SZZeyVN38cjQ08lZhRshYCW3xuQv8FHAdbkYg1Zc2ClTu5mPqFFZ1b08YCvHiXUriJWmcf9tkiq_yj-WlsZIjCDN3qVOfidDIUO6pyvu05sOLzMNyYX_rF11xWoyYLdfiVHIN_P_490CY5unK0fQLsn_E-LYMOvOyzhR5D-dgiNMJMv0NOU7MiEx9yrBvdNqzXQDyyT_FkPb-Fvnzd3SYWcJRVMRyIti-CdAgcFd7AsNQ81rZkHzCHV1g-aq_hE2ZTSvXEBoTBI3nWCSVpKlWS4UnkXJQhmXCSRA18zT9BhTbaYtA4pUczfqCFhyvhTSUVgX43v1spji2227OPmMkZ2sdKyS7fUSCixHsqwaCTYU5dNss_46yE18AaXFAxhAfon56gLPj4uVOitqnF67p23iCGaI4Bc0BYx0YRWDfgdtR75wwhak-MmoTAr8W8yrR3OgBz2AmGGrtfDBpjyqOwtlCGkOP4LNlQ84HPMsGupRK8sgYzk5Q_FmO6kHJgLZTCnmy_A3dOF4rdkb-UFw2K1k76OhhdsnG2U-TeaP_xnJx7l6ianCWgkvKhJt8qa4cyiHXQfsgiGSnUSa7yO3Nm9W_FujDghuW6MR4mllI9UDl2KM0o8Ctk2dKJTZvmjeyhWx03L1OgzOsDI4C-GhzD1PJwG)
**Susie Lee clearly knows nothing about courage.** It doesn’t take courage to allow violent criminals, drug lords, and human traffickers to cross unimpeded into our country.

It doesn’t take courage to make it increasingly difficult for middle-class and working American families to simply get by.
